model.edw.int_client_concerns_union.name: int_client_concerns_union
model.edw.int_client_concerns_union.raw_code:
with client_concerns_v1 as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_monday__client_concern_tracking') }}
), 
client_concerns_v2 as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_monday__client_concern_tracking_v2') }}
),
combined as (
select * from client_concerns_v2
union all
select * from client_concerns_v1
),
transform as (
select 
	*,
    case 
        when branch_location = 'COL' then 'Columbus' 
        when branch_location = 'DAY' then 'Dayton' 
        when branch_location = 'CIN' then 'Cincinnati' 
        when branch_location = 'CHL' then 'Chillicothe'
        when branch_location = 'TOL' then 'Toldeo' 
        when branch_location = 'AKR' then 'Akron' 
        when branch_location = 'CLE' then 'Cleveland'
        when branch_location = 'IND' then 'Indianapolis' 
        when branch_location = 'PIT' then 'Pittsburgh' 
    else branch_location end as branch_location_clean,
    case 
       when department = 'Electrical Service' then 'Electric'
       when department = 'Excavation' then 'Sewer'
       when department = 'HVAC Commercial Service' then 'HVAC'
       when department = 'HVAC Install' then 'HVAC'
       when department = 'HVAC Maintenance' then 'HVAC'
       when department = 'HVAC Sales' then 'HVAC'
       when department = 'HVAC Service' then 'HVAC'
       when department = 'Plumbing Install' then 'Plumbing'
       when department = 'Plumbing Install Sales' then 'Plumbing'
       when department = 'Plumbing Service' then 'Plumbing'
       when department = 'Sewer Service' then 'Sewer'
       when department ~* 'Electric' then 'Electric'
       when department ~* 'HVAC' then 'HVAC'
       when department ~* 'Plumbing' then 'Plumbing'
       when department ~* 'Sewer' then 'Sewer'
    else department
    end as department_clean
from combined
)
select 
	board_id,
	monday_row_id,
	customer,
	servicetitan_job_number,
	concern_status,
	is_follow_up_requested,
	timeframe_for_follow_up,
	concern_owner,
	employee1,
	employee2,
	employee3,
	concern_date,
	first_contact_made_at,
	resolved_at,
	resolution_due_date,
	concern_manager,
	is_ecofi_member,
	ecofi_status_after_concern,
	concern_description,
	resolution,
	type_of_concern,
	type_of_concern_main,
	sub_category,
	sub_category_main,
    branch_location_clean as branch_location,
    branch_location_clean || ' ' || department_clean as department,
	is_invoice_summary,
	is_summary_findings_present,
	is_summary_findings_clear_and_detailed,
	is_estimate_items_detailed,
	is_eco_guarentees_sku,
	has_adequite_pictures,
	refund_amount,
	damage_amount,
	is_contact_made,
	submitted_by,
	concern_timestamp,
	valid_concern,
	is_damage,
	hours_to_resolution
from transform

model.edw.int_ringcentral_agent_states_a.name: int_ringcentral_agent_states_agg_to_day
model.edw.int_ringcentral_agent_states_a.raw_code:
select 
    agent_id::text as agent_id, 
    last_name || ', ' || first_name as csr,
    state_dts::Date,
    sum(duration) as total_time,
    sum(case when UPPER("state") = 'AVAILABLE' then duration else 0 end) as available_time,
    sum(case when UPPER("state") in ('ENGAGED','TRANSITION') then duration else 0 end) as engaged_time,
    sum(case when UPPER("state") = 'AFTER CALL WORK' then duration else 0 end) as after_call_work_time,
    sum(case when UPPER("state") in ('LUNCH','ON-BREAK') then duration else 0 end) as lunch_break_time,
    sum(case when UPPER("state") in ('AWAY') then duration else 0 end) as away_time,
    sum(case when UPPER("state") in ('TRAINING') then duration else 0 end) as training_time,
    sum(case when UPPER("state") in ('QA') then duration else 0 end) as qa_time,
    sum(case when UPPER("state") in ('MEETINGS') then duration else 0 end) as meetings_time,
    sum(case when UPPER("state") in ('DISPATCHING') then duration else 0 end) as dispatching_time,
    min(state_dts) as start_time,
    max(state_dts) as end_time,
    sum(case when not UPPER("state") in ('LUNCH','ON-BREAK','MEETINGS','TRAINING','QA','DISPATCHING') then duration else 0 end) as total_adjusted_available_time,
    sum(case when UPPER("state") in ('ENGAGED','TRANSITION','AFTER CALL WORK') then duration else 0 end) as total_working_call_time,
    sum(case when UPPER("state") in ('ENGAGED','TRANSITION','AFTER CALL WORK') then duration else 0 end) as total_productive_time
from
    {{ ref("stg_ringcentral_rpt__agent_states") }} rascrr 
group by 1,2,3
order by 1,2,3

model.edw.int_ringcentral_calls_categori.name: int_ringcentral_calls_categories
model.edw.int_ringcentral_calls_categori.raw_code:
with
call_detail as (
    select *
    from {{ ref('stg_ringcentral_rpt__call_detail') }}
),
add_call_types as (
select 
    cd.*,
    coalesce(source_name,'Other') as route,
    coalesce(
            case when source_name ~ 'New Appointment' then 'New'
                 when source_name ~ 'Emergency' then 'Emergency'
                 when source_name ~ 'Existing' then 'Existing'
                 when source_name ~ 'Care Plan' then 'Care Plan'
                 when source_name ~ 'Member' then 'Care Plan'
                 when source_name ~ 'Relationship' then 'Relationship Managers'
                 when dial_type = 'MANUAL-DIAL' or source_name ~ 'Manual Outbound' then 'Outbound'
            else 'Other'
            end,
            'Other'
    ) as route_group,
    coalesce(connected_name, 'None') as csr_name,
    call_result in ('CONNECTED') and call_duration > 0 as is_accepted,
    call_result in ('ABANDON') as is_abandoned,
    call_result in ('ABANDON') and call_duration <= {{ var('short_abandon_duration') }} as is_short_abandoned,
    call_result in ('CONNECTED') and call_duration <= {{ var('short_abandon_duration') }} as is_short_call,
    call_result in ('DEFLECTED') as is_deflected,
    dial_type in ('MANUAL-DIAL') as is_outbound,
    dial_type in ('MANUAL-DIAL') and call_duration = 0 as is_outbound_unconnected,
    dial_type in ('INBOUND-CALLBACK') as is_inbound_callback,
    (call_result in ('CONNECTED','ABANDON') -- Standard Calls 
        or (call_status in ('INTERNAL-APP-HANDOFF','QUEUE-TRANSFERRED'))) -- Internal Calls
        and not (call_result in ('ABANDON') and call_duration <= {{ var('short_abandon_duration') }}) -- Remove Short Abandons
    as is_sla_qualifying_call,
    call_result in ('CONNECTED') and queue_time <= {{ var('sla_duration') }} as is_sla_success,
    call_result in ('CONNECTED')
        and connected_duration < 10 
        and call_term_party = 'SYSTEM' 
        and call_term_reason = 'DROP' 
    as is_dropped
from call_detail as cd
)
select 
    add_call_types.*,
    route_group in ('New','Care Plan','Emergency') as is_priority_route
from add_call_types
model.edw.int_ringcentral_calls_categori.compiled_code:
with
call_detail as (

    from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_ringcentral_rpt__call_detail"
),
add_call_types as (

                 when source_name ~ 'Emergency' then 'Emergency'
                 when source_name ~ 'Existing' then 'Existing'
                 when source_name ~ 'Care Plan' then 'Care Plan'
                 when source_name ~ 'Member' then 'Care Plan'
                 when source_name ~ 'Relationship' then 'Relationship Managers'
                 when dial_type = 'MANUAL-DIAL' or source_name ~ 'Manual Outbound' then 'Outbound'
            else 'Other'
            end,
            'Other'
    ) as route_group,
    coalesce(connected_name, 'None') as csr_name,
    call_result in ('CONNECTED') and call_duration > 0 as is_accepted,
    call_result in ('ABANDON') as is_abandoned,
    call_result in ('ABANDON') and call_duration <= 30 as is_short_abandoned,
    call_result in ('CONNECTED') and call_duration <= 30 as is_short_call,
    call_result in ('DEFLECTED') as is_deflected,
    dial_type in ('MANUAL-DIAL') as is_outbound,
    dial_type in ('MANUAL-DIAL') and call_duration = 0 as is_outbound_unconnected,
    dial_type in ('INBOUND-CALLBACK') as is_inbound_callback,
    (call_result in ('CONNECTED','ABANDON') -- Standard Calls 
        or (call_status in ('INTERNAL-APP-HANDOFF','QUEUE-TRANSFERRED'))) -- Internal Calls
        and not (call_result in ('ABANDON') and call_duration <= 30) -- Remove Short Abandons
    as is_sla_qualifying_call,
    call_result in ('CONNECTED') and queue_time <= 30 as is_sla_success,
    call_result in ('CONNECTED')
        and connected_duration < 10 
        and call_term_party = 'SYSTEM' 
        and call_term_reason = 'DROP' 
    as is_dropped
from call_detail as cd
)
select 
    add_call_types.*,
    route_group in ('New','Care Plan','Emergency') as is_priority_route
from add_call_types

model.edw.int_scheduler_sessions.name: int_scheduler_sessions
model.edw.int_scheduler_sessions.raw_code:
with sessions as (
    select 
        s.session_id,
        s.scheduler_id,
        s.job_id,
        s.customer_id,
        s.customer_phone,
        s.customer_email,
        s.customer_first_name,
        s.customer_last_name,
        s.customer_address,
        s.category,
        s.job_type_id,
        s.business_unit_id,
        s.zone_id,
        s.outcome,
        s.booked_from,
        s.landing_page_url,
        s.gclid,
        s.created_on_est
    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__schedulers_sessions') }} s 
    where s.created_on_est >= current_date - 180
)
select * from sessions

model.edw.int_servicetitan_available_tec.name: int_servicetitan_available_techs_by_department
model.edw.int_servicetitan_available_tec.raw_code:
with
technician_shifts as (
    select distinct on (technician_id, started_on_est::date)
        technician_id,
        started_on_est::date as start_date,
        ended_on_est - started_on_est as duration
    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__dispatch_technician_shifts') }}
    where 1=1
        and tenant_id = '119741958'
        and active
),
grey_bars as (
    select 
        technician_id,
        started_on_est::date as start_date,
        sum(duration::interval) as time_off_duration
    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__dispatch_non_job_appointments') }}
    where active
        and tenant_id = '119741958'
    group by 1,2
),
technician_settings as (
    select 
        tech.technician_id,
        tech.technician_name,
        tech.active,
        bu.business_unit
    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__settings_technicians') }} tech
    left join {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__business_units') }} bu
        on bu.business_unit_id = tech.business_unit_id
),
technician_performance as (
        select distinct on (technician_name,data_start_date::date)
            technician_name,
            technician_business_unit,
            data_start_date::date as data_date
        from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_rpt__technician_performance') }}
        where data_timeframe = 'YST'
            and data_start_date = data_end_date
        order by technician_name,data_start_date::date, completed_jobs
),
technician_business_unit_by_date as (
	select
		ts.technician_id,
		tp.technician_name,
		tp.technician_business_unit,
		tp.data_date
	from
		technician_performance tp
	left join technician_settings ts
		on tp.technician_name = ts.technician_name
),
true_technician_shifts as (
    select 
        ts.technician_id,
        ts.start_date,
        tbub.technician_name,
        coalesce(tbub.technician_business_unit, settings.business_unit) as technician_business_unit,
        ts.duration - coalesce(gb.time_off_duration, '00:00:00'::interval) as working_duration,
        case when ts.duration - coalesce(gb.time_off_duration, '00:00:00'::interval) > '02:00:00'::interval then 1 else 0 end as is_working
    from technician_shifts ts
    left join grey_bars gb
        on ts.technician_id = gb.technician_id
        and ts.start_date = gb.start_date
    left join technician_business_unit_by_date tbub
        on tbub.technician_id = ts.technician_id 
        and tbub.data_date = ts.start_date
    left join technician_settings settings
        on ts.technician_id = settings.technician_id
    where settings.active
)
select 
    start_date as date,
    technician_business_unit, 
    sum(working_duration) as total_available_hours, 
    count(distinct case when is_working = 1 then technician_id else null end) as total_available_technicians,
    case when count(distinct case when is_working = 1 then technician_id else null end) = 0 then sum('00:00:00'::interval) else sum(working_duration)/count(distinct case when is_working = 1 then technician_id else null end) end as hours_per_tech
from true_technician_shifts
group by 1,2

from true_technician_shifts
group by 1,2

model.edw.int_servicetitan_calls_by_busi.name: int_servicetitan_calls_by_business_unit_by_day
model.edw.int_servicetitan_calls_by_busi.raw_code:
with calls_by_unit_and_date as (
	select 
		business_unit as job_business_unit,
		case when status in ('Completed','Canceled') then completion_date::date
         when last_appt_date is not null then last_appt_date::date
         else scheduled_date::date
        end::Date as reporting_date,
		sum(case when {{ is_working_status("status") }} and {{ is_new_opportunity("tags") }} then 1 else 0 end) as total_calls
	from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_rpt__jobs') }}
	where 1=1 
	group by 1,2
	order by 2 desc
),
average_called_by_dow as (
	select 
		job_business_unit,
        reporting_date,
		EXTRACT(DOW from reporting_date) as reporting_DOW,
		total_calls
	from calls_by_unit_and_date
)
select
	*
from average_called_by_dow dow
model.edw.int_servicetitan_calls_by_busi.compiled_code:
with calls_by_unit_and_date as (
	select 
		business_unit as job_business_unit,
		case when status in ('Completed','Canceled') then completion_date::date
         when last_appt_date is not null then last_appt_date::date
         else scheduled_date::date
        end::Date as reporting_date,
		sum(case when 
    "status" in ('Completed', 'Scheduled','Dispatched','Working','In Progress')
 and 
    CASE
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%1R%%'::text THEN '1R'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%1N%%'::text THEN '1N'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%1SPP%%'::text THEN '1SPP'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%2N%%'::text THEN '2N'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%2R%%'::text THEN '1R'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%2SPP%%'::text THEN '2SPP'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%3N%%'::text THEN '3N'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%3R%%'::text THEN '3R'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%3SPP%%'::text THEN '3SPP'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%4N%%'::text THEN '4N'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%4R%%'::text THEN '4R'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%4SPP%%'::text THEN '4SPP'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%HV N%%'::text THEN 'HV N'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%HV R%%'::text THEN 'HV R'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%ER N%%'::text THEN 'ER N'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%ER R%%'::text THEN 'ER R'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%NE N%%'::text THEN 'NE N'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%NE R%%'::text THEN 'NE R'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%Lead Turn-Over%%'::text THEN 'Lead Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%Lead Turnover%%'::text THEN 'Lead Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN "tags" ~~ '%%Trade Turnover%%'::text THEN 'Trade Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN lower("tags") ~~ '%%maintenance%%'::text THEN 'Maintenance'::text
          ELSE NULL
          end  IS NOT NULL 
 then 1 else 0 end) as total_calls
	from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_rpt__jobs"
	where 1=1 
	group by 1,2
	order by 2 desc
),
average_called_by_dow as (
	select 
		job_business_unit,
        reporting_date,
		EXTRACT(DOW from reporting_date) as reporting_DOW,
		total_calls
	from calls_by_unit_and_date
)

	*
from average_called_by_dow dow

model.edw.int_servicetitan_call_types_ba.name: int_servicetitan_call_types_base
model.edw.int_servicetitan_call_types_ba.raw_code:
with
calls as (
    select *
    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__calls') }}
)
select 
	created_on_est::date as call_date,
	sum(case when call_direction = 'Inbound' and (call_type = 'Booked') then 1 else 0 end) as leads,
	sum(case when call_direction = 'Inbound' and extract(epoch from call_duration::time) > 60 and call_type <>'Booked' and call_type <>'Unbooked' and call_type <> 'Excused' and call_type <> 'NotLead' then 1 else 0 end) as missed_calls
from calls
group by 1
order by 1

model.edw.int_servicetitan_call_types_ma.name: int_servicetitan_call_types_manual
model.edw.int_servicetitan_call_types_ma.raw_code:
with
jobs as (
    select *
    from {{ ref("jobs") }}
),
calls as (
    select *
    from {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__calls") }}
)
select 
	dj.created_on_est::date as manual_date, 
    sum(case when is_new_opportunity = true then 1 else 0 end) as manual_jobs
from jobs dj
left join calls
	on calls.job_id = dj.job_id
    and dj.created_by_name = calls.agent_name
    and dj.created_on_est::timestamp > calls.created_on_est::timestamp
where calls.call_id is null
and job_type not in ('To-Do', 'Warranty', 'Scheduled Inspection')
and job_type not like '%%Install%%'
and job_type not like '%%Recall%%'
and case when dj."campaign_name" ~ 'GoogleLocalServices Integration' or dj."campaign_name" ~ 'SCHEDULE Engine- DAY' or dj."campaign_name" ~ 'SCHEDULE Engine COL' or dj.is_lto_set=1 then False else True end
and dj.created_by_name <> 'None'
and job_status <> 'Canceled'
group by 1
order by 1 desc

model.edw.int_zoom_agent_states_agg_to_d.name: int_zoom_agent_states_agg_to_day
model.edw.int_zoom_agent_states_agg_to_d.raw_code:
/*
status_name	sub_status_name
Not Ready	Away
Not Ready	Break
Not Ready	Client Concern
Not Ready	End Shift
Not Ready	Forced
Not Ready	Meal
Not Ready	Meeting
Not Ready	QA
Not Ready	Training
Occupied	Holding
Occupied	Inbound
Occupied	Outbound
Occupied	Wrapping up
Offline	[NULL]
Ready	Idle
Ready	Ringing
*/

select 
    user_id::text as agent_id, 
    display_name as csr,
    start_time_est::date as state_dts,
    sum(duration) as total_time,
    sum(case when ("status_name") in ('Ready') then duration else 0 end) as available_time,
    sum(case when ("status_name") in ('Occupied') then duration else 0 end) as engaged_time,
    sum(case when ("sub_status_name") = 'Wrapping up' then duration else 0 end) as after_call_work_time,
    sum(case when ("sub_status_name") in ('Meal','Break') then duration else 0 end) as lunch_break_time,
    sum(case when ("sub_status_name") in ('Away') then duration else 0 end) as away_time,
    sum(case when ("sub_status_name") in ('Training') then duration else 0 end) as training_time,
    sum(case when ("sub_status_name") in ('QA') then duration else 0 end) as qa_time,
    sum(case when ("sub_status_name") in ('Meeting') then duration else 0 end) as meetings_time,
    sum(case when ("sub_status_name") in ('Client Concern') then duration else 0 end) as dispatching_time,
    min(start_time_est) as start_time,
    max(end_time_est) as end_time,
    sum(case when ("status_name") in ('Ready', 'Occupied') then duration else 0 end) as total_adjusted_available_time,
    sum(case when ("status_name") in ('Occupied') then duration else 0 end) as total_working_call_time,
    sum(case when ("status_name") in ('Occupied') or ("sub_status_name") in  ('Wrapping up', 'Client Concern','Training','Meeting','QA') then duration else 0 end) as total_productive_time
from
    {{ ref("stg_zoom__contact_center_agents_status_history_data") }} rascrr 
group by 1,2,3
order by 1,2,3

model.edw.int_zoom_contact_center_calls_.name: int_zoom_contact_center_calls_categories
model.edw.int_zoom_contact_center_calls_.raw_code:
with 
queues as (
     select * from {{ ref('int_zoom_contact_center_vc_queues_to_engagement_id') }}
),
var_queue_names as (
    select * from {{ ref('int_zoom_vars_queuename_to_engagement') }}
),
agents as (
    select * from {{ ref('int_zoom_contact_center_vc_agents_to_engagement_id') }}
),
engagements as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_zoom__contact_center_engagements_data') }}
),
calls as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_zoom__contact_center_voice_calls_data') }}
),
call_detail as (
    select
        c.*,
        e.start_time_est as engagment_start_time_est,
        e.end_time_est as engagement_end_time_est,
        e.duration as engagement_duration,
        e.flow_duration + e.waiting_duration as queue_duration,
        e.talk_duration as talk_duration,
        e.wrap_up_duration,
        q.queue_id,
        q.queue_name,
        a.user_id,
        a.agent_name,
        -- Transformation for joining multiple queue_names
        case when vqn.queue_name = 'New' then 'New Appointments'
             when vqn.queue_name = 'OtherInquiries' then 'Other Inquiry'
             when vqn.queue_name = 'Existing' then 'Existing Appointments'
             when vqn.queue_name = 'EcoFi' then 'EcoFi Member'
             when vqn.queue_name =  'AnsweringService' then 'Answering Service'
             when vqn.queue_name in ('Broccoli') then 'AI CSR'
             else q.queue_name
        end as var_queue_name
    from calls as  c
    left join engagements as e
    on  c.engagement_id = e.engagement_id
    left join queues as q
    on  c.engagement_id = q.voice_calls_id
    left join agents as a
    on  c.engagement_id = a.voice_calls_id
    left join var_queue_names as vqn
    on  c.engagement_id = vqn.engagement_id
),
add_call_types as (
select 
    cd.*,
    coalesce(var_queue_name, queue_name,'Other') as route,
    coalesce(
            case         
                 when var_queue_name ~ 'New Appointment' then 'New'
                 when var_queue_name ~ 'Emergency' then 'Emergency'
                 when var_queue_name ~ 'Existing' then 'Existing'
                 when var_queue_name ~ 'Care Plan' then 'Care Plan'
                 when var_queue_name ~ 'Member' then 'Care Plan'
                 when var_queue_name ~ 'Relationship' then 'Relationship Managers'
                 when var_queue_name ~ 'AI CSR' then 'AI CSR'
                 when direction = 'outbound' then 'Outbound'
            else 'Other'
            end,
            'Other'
    ) as route_group,
    coalesce(agent_name, 'None') as csr_name,
    -- Adding in  logic b/c some AI calls are overflowed but not all overflowed calls are AI calls and we want the AI calls to be accepted
    (result in ('completed','long_calls','short_calls','hang_up_calls') 
        or (result = 'overflowed' and queue_name not in ('AI Transfers', 'Other Inquiry'))) and total_duration > 0 as is_accepted, 
    result in ('short_abandoned', 'long_abandoned', 'hold_abandoned','abandon_quit','overflowed_to_disconnect') as is_abandoned,
    result in ('short_abandoned') or total_duration <= 10 as is_short_abandoned,
    result in ('short_calls') as is_short_call,
    result in ('declined', 'callback_abandoned_by_consumer') as is_deflected,
    result in ('overflowed_to_inbox', 'overflowed', 'overflowed_to_disconnect') as is_overflowed,
    direction = 'outbound' as is_outbound,
    direction = 'outbound' and total_duration = 0 as is_outbound_unconnected,
    false as is_inbound_callback, -- Not applicable in Zoom or TODO: find a way to get this
    false as is_dropped -- Not applicable in Zoom or TODO: find a way to get this
from call_detail as cd
)
select 
    add_call_types.*,
    (is_accepted and not is_short_abandoned) as is_sla_qualifying_call, -- Need to Add Queue Duration
    is_accepted and queue_duration <= {{ var('sla_duration') }} as is_sla_success,
    route_group in ('New','Care Plan','Emergency','AI CSR') as is_priority_route
from add_call_types

    result in ('short_abandoned', 'long_abandoned', 'hold_abandoned','abandon_quit','overflowed_to_disconnect') as is_abandoned,

    false as is_inbound_callback, -- Not applicable in Zoom or TODO: find a way to get this
    false as is_dropped -- Not applicable in Zoom or TODO: find a way to get this
from call_detail as cd
)
select 
    add_call_types.*,
    (is_accepted and not is_short_abandoned) as is_sla_qualifying_call, -- Need to Add Queue Duration
    is_accepted and queue_duration <= 30 as is_sla_success,
    route_group in ('New','Care Plan','Emergency','AI CSR') as is_priority_route
from add_call_types

model.edw.int_zoom_contact_center_vc_age.name: int_zoom_contact_center_vc_agents_to_engagement_id
model.edw.int_zoom_contact_center_vc_age.raw_code:
with 
agents as (
        select * from {{ref("stg_zoom__contact_center_voice_calls_agents")}}
),
rank_agents as (
    select *,
        count(*) over (partition by voice_calls_id) as agent_count,
        row_number() over (partition by voice_calls_id order by user_id desc) as rn
    from agents
)
select
    voice_calls_id,
    user_id,
    agent_name
from rank_agents
where rn = 1

model.edw.int_zoom_vars_queuename_to_eng.name: int_zoom_vars_queuename_to_engagement
model.edw.int_zoom_vars_queuename_to_eng.raw_code:
with queue_names as (
    select *,
    -- rank engagement by created_at to ensure we get the last variable_value use a window function
    -- this is important because the engagement_id is not unique in the variable_logs table
    row_number() over (partition by engagement_id order by created_at_est desc) as "rank"
    from {{ ref('stg_zoom__contact_center_variable_logs_data') }}
    where variable_name = 'QueueName'
)
select
    engagement_id,
    variable_value as queue_name
from
    queue_names
where variable_value is not null
and "rank" = 1

    ]
) }}

customer_data as (

),
customer_contact as (

        distinct customer_id,
        array_to_string(array_remove(ARRAY_AGG(case when "type" = 'MobilePhone' or "type" = 'Phone' then value end), null), ', ') as phone_number,
        array_to_string(array_remove(ARRAY_AGG(case when "type" = 'Email' then value end), null), ', ') as email

)
select

    cd.created_on,

    cd.modified_on,
    cd.merged_to_id,
    concat(cd.address_street, ' ', cd.address_unit, ', ', cd.address_city, ', ', cd.address_state, ' ', cd.address_zip) as "address",
    cd.address_street,
    cd.address_unit,
    cd.address_city,
    cd.address_zip,
    cd.address_country,
    cd.address_latitude,
    cd.address_longitude,
    cc.phone_number,
    cc.email
from
    customer_data cd
left JOIN
    customer_contact cc
    ON cc.customer_id = cd.crm_customer_id

model.edw.int_customers_add_attributes.name: int_customers_add_attributes
model.edw.int_customers_add_attributes.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['customer_id']}
    ]
) }}

-- Eventually this will be moved to dbt model(s)
with
customers as (
    SELECT 
        * 
    FROM 
        {{ ref('int_customers') }}
    ),
invoices as (
    select 
    	*
    from {{ ref('int_invoices_aggregated_to_customer') }}
),
jobs as (
    select 
    	*
    from {{ ref('int_jobs_add_attributes_stage_2') }}
),
members as (
    SELECT
        *
    FROM
        {{ ref('int_memberships_aggregated_to_customer') }} as mem
    WHERE
        last_membership_end_date > current_date - 1
),
job_order_all as (
    select 
    	jobs.*,
    	row_number() over (partition by customer_id order by created_on_est) as customer_job_order,
        case 
            when jobs.trade_line_type in ('Plumbing','Management','Sewer') then 'Plumbing'
            when jobs.trade_line_type in ('HVAC') then 'HVAC'
            when jobs.trade_line_type in ('Electric') then 'Electric'
            end as trade
    from jobs
),
job_order_completed as (
    select 
        jobs.job_id,
        row_number() over (partition by customer_id order by created_on_est) as customer_job_completed_order
    from jobs
    where job_status = 'Completed'
),
job_order_paid as (
    select 
        jobs.job_id,
        row_number() over (partition by customer_id order by created_on_est) as customer_job_paid_order
    from jobs
    where job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0
),
job_order as (
    select 
        job_order_all.*,
        job_order_completed.customer_job_completed_order,
        job_order_paid.customer_job_paid_order
    from job_order_all
    left join job_order_completed on job_order_all.job_id = job_order_completed.job_id
    left join job_order_paid on job_order_all.job_id = job_order_paid.job_id
),
jobs_to_customers as (
    select
        customer_id as customer_id_from_jobs,
        -- Dates
        -- Booked
        min(created_on_est::date) as first_booked_job,
        max(created_on_est::date) as last_booked_job,
        current_date - max(created_on_est::date) as days_since_first_job,
        current_date - min(created_on_est::date) as days_since_last_job,
        max(case when customer_job_order = 2 then created_on_est::date end) - max(case when customer_job_order = 1 then created_on_est::date end) as days_from_booked_1_to_2,
        -- array_agg(distinct extract(year from created_on_est::date)) as booked_job_years,

        -- Completed
        min(case when job_status = 'Completed' then completed_on_est::date end) as first_completed_job,
        max(case when job_status = 'Completed' then completed_on_est::date end) as last_completed_job,
        current_date - min(case when job_status = 'Completed' then completed_on_est::date end) as days_since_first_completed_job,
        current_date - max(case when job_status = 'Completed' then completed_on_est::date end) as days_since_last_completed_job,
        max(case when customer_job_completed_order = 2 then completed_on_est::date end) - max(case when customer_job_completed_order = 1 then completed_on_est::date end) as days_from_completed_1_to_2,
        -- array_agg(distinct case when job_status = 'Completed' then extract(year from completed_on_est::date) end) as completed_job_years,

        -- Paid
        min(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then completed_on_est::date end) as first_paid_job,
        max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then completed_on_est::date end) as last_paid_job,
        current_date - min(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then completed_on_est::date end) as days_since_first_paid_job,
        current_date - max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then completed_on_est::date end) as days_since_last_paid_job,
        max(case when customer_job_paid_order = 2 then completed_on_est::date end) - max(case when customer_job_paid_order = 1 then completed_on_est::date end) as days_from_paid_1_to_2,
        -- array_agg(distinct case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then extract(year from completed_on_est::date) end) as paid_job_years,

        -- Location
        max(case when customer_job_completed_order = 1 then location else 'No Completed Jobs' end) as first_location,
        max(case when customer_job_completed_order = 1 and location = 'Columbus' then 1 else 0 end) as is_columbus_first_customer,
        max(case when customer_job_completed_order = 1 and location = 'Dayton' then 1 else 0 end) as is_dayton_first_customer,
        max(case when customer_job_completed_order = 1 and location = 'Cincinnati' then 1 else 0 end) as is_cincinnati_first_customer,
        max(case when customer_job_completed_order = 1 and location = 'Chillicothe' then 1 else 0 end) as is_chillicothe_first_customer,
        --
        max(case when location = 'Columbus' and job_status = 'Completed' then 1 else 0 end) as is_columbus_customer,
        max(case when location = 'Dayton' and job_status = 'Completed' then 1 else 0 end) as is_dayton_customer,
        max(case when location = 'Cincinnati' and job_status = 'Completed' then 1 else 0 end) as is_cincinnati_customer,
        max(case when location = 'Chillicothe' and job_status = 'Completed' then 1 else 0 end) as is_chillicothe_customer,

        -- Overall
        count(job_id) as lifetime_jobs,
        sum(case when job_status = 'Completed' then 1 else 0 end) as lifetime_completed_jobs,
        sum(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as lifetime_paid_jobs,

        sum(case when job_status = 'Completed' then revenue else 0 end) as lifetime_revenue,
        
        count(distinct case when revenue > 0 then trade end) as trades_used,
        count(distinct case when revenue > 0 then location end) as locations_used,
        -- First Job
        max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and customer_job_completed_order = 1 and jobs.trade in ('Plumbing') then 1 else 0 end) as plumbing_customer_first,
        max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and customer_job_completed_order = 1 and jobs.trade in ('HVAC') then 1 else 0 end) as hvac_customer_first,
        max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and customer_job_completed_order = 1 and jobs.trade in ('Electric') then 1 else 0 end) as electric_customer_first,
        -- Any Customer
        max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Plumbing') then 1 else 0 end) as plumbing_customer,
        max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('HVAC') then 1 else 0 end) as hvac_customer,
        max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Electric') then 1 else 0 end) as electric_customer,
        -- Jobs
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Plumbing') then job_id end) as plumbing_jobs,
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('HVAC') then job_id end) as hvac_jobs,
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Electric') then job_id end) as electric_jobs,
        -- Paid Jobs
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 and jobs.trade in ('Plumbing') then job_id end) as plumbing_paid_jobs,
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 and jobs.trade in ('HVAC') then job_id end) as hvac_paid_jobs,
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 and jobs.trade in ('Electric') then job_id end) as electric_paid_jobs,
        -- Trade Revenues
        sum(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Plumbing') then revenue else 0 end) as plumbing_lifetime_revenue,
        sum(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('HVAC') then revenue else 0 end) as hvac_lifetime_revenue,
        sum(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Electric') then revenue else 0 end) as electric_lifetime_revenue,
        -- Large Ticekts
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 5000 then job_id end) as high_value_jobs,
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Plumbing') and revenue > 5000 then job_id end) as plumbing_high_value_jobs,
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('HVAC') and revenue > 5000 then job_id end) as hvac_high_value_jobs,
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Electric') and revenue > 5000 then job_id end) as electric_high_value_jobs,
        -- Rebooks
        count(case when jobs.is_rebook = True then jobs.job_id end) as lifetime_rebooks,
        count(case when jobs.is_rebook = True and jobs.tags LIKE '%Double Rebook%' then jobs.job_id end) as lifetime_double_rebooks,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM avg(coalesce(next_appointment_date, last_appointment_end_date) - created_on_est)::interval) / 86400 as avg_waiting_days,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM avg(case when jobs.is_rebook = True then coalesce(next_appointment_date, last_appointment_end_date) - created_on_est else Null end)::interval) / 86400 as avg_rebooked_waiting_days
    from 
        job_order jobs
    group by 
        customer_id
),
customer_segmentation_all as (
select 
    customers.*,
    case when lifetime_jobs > 1 then (last_booked_job - first_booked_job)::numeric / (lifetime_jobs::numeric - 1) end as avg_days_between_booked_jobs,
    case when lifetime_completed_jobs > 1 then (last_completed_job - first_completed_job)::numeric / (lifetime_completed_jobs::numeric - 1) end as avg_days_between_completed_jobs,
    case when lifetime_paid_jobs > 1 then (last_paid_job - first_paid_job)::numeric / (lifetime_paid_jobs::numeric - 1) end as avg_days_between_paid_jobs,
    -- Trades
    case when trades_used > 1 then 1 else 0 end is_multi_trade,
    -- Repeats
    case when lifetime_paid_jobs > 1 then 1 else 0 end as is_repeat_customer,
    case when plumbing_paid_jobs > 1 then 1 else 0 end as is_repeat_plumbing_customer,
    case when hvac_paid_jobs > 1 then 1 else 0 end as is_repeat_hvac_customer,
    case when electric_paid_jobs > 1 then 1 else 0 end as is_repeat_electric_customer,
    -- Others
    case when hvac_high_value_jobs > 0  then 1 else 0 end as is_hvac_high_value_customer,
    case when hvac_high_value_jobs > 0 and plumbing_customer_first = 1 then 1 else 0 end as is_hvac_high_value_plumbing_first_customer,
    -- Memberships
    case when members.active_memberships > 0 then 1 else 0 end as is_member,
    members.first_membership_start_date,
    members.recent_membership_sold_by_business_unit,
    members.recent_membership_sold_by_name,
    members.recent_membership_sold_by_billing_frequency,
    current_date - members.first_membership_start_date::date as days_since_first_membership
from jobs_to_customers customers
left join members 
    on customers.customer_id_from_jobs = members.customer_id 
),
paying_customers as (
    select 
        customer_id_from_jobs,
        percent_rank() over (order by lifetime_revenue) as percentile_lifetime_revenue
    from customer_segmentation_all
    where lifetime_revenue > 0
),
customer_segmentation as (
    select 
        customer_segmentation_all.*,
        paying_customers.percentile_lifetime_revenue
    from customer_segmentation_all
    left join paying_customers 
        on customer_segmentation_all.customer_id_from_jobs = paying_customers.customer_id_from_jobs
),
segmentation_attributes as (
select 
    customer_segmentation.*,
    case when percentile_lifetime_revenue is null then '0. No Revenue (0%)'   
         when percentile_lifetime_revenue <= 0.2 then '1. Bottom Decile (0-20%)'
         when percentile_lifetime_revenue <= 0.4 then '2. Second Decile (20-40%)'
         when percentile_lifetime_revenue <= 0.6 then '3. Third Decile (40-60%)'
         when percentile_lifetime_revenue <= 0.8 then '4. Fourth Decile (60-80%)'
         when percentile_lifetime_revenue <= 1.0 then '5. Top Decile (80-100%)'
        else 'Unknown'
    end as lifetime_revenue_segment,
    case when days_since_last_paid_job <= 365 then '1. Active (0-1 year)'
         when days_since_last_paid_job <= 730 then '2. Lapsed (1-2 years)'
         when days_since_last_paid_job <= 1095 then '3. Dormant (2-3 years)'
         when days_since_last_paid_job <= 1460 then '4. Inactive (3-4 years)'
         when days_since_last_paid_job <= 1825 then '5. Lost (4-5 years)'
         when days_since_last_paid_job > 1825 then '6. Inactive (5+ years)'
         when days_since_last_paid_job is null then '7. No Jobs'
        else 'Unknown'
    end as paid_recency_segment,   
    case when days_since_first_paid_job <= 365 then '1. New (0-1 year)'
         when days_since_first_paid_job <= 730 then '2. Young (1-2 years)'
         when days_since_first_paid_job <= 1095 then '3. Established (2-3 years)'
         when days_since_first_paid_job <= 1460 then '4. Mature (3-4 years)'
         when days_since_first_paid_job <= 1825 then '5. Old (4-5 years)'
         when days_since_first_paid_job > 1825 then '6. Ancient (5+ years)'
         when days_since_first_paid_job is null then '7. No Jobs'
        else 'Unknown'
    end as paid_tenure_segment, 
    case when days_since_last_completed_job <= 365 then '1. Active (0-1 year)'
         when days_since_last_completed_job <= 730 then '2. Lapsed (1-2 years)'
         when days_since_last_completed_job <= 1095 then '3. Dormant (2-3 years)'
         when days_since_last_completed_job <= 1460 then '4. Inactive (3-4 years)'
         when days_since_last_completed_job <= 1825 then '5. Lost (4-5 years)'
         when days_since_last_completed_job > 1825 then '6. Inactive (5+ years)'
         when days_since_last_completed_job is null then '7. No Jobs'
        else 'Unknown'
    end as completed_recency_segment,   
    case when days_since_first_completed_job <= 365 then '1. New (0-1 year)'
         when days_since_first_completed_job <= 730 then '2. Young (1-2 years)'
         when days_since_first_completed_job <= 1095 then '3. Established (2-3 years)'
         when days_since_first_completed_job <= 1460 then '4. Mature (3-4 years)'
         when days_since_first_completed_job <= 1825 then '5. Old (4-5 years)'
         when days_since_first_completed_job > 1825 then '6. Ancient (5+ years)'
         when days_since_first_completed_job is null then '7. No Jobs'
        else 'Unknown'
    end as completed_tenure_segment, 
    case when avg_days_between_completed_jobs <= 30 then '1. Very Frequent (0-30 days)'
         when avg_days_between_completed_jobs <= 60 then '2. Frequent (30-60 days)'
         when avg_days_between_completed_jobs <= 90 then '3. Regular (60-90 days)'
         when avg_days_between_completed_jobs <= 120 then '4. Infrequent (90-120 days)'
         when avg_days_between_completed_jobs <= 150 then '5. Rare (120-150 days)'
         when avg_days_between_completed_jobs > 150 then '6. Very Rare (150+ days)'
         when avg_days_between_completed_jobs is null then '7. No Completed Jobs'
        else 'Unknown'
    end as frequency_segment,
    case when days_since_first_membership <= 365 then '1. New (0-1 year)'
         when days_since_first_membership <= 730 then '2. Young (1-2 years)'
         when days_since_first_membership <= 1095 then '3. Established (2-3 years)'
         when days_since_first_membership <= 1460 then '4. Mature (3-4 years)'
         when days_since_first_membership <= 1825 then '5. Old (4-5 years)'
         when days_since_first_membership > 1825 then '6. Ancient (5+ years)'
         when days_since_first_membership is null then '7. No Membership'
        else 'Unknown'
    end as membership_tenure_segment,
    case when days_since_first_membership <= 365 and lifetime_paid_jobs = 1 then '1. New Member Single Purchase (0-1 year)'
         when days_since_first_membership <= 365 and lifetime_paid_jobs > 1 then '2. New Member Repeat Purchases (0-1 year)'
         when days_since_first_membership > 365 and lifetime_paid_jobs = 1 then '3. Established Member Single Purchase (1+ year)'
         when days_since_first_membership > 365 and lifetime_paid_jobs > 1 then '4. Established Member Repeat Purchases (1+ year)'
         when days_since_first_membership >= 0 and lifetime_paid_jobs = 0 then '5. Membership No Completed Jobs' 
         when days_since_first_membership is null then '6. No Membership'
         else 'Unknown'
    end as membership_segment,
    extract(year from first_booked_job) as start_year,
    extract(year from last_booked_job) as end_year,
    extract(year from first_membership_start_date) as memberships_year,
    -- Customer Location Exculsivity
    case when locations_used > 1 and trades_used = 1 then '9. Multi-Location Single-Trade'
         when locations_used > 1 and trades_used > 1 then '10. Multi-Location Multi-Trade' 
         when is_columbus_customer = 1 and trades_used = 1 then '1. Columbus Single-Trade'
         when is_dayton_customer = 1 and trades_used = 1 then '2. Dayton Single-Trade'
         when is_cincinnati_customer = 1 and trades_used = 1 then '3. Cincinnati Single-Trade'
         when is_chillicothe_customer = 1 and trades_used = 1 then '4. Chillicothe Single-Trade'
         when is_columbus_customer = 1 and trades_used > 1 then '5. Columbus Multi-Trade'
         when is_dayton_customer = 1 and trades_used > 1 then '6. Dayton Multi-Trade'
         when is_cincinnati_customer = 1 and trades_used > 1 then '7. Cincinnati Multi-Trade'
         when is_chillicothe_customer = 1 and trades_used > 1 then '8. Chillicothe Multi-Trade'
         else '11. Other'
    end as location_exclusivity,
    true as last_col
from customer_segmentation
)
select 
	customers.customer_id,
    customers.name,
    customers.address,
    customers.email,
    customers.phone_number,
    segmentation_attributes.*,
    invoices.hvac_eco_installed_count,
    invoices.hvac_eco_installed_on
from customers
left join segmentation_attributes
on customers.customer_id = segmentation_attributes.customer_id_from_jobs
left join invoices
on customers.customer_id = invoices.customer_id

        current_date - min(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then completed_on_est::date end) as days_since_first_paid_job,
        current_date - max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then completed_on_est::date end) as days_since_last_paid_job,
        max(case when customer_job_paid_order = 2 then completed_on_est::date end) - max(case when customer_job_paid_order = 1 then completed_on_est::date end) as days_from_paid_1_to_2,
        -- array_agg(distinct case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then extract(year from completed_on_est::date) end) as paid_job_years,

        -- Location
        max(case when customer_job_completed_order = 1 then location else 'No Completed Jobs' end) as first_location,
        max(case when customer_job_completed_order = 1 and location = 'Columbus' then 1 else 0 end) as is_columbus_first_customer,
        max(case when customer_job_completed_order = 1 and location = 'Dayton' then 1 else 0 end) as is_dayton_first_customer,
        max(case when customer_job_completed_order = 1 and location = 'Cincinnati' then 1 else 0 end) as is_cincinnati_first_customer,
        max(case when customer_job_completed_order = 1 and location = 'Chillicothe' then 1 else 0 end) as is_chillicothe_first_customer,
        --
        max(case when location = 'Columbus' and job_status = 'Completed' then 1 else 0 end) as is_columbus_customer,
        max(case when location = 'Dayton' and job_status = 'Completed' then 1 else 0 end) as is_dayton_customer,
        max(case when location = 'Cincinnati' and job_status = 'Completed' then 1 else 0 end) as is_cincinnati_customer,
        max(case when location = 'Chillicothe' and job_status = 'Completed' then 1 else 0 end) as is_chillicothe_customer,

        -- Overall
        count(job_id) as lifetime_jobs,
        sum(case when job_status = 'Completed' then 1 else 0 end) as lifetime_completed_jobs,
        sum(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as lifetime_paid_jobs,

        sum(case when job_status = 'Completed' then revenue else 0 end) as lifetime_revenue,
        
        count(distinct case when revenue > 0 then trade end) as trades_used,
        count(distinct case when revenue > 0 then location end) as locations_used,
        -- First Job
        max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and customer_job_completed_order = 1 and jobs.trade in ('Plumbing') then 1 else 0 end) as plumbing_customer_first,
        max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and customer_job_completed_order = 1 and jobs.trade in ('HVAC') then 1 else 0 end) as hvac_customer_first,
        max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and customer_job_completed_order = 1 and jobs.trade in ('Electric') then 1 else 0 end) as electric_customer_first,
        -- Any Customer
        max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Plumbing') then 1 else 0 end) as plumbing_customer,
        max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('HVAC') then 1 else 0 end) as hvac_customer,
        max(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Electric') then 1 else 0 end) as electric_customer,
        -- Jobs
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Plumbing') then job_id end) as plumbing_jobs,
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('HVAC') then job_id end) as hvac_jobs,
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Electric') then job_id end) as electric_jobs,
        -- Paid Jobs
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 and jobs.trade in ('Plumbing') then job_id end) as plumbing_paid_jobs,
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 and jobs.trade in ('HVAC') then job_id end) as hvac_paid_jobs,
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 and jobs.trade in ('Electric') then job_id end) as electric_paid_jobs,
        -- Trade Revenues
        sum(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Plumbing') then revenue else 0 end) as plumbing_lifetime_revenue,
        sum(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('HVAC') then revenue else 0 end) as hvac_lifetime_revenue,
        sum(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Electric') then revenue else 0 end) as electric_lifetime_revenue,
        -- Large Ticekts
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 5000 then job_id end) as high_value_jobs,
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Plumbing') and revenue > 5000 then job_id end) as plumbing_high_value_jobs,
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('HVAC') and revenue > 5000 then job_id end) as hvac_high_value_jobs,
        count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and jobs.trade in ('Electric') and revenue > 5000 then job_id end) as electric_high_value_jobs,
        -- Rebooks
        count(case when jobs.is_rebook = True then jobs.job_id end) as lifetime_rebooks,
        count(case when jobs.is_rebook = True and jobs.tags LIKE '%Double Rebook%' then jobs.job_id end) as lifetime_double_rebooks,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM avg(coalesce(next_appointment_date, last_appointment_end_date) - created_on_est)::interval) / 86400 as avg_waiting_days,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM avg(case when jobs.is_rebook = True then coalesce(next_appointment_date, last_appointment_end_date) - created_on_est else Null end)::interval) / 86400 as avg_rebooked_waiting_days
    from 
        job_order jobs
    group by 
        customer_id
),
customer_segmentation_all as (
select 
    customers.*,
    case when lifetime_jobs > 1 then (last_booked_job - first_booked_job)::numeric / (lifetime_jobs::numeric - 1) end as avg_days_between_booked_jobs,
    case when lifetime_completed_jobs > 1 then (last_completed_job - first_completed_job)::numeric / (lifetime_completed_jobs::numeric - 1) end as avg_days_between_completed_jobs,
    case when lifetime_paid_jobs > 1 then (last_paid_job - first_paid_job)::numeric / (lifetime_paid_jobs::numeric - 1) end as avg_days_between_paid_jobs,
    -- Trades
    case when trades_used > 1 then 1 else 0 end is_multi_trade,
    -- Repeats
    case when lifetime_paid_jobs > 1 then 1 else 0 end as is_repeat_customer,
    case when plumbing_paid_jobs > 1 then 1 else 0 end as is_repeat_plumbing_customer,
    case when hvac_paid_jobs > 1 then 1 else 0 end as is_repeat_hvac_customer,
    case when electric_paid_jobs > 1 then 1 else 0 end as is_repeat_electric_customer,
    -- Others
    case when hvac_high_value_jobs > 0  then 1 else 0 end as is_hvac_high_value_customer,
    case when hvac_high_value_jobs > 0 and plumbing_customer_first = 1 then 1 else 0 end as is_hvac_high_value_plumbing_first_customer,
    -- Memberships
    case when members.active_memberships > 0 then 1 else 0 end as is_member,
    members.first_membership_start_date,
    members.recent_membership_sold_by_business_unit,
    members.recent_membership_sold_by_name,
    members.recent_membership_sold_by_billing_frequency,
    current_date - members.first_membership_start_date::date as days_since_first_membership
from jobs_to_customers customers
left join members 
    on customers.customer_id_from_jobs = members.customer_id 
),
paying_customers as (
    select 
        customer_id_from_jobs,
        percent_rank() over (order by lifetime_revenue) as percentile_lifetime_revenue
    from customer_segmentation_all
    where lifetime_revenue > 0
),
customer_segmentation as (
    select 
        customer_segmentation_all.*,
        paying_customers.percentile_lifetime_revenue
    from customer_segmentation_all
    left join paying_customers 
        on customer_segmentation_all.customer_id_from_jobs = paying_customers.customer_id_from_jobs
),
segmentation_attributes as (
select 
    customer_segmentation.*,
    case when percentile_lifetime_revenue is null then '0. No Revenue (0%)'   
         when percentile_lifetime_revenue <= 0.2 then '1. Bottom Decile (0-20%)'
         when percentile_lifetime_revenue <= 0.4 then '2. Second Decile (20-40%)'
         when percentile_lifetime_revenue <= 0.6 then '3. Third Decile (40-60%)'
         when percentile_lifetime_revenue <= 0.8 then '4. Fourth Decile (60-80%)'
         when percentile_lifetime_revenue <= 1.0 then '5. Top Decile (80-100%)'
        else 'Unknown'
    end as lifetime_revenue_segment,
    case when days_since_last_paid_job <= 365 then '1. Active (0-1 year)'
         when days_since_last_paid_job <= 730 then '2. Lapsed (1-2 years)'
         when days_since_last_paid_job <= 1095 then '3. Dormant (2-3 years)'
         when days_since_last_paid_job <= 1460 then '4. Inactive (3-4 years)'
         when days_since_last_paid_job <= 1825 then '5. Lost (4-5 years)'
         when days_since_last_paid_job > 1825 then '6. Inactive (5+ years)'
         when days_since_last_paid_job is null then '7. No Jobs'
        else 'Unknown'
    end as paid_recency_segment,   
    case when days_since_first_paid_job <= 365 then '1. New (0-1 year)'
         when days_since_first_paid_job <= 730 then '2. Young (1-2 years)'
         when days_since_first_paid_job <= 1095 then '3. Established (2-3 years)'
         when days_since_first_paid_job <= 1460 then '4. Mature (3-4 years)'
         when days_since_first_paid_job <= 1825 then '5. Old (4-5 years)'
         when days_since_first_paid_job > 1825 then '6. Ancient (5+ years)'
         when days_since_first_paid_job is null then '7. No Jobs'
        else 'Unknown'
    end as paid_tenure_segment, 
    case when days_since_last_completed_job <= 365 then '1. Active (0-1 year)'
         when days_since_last_completed_job <= 730 then '2. Lapsed (1-2 years)'
         when days_since_last_completed_job <= 1095 then '3. Dormant (2-3 years)'
         when days_since_last_completed_job <= 1460 then '4. Inactive (3-4 years)'
         when days_since_last_completed_job <= 1825 then '5. Lost (4-5 years)'
         when days_since_last_completed_job > 1825 then '6. Inactive (5+ years)'
         when days_since_last_completed_job is null then '7. No Jobs'
        else 'Unknown'
    end as completed_recency_segment,   
    case when days_since_first_completed_job <= 365 then '1. New (0-1 year)'
         when days_since_first_completed_job <= 730 then '2. Young (1-2 years)'
         when days_since_first_completed_job <= 1095 then '3. Established (2-3 years)'
         when days_since_first_completed_job <= 1460 then '4. Mature (3-4 years)'
         when days_since_first_completed_job <= 1825 then '5. Old (4-5 years)'
         when days_since_first_completed_job > 1825 then '6. Ancient (5+ years)'
         when days_since_first_completed_job is null then '7. No Jobs'
        else 'Unknown'
    end as completed_tenure_segment, 
    case when avg_days_between_completed_jobs <= 30 then '1. Very Frequent (0-30 days)'
         when avg_days_between_completed_jobs <= 60 then '2. Frequent (30-60 days)'
         when avg_days_between_completed_jobs <= 90 then '3. Regular (60-90 days)'
         when avg_days_between_completed_jobs <= 120 then '4. Infrequent (90-120 days)'
         when avg_days_between_completed_jobs <= 150 then '5. Rare (120-150 days)'
         when avg_days_between_completed_jobs > 150 then '6. Very Rare (150+ days)'
         when avg_days_between_completed_jobs is null then '7. No Completed Jobs'
        else 'Unknown'
    end as frequency_segment,
    case when days_since_first_membership <= 365 then '1. New (0-1 year)'
         when days_since_first_membership <= 730 then '2. Young (1-2 years)'
         when days_since_first_membership <= 1095 then '3. Established (2-3 years)'
         when days_since_first_membership <= 1460 then '4. Mature (3-4 years)'
         when days_since_first_membership <= 1825 then '5. Old (4-5 years)'
         when days_since_first_membership > 1825 then '6. Ancient (5+ years)'
         when days_since_first_membership is null then '7. No Membership'
        else 'Unknown'
    end as membership_tenure_segment,
    case when days_since_first_membership <= 365 and lifetime_paid_jobs = 1 then '1. New Member Single Purchase (0-1 year)'
         when days_since_first_membership <= 365 and lifetime_paid_jobs > 1 then '2. New Member Repeat Purchases (0-1 year)'
         when days_since_first_membership > 365 and lifetime_paid_jobs = 1 then '3. Established Member Single Purchase (1+ year)'
         when days_since_first_membership > 365 and lifetime_paid_jobs > 1 then '4. Established Member Repeat Purchases (1+ year)'
         when days_since_first_membership >= 0 and lifetime_paid_jobs = 0 then '5. Membership No Completed Jobs' 
         when days_since_first_membership is null then '6. No Membership'
         else 'Unknown'
    end as membership_segment,
    extract(year from first_booked_job) as start_year,
    extract(year from last_booked_job) as end_year,
    extract(year from first_membership_start_date) as memberships_year,
    -- Customer Location Exculsivity
    case when locations_used > 1 and trades_used = 1 then '9. Multi-Location Single-Trade'
         when locations_used > 1 and trades_used > 1 then '10. Multi-Location Multi-Trade' 
         when is_columbus_customer = 1 and trades_used = 1 then '1. Columbus Single-Trade'
         when is_dayton_customer = 1 and trades_used = 1 then '2. Dayton Single-Trade'
         when is_cincinnati_customer = 1 and trades_used = 1 then '3. Cincinnati Single-Trade'
         when is_chillicothe_customer = 1 and trades_used = 1 then '4. Chillicothe Single-Trade'
         when is_columbus_customer = 1 and trades_used > 1 then '5. Columbus Multi-Trade'
         when is_dayton_customer = 1 and trades_used > 1 then '6. Dayton Multi-Trade'
         when is_cincinnati_customer = 1 and trades_used > 1 then '7. Cincinnati Multi-Trade'
         when is_chillicothe_customer = 1 and trades_used > 1 then '8. Chillicothe Multi-Trade'
         else '11. Other'
    end as location_exclusivity,
    true as last_col
from customer_segmentation
)
select 
	customers.customer_id,
    customers.name,
    customers.address,
    customers.email,
    customers.phone_number,
    segmentation_attributes.*,
    invoices.hvac_eco_installed_count,
    invoices.hvac_eco_installed_on
from customers
left join segmentation_attributes
on customers.customer_id = segmentation_attributes.customer_id_from_jobs
left join invoices
on customers.customer_id = invoices.customer_id

model.edw.int_equipment_aggregated_to_cu.name: int_equipment_aggregated_to_customer
model.edw.int_equipment_aggregated_to_cu.raw_code:
with equipment_data as (
    select 
        * 
    from {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__installed_equipment") }}
    where is_active
),
equipment_types as (
    select 
        equipment_data.*,
        case 
            when name ~* 'Condenser|Air|Condenser|Furnace|AC|Evaporator|Stage|A/C|Heater|Coil' 
                or memo ~* 'Condenser|Air|Condenser|Furnace|AC|Evaporator|A/C|Heater|Coil' 
                or type_id in (238093282,238094163,241445843,278807044,278812364,278812780,354280410,354280412,354280414,354280425,354280444,354280445)
                then true
            else false
        end as is_hvac_unit,
        case
            when name ~* 'Gallon|Water|Boiler|Tankless'
                or type_id in (13427743,14978260,354280406,354280416)
            then true
            else false
        end as is_wh_unit
    from equipment_data
),
customer_agg as (
    select 
        customer_id,
        count(*) as equipment_count,
        bool_or(is_hvac_unit) as has_hvac_unit,
        sum(case when is_hvac_unit then 1 else 0 end) as hvac_unit_records,
        max(case when is_hvac_unit then installed_on_est else null end) as hvac_installed_on,
        max(case when is_hvac_unit then predicted_replacement_date else null end) as hvac_replacement_date,
        min(case when is_hvac_unit then current_date - installed_on_est else null end) as recent_hvac_age,
        bool_or(is_wh_unit) as has_wh_unit,
        sum(case when is_wh_unit then 1 else 0 end) as wh_unit_records,
        max(case when is_wh_unit then installed_on_est else null end) as wh_installed_on,
        max(case when is_wh_unit then predicted_replacement_date else null end) as wh_replacement_date,
        min(case when is_wh_unit then current_date - installed_on_est else null end) as recent_wh_age
    from equipment_types
    group by customer_id
)
select 
    * 
from customer_agg

model.edw.int_invoices_aggregated_to_cus.name: int_invoices_aggregated_to_customer
model.edw.int_invoices_aggregated_to_cus.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['customer_id']}
    ]
) }}
with invoice_items as (
    select
        *
    from
        {{ ref("int_invoices_add_attributes") }}
    where 1=1
)
select
	customer_id,
    sum(CASE 
        WHEN (invoice_item_cross_sale_groups ~* 'HVAC' and invoice_item_cross_sale_groups ~* 'Install|Replac') THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END) as hvac_eco_installed_count,
    max(CASE 
        WHEN (invoice_item_cross_sale_groups ~* 'HVAC' and invoice_item_cross_sale_groups ~* 'Install|Replac') THEN completed_on_est
        ELSE Null
    END) as hvac_eco_installed_on
from invoice_items
group by 1
model.edw.int_invoices_aggregated_to_cus.compiled_code:
with invoice_items as (
    select
        *
    from
        "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_invoices_add_attributes"

)
select
	customer_id,
    sum(CASE 
        WHEN (invoice_item_cross_sale_groups ~* 'HVAC' and invoice_item_cross_sale_groups ~* 'Install|Replac') THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END) as hvac_eco_installed_count,
    max(CASE 
        WHEN (invoice_item_cross_sale_groups ~* 'HVAC' and invoice_item_cross_sale_groups ~* 'Install|Replac') THEN completed_on_est
        ELSE Null
    END) as hvac_eco_installed_on
from invoice_items

model.edw.int_maintenance_aggregated_to_.name: int_maintenance_aggregated_to_customer
model.edw.int_maintenance_aggregated_to_.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['customer_id']}
    ]
) }}

with maintenance_jobs as (
    select
        customer_id,
        completed_on_est,
        trade_line_type,
        tags,
        job_type,
        service_lead_type
    from
        {{ ref("int_jobs_add_attributes") }}
    where job_status = 'Completed'
    and (job_type ~* 'HVAC - Membership|Maintenance' or service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' or tags ~* 'MAINTENANCE')
)
select
	customer_id,
	max(case when trade_line_type = 'Plumbing' then completed_on_est::date else null end) as last_plumbing_maintenance_on,
    max(case when trade_line_type = 'Sewer' then completed_on_est::date else null end) as last_sewer_maintenance_on,
	max(case when trade_line_type = 'HVAC' then completed_on_est::date else null end) as last_hvac_maintenance_on,
	max(case when trade_line_type = 'Electric' then completed_on_est::date else null end) as last_electrical_maintenance_on,
	max(completed_on_est::date) as last_maintenance_on,
	sum(case when trade_line_type = 'Plumbing' then 1 else 0 end) as total_plumbing_maintenances,
    sum(case when trade_line_type = 'Sewer' then 1 else 0 end) as total_sewer_maintenances,
	sum(case when trade_line_type = 'HVAC' then 1 else 0 end) as total_hvac_maintenances,
	sum(case when trade_line_type = 'Electric' then 1 else 0 end) as total_electrical_maintenances,
	sum(case when trade_line_type = 'Plumbing' and DATE_TRUNC('year', completed_on_est) = DATE_TRUNC('year', current_date) then 1 else 0 end) as total_plumbing_maintenances_this_year,
    sum(case when trade_line_type = 'Sewer' and DATE_TRUNC('year', completed_on_est) = DATE_TRUNC('year', current_date) then 1 else 0 end) as total_sewer_maintenances_this_year,
	sum(case when trade_line_type = 'HVAC' and DATE_TRUNC('year', completed_on_est) = DATE_TRUNC('year', current_date) then 1 else 0 end) as total_hvac_maintenances_this_year,
	sum(case when trade_line_type = 'Electric' and DATE_TRUNC('year', completed_on_est) = DATE_TRUNC('year', current_date) then 1 else 0 end) as total_electrical_maintenances_this_year
from maintenance_jobs
group by 1

	max(case when trade_line_type = 'Electric' then completed_on_est::date else null end) as last_electrical_maintenance_on,

	sum(case when trade_line_type = 'Plumbing' then 1 else 0 end) as total_plumbing_maintenances,

	sum(case when trade_line_type = 'HVAC' then 1 else 0 end) as total_hvac_maintenances,
	sum(case when trade_line_type = 'Electric' then 1 else 0 end) as total_electrical_maintenances,
	sum(case when trade_line_type = 'Plumbing' and DATE_TRUNC('year', completed_on_est) = DATE_TRUNC('year', current_date) then 1 else 0 end) as total_plumbing_maintenances_this_year,
    sum(case when trade_line_type = 'Sewer' and DATE_TRUNC('year', completed_on_est) = DATE_TRUNC('year', current_date) then 1 else 0 end) as total_sewer_maintenances_this_year,
	sum(case when trade_line_type = 'HVAC' and DATE_TRUNC('year', completed_on_est) = DATE_TRUNC('year', current_date) then 1 else 0 end) as total_hvac_maintenances_this_year,
	sum(case when trade_line_type = 'Electric' and DATE_TRUNC('year', completed_on_est) = DATE_TRUNC('year', current_date) then 1 else 0 end) as total_electrical_maintenances_this_year
from maintenance_jobs
group by 1

model.edw.int_audit_trail_jobs_by_tod.name: int_audit_trail_jobs_by_tod
model.edw.int_audit_trail_jobs_by_tod.raw_code:
--join jobs onto audits to calculate based on actions performed and job tags successfully added

with audit_base as (
    select * 
    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_rpt__office_audit_trail') }}
),
job_base as (
    select *
    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_rpt__jobs') }}
)
select 
    ab.date::date as audit_date,
    ab.name as audit_user,
    ab.time,
    ab.action_type as audit_action_type,
    ab.action_performed as audit_action_performed,
    case
        when ab.action_performed like '%🌞%' then 'Morning Update'
        when ab.action_performed like '%🌜%' then 'Evening Update'
        when ab.action_performed like '%History Verified%' then 'History Check'
        when ab.action_performed like '%CFI%' then 'CFI'
        when ab.action_performed like '%Dispatch Audited%' then 'Dispatch Audited'
        when ab.action_performed like '%NEXT STOP%' then 'Next Stop'
        when ab.action_performed like '%Quality Review%' then 'Quality Review'
        when ab.action_performed like '%REBOOKED%' then 'Rebooked'
        when ab.action_performed like '%Double Rebook%' then 'Rebooked'
        when ab.action_performed ilike '%booked the job%' then 'Booked the Job'
        else 'Other'
    end as action_type,
    case 
        when ab.action_performed like '%added%' then 1
        when ab.action_performed like '%removed%' then -1
        else 0 
    end as action_value,
    case
        when lower(action_performed) ~~ '%%completed the job%%' then 1
        else 0
    end as job_completion_action,
    jb.job_id,
    jb.job_type,
    jb.business_unit as job_business_unit,
    jb.status,
    jb.dispatched_by,
    jb.tags as job_tags,
    case
        when ecoplumbers.isreturningcustomertag(jb.tags) is not null then jb.job_id
    end as return_customer_tag,
    case
        when jb.tags like '%History Verified%' and ecoplumbers.isreturningcustomertag(jb.tags) is not null then jb.job_id
    end as job_history_verified,
    jb.scheduled_date::date as job_scheduled_date
from audit_base ab
left join job_base jb
    on ab."job_id"=jb."job_id"

model.edw.int_audit_trail_to_rebooks.name: int_audit_trail_to_rebooks
model.edw.int_audit_trail_to_rebooks.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['rebook_job_id']}
    ]
) }}

with audit_base as (
    select * 
    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_rpt__office_audit_trail') }}
),
audit_log_to_rebooks AS (
SELECT
	job_id,
	count(*) AS action_count,
	max(date::date + CASE 
		WHEN time ILIKE '%AM' OR time ILIKE '%PM' THEN 
			make_time(
				CASE 
					WHEN time ILIKE '%PM' AND split_part(time, ':', 1)::int != 12 THEN split_part(time, ':', 1)::int + 12
					WHEN time ILIKE '%AM' AND split_part(time, ':', 1)::int = 12 THEN 0
					ELSE split_part(time, ':', 1)::int
				END,
				regexp_replace(split_part(time, ':', 2), '[^0-9]', '', 'g')::int,
				0
			)
		ELSE (time::time)
	END) AS last_action_datetime,
	max(name) AS rebooked_by,
	sum(CASE WHEN action_performed ~* 'added' THEN 1 ELSE -1 end) AS rebooked
FROM
	audit_base
WHERE action_performed ~ 'REBOOKED'
GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
	job_id as rebook_job_id,
	rebooked_by,
	last_action_datetime::date AS rebook_date,
	last_action_datetime::time AS rebook_time
FROM
	audit_log_to_rebooks
WHERE
	rebooked = 1

model.edw.int_timesheet_to_technician_ac.name: int_timesheet_to_technician_activity
model.edw.int_timesheet_to_technician_ac.raw_code:
-- simple timesheet dataset
with base as (
    select *
    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_rpt__timesheets')}}
)
select 
    timesheet_name,
    business_unit,
    team,
    timesheet_activity_date::date,
    CASE 
        WHEN start_time ILIKE '%AM' OR start_time ILIKE '%PM' THEN 
            make_time(
                CASE 
                    WHEN start_time ILIKE '%PM' AND split_part(start_time, ':', 1)::int != 12 THEN split_part(start_time, ':', 1)::int + 12
                    WHEN start_time ILIKE '%AM' AND split_part(start_time, ':', 1)::int = 12 THEN 0
                    ELSE split_part(start_time, ':', 1)::int
                END,
                regexp_replace(split_part(start_time, ':', 2), '[^0-9]', '', 'g')::int,
                0
            )
        ELSE (start_time::time)
    END as start_time,
    CASE 
        WHEN end_time ILIKE '%AM' OR end_time ILIKE '%PM' THEN 
            make_time(
                CASE 
                    WHEN end_time ILIKE '%PM' AND split_part(end_time, ':', 1)::int != 12 THEN split_part(end_time, ':', 1)::int + 12
                    WHEN end_time ILIKE '%AM' AND split_part(end_time, ':', 1)::int = 12 THEN 0
                    ELSE split_part(end_time, ':', 1)::int
                END,
                regexp_replace(split_part(end_time, ':', 2), '[^0-9]', '', 'g')::int,
                0
            )
        ELSE (end_time::time)
    END as end_time,
    coalesce(job_id, 0) as job_id,
    sum(duration_decimal) as total_time,
    sum(case when paid_event then duration_decimal end) as paid_time,
    sum(case when timesheet_activity = 'Idle' then duration_decimal else 0 end) as idle_time
from base
group by 1,2,3,4,5,6,7

model.edw.int_zones_to_bu.name: int_zones_to_bu
model.edw.int_zones_to_bu.raw_code:
with zone_bu as (
select
	zone_id,
	zone_name,
	TRIM(unnest(STRING_TO_ARRAY(SUBSTRING("business_units" FROM 2 FOR LENGTH("business_units") - 2),','))) as business_unit_id
from {{ref("stg_servicetitan_api__zones") }} as z
where active
) 
select 
	zone_id,
	zone_name,
	business_unit_id::int,
	dd."branch" 
from zone_bu
left join {{ref("stg_ecoplumbers__departments")}} dd 
on zone_bu.business_unit_id = dd.servicetitan_business_unit_id

model.edw.int_zones_to_zip.name: int_zones_to_zip
model.edw.int_zones_to_zip.raw_code:
WITH zones AS (
SELECT
	tenant_id,
	id AS zone_id,
	"name" AS "zone_name",
	string_to_array(replace(replace(replace(zips, '[', ''), ']', ''), '''', ''), ', ') AS zips_array,
	string_to_array(replace(replace(replace("businessUnits", '[', ''), ']', ''), '''', ''), ', ') AS bu_array
FROM 
	servicetitan.api_v2_dispatch_zones avdz 
WHERE active
),
unnest_zips AS (
SELECT 
	tenant_id,
	zone_id,
	zone_name,
	bu_array,
	UNNEST(zips_array) AS zip
FROM zones
),
unnest_bu AS (
SELECT
	tenant_id,
	zone_id,
	zone_name,
	zip,
	UNNEST(bu_array) AS bu
FROM unnest_zips
),
add_branch AS (
SELECT z.*, branch
FROM unnest_bu AS z
LEFT JOIN edw2.stg_ecoplumbers__departments d ON z.bu = d.servicetitan_business_unit_id 
)
SELECT DISTINCT
	tenant_id, zone_id, zone_name, zip, branch
FROM add_branch
ORDER BY 
	branch, tenant_id, zone_id

model.edw.int_zoom_call_logs.name: int_zoom_call_logs
model.edw.int_zoom_call_logs.raw_code:
with call_history as (
    SELECT
        *, coalesce(callee_email, caller_email) as owner_email
    FROM
        {{ ref('stg_zoom__call_history') }}
),
call_queues as (
    SELECT
        *
    FROM
        {{ ref('stg_zoom__call_queue') }}
),
user_call_history as (
    select
        *
    from {{ref('stg_zoom__user_call_history')}}
),
accepted_user_call_history as (
    select
        call_id,
        caller_name,
        caller_email,
        caller_ext_id,
        callee_name as accepted_by,
        callee_email as accepted_by_email,
        callee_ext_id,
        answer_time,
        department as accepted_by_department,
        operator_name as queue_name,
        operator_ext_id as queue_ext_id,
        result
    from user_call_history
    where result in ('answered', 'connected')
),
call_window as (
    select
        *,
        row_number() over (partition by call_id order by date_time desc) as rn,
        bool_or(result = 'answered') over (partition by call_id) as has_answered
    from user_call_history
),
rejected_user_call_history as (
    -- Get 1 row from the last queue per call_id where all of the rows are not answered
    select
        call_id,
        operator_name as queue_name,
        operator_ext_id as queue_ext_id,
        result
    from call_window
    where rn = 1 and not has_answered
),
users as (
    select
        *
    from {{ ref('stg_zoom__users') }}
),
full_logs as (
    select
        ch.call_history_id,
        ch.date_time::timestamp,
        ch.direction,
        ch.call_result,
        auch.accepted_by as user_accepted_by,
        auch.accepted_by_email as user_accepted_by_email,
        auch.accepted_by_department as user_accepted_by_dept,
        auch.answer_time as user_answer_time,
        coalesce(auch.queue_name, ruch.queue_name) as queue_name,
        coalesce(auch.queue_ext_id, ruch.queue_ext_id) as queue_ext_id,
        coalesce(auch.result, ruch.result, ch.call_result) as result,
        auch.result as accepted_result,
        ruch.result as rejected_result,
        cq.extension_number as queue_extension_number,
        cq.phone_number as queue_phone_number,
        cq.queue_status as queue_status,
        ch.international,
        ch.department,
        ch.duration,
        ch.call_path_id,
        ch.call_id,
        ch.connect_type,
        ch.call_type,
        ch.hide_caller_id,
        ch.caller_name,
        ch.caller_did_number,
        ch.caller_number_type,
        ch.caller_country_iso_code,
        ch.caller_country_code,
        ch.callee_ext_id,
        ch.callee_name,
        ch.callee_did_number,
        ch.callee_ext_number,
        ch.callee_ext_type,
        ch.callee_number_type,
        ch.callee_country_iso_code,
        ch.callee_country_code,
        ch.end_to_end,
        ch.answer_time,
        ch.end_time,
        ch.recording_status,
        ch.callee_email,
        ch.callee_device_type,
        ch.caller_ext_id,
        ch.caller_email,
        ch.caller_ext_number,
        ch.caller_ext_type,
        ch.caller_device_type,
        ch.group_id,
        o.email as owner_email,
        o.user_department as owner_department,
        o.name as owner_name,
        o.extension_id as owner_extension_id,
        o.extension_number as owner_extension_number
    from
        call_history ch
    left join
        accepted_user_call_history auch --Accepted calls
        on ch."call_id" = auch."call_id"
    left join
        rejected_user_call_history ruch --Rejected calls from queue
        on ch."call_id" = ruch."call_id"
        and ch.callee_ext_type in ('auto_receptionist', 'call_queue')
    left join
        call_queues cq --Queue details
        on cq.extension_id = coalesce(auch.queue_ext_id, ruch.queue_ext_id)
    left join 
        users o --Define owner and get details
        on o.extension_id = coalesce(ch.callee_ext_id, ch.caller_ext_id, auch.callee_ext_id, auch.caller_ext_id)
)
select
    *,
    extract(epoch from (user_answer_time - date_time)) as queue_time,
    extract(epoch from (end_time - user_answer_time)) as connected_duration,
    extract(epoch from (end_time - date_time)) as call_duration
from
    full_logs

        on o.extension_id = coalesce(ch.callee_ext_id, ch.caller_ext_id, auch.callee_ext_id, auch.caller_ext_id)
)
select
    *,
    extract(epoch from (user_answer_time - date_time)) as queue_time,
    extract(epoch from (end_time - user_answer_time)) as connected_duration,
    extract(epoch from (end_time - date_time)) as call_duration
from
    full_logs
