model.edw.int_applied_payments_to_invoic.name: int_applied_payments_to_invoice
model.edw.int_applied_payments_to_invoic.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['invoice_id']}
    ]
) }}
with
    applied_to as (select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__payments_appliedto') }}),
    payments as (select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__payments') }}),
    applied as (
        select payment_id, invoice_id, sum("applied_amount") as applied_payments
        from applied_to as avapa
        group by 1, 2
    ),
    invoices as (
        select
            applied.payment_id,
            applied.invoice_id,
            applied.applied_payments,
            pmt.payment_type,
            case
                when
                    pmt.payment_type in (
                        'ACH',
                        'Cash',
                        'Check - Deposit Later',
                        'Check - Key In',
                        'Check - Mobile Capture',
                        'Groupon ACH',
                        'Mobile Check Capture',
                        'WIRE OR ACH PAYMENT'
                    )
                then applied_payments
                else 0
            end as applied_cash_check,
            case
                when
                    pmt.payment_type in (
                        'AMEX',
                        'Discover',
                        'Discover Card',
                        'Online Payments',
                        'Visa',
                        'MasterCard'
                    )
                then applied_payments
                else 0
            end as applied_amount_credit,
            case
                when
                    pmt.payment_type in (
                        'Applied Payment for AR',
                        'Credit Memo/Deposit',
                        'Payment Adjustments'
                    )
                then applied_payments
                else 0
            end as applied_amount_adj,
            case
                when
                    pmt.payment_type in (
                        'Financing by Service Finance',
                        'Goodleap',
                        'GreenSky Direct Funding',
                        'GreenSky Financing',
                        'Microf',
                        'Synchrony Financing',
                        'Turns Financing',
                        'Wells Fargo',
                        'Wright Patt'
                    )
                then applied_payments
                else 0
            end as applied_amount_financing,
            case
                when
                    pmt.payment_type in (
                        'Refund  - Manual Check',
                        'Refund (check)',
                        'Refund (credit card)',
                        'Refund - Credit Card',
                        'Refund - Ohio'
                    )
                then applied_payments
                else 0
            end as applied_amount_refund,
            pmt.payed_on_est
        from applied
        left join payments as pmt on applied.payment_id = pmt.payment_id
        where pmt.active
    ),
    mpt as (
        select
            applied.invoice_id,
            payment_type,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY invoice_id ORDER BY applied_payments DESC) as rn
        from applied
        left join payments as pmt on applied.payment_id = pmt.payment_id
    )
select
    invoices.invoice_id,
    mpt.payment_type as main_payment_type,
    sum(applied_payments) as applied_payments,
    sum(applied_amount_credit) as applied_amount_credit,
    sum(applied_cash_check) as applied_cash_check,
    sum(applied_amount_adj) as applied_amount_adj,
    sum(applied_amount_financing) as applied_amount_financing,
    sum(applied_amount_refund) as applied_amount_refund,
    max(payed_on_est) as recent_payment_on
from invoices
left join mpt on mpt.invoice_id = invoices.invoice_id and rn = 1
group by invoices.invoice_id, mpt.payment_type

model.edw.int_bonusly_list_bonuses.name: int_bonusly_list_bonuses
model.edw.int_bonusly_list_bonuses.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['id']}
    ]
) }}

with list_bonuses as (
    SELECT
        *
    FROM
        {{ ref("stg_bonusly__list_bonuses") }}
),
giver_max_date as (
    select distinct giver_full_name as max_full_name, max(created_at) as giver_max_date, true as is_max_giver
    from list_bonuses
    group by 1
),
giver_newest_url as (
    select distinct giver_full_name, max(giver_full_pic_url) as giver_full_pic_url
    from list_bonuses lb
    left join giver_max_date md
        on md.giver_max_date = lb.created_at
        and md.max_full_name = lb.giver_full_name
    where is_max_giver is true
    group by 1
    order by 1
),
managers as (
select distinct giver_manager_email, TRUE as is_manager
from list_bonuses lb 
where giver_manager_email is not null
group by 1
)
select lb.*, coalesce(m.is_manager, false) as giver_is_manager, gnu.giver_full_pic_url as giver_recent_url
from list_bonuses lb
left join managers m
	on lb.giver_email = m.giver_manager_email
left join giver_newest_url gnu
	on gnu.giver_full_name = lb.giver_full_name
order by created_at desc

with parse as (

    replace(

        , ' ''', ' "')
        , ''':', '":')
        , '{''', '{"')
        , '''}', '"}')
        , ''',', '",')
        , 'True','true')

        ,' None',' "None"')

        ,''']','"]')::json

FROM {{ ref("stg_bonusly__list_bonuses") }}
)

    (elem->>'time_zone') AS receivers_time_zone,
    (elem->>'can_receive') AS receivers_can_receive,

model.edw.int_combine_rosters_by_email.name: int_combine_rosters_by_email
model.edw.int_combine_rosters_by_email.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True
) }}
with
inova_roster as (
    select distinct on (primary_email) 
        *
    from {{ ref("int_inova_employees") }}
    order by primary_email, tenure desc
),
servicetitan as (
    select * from {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__technicians")}}
    where active
),
servicetitan_employees as (
    select * from {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__employees")}}
    where active
),
max_servicetitan_id_by_email as (
    select
        lower(trim(email)) as email,
        max(technician_id) as max_id
    from servicetitan
    group by 1
),
all_servicetitan_id_by_email as (
    select * from max_servicetitan_id_by_email
    UNION ALL 
    select lower(trim(email)) as email, employee_id as max_id
    from servicetitan_employees
),
servicetitan_unique_name as (
    select
        trim(technician_name) as technician_name,
        max(technician_id) as max_id
    from servicetitan
    group by 1
),
email_joins as (
select
    concat(st_un.technician_name,se.employee_name) as servicetitan_name,
    st_em.email as servicetitan_email,
    coalesce(st_un.max_id, st_em.max_id) as servicetitan_technician_id,
    case when se.employee_id is Null then 'Technician' when st_un.max_id is Null then 'Employee' else Null end as servicetitan_account_type,
    inova.full_name,
    inova.primary_email,
    inova.id as inova_id,
    inova.employee_id as inova_employee_id,
    {# replace once job titles are imported and resolved #}
    NULL as inova_job_title
from all_servicetitan_id_by_email st_em
left join inova_roster inova
    on replace(lower(trim(inova.primary_email)), 'ecoplumbers','geteco') = replace(st_em.email, 'ecoplumbers','geteco')
left join servicetitan_employees se
    on se.employee_id = st_em.max_id
left join servicetitan_unique_name st_un
    on st_em.max_id = st_un.max_id
)
select
    *
from email_joins

model.edw.int_max_st_technician_id_by_na.name: int_max_st_technician_id_by_name
model.edw.int_max_st_technician_id_by_na.raw_code:
{# 
"""
DESCRIPTION:
This model is used to get the max technician_id by technician_name
We need to do this to prevent duplicating rows when joining by technician_name
"""
#}

with
servicetitan as (
    select * from {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__technicians")}}
),
max_servicetitan_id_by_name as (
    select
        lower(trim(technician_name)) as technician_name,
        max(technician_id) as max_id
    from servicetitan
    group by 1
)
select servicetitan.*
from servicetitan
join max_servicetitan_id_by_name m
    on servicetitan.technician_id = m.max_id

model.edw.int_servicetitan_technicians.name: int_servicetitan_technicians
model.edw.int_servicetitan_technicians.raw_code:
with employees as (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__technicians_snapshot') }}
    WHERE 
        technician_level is not null
        and is_managed_tech
        and is_active 
),
consolidated as (
    SELECT
        technician_id as servicetitan_technician_id, 
        technician_name, 
        technician_level
    FROM
        (
            SELECT

)

model.edw.int_facebook_ad_campaigns.name: int_facebook_ad_campaigns
model.edw.int_facebook_ad_campaigns.raw_code:
with campaigns as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_facebook__campaigns') }}
),
campaign_insights as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_facebook__campaign_insights') }}
)
select 
    ci.campaign_id,
    ci.campaign_name,
    c.daily_budget,
    c.lifetime_budget,
    c.budget,
    ci.impressions,
    ci.clicks,
    ci.spend,
    ci.reach,
    ci.cost_per_click,
    ci.click_through_rate,
    ci.frequency,
    ci.date_start,
    ci.date_stop,
    case 
        when ci.date_start::date between c.start_time and c.stop_time then 'Active'
        when ci.date_stop::date between c.start_time and c.stop_time then 'Active'
        else 'Paused'
    end as campaign_status,
    c.account_id as campaign_account_id,
    c.objective as campaign_objective,
    c.campaign_status as current_campaign_status,
    c.start_time as campaign_started_on,
    c.stop_time as campaign_ended_on,
    ci.location as campaign_insight_account_location,
    c.campaign_location as campaign_account_location,
    ci.timeframe
from campaign_insights ci
left join campaigns c
    on c.campaign_id = ci.campaign_id

model.edw.int_memberships_aggregated_to_.name: int_memberships_aggregated_to_customer
model.edw.int_memberships_aggregated_to_.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['customer_id']}
    ]
) }}

with
memberships as (
  select 
    member.*,
    bu.business_unit
  from {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__memberships") }} member
  left join {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__business_units") }} bu
    on member.business_unit_id = bu.business_unit_id
  where 
    membership_active
),
membership_types as (
  select * from {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__membership_types") }}
),
membership_status_changes as (
  select * from {{ ref("int_membership_status_changes_aggregated_to_membership") }}
),
technicians as (
    select * from {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__technicians") }}
),
recent_membership AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (m.customer_id) 
    m.customer_id, 
    m.sold_by_id,
    m.business_unit,
    m.billing_frequency
  FROM memberships m
  ORDER BY m.customer_id, COALESCE(m.membership_start_date, m.created_on_est) DESC
)
Select
    m.customer_id,
    rm.business_unit as recent_membership_sold_by_business_unit,
    rm.sold_by_id as recent_membership_sold_by_id,
    t.technician_name as recent_membership_sold_by_name,
    rm.billing_frequency as recent_membership_sold_by_billing_frequency,
    count(distinct m.membership_id) as membership_count,
    min(m.created_on_est::date) as first_membership_created_on_est,
    min(coalesce(m.membership_start_date::date, m.created_on_est::date)) as first_membership_start_date,
		max(case when m.membership_status = 'Active' then '1/1/2111'
			when m.membership_status = 'Canceled' then coalesce(msc.last_canceled_on::date, m.cancellation_date::date)
			when m.membership_status = 'Expired' then coalesce(msc.last_expired_on::date, m.cancellation_date::date,m.membership_end_date::date, m.modified_on_est::date,m.next_scheduled_bill_date::date) - 1 
			else coalesce(m.cancellation_date::date,m.membership_end_date::date, msc.last_status_change::date) end) as last_membership_end_date,
    {# Extra Data added 1/28/2025 for Churn #}
		max(coalesce(m.membership_start_date, m.created_on_est))::date as recent_start_active_date,
		sum(case when m.membership_status = 'Active' then 1 else 0 end) as active_memberships,
		sum(case when m.membership_status = 'Canceled' then 1 else 0 end) as canceled_memberships,
		sum(case when m.membership_status = 'Expired' then 1 else 0 end) as expired_memberships,
    {# Status change data added 1/29/2025 for Churn post ST addition #}
    sum(msc.total_status_changes) as total_membership_status_changes,
    MAX(msc.last_status_change)::date as last_membership_status_change_on,
    MAX(msc.last_activated_on)::date as last_membership_status_activated_on,
    MAX(msc.last_canceled_on)::date as last_membership_status_canceled_on,
    MAX(msc.last_suspended_on)::date as last_membership_status_suspended_on,
    MAX(msc.last_expired_on)::date as last_membership_status_expired_on,
    MAX(msc.last_deleted_on)::date as last_membership_status_deleted_on
from memberships m
left join membership_types mt
  on m.membership_type_id = mt.membership_type_id
left join membership_status_changes msc
  on m.membership_id = msc.membership_id
LEFT JOIN recent_membership rm
  ON m.customer_id = rm.customer_id 
LEFT JOIN technicians t
  ON rm.sold_by_id = t.technician_id
group by 
    m.customer_id, rm.business_unit, rm.sold_by_id, t.technician_name, rm.billing_frequency

			when m.membership_status = 'Expired' then coalesce(msc.last_expired_on::date, m.cancellation_date::date,m.membership_end_date::date, m.modified_on_est::date,m.next_scheduled_bill_date::date) - 1 
			else coalesce(m.cancellation_date::date,m.membership_end_date::date, msc.last_status_change::date) end) as last_membership_end_date,
    
		max(coalesce(m.membership_start_date, m.created_on_est))::date as recent_start_active_date,

    sum(msc.total_status_changes) as total_membership_status_changes,

    MAX(msc.last_suspended_on)::date as last_membership_status_suspended_on,
    MAX(msc.last_expired_on)::date as last_membership_status_expired_on,
    MAX(msc.last_deleted_on)::date as last_membership_status_deleted_on
from memberships m
left join membership_types mt
  on m.membership_type_id = mt.membership_type_id
left join membership_status_changes msc
  on m.membership_id = msc.membership_id
LEFT JOIN recent_membership rm
  ON m.customer_id = rm.customer_id 
LEFT JOIN technicians t
  ON rm.sold_by_id = t.technician_id
group by 
    m.customer_id, rm.business_unit, rm.sold_by_id, t.technician_name, rm.billing_frequency

model.edw.int_membership_status_changes_.name: int_membership_status_changes_aggregated_to_membership
model.edw.int_membership_status_changes_.raw_code:
with membership_status_changes as (
	select
		*
	from
		{{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__memberships_status_changes") }}
)
SELECT 
    membership_id,
    COUNT(*) AS total_status_changes,
    MAX(new_status) FILTER 
    	(WHERE status_change_on = (SELECT MAX(status_change_on) 
        	FROM membership_status_changes msc2
        	WHERE msc2.membership_id = msc1.membership_id)) AS most_recent_status,
    MAX(status_change_on) AS last_status_change,
    MAX(CASE WHEN new_status = 'Active' THEN status_change_on ELSE NULL END) AS last_activated_on,
    MAX(CASE WHEN new_status = 'Canceled' THEN status_change_on ELSE NULL END) AS last_canceled_on,
    MAX(CASE WHEN new_status = 'Suspended' THEN status_change_on ELSE NULL END) AS last_suspended_on,
    MAX(CASE WHEN new_status = 'Expired' THEN status_change_on ELSE NULL END) AS last_expired_on,
    MAX(CASE WHEN new_status = 'Deleted' THEN status_change_on ELSE NULL END) AS last_deleted_on
FROM membership_status_changes msc1
GROUP BY membership_id

model.edw.int_pulsem_reviews.name: int_pulsem_reviews
model.edw.int_pulsem_reviews.raw_code:
with 
reviews as (
  select *  from {{ ref('stg_pulsem__reviews') }}
),
pulse_checks as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_pulsem__pulse_checks') }}
),
combined as (
  select
    review_id,
    "source",
    review_date::date,
    name,
    department,
    author,
    review_text,
    rating_type,
    rating,
    rating_best,
    rating_worst,
    reply_author,
    reply_datetime,
    reply_text,
    location,
    bad_review_categories,
    bad_review_primary_category
  from
    reviews
  UNION ALL
  select
    pc.review_id,
    'pulse_check' as "source",
    pc.review_date::date,
    pc.technician_name as name,
    pc.technician_department,
    pc.surveyee_name as author,
    pc.review_text_value::text as review_text,
    'pulse_index' as rating_type,
    pc.pulsem_index_value::text as rating,
    '10' as rating_best,
    '0' as rating_worst,
    NULL as reply_author,
    'None' as reply_datetime,
    NULL as reply_text,
    CASE
      WHEN pc.location_account_metadata_name = 'Eco Plumbers - Columbus' THEN 'Columbus'
      WHEN pc.location_account_metadata_name = 'The Eco Plumbers of Kettering (Dayton)' THEN 'Dayton'
      WHEN pc.location_account_metadata_name = 'The Eco Plumbers of West Chester' THEN 'Cincinnati'
      WHEN pc.location_account_metadata_name = 'The Eco Plumbers, Electricians, and HVAC of Chillicothe - (Advanced Services)' THEN 'Chillicothe'
      ELSE 'Other'
    END as location,
    NULL as bad_review_categories,
    NULL as bad_review_primary_category
  from
    pulse_checks pc
  where
    pc.review_text_value is not null
)
select
    min(review_id) as review_id,
    "source",
    review_date::date,
    name,
    department,
    author,
    review_text,
    rating_type,
    CASE
      WHEN rating = 'None' THEN NULL
      ELSE rating::numeric
    END as rating,
    CASE
      WHEN rating_best = 'None' THEN NULL
      ELSE rating_best::numeric
    END as rating_best,
    CASE
      WHEN rating_worst = 'None' THEN NULL
      ELSE rating_worst::numeric
    END as rating_worst,
    reply_author,
    CASE 
      WHEN reply_datetime = 'None' THEN NULL
      ELSE reply_datetime::timestamp

model.edw.int_appointments_aggregated_to.name: int_appointments_aggregated_to_jobs
model.edw.int_appointments_aggregated_to.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['job_id']}
    ]
) }}

with appts as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__appointments') }}
)
select 
  job_id,
  count(appointment_id) as appointment_count,
  min(appointment_start_est) as first_appointment_start_date,
  min(appointment_end_est) - min(appointment_start_est) as first_appointment_duration,
  max(appointment_end_est) - max(appointment_start_est) as last_appointment_duration,
  sum(appointment_end_est - appointment_start_est) as total_appointment_duration,
  sum(appointment_end_est - appointment_start_est)/count(appointment_id) as average_appointment_duration,
  max(appointment_end_est) as last_appointment_end_date,
  min(case when appointment_start_est::date >= current_date then appointment_start_est end) as next_appointment_date,
  count(case when appointment_status in ('Done') then appointment_id end) as completed_appointment_count,
  count(case when appointment_status in ('Scheduled','In Progress') then appointment_id end) as active_appointment_count,
  count(case when appointment_status not in ('Scheduled','Done','In Progress') then appointment_id end) as inactive_appointment_count
from appts
group by job_id

model.edw.int_appointments_assignments_a.name: int_appointments_assignments_aggregated_to_jobs
model.edw.int_appointments_assignments_a.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['job_id']}
    ]
) }}

with appointment_assignments as (
    SELECT
        *
    from
        {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__appointment_assignments') }}
),
employees as (
    SELECT
        *
    from
        {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__employees') }}
),
primary_assigned_by as (
select 
    job_id, 
	employee_name, 
	count(*),
	max(assigned_on::timestamp) as assigned_on,
	rank() over (partition by job_id order by count(*) desc) as ranking
from appointment_assignments aa 
left join employees emp 
    on aa.assigned_by_id = emp.employee_id
where employee_name is not null
group by 1,2
),
primary_assigned_by2 as (
select 
    job_id, 
    employee_name, 
    rank() over (partition by job_id order by max(assigned_on::timestamp) desc) as time_ranking
from primary_assigned_by
where ranking = 1
group by job_id, employee_name
),
primary_assigned_by3 as (
select 
    job_id, 
    employee_name
from primary_assigned_by2
where time_ranking = 1
group by job_id, employee_name
),
all_assigned_by as (
select 
    aa.job_id, 
    string_agg(distinct emp.employee_name, ', ') as all_assigned_by
from appointment_assignments aa 
left join employees emp on aa.assigned_by_id = emp.employee_id
group by 1
)
select 
    aab.job_id, 
    aab.all_assigned_by, 
    string_agg(distinct pab.employee_name, ', ') as primary_assigned_by
from all_assigned_by aab
left join primary_assigned_by3 pab on aab.job_id = pab.job_id
group by 1,2

model.edw.int_costs_aggregated_to_jobs.name: int_costs_aggregated_to_jobs
model.edw.int_costs_aggregated_to_jobs.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['job_id']}
    ]
) }}

with
timesheets as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__payroll_timesheets')}}
),
payrolls as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__payroll') }}
),
technician_burdens as (
    select * from {{ref('stg_servicetitan_api__settings_technicians')}}
),
purchase_orders as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__inventory_purchase_orders') }}
    where po_status <> 'Canceled'
),
inv_returns as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__inventory_returns') }}
),
purchase_orders_returns as (
    select *
    from purchase_orders
),
invoice_items as (
    select * from {{ ref('int_invoice_items_aggregated_to_jobs') }}
),
timesheets_jobs_aggregate as (
    select 
        ts.job_id, 
        sum(timesheet_duration) as total_paid_burden_hours,
        sum(coalesce(pr.payroll_burden_rate, tb.burden_rate) * extract(epoch from timesheet_duration) / 3600) as total_burden_cost
    from timesheets ts
    left join payrolls pr 
        on pr.employee_id = ts.technician_id
        and ts.dispatched_on_est::date between pr.started_on_est::date and pr.ended_on_est::date
    left join technician_burdens tb 
        on ts.technician_id = tb.technician_id
    group by 1
),
purchase_orders_jobs_aggregate as (
    select
        job_id,
        sum(total) as po_cost
    from purchase_orders_returns
    group by 1
)
select
    coalesce(gpi.job_id, po.job_id, ii.job_id) as job_id,
    gpi.total_paid_burden_hours,
    coalesce(gpi.total_burden_cost,0) as total_burden_cost,
    coalesce(po.po_cost,0) as po_cost,
    coalesce(inv_returns.return_amount,0) as return_total,
    coalesce(ii.item_cost,0) as item_cost,
    coalesce(ii.material_item_cost,0) as material_cost,
    coalesce(ii.service_item_cost,0) as service_cost,
    coalesce(ii.equipment_item_cost,0) as equipment_cost,
    coalesce(gpi.total_burden_cost,0) + coalesce(po.po_cost,0) - coalesce(inv_returns.return_amount,0) + coalesce(ii.item_cost,0) as total_cost
from
    timesheets_jobs_aggregate gpi
left join
    purchase_orders_jobs_aggregate po
    on gpi.job_id = po.job_id
left join
    invoice_items ii
    on ii.job_id = gpi.job_id
left join
    (select return_job_id, sum(return_amount) as return_amount from inv_returns group by 1) as inv_returns 
    on inv_returns.return_job_id = gpi.job_id

model.edw.int_debrief_form_aggregated_to.name: int_debrief_form_aggregated_to_jobs
model.edw.int_debrief_form_aggregated_to.raw_code:
{# tool used to make columns: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Ysl_nP9lSUnePuK3FN9zPwA522Se2vSxgSE7UUHuFv8/edit?usp=sharing #}

with 
forms_data as (
    select * 
    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__forms_submissions') }}
    where form_id = 102942
    and type = 'Job'
	and status = 'Completed'
),
job_agg as (
	select 
		form_name,
		owner_id as job_id,
		max(submitted_on::timestamp),
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Is there a completed SOF?') as is_there_a_completed_sof,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='TECHNICIAN RESPONSIBILITY') as technician_responsibility,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Technician') as technician,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Were there any failed or fake payments on the invoice?') as were_there_any_failed_or_fake_payments_on_the_invoice,
		max(unit_values) filter(where unit_name='Type of DB?') as type_of_db,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Are all SKUs completed?') as are_all_skus_completed,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Is there a special order part?') as is_there_a_special_order_part,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Was the invoice emailed?') as was_the_invoice_emailed,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Sold on site?') as sold_on_site,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Was a deposit collected?') as was_a_deposit_collected,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='DISPATCH RESPONSIBILITY') as dispatch_responsibility,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Were estimates emailed?') as were_estimates_emailed,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Are there before (and after if applicable) pictures and/or videos?') as are_there_before_and_after_if_applicable_pictures_and_or_videos,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Was payment collected?') as was_payment_collected
	from forms_data
	group by 1,2
)
select 
	*
from job_agg

    ]
) }}

with estimate_items as (
	select
        *
	from
		{{ ref('estimate_items') }} ei
),
memberships as (
	select
		ei.job_id,
        sum(
			case
				when (ei.item_name like '%%Care Plan%%' or ei.item_name ~* 'ecofi' or ei.item_name ~* 'membership')
				and ei.item_name not like '%%Prepaid%%'
				and ei.item_cross_sale_group like '%%Care Plans%%' 
                then 1
				else 0
			end
		) as estimate_with_care_plan,
		sum(
			case
				when (ei.item_name like '%%Care Plan%%' or ei.item_name ~* 'ecofi' or ei.item_name ~* 'membership')
				and ei.item_name not like '%%Prepaid%%'
				and ei.item_cross_sale_group like '%%Care Plans%%' 
                and ei.status_name = 'Sold'
                then 1
				else 0
			end
		) as estimate_with_sold_care_plan
	from
		estimate_items ei
	where
		ei.job_status = 'Completed'
	group by
		1
)
select
    job_id,
    case when estimate_with_care_plan > 0 then TRUE else FALSE end as estimate_has_membership,
    case when estimate_with_sold_care_plan > 0 then TRUE else FALSE end as estimate_sold_membership
from memberships
where estimate_with_care_plan > 0 or estimate_with_sold_care_plan > 0

model.edw.int_fieldpro_recordings.name: int_fieldpro_recordings
model.edw.int_fieldpro_recordings.raw_code:
with recordings as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_rpt__field_pro_recordings') }}
),
jobs as (
  select 
    *
  from {{ ref('int_jobs_add_attributes_stage_2') }}
  where completed_on_est::date >= '2025-10-15' -- First recording in database
),
techs as (
  select * from {{ ref('base_servicetitan_api__technicians') }}
),
business_units as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__business_units') }}
),
base as (
select
  recordings.*,
  bu.business_unit as recorder_business_unit_name,
  jobs.job_id as jobs_job_id,
  jobs.job_status as jobs_job_status,
  jobs.primary_technician_name as jobs_primary_technician_name,
  jobs.primary_technician_business_unit as jobs_primary_technician_business_unit,
  jobs.is_blended_opportunity as jobs_is_blended_opportunity,
  jobs.is_blended_converted as jobs_is_blended_converted,
  jobs.completed_on_est as jobs_completed_on_est
from
  recordings
full outer join
  jobs
on recordings.job_id = jobs.job_id
left join techs on recordings.technician_id::int = techs.technician_id
left join business_units bu on techs.business_unit_id = bu.business_unit_id
)
select * from base

model.edw.int_invoices_add_attributes.name: int_invoices_add_attributes
model.edw.int_invoices_add_attributes.raw_code:
with
invoices as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__invoices') }}
),
jobs as (
  select * from {{ ref("int_jobs_add_attributes") }}
),
items as (
  select * from {{ ref('int_invoice_items_aggregated_to_invoice')}}
),
customers as (
  select * from {{ ref('int_customers') }}
),
joins as (
    select 
        inv.invoice_id,
        inv.job_id,
        inv.job_type,
        jobs.job_status,
        inv.business_unit_id,
        inv.business_unit_name,
        inv.invoice_date::date,
        inv.customer_id,
        customers.name as customer_name,
        jobs.completed_on_est,
        jobs.primary_technician_id,
        jobs.primary_technician_name,
        jobs.sold_by_id,
        jobs.sold_by_name,
        jobs.sold_by_business_unit,
        case when jobs.tags ~* 'Financing' then True else False end as is_financed,
        inv.total as invoice_total,
        inv.balance as invoice_balance,
        items.invoice_item_names,
        items.invoice_item_ids,
        items.invoice_item_types,
        items.invoice_item_quantities,
        items.invoice_item_total,
        items.invoice_item_cross_sale_groups
    from invoices as inv
    left join jobs
        on inv.job_id = jobs.job_id
    left join customers
        on customers.customer_id = inv.customer_id
    left join items
        on items.invoice_id = inv.invoice_id
    where 1=1
        and jobs.job_status in ('Completed', 'In Progress', 'Scheduled')
        and inv.adjustment_to_id is null
        and not inv.invoice_reference_number ~ 'R' 
        and inv.active
        and inv.job_id is not null
)
select
    *
from
    joins

model.edw.int_invoices_aggregated_to_job.name: int_invoices_aggregated_to_jobs
model.edw.int_invoices_aggregated_to_job.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['job_id']}
    ]
) }}

with
    invoices as (select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__invoices') }}),
    payments as (select * from {{ ref('int_applied_payments_to_invoice') }}),
    max_payments as (
        select
            job_id,
            main_payment_type as payment_type,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY job_id ORDER BY applied_payments DESC) as rn
        from invoices
        left join payments using (invoice_id)
    )
select
    invoices.job_id,
    invoices.sync_status,
    min(invoice_date) as first_invoice_date,
    max(recent_payment_on) as recent_payment_date,
    count(invoice_id) as invoice_count,
    count(case when total < 0 then invoice_id end) as negative_invoice_count,
    sum(subtotal) as subtotal,
    sum(sales_tax) as sales_tax,
    sum(total) as total,
    sum(balance) as balance,
    -- PAYMENTS 
    mp.payment_type AS main_payment_type,
    sum(applied_payments) as payments,
    sum(applied_cash_check) as cash_check_payments,
    sum(applied_amount_credit) as credit_card_payments,
    sum(applied_amount_adj) as adjustment_payments,
    sum(applied_amount_financing) as financing_payments,
    sum(applied_amount_refund) as refund_payments
from invoices
left join payments using (invoice_id)
LEFT JOIN max_payments mp ON invoices.job_id = mp.job_id AND mp.rn = 1
where
    1 = 1
    and adjustment_to_id is null
    and not invoice_reference_number ~ 'R'
    and active
    and invoices.job_id is not null
group by invoices.job_id,invoices.sync_status, mp.payment_type

model.edw.int_invoice_items_aggregated_t.name: int_invoice_items_aggregated_to_invoice
model.edw.int_invoice_items_aggregated_t.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True
) }}
with
invoice_items as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__invoice_items')}}
),
items as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__items')}}
)
select
ii.invoice_id,
count(ii.invoice_item_id) as invoice_item_count,
sum(ii.item_quantity) as item_quantity,
sum(ii.item_cost) as item_cost,
sum(case when ii.item_type = 'Equipment' then ii.item_cost else 0 end) as equipment_cost,
sum(case when ii.item_type = 'Material' then ii.item_cost else 0 end) as material_cost,
sum(case when ii.item_type = 'Service' then ii.item_cost else 0 end) as service_cost,
sum(case when ii.item_type not in ('Material', 'Equipment', 'Service') then ii.item_cost else 0 end) as other_invoice_cost,
sum(ii.item_total) as item_total,
sum(case when items.item_pays_commission then ii.item_total else 0 end) as commissionable_item_total,
sum(coalesce(ii.item_sold_hours,0)) as item_sold_hours,
sum(case when coalesce(items.item_cross_sale_group, 'No Item') = 'Discounts' or ii.item_type = 'PriceModifier' then ii.item_total else 0 end) as item_discount,
sum(case when ii.item_name = 'Manager Approved Discount' then ii.item_total else 0 end) as manager_approved_discount,
sum(case when ii.item_name ~ 'SAME.DAY' then ii.item_total else 0 end) as same_day_promo_discount,
sum(case when ii.item_id in (354259618, 32483028) then 1 else 0 end) as audited_invoice_materials,
sum(case when items.item_cross_sale_group like '%%Care Plan%%' and ii.item_total > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as invoice_has_membership,
sum(case when ii.item_type = 'Service' and ii.item_total > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as invoice_service_tasks,
-- Payroll Adjustments
sum(case when ii.item_name ~ 'INSIDE SALES|ZERO TEAM' then ii.item_cost else 0 end) as inside_sales_payroll_adjustment_material_cost,
sum(case when ii.item_id = 691700511 then 1 else 0 end) as mantel_financing_materials,
sum(case when ii.item_id = 691700511 then ii.item_cost else 0 end) as mantel_financing_material_cost,
sum(case when ii.item_id = 691676171 then 1 else 0 end) as mantel_software_materials,
sum(case when ii.item_id = 691676171 then ii.item_cost else 0 end) as mantel_software_material_cost,
-- Item Names
string_agg(ii.item_name::varchar, ',') as invoice_item_names,
string_agg(ii.item_id::varchar, ',') as invoice_item_ids,
string_agg(ii.item_type::varchar, ',') as invoice_item_types,
string_agg(ii.item_quantity::varchar, ',') as invoice_item_quantities,
string_agg(ii.item_total::varchar, ',') as invoice_item_total,
string_agg(items.item_cross_sale_group::varchar, ',') as invoice_item_cross_sale_groups
from invoice_items ii
left join items
on ii.item_id = items.item_id
where 1=1
group by invoice_id

model.edw.int_invoice_items_aggregated_t.name: int_invoice_items_aggregated_to_jobs
model.edw.int_invoice_items_aggregated_t.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['job_id']}
    ]
) }}

with
invoice_items as (
  select *,
    -- Payroll adjustments for material costs
    coalesce(inside_sales_payroll_adjustment_material_cost, 0) as inside_sales_payroll_adjustment_material_cost,
    coalesce(mantel_financing_material_cost, 0) as mantel_financing_material_cost,
    coalesce(mantel_software_material_cost, 0) as mantel_software_material_cost,
    -- Sum of all payroll adjustments for material costs
    coalesce(inside_sales_payroll_adjustment_material_cost, 0) +
    coalesce(mantel_financing_material_cost, 0) +
    coalesce(mantel_software_material_cost, 0) as payroll_material_cost_adjustment
  from {{ ref("int_invoice_items_aggregated_to_invoice")}}
),
invoices as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__invoices') }}
)
select
job_id,
count(invoice_items.invoice_id) as invoice_count,
sum(invoice_items.invoice_item_count) as invoice_item_count,
sum(invoice_items.item_quantity) as item_quantity,
sum(invoice_items.item_cost) as item_cost,
sum(invoice_items.equipment_cost) as equipment_item_cost,
-- Added inside sales payroll adjustment to material cost due to skewing of reporting - EP 2026-03-16
sum(invoice_items.material_cost - invoice_items.payroll_material_cost_adjustment) as material_item_cost,
sum(invoice_items.material_cost) as material_raw_item_cost,
sum(invoice_items.service_cost) as service_item_cost,
sum(invoice_items.item_total) as item_total,
sum(invoice_items.commissionable_item_total) as commissionable_item_total,
sum(invoice_items.item_sold_hours) as item_sold_hours,
sum(invoice_items.item_discount) as item_discount,
sum(invoice_items.manager_approved_discount) as manager_approved_discount,
sum(invoice_items.same_day_promo_discount) as same_day_promo_discount,
sum(invoice_items.mantel_financing_materials) as mantel_financing_materials,
sum(invoice_items.invoice_has_membership) as invoice_memberships,
sum(invoice_items.invoice_service_tasks) as invoice_service_tasks,
sum(invoice_items.audited_invoice_materials) as audited_invoice_materials
from invoice_items
inner join invoices
on invoice_items.invoice_id = invoices.invoice_id
where 1=1
and adjustment_to_id is null
and not invoice_reference_number ~ 'R' 
and active
and job_id is not null
group by job_id
