model.edw.int_jobs_add_attributes.name: int_jobs_add_attributes
model.edw.int_jobs_add_attributes.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['job_id']}
    ]
) }}

with 
departments as (
    select * from {{ ref("stg_ecoplumbers__departments") }}
),
bu as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__business_units') }}
),
job_types as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__job_types') }}
),
tags as (
  select * from {{ ref('int_tags_aggregated_to_jobs') }}
),
jobs as (
  select 
    jobs.*, 
    job_types.job_type,
    tags.tags,
    tags.new_opportunity
  from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__jobs') }} as jobs
  left join job_types on jobs.job_type_id = job_types.job_type_id
  left join tags on jobs.job_id = tags.job_id
),
techs as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__technicians') }}
),
employees as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__employees') }}
),
splits as (
  select * from {{ ref('int_splits_aggregated_to_jobs') }}
),
campaigns as (
  select * from {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__marketing_campaigns") }}
),
locations as (
  select * from {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__crm_locations_data") }}
),
cancel_reasons as (
  select * from {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__jobs_cancel_reasons_data")}}
),
canceled_logs as (
  select * from {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__job_canceled_logs") }}
),
memberships as (
  select * from {{ ref("int_memberships_aggregated_to_customer") }}
),
scheduler_sessions as (
  -- There are instances of multiple sessions for the same job_id, so we select distinct on job_id
  select distinct on (job_id) * 
  from {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_api__schedulers_sessions") }}
),
jobs_view as (
select 
  jobs.job_id,
  jobs.job_number,
  jobs.job_type_id,
  jobs.job_type,
  jobs.job_status,
  jobs.project_id,
  coalesce(jobs.project_id, jobs.job_id) as project_job_id,
  jobs.created_on_est,
  jobs.completed_on_est,
  jobs.modified_on_est,
  jobs.customer_id,
  jobs.location_id,
  jobs.job_priority,
  jobs.campaign_id,
  jobs.created_by_id,
  coalesce(employees.employee_name, 'None') as created_by_name,
  coalesce(employees.role, 'None') as created_by_role,
  campaigns.campaign_name,
  campaigns.campaign_category_name,
  {{ is_booked_online("campaign_name", "session_id", alias='campaigns', alias1='scheduler_sessions') }} as is_booked_online,
  jobs.appointment_count,
  jobs.first_appointment_id,
  jobs.last_appointment_id,
  jobs.recall_for_id,
  jobs.warranty_for_id,
  jobs.no_charge,
  splits.primary_technician_id,
  splits.split_technicians,
  jobs.sold_by_id,
  jobs.lto_set_by_id,
  jobs.lto_set_job_id,
  case when (business_unit ~* 'CHL' or business_unit ~* 'import') and jobs.completed_on_est <= '06/01/2023' then False
    else True
  end as business_is_acquired,
  {# This should be polished and standardized for more acquisitions. #}
  bu.business_unit_id,
  bu.business_unit,
  departments.department_id,
  departments.department,
  departments.region,
  departments.branch,
  departments.location,
  departments.trade_line_type,
  departments.department_type,
  departments.customer_type,
  jobs.tags,
  jobs.new_opportunity,
  locations.name as location_name,
  locations.address_street,
  locations.address_unit,
  locations.address_city,
  locations.address_state,
  locations.address_zip,
  locations.address_country,
  locations.address_latitude,
  locations.address_longitude,
  cancel_reasons.cancel_reason,
  cancel_reasons.cancel_reason_desc,
  canceled_logs.created_on_est as canceled_on_est,
  canceled_employee.employee_name as canceled_by,
  case when memberships.customer_id is null or memberships.active_memberships = 0 then false else true end as has_membership,
  memberships.active_memberships as membership_count,
  memberships.first_membership_created_on_est,
  memberships.first_membership_start_date,
  memberships.last_membership_end_date,
    case
      when jobs.warranty_for_id is not null or jobs.recall_for_id is not null
      then 'Recall'
      when jobs.tags ~* 'maintenance'
      then 'Maintenance'
      when jobs.lto_set_job_id is not null
      then 'LTO'
      else 'Service'
  end as service_lead_type,
  case
      when jobs.lto_set_job_id is not null and jobs.tags ~* 'Team Visit'
      then 'Team Visit'
      when jobs.lto_set_job_id is not null
      then 'LTO'
      else 'Marketed'
  end as sales_lead_type,
  {{ lto_set_type("job_type","tags",alias="jobs") }} as lto_opp_group
from
  jobs 
left join
  bu on jobs.business_unit_id = bu.business_unit_id
left join 
  splits on jobs.job_id = splits.job_id
left join
  campaigns on jobs.campaign_id = campaigns.campaign_id
left join 
  employees on jobs.created_by_id = employees.employee_id
left join 
  departments on jobs.business_unit_id = departments.servicetitan_business_unit_id::int
left join 
  locations on jobs.location_id = locations.location_id
left join
  cancel_reasons on cancel_reasons.job_id = jobs.job_id
left join 
  memberships on memberships.customer_id = jobs.customer_id
left join 
  canceled_logs on canceled_logs.job_id = jobs.job_id
left join
  employees canceled_employee on canceled_logs.canceled_by_id = canceled_employee.employee_id
left join
  scheduler_sessions on jobs.job_id = scheduler_sessions.job_id
)
select 
  jobs_view.*,
  pt.technician_name as primary_technician_name,
  pt.business_unit as primary_technician_business_unit,
  pt.technician_level as primary_technician_level,
  sbt.technician_name as sold_by_name,
  sbt.business_unit as sold_by_business_unit,
  sbt.email as sold_by_email,
  lt.technician_name as lto_set_by_name,
  lt.business_unit as lto_set_by_business_unit
from jobs_view
left join techs as pt on pt.technician_id = jobs_view.primary_technician_id
left join techs as sbt on sbt.technician_id = jobs_view.sold_by_id
left join techs as lt on lt.technician_id = jobs_view.lto_set_by_id
model.edw.int_jobs_add_attributes.compiled_code:
with 
departments as (
    select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_ecoplumbers__departments"
),
bu as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_api__business_units"
),
job_types as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_api__job_types"
),
tags as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_tags_aggregated_to_jobs"
),
jobs as (
  select 
    jobs.*, 
    job_types.job_type,
    tags.tags,
    tags.new_opportunity
  from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_api__jobs" as jobs
  left join job_types on jobs.job_type_id = job_types.job_type_id
  left join tags on jobs.job_id = tags.job_id
),
techs as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_api__technicians"
),
employees as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_api__employees"
),
splits as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_splits_aggregated_to_jobs"
),
campaigns as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_api__marketing_campaigns"
),
locations as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_api__crm_locations_data"
),
cancel_reasons as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_api__jobs_cancel_reasons_data"
),
canceled_logs as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_api__job_canceled_logs"
),
memberships as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_memberships_aggregated_to_customer"
),
scheduler_sessions as (
  -- There are instances of multiple sessions for the same job_id, so we select distinct on job_id
  select distinct on (job_id) * 
  from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_api__schedulers_sessions"
),
jobs_view as (
select 
  jobs.job_id,
  jobs.job_number,
  jobs.job_type_id,
  jobs.job_type,
  jobs.job_status,
  jobs.project_id,
  coalesce(jobs.project_id, jobs.job_id) as project_job_id,
  jobs.created_on_est,
  jobs.completed_on_est,
  jobs.modified_on_est,
  jobs.customer_id,
  jobs.location_id,
  jobs.job_priority,
  jobs.campaign_id,
  jobs.created_by_id,
  coalesce(employees.employee_name, 'None') as created_by_name,
  coalesce(employees.role, 'None') as created_by_role,
  campaigns.campaign_name,
  campaigns.campaign_category_name,
  
  case 
    when "campaigns"."campaign_name" ~* 'SCHEDULE Engine|Schedule_Engine' then true
    when "campaigns"."campaign_name" in ('GoogleLocalServices Integration','Reserve with Google','ServiceTitan Web Scheduler') then true
    when "scheduler_sessions"."session_id" is not null then true
    else false 
   end
 as is_booked_online,
  jobs.appointment_count,
  jobs.first_appointment_id,
  jobs.last_appointment_id,
  jobs.recall_for_id,
  jobs.warranty_for_id,
  jobs.no_charge,
  splits.primary_technician_id,
  splits.split_technicians,
  jobs.sold_by_id,
  jobs.lto_set_by_id,
  jobs.lto_set_job_id,
  case when (business_unit ~* 'CHL' or business_unit ~* 'import') and jobs.completed_on_est <= '06/01/2023' then False
    else True
  end as business_is_acquired,
  
  bu.business_unit_id,
  bu.business_unit,
  departments.department_id,
  departments.department,
  departments.region,
  departments.branch,
  departments.location,
  departments.trade_line_type,
  departments.department_type,
  departments.customer_type,
  jobs.tags,
  jobs.new_opportunity,
  locations.name as location_name,
  locations.address_street,
  locations.address_unit,
  locations.address_city,
  locations.address_state,
  locations.address_zip,
  locations.address_country,
  locations.address_latitude,
  locations.address_longitude,
  cancel_reasons.cancel_reason,
  cancel_reasons.cancel_reason_desc,
  canceled_logs.created_on_est as canceled_on_est,
  canceled_employee.employee_name as canceled_by,
  case when memberships.customer_id is null or memberships.active_memberships = 0 then false else true end as has_membership,
  memberships.active_memberships as membership_count,
  memberships.first_membership_created_on_est,
  memberships.first_membership_start_date,
  memberships.last_membership_end_date,
    case
      when jobs.warranty_for_id is not null or jobs.recall_for_id is not null
      then 'Recall'
      when jobs.tags ~* 'maintenance'
      then 'Maintenance'
      when jobs.lto_set_job_id is not null
      then 'LTO'
      else 'Service'
  end as service_lead_type,
  case
      when jobs.lto_set_job_id is not null and jobs.tags ~* 'Team Visit'
      then 'Team Visit'
      when jobs.lto_set_job_id is not null
      then 'LTO'
      else 'Marketed'
  end as sales_lead_type,
  
    CASE
        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" in 
            ('Drain Clogged or Broken Downspout-Clog/Clearing',
             'Drain Clogged or Broken Downspout- Repair/Replace'
            ) 
            THEN 'Downspout'
        WHEN 
            "jobs"."tags" ~ 'Repipe Opportunity' 
            AND "jobs"."job_type" in ('Drain Clogged Floor')
            THEN 'Repipe'
        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" in 
            (
            'Drain Clogged Floor',
            'Drain Clogged Kitchen',
            'Drain Clogged Toilet/Shower/Sink/Bathtub/Stack: Secondary Line'
            )
            THEN 'Drain'
        WHEN ("jobs"."job_type" in 
            ('DEAL: 93 or Free',
             'Drain Clogged Sanitary Sewer'
            ) AND  "jobs"."tags" ~ 'Sewer') and NOT  "jobs"."tags" ~ 'Non Sewer Opp' 
            THEN 'Sewer'
        WHEN 
            "jobs"."tags" ~ 'HVAC 10+' 
            AND "jobs"."job_type" ~* 'HVAC'
            THEN 'HVAC 10+' 
        WHEN 
            "jobs"."job_type" ~* 'HVAC'
            THEN 'HVAC' 
        WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~ 'Tankless Opportunity' THEN 'Tankless'
        WHEN 
            "jobs"."tags" ~ 'Repipe Opportunity' 
            THEN 'Repipe'
        ELSE 'Other' 
        END
 as lto_opp_group
from
  jobs 
left join
  bu on jobs.business_unit_id = bu.business_unit_id
left join 
  splits on jobs.job_id = splits.job_id
left join
  campaigns on jobs.campaign_id = campaigns.campaign_id
left join 
  employees on jobs.created_by_id = employees.employee_id
left join 
  departments on jobs.business_unit_id = departments.servicetitan_business_unit_id::int
left join 
  locations on jobs.location_id = locations.location_id
left join
  cancel_reasons on cancel_reasons.job_id = jobs.job_id
left join 
  memberships on memberships.customer_id = jobs.customer_id
left join 
  canceled_logs on canceled_logs.job_id = jobs.job_id
left join
  employees canceled_employee on canceled_logs.canceled_by_id = canceled_employee.employee_id
left join
  scheduler_sessions on jobs.job_id = scheduler_sessions.job_id
)
select 
  jobs_view.*,
  pt.technician_name as primary_technician_name,
  pt.business_unit as primary_technician_business_unit,
  pt.technician_level as primary_technician_level,
  sbt.technician_name as sold_by_name,
  sbt.business_unit as sold_by_business_unit,
  sbt.email as sold_by_email,
  lt.technician_name as lto_set_by_name,
  lt.business_unit as lto_set_by_business_unit
from jobs_view
left join techs as pt on pt.technician_id = jobs_view.primary_technician_id
left join techs as sbt on sbt.technician_id = jobs_view.sold_by_id
left join techs as lt on lt.technician_id = jobs_view.lto_set_by_id

model.edw.int_jobs_add_attributes_stage_.name: int_jobs_add_attributes_stage_2
model.edw.int_jobs_add_attributes_stage_.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['job_id']},
      {'columns': ['customer_id']}
    ]
) }}

with
    jobs as (select * from {{ ref('int_jobs_add_attributes') }}),
    invoices as (select * from {{ ref('int_invoices_aggregated_to_jobs') }}),
    invoice_items as (select * from {{ ref('int_invoice_items_aggregated_to_jobs') }}),
    estimates as (select * from {{ ref('int_estimates_aggregated_to_jobs') }}),
    appointments as (select * from {{ ref('int_appointments_aggregated_to_jobs') }}),
    lto_set as (select * from {{ ref('int_lto_set_aggregated_to_jobs') }}),
    memberships as (select * from {{ ref('int_estimates_filtered_to_memberships') }}),
    recall_caused as (select * from {{ ref("int_recall_caused_aggregated_to_jobs") }}),
    recall_by as (select * from {{ ref("int_jobs_filtered_to_recalled") }}),
    costs as (select * from {{ ref("int_costs_aggregated_to_jobs") }}),
    rebooks as (select * from {{ ref("int_audit_trail_to_rebooks") }}),
    rebook_form as (select * from {{ ref("int_rebook_form_aggregated_to_jobs") }}),
    appointment_assignments as (select * from {{ ref('int_appointments_assignments_aggregated_to_jobs') }}),
    jobs_view as (
        select
            jobs.*,
            case
                when memberships.estimate_has_membership = true then true else false
            end as estimate_has_membership,
            case
                when memberships.estimate_sold_membership = true then true else false
            end as estimate_sold_membership,
            case
                when inv_items.invoice_memberships > 0 and jobs.job_status = 'Completed'
                then true
                else false
            end as invoice_sold_membership,
            app_assi.all_assigned_by,
            app_assi.primary_assigned_by,
            appt.first_appointment_start_date,
            appt.last_appointment_end_date,
            appt.first_appointment_duration::text,
            appt.last_appointment_duration::text,
            appt.total_appointment_duration::text,
            appt.average_appointment_duration::text,
            EXTRACT(epoch FROM appt.first_appointment_duration::interval) / 3600 as first_appointment_hours,
            EXTRACT(epoch FROM appt.last_appointment_duration::interval) / 3600 as last_appointment_hours,
            EXTRACT(epoch FROM appt.total_appointment_duration::interval) / 3600 as total_appointment_hours,
            EXTRACT(epoch FROM appt.average_appointment_duration::interval) / 3600 as average_appointment_hours,
            appt.next_appointment_date,
            appt.completed_appointment_count,
            appt.active_appointment_count,
            appt.inactive_appointment_count,
            appt.first_appointment_start_date::date
            - jobs.created_on_est::date as days_to_book,
            case
                when jobs.created_on_est::date = appt.first_appointment_start_date::date
                then 1
                else 0
            end as is_booked_same_day,
            case
                when jobs.created_on_est::date = jobs.completed_on_est::date
                then 1
                else 0
            end as is_completed_same_day,
            est.min_sold_on_est,
            est.max_sold_on_est,
            case when inv.balance <= 0 and inv.payments is not null then inv.recent_payment_date else null end as final_payment_on_est,
            est.estimate_count,
            est.avg_estimate_sales,
            coalesce(
                case
                    when recall_caused.recall_caused_job_id is not null then 1 else 0
                end,
                0
            ) as is_recall,
            recall_caused.recall_run_job_ids,
            recall_caused.recall_run_job_types,
            recall_caused.recall_run_primary_technician_ids,
            recall_caused.recall_run_technician_names,
            recall_caused.first_recall_run_completed_on_est,
            recall_caused.last_recall_run_completed_on_est,
            recall_caused.recall_run_count,
            recall_caused.recall_run_completed_count,
            recall_caused.recall_run_pending_count,
            recall_caused.recall_run_canceled_count,
            recall_by.recall_business_unit,
            recall_by.recall_job_type,
            recall_by.recall_primary_technician_name,
            coalesce(
                case when lto_set.lto_set_job_id is not null then 1 else 0 end, 0
            ) as is_lto_set,
            lto_set.lto_run_job_ids,
            lto_set.lto_run_job_types,
            lto_set.lto_run_sales_lead_type,
            lto_set.lto_run_primary_technician_ids as lto_run_by_ids,
            lto_set.lto_run_technician_names as lto_run_by_names,
            lto_set.first_lto_run_completed_on_est,
            lto_set.last_lto_run_completed_on_est,
            lto_set.lto_run_count,
            lto_set.lto_run_completed_count,
            lto_set.lto_run_pending_count,
            lto_set.lto_run_canceled_count,
            lto_set.lto_run_sold_count,
            coalesce(
                case when lto_run.job_id is not null then 1 else 0 end, 0
            ) as is_lto_run,
            lto_run.primary_technician_name as lto_set_primary_technician,
            lto_run.tags as lto_set_job_tags,
            lto_run.business_unit_id as lto_set_business_unit_id,
            lto_run.business_unit as lto_set_business_unit,
            lto_run.trade_line_type as lto_set_trade_line_type,
            lto_run.job_type as lto_set_job_type,
            lto_run.lto_opp_group as lto_set_opp_group,
            case
                when
                    lto_run.trade_line_type = jobs.trade_line_type
                    and lto_set.lto_set_job_id is not null
                then 'LTO'
                when
                    lto_run.trade_line_type <> jobs.trade_line_type
                    and lto_set.lto_set_job_id is not null
                then 'TTO'
                else null
            end as lto_set_type,
            case
                when lto_run.job_id is not null then 'Internal' else 'External'
            end as lead_type,
            lto_run.lto_set_job_id as lto_set_set_job_id,
            case
                when inv.total > {{ var('min_opportunity_revenue') }}
                then 1
                when
                    jobs.no_charge
                    or jobs.warranty_for_id is not null
                    or jobs.recall_for_id is not null
                then 0
                else 1
            end as is_opportunity,
            case
                when inv.total > {{ var('min_opportunity_revenue') }} then 1 else 0
            end as is_converted,
            case
                when est.sales > 0 then est.min_sold_on_est else jobs.completed_on_est
            end as is_sales_opportunity_date_est,
            case
                when est.sales > {{ var('min_opportunity_revenue') }}
                then 1
                when
                    jobs.no_charge
                    or jobs.warranty_for_id is not null
                    or jobs.recall_for_id is not null
                then 0
                else 1
            end as is_sales_opportunity,
            case
                when est.sales > {{ var('min_opportunity_revenue') }} then 1 else 0
            end as is_sales_converted,
            -- Job Flags
            {{ is_new_opportunity("tags",True,alias="jobs") }} as priority_tag,
            {{ priority_tag_group("tags",alias="jobs") }} as priority_tag_group,
            {{ is_presold("tags",alias="jobs") }} as is_presold,
            {{ is_new_opportunity("tags",alias="jobs") }}
            or jobs.job_type ~* 'LTO -|- LTO' as is_new_opportunity,
            {{ is_returning_customer("tags",alias="jobs") }} as is_returning_customer,
            {{ is_working_status("job_status",alias="jobs") }} as is_working_status,
            {{ is_first_stop("tags",alias="jobs") }} as is_first_stop,
            {{ lto_run_type("job_type",alias="jobs") }} as lto_run_opp_group,
            {{ job_type_group("job_type", "tags", alias='jobs') }} as job_type_group,
            case when lto_set.lto_sales_generated > 0 then 1 else 0 end as is_set_lto_converted,
            case when rebooks.rebook_job_id is not null then true else false end as is_rebook,
            rebooks.rebook_date,
            rebooks.rebook_time,
            rebooks.rebooked_by,
            rebook_form.rebook_reason as rebook_form_reason,
            rebook_form.manager_help as rebook_form_manager_help,
            rebook_form.why_manager_no_help as rebook_form_why_manager_no_help,
            rebook_form.rebook_days as rebook_form_rebook_days,
            rebook_form.additional_comments as rebook_form_additional_comments,
            coalesce(lto_set.lto_sales_generated, 0) as lto_sales,
            coalesce(lto_set.lto_cost,0) as lto_costs,
            coalesce(inv.total, 0) as revenue,
            coalesce(inv_items.commissionable_item_total,0) as commissionable_revenue,
            coalesce(costs.total_cost, 0) as cost,
            coalesce(costs.total_burden_cost, 0) as burden_cost,
            coalesce(extract(epoch from costs.total_paid_burden_hours) / 3600, 0) as total_paid_burden_hours,
            coalesce(costs.po_cost, 0) as po_cost,
            coalesce(costs.return_total,0) as return_total,
            coalesce(costs.material_cost, 0) as material_cost,
            coalesce(costs.service_cost, 0) as service_cost,
            coalesce(costs.equipment_cost, 0) as equipment_cost,
            coalesce(costs.po_cost,0)+coalesce(costs.material_cost,0)+coalesce(costs.equipment_cost,0) as materials_equipment_po_costs,
            coalesce(inv.total, 0) - coalesce(costs.total_cost, 0) as gross_margin,
            coalesce(inv_items.item_sold_hours, 0) as sold_hours,
            coalesce(inv_items.item_discount, 0) as discounts,
            coalesce(inv_items.manager_approved_discount, 0) as manager_approved_discounts,
            coalesce(inv_items.same_day_promo_discount, 0) as same_day_promo_discounts,
            coalesce(inv_items.mantel_financing_materials, 0) as mantel_financing_materials,
            coalesce(inv_items.audited_invoice_materials, 0) as audited_invoice_materials,
            coalesce(inv_items.invoice_service_tasks, 0) as tasks,
            inv.main_payment_type,
            inv.sync_status as invoice_payment_status,
            coalesce(inv.payments,0) as payments,
            coalesce(inv.cash_check_payments,0) as cash_check_payments,
            coalesce(inv.credit_card_payments,0) as credit_card_payments,
            coalesce(inv.financing_payments, 0) as financing_payments,
            coalesce(inv.balance, 0) as balance,
            coalesce(inv.refund_payments,0) as refunds,
            {# coalesce(est.commissionable_sales,0) as commissionable_sales, #}
            coalesce(est.sales, 0) as sales
        from jobs
        left join invoices as inv on jobs.job_id = inv.job_id
        left join invoice_items as inv_items on jobs.job_id = inv_items.job_id
        left join estimates as est on jobs.job_id = est.job_id
        left join appointments as appt on jobs.job_id = appt.job_id
        left join lto_set on jobs.job_id = lto_set.lto_set_job_id
        left join memberships on jobs.job_id = memberships.job_id
        left join jobs as lto_run on jobs.lto_set_job_id = lto_run.job_id
        left join recall_caused on jobs.job_id = recall_caused.recall_caused_job_id
        left join recall_by on jobs.job_id = recall_by.recall_job_id
        left join costs on jobs.job_id = costs.job_id
        left join appointment_assignments as app_assi on jobs.job_id = app_assi.job_id
        left join rebooks on rebooks.rebook_job_id = jobs.job_id
        left join rebook_form on jobs.job_id = rebook_form.job_id
        where jobs.business_is_acquired
    ),
    jobs_output as (
        select
            jobs_view.*,
            case when is_sales_converted = 1 or is_set_lto_converted = 1 then 1 else 0 end as is_sales_or_lto_converted,
            -- Blended Conversion 
            case when department_type = 'Sales' then is_sales_opportunity
                when department_type in ('Service','Maintenance') then is_opportunity
                else 0
            end as is_blended_opportunity,
            case when department_type = 'Sales' then is_sales_converted
                when department_type in ('Service','Maintenance') then is_converted
                else 0
            end as is_blended_converted
        from jobs_view
    )
select * from jobs_output
model.edw.int_jobs_add_attributes_stage_.compiled_code:
with
    jobs as (select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_jobs_add_attributes"),
    invoices as (select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_invoices_aggregated_to_jobs"),
    invoice_items as (select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_invoice_items_aggregated_to_jobs"),
    estimates as (select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_estimates_aggregated_to_jobs"),
    appointments as (select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_appointments_aggregated_to_jobs"),
    lto_set as (select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_lto_set_aggregated_to_jobs"),
    memberships as (select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_estimates_filtered_to_memberships"),
    recall_caused as (select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_recall_caused_aggregated_to_jobs"),
    recall_by as (select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_jobs_filtered_to_recalled"),
    costs as (select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_costs_aggregated_to_jobs"),
    rebooks as (select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_audit_trail_to_rebooks"),
    rebook_form as (select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_rebook_form_aggregated_to_jobs"),
    appointment_assignments as (select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_appointments_assignments_aggregated_to_jobs"),
    jobs_view as (
        select
            jobs.*,
            case
                when memberships.estimate_has_membership = true then true else false
            end as estimate_has_membership,
            case
                when memberships.estimate_sold_membership = true then true else false
            end as estimate_sold_membership,
            case
                when inv_items.invoice_memberships > 0 and jobs.job_status = 'Completed'
                then true
                else false
            end as invoice_sold_membership,
            app_assi.all_assigned_by,
            app_assi.primary_assigned_by,
            appt.first_appointment_start_date,
            appt.last_appointment_end_date,
            appt.first_appointment_duration::text,
            appt.last_appointment_duration::text,
            appt.total_appointment_duration::text,
            appt.average_appointment_duration::text,
            EXTRACT(epoch FROM appt.first_appointment_duration::interval) / 3600 as first_appointment_hours,
            EXTRACT(epoch FROM appt.last_appointment_duration::interval) / 3600 as last_appointment_hours,
            EXTRACT(epoch FROM appt.total_appointment_duration::interval) / 3600 as total_appointment_hours,
            EXTRACT(epoch FROM appt.average_appointment_duration::interval) / 3600 as average_appointment_hours,
            appt.next_appointment_date,
            appt.completed_appointment_count,
            appt.active_appointment_count,
            appt.inactive_appointment_count,
            appt.first_appointment_start_date::date
            - jobs.created_on_est::date as days_to_book,
            case
                when jobs.created_on_est::date = appt.first_appointment_start_date::date
                then 1
                else 0
            end as is_booked_same_day,
            case
                when jobs.created_on_est::date = jobs.completed_on_est::date
                then 1
                else 0
            end as is_completed_same_day,
            est.min_sold_on_est,
            est.max_sold_on_est,
            case when inv.balance <= 0 and inv.payments is not null then inv.recent_payment_date else null end as final_payment_on_est,
            est.estimate_count,
            est.avg_estimate_sales,
            coalesce(
                case
                    when recall_caused.recall_caused_job_id is not null then 1 else 0
                end,
                0
            ) as is_recall,
            recall_caused.recall_run_job_ids,
            recall_caused.recall_run_job_types,
            recall_caused.recall_run_primary_technician_ids,
            recall_caused.recall_run_technician_names,
            recall_caused.first_recall_run_completed_on_est,
            recall_caused.last_recall_run_completed_on_est,
            recall_caused.recall_run_count,
            recall_caused.recall_run_completed_count,
            recall_caused.recall_run_pending_count,
            recall_caused.recall_run_canceled_count,
            recall_by.recall_business_unit,
            recall_by.recall_job_type,
            recall_by.recall_primary_technician_name,
            coalesce(
                case when lto_set.lto_set_job_id is not null then 1 else 0 end, 0
            ) as is_lto_set,
            lto_set.lto_run_job_ids,
            lto_set.lto_run_job_types,
            lto_set.lto_run_sales_lead_type,
            lto_set.lto_run_primary_technician_ids as lto_run_by_ids,
            lto_set.lto_run_technician_names as lto_run_by_names,
            lto_set.first_lto_run_completed_on_est,
            lto_set.last_lto_run_completed_on_est,
            lto_set.lto_run_count,
            lto_set.lto_run_completed_count,
            lto_set.lto_run_pending_count,
            lto_set.lto_run_canceled_count,
            lto_set.lto_run_sold_count,
            coalesce(
                case when lto_run.job_id is not null then 1 else 0 end, 0
            ) as is_lto_run,
            lto_run.primary_technician_name as lto_set_primary_technician,
            lto_run.tags as lto_set_job_tags,
            lto_run.business_unit_id as lto_set_business_unit_id,
            lto_run.business_unit as lto_set_business_unit,
            lto_run.trade_line_type as lto_set_trade_line_type,
            lto_run.job_type as lto_set_job_type,
            lto_run.lto_opp_group as lto_set_opp_group,
            case
                when
                    lto_run.trade_line_type = jobs.trade_line_type
                    and lto_set.lto_set_job_id is not null
                then 'LTO'
                when
                    lto_run.trade_line_type <> jobs.trade_line_type
                    and lto_set.lto_set_job_id is not null
                then 'TTO'
                else null
            end as lto_set_type,
            case
                when lto_run.job_id is not null then 'Internal' else 'External'
            end as lead_type,
            lto_run.lto_set_job_id as lto_set_set_job_id,
            case
                when inv.total > 0
                then 1
                when
                    jobs.no_charge
                    or jobs.warranty_for_id is not null
                    or jobs.recall_for_id is not null
                then 0
                else 1
            end as is_opportunity,
            case
                when inv.total > 0 then 1 else 0
            end as is_converted,
            case
                when est.sales > 0 then est.min_sold_on_est else jobs.completed_on_est
            end as is_sales_opportunity_date_est,
            case
                when est.sales > 0
                then 1
                when
                    jobs.no_charge
                    or jobs.warranty_for_id is not null
                    or jobs.recall_for_id is not null
                then 0
                else 1
            end as is_sales_opportunity,
            case
                when est.sales > 0 then 1 else 0
            end as is_sales_converted,
            -- Job Flags
            
    CASE
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%1R%%'::text THEN '1R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%1N%%'::text THEN '1N'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%1SPP%%'::text THEN '1SPP'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%2N%%'::text THEN '2N'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%2R%%'::text THEN '1R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%2SPP%%'::text THEN '2SPP'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%3N%%'::text THEN '3N'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%3R%%'::text THEN '3R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%3SPP%%'::text THEN '3SPP'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%4N%%'::text THEN '4N'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%4R%%'::text THEN '4R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%4SPP%%'::text THEN '4SPP'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%HV N%%'::text THEN 'HV N'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%HV R%%'::text THEN 'HV R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%ER N%%'::text THEN 'ER N'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%ER R%%'::text THEN 'ER R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%NE N%%'::text THEN 'NE N'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%NE R%%'::text THEN 'NE R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%Lead Turn-Over%%'::text THEN 'Lead Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%Lead Turnover%%'::text THEN 'Lead Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%Trade Turnover%%'::text THEN 'Trade Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN lower("jobs"."tags") ~~ '%%maintenance%%'::text THEN 'Maintenance'::text
          ELSE NULL
          end 
 as priority_tag,
            
    CASE
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%1N%%'::text   THEN 'P1 - Green'
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%1R%%'::text   THEN 'P1 - Green'
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%1SPP%%'::text THEN 'P1 - Green'
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%2N%%'::text   THEN 'P2 - Orange'
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%2R%%'::text   THEN 'P2 - Orange'
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%2SPP%%'::text THEN 'P2 - Orange'
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%3N%%'::text   THEN 'P3 - Yellow'
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%3R%%'::text   THEN 'P3 - Yellow'
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%3SPP%%'::text THEN 'P3 - Yellow'
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%4N%%'::text   THEN 'P4 - Red'
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%4R%%'::text   THEN 'P4 - Red'
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%4SPP%%'::text THEN 'P4 - Red'

          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%HV N%%'::text THEN 'High Value'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%HV R%%'::text THEN 'High Value'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%ER N%%'::text THEN 'Emergency'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%ER R%%'::text THEN 'Emergency'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%NE N%%'::text THEN 'Non-Emergency'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%NE R%%'::text THEN 'Non-Emergency'::text
          ELSE null::text
          end
 as priority_tag_group,
            
    CASE
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%PRE-SOLD WORK%%'::text THEN True
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%Rescheduled by%%'::text THEN true
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%Rescheduled By%%'::text THEN True
          ELSE False
          end
 as is_presold,
            
    CASE
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%1R%%'::text THEN '1R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%1N%%'::text THEN '1N'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%1SPP%%'::text THEN '1SPP'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%2N%%'::text THEN '2N'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%2R%%'::text THEN '1R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%2SPP%%'::text THEN '2SPP'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%3N%%'::text THEN '3N'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%3R%%'::text THEN '3R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%3SPP%%'::text THEN '3SPP'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%4N%%'::text THEN '4N'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%4R%%'::text THEN '4R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%4SPP%%'::text THEN '4SPP'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%HV N%%'::text THEN 'HV N'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%HV R%%'::text THEN 'HV R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%ER N%%'::text THEN 'ER N'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%ER R%%'::text THEN 'ER R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%NE N%%'::text THEN 'NE N'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%NE R%%'::text THEN 'NE R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%Lead Turn-Over%%'::text THEN 'Lead Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%Lead Turnover%%'::text THEN 'Lead Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%Trade Turnover%%'::text THEN 'Trade Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN lower("jobs"."tags") ~~ '%%maintenance%%'::text THEN 'Maintenance'::text
          ELSE NULL
          end  IS NOT NULL 

            or jobs.job_type ~* 'LTO -|- LTO' as is_new_opportunity,
            

    CASE
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%1R%%'::text THEN '1R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%1SPP%%'::text THEN '1SPP'::text
          
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%2R%%'::text THEN '1R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%2SPP%%'::text THEN '2SPP'::text
          
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%3R%%'::text THEN '3R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%3SPP%%'::text THEN '3SPP'::text
          
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%4R%%'::text THEN '4R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%4SPP%%'::text THEN '4SPP'::text

          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%HV R%%'::text THEN 'HV R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%ER R%%'::text THEN 'ER R'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%NE R%%'::text THEN 'NE R'::text

          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%Lead Turn-Over%%'::text THEN 'Lead Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%Lead Turnover%%'::text THEN 'Lead Turn-Over'::text

          WHEN "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%EcoFi Member%%'::text THEN 'EcoFi Member'::text
          ELSE NULL
          end IS NOT NULL
 as is_returning_customer,
            
    "jobs"."job_status" in ('Completed', 'Scheduled','Dispatched','Working','In Progress')
 as is_working_status,
            
    "jobs"."tags" ~~ '%%First Stop%%'
 as is_first_stop,
            
    CASE 
        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" = 'LTO - Sewer' THEN 'Sewer'
        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" = 'LTO - Downspout' THEN 'Downspout'
        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" = 'LTO - Water Service' THEN 'Water Service'
        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" in (
            'HVAC - LTO','HVAC - Furnace 8 Plus','HVAC - No Heat 🔥',
            'HVAC - Air Conditioner 8 Plus', 'HVAC - No Cool ❄',
            'HVAC - Air Conditioner 10 Plus','HVAC - Furnace 10 Plus') THEN 'HVAC'
        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" in ('HVAC - Team Visit') THEN 'HVAC - Team Visit'
        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" in ('LTO - Repipe','LTO - Stack') THEN 'Repipe'
        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" = 'LTO - Water Treatment' THEN 'Water Treatment'
        ELSE 'Other'
        END
 as lto_run_opp_group,
            
  case 
    when 
    "jobs"."job_type" in 
        ('Water Heater 6 Plus Years','Tankless Options','Tankless 6 Plus Years', 'Tankless 10 Plus Years', 'Leaking Water Heater') 
 then 'Water Heater Replacement'
    when 
    "jobs"."job_type" in 
        ('Water Heater Below 6 Years','DEAL: Water Heater Tune Up','Tankless Below 6 Years','Tankless Below 10 Years') 
 then 'Water Heater Service'
    when 
    "jobs"."job_type" in 
        (
        'HVAC - No Cool ❄','HVAC - No Heat 🔥','HVAC - Furnace 10 Plus','HVAC - Air Conditioner 10 Plus'
        ) 
 then 'HVAC Replacement'
    when 
    "jobs"."job_type" in 
        (
        'HVAC - Care Plan - Fall Tune Up','HVAC - Care Plan - Spring Tune Up'
        'HVAC - Membership - Fall Tune Up','HVAC - Membership - Spring Tune Up',
        'HVAC - Membership - Spring Multi System Tune Up',
        'HVAC - Membership - Fall Multi System Tune Up'
        ) 
 then 'HVAC Care Plan System Check'
    when 
    "jobs"."job_type" in 
        ('HVAC - Care Plan - Fall Tune Up','HVAC - Care Plan - Spring Tune Up', 
         'HVAC - Deal - Tune Up', 'HVAC - Non Care Plan Member - Tune Up ',
         'HVAC - Membership - Fall Tune Up','HVAC - Membership - Spring Tune Up', 
         'HVAC - Non Member - Tune Up ',
         'HVAC - Membership - Spring Multi System Tune Up',
         'HVAC - Membership - Fall Multi System Tune Up',
         'HVAC - Non Member - Multi System Tune Up'
         ) 
 then 'HVAC Non Care Plan System Check'
    when 
    "jobs"."job_type" in 
        (
        'HVAC - Care Plan - Fall Tune Up','HVAC - Care Plan - Spring Tune Up'
        'HVAC - Membership - Fall Tune Up','HVAC - Membership - Spring Tune Up',
        'HVAC - Membership - Spring Multi System Tune Up',
        'HVAC - Membership - Fall Multi System Tune Up'
        ) 
 then 'HVAC Care Plan System Check'
    when 
    "jobs"."job_type" in 
        ('HVAC - Care Plan - Fall Tune Up','HVAC - Care Plan - Spring Tune Up', 
         'HVAC - Deal - Tune Up', 'HVAC - Non Care Plan Member - Tune Up ',
         'HVAC - Membership - Fall Tune Up','HVAC - Membership - Spring Tune Up', 
         'HVAC - Non Member - Tune Up ',
         'HVAC - Membership - Spring Multi System Tune Up',
         'HVAC - Membership - Fall Multi System Tune Up',
         'HVAC - Non Member - Multi System Tune Up'
         ) 
 then 'HVAC Non Care Plan System Check'
    -- With Tags
    when 
    ("jobs"."job_type" in 
                ('DEAL: 93 or Free',
                'Drain Clogged Sanitary Sewer'
                ) OR  "jobs"."tags" ~ 'Sewer') and NOT  "jobs"."tags" ~ 'Non Sewer Opp' 
 then 'Sewer LTO Opp'
    when 
    "jobs"."job_type" in 
                ('Drain Clogged or Broken Downspout-Clog/Clearing',
                'Drain Clogged or Broken Downspout- Repair/Replace'
                ) 
 then 'Downspout LTO Opp'
    else 'Other' 
   end
 as job_type_group,
            case when lto_set.lto_sales_generated > 0 then 1 else 0 end as is_set_lto_converted,
            case when rebooks.rebook_job_id is not null then true else false end as is_rebook,
            rebooks.rebook_date,
            rebooks.rebook_time,
            rebooks.rebooked_by,
            rebook_form.rebook_reason as rebook_form_reason,
            rebook_form.manager_help as rebook_form_manager_help,
            rebook_form.why_manager_no_help as rebook_form_why_manager_no_help,
            rebook_form.rebook_days as rebook_form_rebook_days,
            rebook_form.additional_comments as rebook_form_additional_comments,
            coalesce(lto_set.lto_sales_generated, 0) as lto_sales,
            coalesce(lto_set.lto_cost,0) as lto_costs,
            coalesce(inv.total, 0) as revenue,
            coalesce(inv_items.commissionable_item_total,0) as commissionable_revenue,
            coalesce(costs.total_cost, 0) as cost,
            coalesce(costs.total_burden_cost, 0) as burden_cost,
            coalesce(extract(epoch from costs.total_paid_burden_hours) / 3600, 0) as total_paid_burden_hours,
            coalesce(costs.po_cost, 0) as po_cost,
            coalesce(costs.return_total,0) as return_total,
            coalesce(costs.material_cost, 0) as material_cost,
            coalesce(costs.service_cost, 0) as service_cost,
            coalesce(costs.equipment_cost, 0) as equipment_cost,
            coalesce(costs.po_cost,0)+coalesce(costs.material_cost,0)+coalesce(costs.equipment_cost,0) as materials_equipment_po_costs,
            coalesce(inv.total, 0) - coalesce(costs.total_cost, 0) as gross_margin,
            coalesce(inv_items.item_sold_hours, 0) as sold_hours,
            coalesce(inv_items.item_discount, 0) as discounts,
            coalesce(inv_items.manager_approved_discount, 0) as manager_approved_discounts,
            coalesce(inv_items.same_day_promo_discount, 0) as same_day_promo_discounts,
            coalesce(inv_items.mantel_financing_materials, 0) as mantel_financing_materials,
            coalesce(inv_items.audited_invoice_materials, 0) as audited_invoice_materials,
            coalesce(inv_items.invoice_service_tasks, 0) as tasks,
            inv.main_payment_type,
            inv.sync_status as invoice_payment_status,
            coalesce(inv.payments,0) as payments,
            coalesce(inv.cash_check_payments,0) as cash_check_payments,
            coalesce(inv.credit_card_payments,0) as credit_card_payments,
            coalesce(inv.financing_payments, 0) as financing_payments,
            coalesce(inv.balance, 0) as balance,
            coalesce(inv.refund_payments,0) as refunds,
            
            coalesce(est.sales, 0) as sales
        from jobs
        left join invoices as inv on jobs.job_id = inv.job_id
        left join invoice_items as inv_items on jobs.job_id = inv_items.job_id
        left join estimates as est on jobs.job_id = est.job_id
        left join appointments as appt on jobs.job_id = appt.job_id
        left join lto_set on jobs.job_id = lto_set.lto_set_job_id
        left join memberships on jobs.job_id = memberships.job_id
        left join jobs as lto_run on jobs.lto_set_job_id = lto_run.job_id
        left join recall_caused on jobs.job_id = recall_caused.recall_caused_job_id
        left join recall_by on jobs.job_id = recall_by.recall_job_id
        left join costs on jobs.job_id = costs.job_id
        left join appointment_assignments as app_assi on jobs.job_id = app_assi.job_id
        left join rebooks on rebooks.rebook_job_id = jobs.job_id
        left join rebook_form on jobs.job_id = rebook_form.job_id
        where jobs.business_is_acquired
    ),
    jobs_output as (
        select
            jobs_view.*,
            case when is_sales_converted = 1 or is_set_lto_converted = 1 then 1 else 0 end as is_sales_or_lto_converted,
            -- Blended Conversion 
            case when department_type = 'Sales' then is_sales_opportunity
                when department_type in ('Service','Maintenance') then is_opportunity
                else 0
            end as is_blended_opportunity,
            case when department_type = 'Sales' then is_sales_converted
                when department_type in ('Service','Maintenance') then is_converted
                else 0
            end as is_blended_converted
        from jobs_view
    )
select * from jobs_output

model.edw.int_jobs_add_customer_prior_me.name: int_jobs_add_customer_prior_metrics
model.edw.int_jobs_add_customer_prior_me.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['job_id']}
    ]
) }}

with 
jobs as (
  select 
		jobs.* ,
		case 
			when jobs.trade_line_type in ('Plumbing','Management','Sewer') then 'Plumbing'
			when jobs.trade_line_type in ('HVAC') then 'HVAC'
			when jobs.trade_line_type in ('Electric') then 'Electric'
		end as trade
	from {{ ref('int_jobs_add_attributes_stage_2') }} as jobs
),
-- customer_by_day
customer_lifetime as (
select 
	job_id,
	-- Job Order
	count(case when job_status = 'Completed' then job_id end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
	) as lifetime_completed_jobs_order,
	count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then job_id end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
	) as lifetime_paid_jobs_order,
	-- Jobs
	count(case when job_status = 'Completed' then job_id end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
		range between unbounded preceding and interval '1' day preceding
	) as lifetime_completed_jobs_prior,
	count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then job_id end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
		range between unbounded preceding and interval '1' day preceding
	) as lifetime_paid_jobs_prior,
	count(case when trade_line_type in ('Plumbing','Management', 'Sewer') and job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then job_id end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
		range between unbounded preceding and interval '1' day preceding
	) as lifetime_plumbing_paid_jobs_prior,
	count(case when trade_line_type = 'HVAC' and job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then job_id end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
		range between unbounded preceding and interval '1' day preceding
	) as lifetime_hvac_paid_jobs_prior,
	count(case when trade_line_type = 'Electric' and job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then job_id end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
		range between unbounded preceding and interval '1' day preceding
	) as lifetime_electric_paid_jobs_prior,
	-- 30 Day Prior Jobs
	count(case when job_status = 'Completed' then job_id end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
		range between unbounded preceding and interval '30' day preceding
	) as lifetime_completed_jobs_prior_30d,
	count(case when job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then job_id end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
		range between unbounded preceding and interval '30' day preceding
	) as lifetime_paid_jobs_prior_30d,
	count(case when trade_line_type in ('Plumbing','Management', 'Sewer') and job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then job_id end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
		range between unbounded preceding and interval '30' day preceding
	) as lifetime_plumbing_paid_jobs_prior_30d,
	count(case when trade_line_type = 'HVAC' and job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then job_id end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
		range between unbounded preceding and interval '30' day preceding
	) as lifetime_hvac_paid_jobs_prior_30d,
	count(case when trade_line_type = 'Electric' and job_status = 'Completed' and revenue > 0 then job_id end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
		range between unbounded preceding and interval '30' day preceding
	) as lifetime_electric_paid_jobs_prior_30d,
	-- Revenue
	sum(case when job_status = 'Completed' then revenue else 0 end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
		range between unbounded preceding and interval '1' day preceding
	) as lifetime_revenue_prior,
	sum(case when trade_line_type in ('Plumbing','Management', 'Sewer') and job_status = 'Completed' then revenue else 0 end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
		range between unbounded preceding and interval '1' day preceding
	) as lifetime_plumbing_revenue_prior,
	sum(case when trade_line_type = 'HVAC' and job_status = 'Completed' then revenue else 0 end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
		range between unbounded preceding and interval '1' day preceding
	) as lifetime_hvac_revenue_prior,
	sum(case when trade_line_type = 'Electric' and job_status = 'Completed' then revenue else 0 end) over (
		partition by customer_id 
		order by completed_on_est
		range between unbounded preceding and interval '1' day preceding
	) as lifetime_electric_revenue_prior
from 
	jobs
)
select 
  cl.*,
  -- add customer segments
	case when cl.lifetime_completed_jobs_prior = 0 then 1 else 0 end as is_new_completed_customer_prior,
	case when cl.lifetime_completed_jobs_prior_30d = 0 then 1 else 0 end as is_new_completed_customer_prior_30d,
  case when cl.lifetime_paid_jobs_prior = 0 then 1 else 0 end as is_new_customer_prior,
	case when cl.lifetime_paid_jobs_prior_30d = 0 then 1 else 0 end as is_new_customer_prior_30d,
  case when cl.lifetime_paid_jobs_prior > 1 then 1 else 0 end as is_repeat_customer_prior,
	case when lifetime_plumbing_paid_jobs_prior > 0 and lifetime_hvac_paid_jobs_prior > 0 then 1
		when lifetime_plumbing_paid_jobs_prior > 0 and lifetime_electric_paid_jobs_prior > 0 then 1
		when lifetime_hvac_paid_jobs_prior > 0 and lifetime_electric_paid_jobs_prior > 0 then 1
		else 0 
	end as is_multi_trade_customer_prior
from 
	customer_lifetime as cl

model.edw.int_jobs_filtered_to_lto_run.name: int_jobs_filtered_to_lto_run
model.edw.int_jobs_filtered_to_lto_run.raw_code:
with 
jobs as (
  select * from {{ ref('int_jobs_add_attributes') }}
),
estimates as (
  select * from {{ ref('int_estimates_aggregated_to_jobs') }}
),
costs as (
  select * from {{ ref("int_costs_aggregated_to_jobs") }}
),
lto_run as (
select 
  jobs.job_id as lto_run_job_id,
  jobs.job_type_id as lto_run_job_type_id,
  jobs.business_unit_id as lto_run_business_unit_id,
  jobs.business_unit as lto_run_business_unit,
  jobs.job_type as lto_run_job_type,
  jobs.job_status as lto_run_job_status,
  jobs.created_on_est as lto_run_created_on_est,
  jobs.completed_on_est as lto_run_completed_on_est,
  jobs.modified_on_est as lto_run_modified_on_est,
  jobs.customer_id,
  jobs.location_id,
  jobs.recall_for_id,
  jobs.warranty_for_id,
  jobs.no_charge,
  jobs.sold_by_id as lto_run_sold_by_id,
  jobs.sold_by_name as lto_run_sold_by_name,
  jobs.primary_technician_id as lto_run_primary_technician_id,
  jobs.primary_technician_name as lto_run_primary_technician_name,
  jobs.lto_set_by_id,
  jobs.lto_set_by_name,
  jobs.lto_set_job_id,
  {{ lto_run_type("job_type") }} as lto_run_group,
  jobs.sales_lead_type as lto_run_sales_lead_type,
  coalesce(estimates.estimate_count,0) as lto_run_estimate_count,
  coalesce(estimates.sales,0) as lto_run_sales,
  coalesce(estimates.sales_high_value) as lto_sales_high_value,
  coalesce(costs.total_cost, 0) as lto_cost
from
  jobs 
left join estimates on estimates.job_id = jobs.job_id
left join costs on jobs.job_id = costs.job_id
where
  jobs.lto_set_job_id is not null
)
select * from lto_run
model.edw.int_jobs_filtered_to_lto_run.compiled_code:
with 
jobs as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_jobs_add_attributes"
),
estimates as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_estimates_aggregated_to_jobs"
),
costs as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_costs_aggregated_to_jobs"
),
lto_run as (
select 
  jobs.job_id as lto_run_job_id,
  jobs.job_type_id as lto_run_job_type_id,
  jobs.business_unit_id as lto_run_business_unit_id,
  jobs.business_unit as lto_run_business_unit,
  jobs.job_type as lto_run_job_type,
  jobs.job_status as lto_run_job_status,
  jobs.created_on_est as lto_run_created_on_est,
  jobs.completed_on_est as lto_run_completed_on_est,
  jobs.modified_on_est as lto_run_modified_on_est,
  jobs.customer_id,
  jobs.location_id,
  jobs.recall_for_id,
  jobs.warranty_for_id,
  jobs.no_charge,
  jobs.sold_by_id as lto_run_sold_by_id,
  jobs.sold_by_name as lto_run_sold_by_name,
  jobs.primary_technician_id as lto_run_primary_technician_id,
  jobs.primary_technician_name as lto_run_primary_technician_name,
  jobs.lto_set_by_id,
  jobs.lto_set_by_name,
  jobs.lto_set_job_id,
  
    CASE 
        WHEN "job_type" = 'LTO - Sewer' THEN 'Sewer'
        WHEN "job_type" = 'LTO - Downspout' THEN 'Downspout'
        WHEN "job_type" = 'LTO - Water Service' THEN 'Water Service'
        WHEN "job_type" in (
            'HVAC - LTO','HVAC - Furnace 8 Plus','HVAC - No Heat 🔥',
            'HVAC - Air Conditioner 8 Plus', 'HVAC - No Cool ❄',
            'HVAC - Air Conditioner 10 Plus','HVAC - Furnace 10 Plus') THEN 'HVAC'
        WHEN "job_type" in ('HVAC - Team Visit') THEN 'HVAC - Team Visit'
        WHEN "job_type" in ('LTO - Repipe','LTO - Stack') THEN 'Repipe'
        WHEN "job_type" = 'LTO - Water Treatment' THEN 'Water Treatment'
        ELSE 'Other'
        END
 as lto_run_group,
  jobs.sales_lead_type as lto_run_sales_lead_type,
  coalesce(estimates.estimate_count,0) as lto_run_estimate_count,
  coalesce(estimates.sales,0) as lto_run_sales,
  coalesce(estimates.sales_high_value) as lto_sales_high_value,
  coalesce(costs.total_cost, 0) as lto_cost
from
  jobs 
left join estimates on estimates.job_id = jobs.job_id
left join costs on jobs.job_id = costs.job_id
where
  jobs.lto_set_job_id is not null
)
select * from lto_run

model.edw.int_lto_set_aggregated_to_jobs.name: int_lto_set_aggregated_to_jobs
model.edw.int_lto_set_aggregated_to_jobs.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['lto_set_job_id']}
    ]
) }}

with 
lto_run as (
  select * from {{ ref('int_jobs_filtered_to_lto_run') }}
),
lto_set_aggregated_to_jobs as (
    select 
        lto_set_job_id, -- Join this to job_id. This is the job_id of the LTO set job.
        count(case when lto_run_job_status not in ('Hold','Canceled') then 1 end) as lto_run_count,
        count(case when lto_run_job_status = 'Completed' then 1 end) as lto_run_completed_count,
        count(case when lto_run_job_status in ('Scheduled','Dispatched','In Progress') then 1 end) as lto_run_pending_count,
        count(case when lto_run_job_status in ('Hold','Canceled') then 1 end) as lto_run_canceled_count,
        count(case when lto_run_job_status = 'Completed' and lto_run_sales > 0 then 1 end) as lto_run_sold_count,
        -- collapse recall runs into a single row
        min(lto_run_completed_on_est) as first_lto_run_completed_on_est,
        max(lto_run_completed_on_est) as last_lto_run_completed_on_est,
        string_agg(distinct lto_run_job_id::text, ',') as lto_run_job_ids,
        string_agg(distinct lto_run_job_type, ',') as lto_run_job_types,
        string_agg(distinct lto_run_sales_lead_type, ',') as lto_run_sales_lead_type,
        string_agg(distinct coalesce(lto_run_sold_by_id::text, lto_run_primary_technician_id::text), ',') as lto_run_primary_technician_ids,
        string_agg(distinct coalesce(lto_run_sold_by_name, lto_run_primary_technician_name), ',') as lto_run_technician_names,
        sum(lto_run_sales) as lto_sales_generated,
        sum(lto_run_estimate_count) as lto_run_estimate_count,
        sum(lto_sales_high_value) as lto_sales_high_value,
        sum(lto_cost) as lto_cost
    from lto_run
    group by 1
)
select * from lto_set_aggregated_to_jobs

    select 
        lto_set_job_id, -- Join this to job_id. This is the job_id of the LTO set job.
        count(case when lto_run_job_status not in ('Hold','Canceled') then 1 end) as lto_run_count,
        count(case when lto_run_job_status = 'Completed' then 1 end) as lto_run_completed_count,
        count(case when lto_run_job_status in ('Scheduled','Dispatched','In Progress') then 1 end) as lto_run_pending_count,
        count(case when lto_run_job_status in ('Hold','Canceled') then 1 end) as lto_run_canceled_count,
        count(case when lto_run_job_status = 'Completed' and lto_run_sales > 0 then 1 end) as lto_run_sold_count,
        -- collapse recall runs into a single row
        min(lto_run_completed_on_est) as first_lto_run_completed_on_est,
        max(lto_run_completed_on_est) as last_lto_run_completed_on_est,
        string_agg(distinct lto_run_job_id::text, ',') as lto_run_job_ids,
        string_agg(distinct lto_run_job_type, ',') as lto_run_job_types,
        string_agg(distinct lto_run_sales_lead_type, ',') as lto_run_sales_lead_type,
        string_agg(distinct coalesce(lto_run_sold_by_id::text, lto_run_primary_technician_id::text), ',') as lto_run_primary_technician_ids,
        string_agg(distinct coalesce(lto_run_sold_by_name, lto_run_primary_technician_name), ',') as lto_run_technician_names,
        sum(lto_run_sales) as lto_sales_generated,
        sum(lto_run_estimate_count) as lto_run_estimate_count,
        sum(lto_sales_high_value) as lto_sales_high_value,
        sum(lto_cost) as lto_cost
    from lto_run
    group by 1
)
select * from lto_set_aggregated_to_jobs

model.edw.int_memberships_aggregated_to_.name: int_memberships_aggregated_to_jobs
model.edw.int_memberships_aggregated_to_.raw_code:
with jobs as (
    select
        *
    from
        {{ ref('int_jobs_add_attributes') }}
),
members as (
    select
        *
    from
        {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__memberships') }}
)
select 
    jobs.job_id,
    bool_or(case when 
        (jobs.completed_on_est between members.membership_start_date 
            and coalesce(members.membership_end_date, members.cancellation_date, members.next_scheduled_bill_date, current_date)) then true 
        else false 
        end) as customer_had_active_membership
from jobs
left join members
    on jobs.customer_id = members.customer_id
    AND members.membership_status != 'Deleted'
group by 1

model.edw.int_purchase_orders_aggregated.name: int_purchase_orders_aggregated_to_invoices
model.edw.int_purchase_orders_aggregated.raw_code:
with purchase_orders as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__inventory_purchase_orders') }}
    where po_status <> 'Canceled'
),
purchase_order_items as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__inventory_purchase_order_items') }}
    where item_status <> 'Canceled'
),
purchase_order_items_aggregated as (
    select 
        purchase_order_id,
        string_agg(item_id::varchar, ',') as purchase_order_item_ids,
        string_agg(item_name::varchar, ',') as purchase_order_item_names,
        string_agg(item_quantity::varchar, ',') as purchase_order_item_quantities,
        sum(item_unit_cost) as purchase_order_item_total_cost,
        sum(item_total) as purchase_order_item_total
    from purchase_order_items
    group by purchase_order_id
),
purchase_orders_aggregated as (
    SELECT
        poa.invoice_id,
        count(distinct poa.po_id) as po_count,
        sum(poa.total) as total_po_cost,
        sum(poa.tax) as total_tax_cost,
        sum(poa.total - poa.tax) as total_po_cost_before_tax,
        string_agg(poi.purchase_order_item_ids::varchar, ',') as purchase_order_item_ids,
        string_agg(poi.purchase_order_item_names::varchar, ',') as purchase_order_item_names,
        string_agg(poi.purchase_order_item_quantities::varchar, ',') as purchase_order_item_quantities,
        sum(poi.purchase_order_item_total_cost) as purchase_order_item_total_cost,
        sum(poi.purchase_order_item_total) as purchase_order_item_total
    FROM
        purchase_orders poa
    left join purchase_order_items_aggregated poi
        on poa.po_id = poi.purchase_order_id
    group by invoice_id
)
select 
    poa.invoice_id,
    poa.po_count,
    poa.total_po_cost,
    poa.total_tax_cost,
    poa.total_po_cost_before_tax,
    poa.purchase_order_item_ids,
    poa.purchase_order_item_names,
    poa.purchase_order_item_quantities,
    poa.purchase_order_item_total_cost,
    poa.purchase_order_item_total
from purchase_orders_aggregated poa

model.edw.int_rebook_form_aggregated_to_.name: int_rebook_form_aggregated_to_jobs
model.edw.int_rebook_form_aggregated_to_.raw_code:
with 
forms_data as (
    select * 
    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__forms_submissions') }}
    where form_id = 244069
    and type = 'Job'
	and status = 'Completed'
),
job_agg as (
	select 
		form_name,
		owner_id as job_id,
		max(submitted_on::timestamp),
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Business Unit') as business_unit,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Job Type') as job_type,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Why are we rebooking this call?') as rebook_reason,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Did we attempt to get manager help?') as manager_help,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Why couldn''t the manager help avoid the rebook?') as why_manager_no_help,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='How far out did we rebook the customer?') as rebook_days,
		max(unit_value) filter(where unit_name='Additional Comments') as additional_comments
	from forms_data
	group by 1,2
)
select 
	*
from job_agg

model.edw.int_splits_aggregated_to_jobs.name: int_splits_aggregated_to_jobs
model.edw.int_splits_aggregated_to_jobs.raw_code:
with splits as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__splits') }}
),
top_split as (
  select 
  	active,
    job_id,
    technician_id,
    split,
    dense_rank() over (partition by job_id order by split desc, technician_id) as split_rank
  from splits
  where active
)
select 
  job_id, 
  max(case when split_rank = 1 then technician_id end) as primary_technician_id,
  max(case when split_rank = 1 then split end) as max_split,
  count(case when split > 0 then technician_id end) as split_technicians,
  count(case when split = 0 then technician_id end) as zero_split_technicians,
  string_agg(technician_id::text, ',') as technician_ids 
from top_split
where active
group by 1

model.edw.int_tags_aggregated_to_jobs.name: int_tags_aggregated_to_jobs
model.edw.int_tags_aggregated_to_jobs.raw_code:
with 
job_tags as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__job_tagtypeids') }}
),
tags as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__tag_types') }}
)
select 
  job_tags.job_id,
  count(job_tags.tag_type_id) as tag_count,
  string_agg(tags.tag, ',') as tags,
  count(distinct case when {{ is_new_opportunity("tag",alias="tags") }} then job_id end) as new_opportunity
from job_tags
join tags on job_tags.tag_type_id = tags.tag_type_id
group by job_id
model.edw.int_tags_aggregated_to_jobs.compiled_code:
with 
job_tags as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_api__job_tagtypeids"
),
tags as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_api__tag_types"
)
select 
  job_tags.job_id,
  count(job_tags.tag_type_id) as tag_count,
  string_agg(tags.tag, ',') as tags,
  count(distinct case when 
    CASE
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%1R%%'::text THEN '1R'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%1N%%'::text THEN '1N'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%1SPP%%'::text THEN '1SPP'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%2N%%'::text THEN '2N'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%2R%%'::text THEN '1R'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%2SPP%%'::text THEN '2SPP'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%3N%%'::text THEN '3N'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%3R%%'::text THEN '3R'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%3SPP%%'::text THEN '3SPP'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%4N%%'::text THEN '4N'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%4R%%'::text THEN '4R'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%4SPP%%'::text THEN '4SPP'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%HV N%%'::text THEN 'HV N'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%HV R%%'::text THEN 'HV R'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%ER N%%'::text THEN 'ER N'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%ER R%%'::text THEN 'ER R'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%NE N%%'::text THEN 'NE N'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%NE R%%'::text THEN 'NE R'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%Lead Turn-Over%%'::text THEN 'Lead Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%Lead Turnover%%'::text THEN 'Lead Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN "tags"."tag" ~~ '%%Trade Turnover%%'::text THEN 'Trade Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN lower("tags"."tag") ~~ '%%maintenance%%'::text THEN 'Maintenance'::text
          ELSE NULL
          end  IS NOT NULL 
 then job_id end) as new_opportunity
from job_tags
join tags on job_tags.tag_type_id = tags.tag_type_id
group by job_id

model.edw.int_technician_performance_ros.name: int_technician_performance_roster_info
model.edw.int_technician_performance_ros.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'date']}
    ]
)}}
with 
technicians as (
    select * 
    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__technicians') }}
),
max_technician_id as (
    select technician_name, max(technician_id) as technician_id
    from technicians
    group by technician_name
),
unique_technicians as (
    select technicians.*
    from technicians
    inner join max_technician_id
    on technicians.technician_id = max_technician_id.technician_id
),
technician_performance as (
    select *
    from {{ ref("stg_servicetitan_rpt__technician_performance")}} as tp
    WHERE 
    	not technician_business_unit = '990 Eco Plumbers of Ohio' 
        AND (
            tp.completed_revenue > 0 or
            tp.completed_jobs > 0 or
            tp.total_sales > 0 or
            tp.total_paid_time > 0 or
            tp.recall_jobs > 0
        )
)
select distinct
    tp.data_start_date::date as date,
    t.technician_id,
    t.technician_name,
    coalesce(tp.technician_business_unit_id, t.business_unit_id) as technician_business_unit_id,
    coalesce(tp.technician_business_unit , t.business_unit) as technician_business_unit,
    tp.technician_trade,
    tp.technician_division,
    tp.team as technician_team,
    t.active,
    t.is_managed_tech
from 
    unique_technicians as t
left join 
    technician_performance as tp
    on trim(tp.technician_name) = trim(t.technician_name)
where 
    tp.data_timeframe = 'YST'

with 
technicians as (
    select * 
    from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_api__technicians"
),
max_technician_id as (
    select technician_name, max(technician_id) as technician_id
    from technicians
    group by technician_name
),
unique_technicians as (
    select technicians.*
    from technicians
    inner join max_technician_id
    on technicians.technician_id = max_technician_id.technician_id
),
technician_performance as (
    select *
    from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_rpt__technician_performance" as tp
    WHERE 
    	not technician_business_unit = '990 Eco Plumbers of Ohio' 
        AND (
            tp.completed_revenue > 0 or
            tp.completed_jobs > 0 or
            tp.total_sales > 0 or
            tp.total_paid_time > 0 or
            tp.recall_jobs > 0
        )
)
select distinct
    tp.data_start_date::date as date,
    t.technician_id,
    t.technician_name,
    coalesce(tp.technician_business_unit_id, t.business_unit_id) as technician_business_unit_id,
    coalesce(tp.technician_business_unit , t.business_unit) as technician_business_unit,
    tp.technician_trade,
    tp.technician_division,
    tp.team as technician_team,
    t.active,
    t.is_managed_tech
from 
    unique_technicians as t
left join

where 
    tp.data_timeframe = 'YST'

model.edw.int_timesheets_aggregated_to_b.name: int_timesheets_aggregated_to_bu_and_tech
model.edw.int_timesheets_aggregated_to_b.raw_code:
with 
timesheets as (
    select * from {{ ref('int_timesheets_aggregated_to_job_and_tech')}}
),
inova_hours as (
    select * from {{ ref('int_worked_hours_aggregated_to_day') }}
),
to_bu as (
select 
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit,
    technician_id,
    technician_business_unit_id,
    completed_on_est,
    sum(job_hours) as job_hours
from timesheets
group by 
    1,2,3,4,5
),
to_day AS (
SELECT 
	*,
	sum(job_hours) OVER (PARTITION BY completed_on_est, technician_id) AS total_day_job_hours
FROM to_bu
),
add_inova AS (
SELECT to_day.*,
	COALESCE(job_hours / nullif(total_day_job_hours,0),0) AS bu_pct_of_job_hours,
	h.hours
FROM to_day
LEFT JOIN inova_hours AS h
ON to_day.technician_id = h.servicetitan_technician_id
AND to_day.completed_on_est = h."date"
)
SELECT *,
CASE 
	WHEN hours IS NULL THEN NULL 
	WHEN technician_business_unit_id = business_unit_id THEN (hours - total_day_job_hours) + job_hours 
	ELSE job_hours END AS bu_worked_hours,
hours  * bu_pct_of_job_hours AS bu_inova_hours
FROM add_inova

model.edw.int_timesheets_aggregated_to_i.raw_code:
with
timesheets as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__payroll_timesheets')}}
),
payrolls as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__payroll') }}
),
invoices as (
    select invoice_id, job_id from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__invoices') }}
),
technician_burdens as (
    select * from {{ref('stg_servicetitan_api__settings_technicians')}}
),
timesheets_invoice_aggregate as (
    select 
        invoices.invoice_id,
        sum(timesheet_duration) as total_paid_burden_hours,
        sum(coalesce(pr.payroll_burden_rate, tb.burden_rate) * extract(epoch from timesheet_duration) / 3600) as total_burden_cost
    from timesheets ts
    left join payrolls pr 
        on pr.employee_id = ts.technician_id
        and ts.dispatched_on_est::date between pr.started_on_est::date and pr.ended_on_est::date
    left join technician_burdens tb 
        on ts.technician_id = tb.technician_id
    left join invoices
        on ts.job_id = invoices.job_id
    group by 1
)
select
    *
from timesheets_invoice_aggregate

model.edw.int_timesheets_aggregated_to_j.name: int_timesheets_aggregated_to_job_and_tech
model.edw.int_timesheets_aggregated_to_j.raw_code:
with
timesheets as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__payroll_timesheets')}}
),
jobs as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__jobs') }}
),
business_units as (
    select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__business_units') }}
),
technicians AS (
	SELECT * FROM {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__technicians') }}
)
SELECT
	ts.job_id,
	j.completed_on_est::Date,
    j.business_unit_id,
    bu.business_unit,
    t.business_unit_id AS technician_business_unit_id,
	ts.technician_id,
	t.email,
	sum(COALESCE(EXTRACT(epoch FROM ts.timesheet_duration) / 3600,0)) AS job_hours,
    SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ts.done_on_est - ts.arrived_on_est))) / 60.0 AS timesheet_working_minutes,
    SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ts.arrived_on_est - ts.dispatched_on_est))) / 60.0 AS timesheet_dispatched_minutes,
    (SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ts.done_on_est - ts.arrived_on_est))) + SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ts.arrived_on_est - ts.dispatched_on_est)))) / 60.0 AS timesheet_minutes
FROM 
    timesheets as ts 
LEFT JOIN 
    jobs as j 
    ON ts.job_id = j.job_id
LEFT JOIN
    business_units as bu
    ON j.business_unit_id = bu.business_unit_id
LEFT JOIN technicians AS t
	ON ts.technician_id = t.technician_id
GROUP BY 
    1,2,3,4,5,6,7

model.edw.int_trucks.name: int_trucks
model.edw.int_trucks.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['vin']}
    ]
) }}

with 
fleet as (
    select * from {{ ref("stg_monday__fleet_roster") }}
    where department != 'Advanced Services'
),
success_days as (
    select *
    from {{ ref("stg_monday__success_day_checklist")}}
    where success_day_status is null and start_date > '2000-01-01'
),
success_days_no_vehicle as (
    select
        null as vin,
        vehicle_number,
        null as vehicle_year,
        null as vehicle_make,
        null as vehicle_model,
        null as plate,
        technician as current_technician,
        null as location,
        null as status,
        department,
        False as is_unassigned_truck,
        False as is_active_truck,
        True as pre_success_day,
        technician as next_success_day_technician
    from success_days
    where vehicle_number = ''
),
success_day_vehicle as (
    select
        vehicle_number,
        technician,
        True as pre_success_day
    from success_days
    where vehicle_number != ''
),
fleet_full as (
    select
        vin,
        fleet.vehicle_number,
        vehicle_year,
        vehicle_make,
        vehicle_model,
        plate,
        current_technician,
        location,
        status,
        department,
        case when current_technician ~* 'possession' then True else False end as is_unassigned_truck,
        case when status = 'Active' and current_technician !~* 'Selling' and vehicle_make !~* 'TRAILER' then True else False end as is_active_truck,
        coalesce(sdv.pre_success_day, False) as pre_success_day,
        sdv.technician as next_success_day_technician
    from fleet
    left join success_day_vehicle sdv 
        on fleet.vehicle_number = sdv.vehicle_number
)
select * from fleet_full
union all
select * from success_days_no_vehicle

model.edw.int_estimates_aggregated_to_it.name: int_estimates_aggregated_to_items
model.edw.int_estimates_aggregated_to_it.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['estimate_item_id']}
    ]
) }}

with
estimates as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__estimates') }}
),
estimate_items as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__estimate_items')}}
),
items as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__items')}}
)
select 
  ei.estimate_item_id,
  est.estimate_id,
  est.job_id,
  est.status_name,
  est.sold_on_est,
  est.sold_by_id,
  est.customer_id,
  est.project_id,
  est.location_id,
  est.business_unit_id,
  est.business_unit_name,
  est.modified_on_est,
  ei.item_id,
  ei.item_name,
  {{abc_item_group('ei')}} as abc_group,
  ei.item_display_name,
  ei.item_type,
  items.item_cross_sale_group,
  est.subtotal as total_estimate_sales,
  -- NOTE: Due to pipeline deleted estimate items are removed from the estimate_items table 
  case when est.subtotal <> 0 then ei.item_quantity else 0 end as item_quantity,
  case when est.subtotal <> 0 then ei.item_price else 0 end as item_price,
  case when est.subtotal <> 0 then ei.item_total else 0 end as item_total,
  case when est.subtotal <> 0 then ei.item_sold_hours else 0 end as item_sold_hours
from estimates as est
inner join estimate_items as ei
on est.estimate_id = ei.estimate_id
left join items
on ei.item_id = items.item_id
where 
  est.active
