model.edw.technicians_metrics_rankings.name: technicians_metrics_rankings
model.edw.technicians_metrics_rankings.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['department_type']}
    ]
) }}

-- Stage 1: Roll up to tech / month across all BUs, compute derived rate metrics
with totals as (
    select
        completed_on_est,
        technician_id,
        technician,
        technician_email,
        mode() within group (order by business_unit) as department_type,
        max(days_worked) as days_worked,
        sum(completed_jobs) as completed_jobs,
        sum(opps) as opps,
        sum(sales_opps) as sales_opps,
        sum(converted) as converted,
        coalesce(sum(converted) / NULLIF(sum(opps),0),0) as conversion,
        sum(sales_converted) as sales_converted,
        coalesce(sum(sales_converted) / NULLIF(sum(sales_opps),0),0) as sales_conversion,
        coalesce(sum(sales) / NULLIF(max(days_worked),0),0) as sales_per_day,
        coalesce(sum(sales) / NULLIF(sum(sales_converted),0),0) as average_sale,
        coalesce(sum(sales) / NULLIF(sum(sales_opps),0),0) as sales_run_rate,
        coalesce(sum(sold_hours)/NULLIF(sum(total_appointment_duration),0),0) as sold_hours_efficiency,
        coalesce(sum(recalls) / NULLIF(sum(completed_jobs),0),0) as recall_rate,
        coalesce(sum(total_revenue) / NULLIF(sum(sold_hours),0),0) as revenue_per_sold_hour,
        coalesce(sum(total_revenue) / NULLIF(sum(total_appointment_duration),0),0) as revenue_per_work_hour,
        sum(ltos_set) as ltos_set,
        sum(recalls) as recalls,
        sum(total_revenue) as total_revenue,
        sum(opp_revenue) as opp_revenue,
        sum(sales) as sales,
        sum(sales_opp_sales) as sales_opp_sales,
        sum(lto_sales) as lto_sales,
        sum(discounts) as discounts,
        sum(sold_hours) as sold_hours,
        sum(total_appointment_duration) as total_appointment_duration,
        sum(gross_margin) as gross_margin,
        coalesce(max(memberships_sold), 0) as memberships_sold
    from {{ ref("technicians_metrics_by_month") }}
    where technician !~* 'AAA'
    group by 1,2,3,4
),

-- Stage 2: Rank each metric within department and month
ranks as (
    select
        completed_on_est,
        technician_id,
        technician,
        technician_email,
        department_type,
        days_worked,
        completed_jobs,
        rank() over (w order by completed_jobs desc)        as completed_jobs_rank,
        opps,
        rank() over (w order by opps desc)                  as opps_rank,
        sales_opps,
        rank() over (w order by sales_opps desc)            as sales_opps_rank,
        converted,
        rank() over (w order by converted desc)             as converted_rank,
        conversion,
        rank() over (w order by conversion desc)            as conversion_rank,
        recalls,
        rank() over (w order by recalls asc)                as recalls_ranked,
        sales_converted,
        rank() over (w order by sales_converted desc)       as sales_converted_rank,
        sales_conversion,
        rank() over (w order by sales_conversion desc)      as sales_conversion_rank,
        sales_per_day,
        rank() over (w order by sales_per_day desc)         as sales_per_day_rank,
        average_sale,
        rank() over (w order by average_sale desc)          as average_sale_rank,
        sales_run_rate,
        rank() over (w order by sales_run_rate desc)        as sales_run_rate_rank,
        ltos_set,
        rank() over (w order by ltos_set desc)              as ltos_set_rank,
        total_revenue,
        rank() over (w order by total_revenue desc)         as total_revenue_rank,
        opp_revenue,
        rank() over (w order by opp_revenue desc)           as opp_revenue_rank,
        sales,
        rank() over (w order by sales desc)                 as sales_rank,
        sales_opp_sales,
        rank() over (w order by sales_opp_sales desc)       as sales_opp_sales_rank,
        lto_sales,
        rank() over (w order by lto_sales desc)             as lto_sales_rank,
        discounts,
        rank() over (w order by discounts desc)             as discounts_rank,
        sold_hours,
        rank() over (w order by sold_hours desc)            as sold_hours_rank,
        sold_hours_efficiency,
        rank() over (w order by sold_hours_efficiency desc) as sold_hour_efficiency_rank,
        recall_rate,
        rank() over (w order by recall_rate asc)            as recall_rate_rank,
        revenue_per_sold_hour,
        rank() over (w order by revenue_per_sold_hour desc) as revenue_per_sold_hour_rank,
        revenue_per_work_hour,
        rank() over (w order by revenue_per_work_hour desc) as revenue_per_work_hour_rank,
        gross_margin,
        rank() over (w order by gross_margin desc)          as gross_margin_rank,
        memberships_sold,
        rank() over (w order by memberships_sold desc)      as memberships_sold_rank
    from totals
    window w as (partition by completed_on_est, department_type)
)
select
    *
from
    ranks

        rank() over (w order by revenue_per_sold_hour desc) as revenue_per_sold_hour_rank,
        revenue_per_work_hour,
        rank() over (w order by revenue_per_work_hour desc) as revenue_per_work_hour_rank,
        gross_margin,
        rank() over (w order by gross_margin desc)          as gross_margin_rank,
        memberships_sold,
        rank() over (w order by memberships_sold desc)      as memberships_sold_rank
    from totals
    window w as (partition by completed_on_est, department_type)
)
select
    *
from
    ranks

model.edw.technician_job_type.name: technician_job_type
model.edw.technician_job_type.raw_code:
select
	js.job_id,
	js.job_type,
	js.sold_by_name,
	js.sold_by_business_unit,
	js.business_unit,
	js.completed_on_est,
	js.tags,
	js.sales,
	js.is_sales_opportunity as is_opportunity,
	js.is_sales_converted as is_converted,
	p.technician_level as skill_level,
	case when
		avts."is_managed_tech"=true then TRUE else FALSE 
	end as is_managed,
	avts."technician_level",
	p.photo_url,
	p.status,
	js.is_recall
from {{ ref('jobs_splits') }} js
left join ecoplumbers.job_types jt
	on js.job_type = jt.job_type
left join  {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__technicians_snapshot') }} avts
	on js.sold_by_id = avts.technician_id
	and avts.report_date = current_date
left join {{ ref('employees') }} p 
	on js.sold_by_name = p.full_name
where 
	js.job_type != 'To-Do'
	{# and (status = 'active' or status is null) #}
	{# and js.sold_by_name not like 'AAA%%' #}
	and js.job_status = 'Completed'

model.edw.estimate_items.name: estimate_items
model.edw.estimate_items.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['job_id']},
      {'columns': ['completed_on_est']},
    ]
) }}
with
estimate_items as (
  select * from {{ ref('int_estimates_aggregated_to_items')}}
),
jobs as (
  select 
  	job_id,
  	job_type,
    job_status,
  	completed_on_est,
    customer_id,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit,
  	primary_technician_id,
  	primary_technician_name,
    service_lead_type,
  	lto_set_by_id,
  	lto_set_by_name,
    lto_set_job_id,
    lto_opp_group,
    {{ lto_run_type("job_type",alias="jobs") }} as lto_run_opp_group  
  from {{ ref('int_jobs_add_attributes')}} as jobs
),
techs as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__technicians')}}
),
employees as (
  select * from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__employees')}}
)
select 
  est.estimate_id,
  est.job_id,
  jobs.job_type,
  jobs.job_status,
  jobs.completed_on_est,
  jobs.customer_id,
  est.status_name,
  coalesce(est.sold_on_est,jobs.completed_on_est) as opportunity_date_est,
  coalesce(est.sold_by_id, jobs.primary_technician_id) as sold_by_id,
  coalesce(techs.technician_name, employees.employee_name || ' (Office)', jobs.primary_technician_name) as sold_by_name,
  techs.business_unit_id as sold_by_business_unit_id,
  techs.business_unit as sold_by_business_unit,
  jobs.business_unit_id as job_business_unit_id,
  jobs.business_unit as job_business_unit,
  jobs.lto_set_by_id,
  jobs.lto_set_by_name,
  lto_run.lto_opp_group as lto_set_opp_group,
  jobs.lto_run_opp_group,
  jobs.service_lead_type,
  est.customer_id as estimate_customer_id,
  est.project_id as estimate_project_id,
  est.location_id as estimate_location_id,
  est.business_unit_id as estimate_business_unit_id,
  est.business_unit_name as estimate_business_unit_name,
  employee_name is not null as is_office_sold,
  est.job_id is null as is_non_job_estimate,
  est.modified_on_est,
  est.sold_on_est,
  est.estimate_item_id,
  est.item_id,
  est.item_name,
  est.abc_group,
  est.item_display_name,
  est.item_type,
  est.item_cross_sale_group,
  est.total_estimate_sales,
  -- NOTE: Due to pipeline deleted estimate items are removed from the estimate_items table 
  est.item_quantity,
  est.item_price,
  est.item_total,
  est.item_sold_hours
from estimate_items as est
left join techs
on est.sold_by_id = techs.technician_id
left join jobs
on est.job_id = jobs.job_id
left join jobs as lto_run 
on jobs.lto_set_job_id = lto_run.job_id
left join employees
on est.sold_by_id = employees.employee_id
model.edw.estimate_items.compiled_code:

estimate_items as (

        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" = 'LTO - Downspout' THEN 'Downspout'
        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" = 'LTO - Water Service' THEN 'Water Service'
        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" in (
            'HVAC - LTO','HVAC - Furnace 8 Plus','HVAC - No Heat 🔥',
            'HVAC - Air Conditioner 8 Plus', 'HVAC - No Cool ❄',
            'HVAC - Air Conditioner 10 Plus','HVAC - Furnace 10 Plus') THEN 'HVAC'
        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" in ('HVAC - Team Visit') THEN 'HVAC - Team Visit'
        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" in ('LTO - Repipe','LTO - Stack') THEN 'Repipe'
        WHEN "jobs"."job_type" = 'LTO - Water Treatment' THEN 'Water Treatment'
        ELSE 'Other'
        END
 as lto_run_opp_group  
  from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_jobs_add_attributes" as jobs
),
techs as (
  select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_servicetitan_api__technicians"
),
employees as (

)
select

  est.job_id,
  jobs.job_type,
  jobs.job_status,
  jobs.completed_on_est,
  jobs.customer_id,
  est.status_name,
  coalesce(est.sold_on_est,jobs.completed_on_est) as opportunity_date_est,
  coalesce(est.sold_by_id, jobs.primary_technician_id) as sold_by_id,
  coalesce(techs.technician_name, employees.employee_name || ' (Office)', jobs.primary_technician_name) as sold_by_name,
  techs.business_unit_id as sold_by_business_unit_id,
  techs.business_unit as sold_by_business_unit,
  jobs.business_unit_id as job_business_unit_id,
  jobs.business_unit as job_business_unit,
  jobs.lto_set_by_id,
  jobs.lto_set_by_name,
  lto_run.lto_opp_group as lto_set_opp_group,
  jobs.lto_run_opp_group,
  jobs.service_lead_type,
  est.customer_id as estimate_customer_id,
  est.project_id as estimate_project_id,
  est.location_id as estimate_location_id,
  est.business_unit_id as estimate_business_unit_id,
  est.business_unit_name as estimate_business_unit_name,
  employee_name is not null as is_office_sold,
  est.job_id is null as is_non_job_estimate,
  est.modified_on_est,
  est.sold_on_est,
  est.estimate_item_id,
  est.item_id,
  est.item_name,
  est.abc_group,
  est.item_display_name,
  est.item_type,
  est.item_cross_sale_group,
  est.total_estimate_sales,
  -- NOTE: Due to pipeline deleted estimate items are removed from the estimate_items table 
  est.item_quantity,
  est.item_price,
  est.item_total,
  est.item_sold_hours
from estimate_items as est
left join techs
on est.sold_by_id = techs.technician_id
left join jobs
on est.job_id = jobs.job_id
left join jobs as lto_run 
on jobs.lto_set_job_id = lto_run.job_id
left join employees
on est.sold_by_id = employees.employee_id

  from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."estimate_items"

model.edw.pricebook_history.name: pricebook_history
model.edw.pricebook_history.raw_code:
with item_history as (
    select * from {{ ref('int_pricebook_item_history') }}
),
invoice_item_history as (
    select * from {{ ref('int_invoice_items_aggregated_to_item_date') }}
),
estimate_item_history as (
    select * from {{ ref('int_estimates_aggregated_to_item_date') }}
),
item_changes as (
    select * from {{ ref('int_pricebook_item_changes') }}
)
select
    ih.*,
    {# item_changes #}
    change.price_difference,
    change.percentage_difference,
    coalesce(change.price_difference <> 0, false) as price_changed,
    {# invoices #}
    iih.item_quantity as sold_item_quantity,
    iih.max_item_price as sold_max_item_price,
    iih.item_sold_hours as sold_item_sold_hours,
    iih.item_total as sold_item_total,
    iih.total_invoice_total as sold_total_invoice_total,
    iih.total_invoice_item_quantity as sold_total_invoice_item_quantity,
    iih.total_invoice_item_cost as sold_total_invoice_item_cost,
    iih.total_invoice_item_reductions as sold_total_invoice_item_reductions,
    {# estimates #}
    eih.jobs_with_estimate_total as total_jobs_with_estimate_count,
    eih.sold_estimates as total_estimates_sold_count, 
    eih.total_estimates as total_estimates_count, 
    eih.sold_cheapest_estimates as total_cheapest_estimates_sold_count, 
    eih.sold_priciest_estimates as total_priciest_estimates_sold_count, 
    eih.sold_middle_estimates as total_middle_estimates_sold_count, 
    eih.job_sold_estimate_potential_loss as total_estimates_sold_potential_loss, 
    eih.job_sold_estimate_potential_gain as total_estimates_sold_potential_gain, 
    eih.sold_estimate_item_total as total_estimates_sold_total,
    eih.largest_estimate_total as total_priciest_estimates_total,
    eih.smalled_estimate_total as total_cheapest_estimates_total,
    eih.job_average_estimates as average_job_estimate_count
from
    item_history ih
left join invoice_item_history iih
    on ih.item_id = iih.item_id
    and ih.history_date = iih.invoice_date
left join estimate_item_history eih 
    on ih.item_id = eih.item_id
    and ih.history_date = eih.history_date
left join item_changes change
    on ih.item_id = change.item_id
    and ih.history_date = change.history_date

model.edw.technician_counts.name: technician_counts
model.edw.technician_counts.raw_code:
-- Weekly & Monthly Distinct Technician Counts and Averages by Business Unit
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    j.completed_on_est :: date AS report_date,
    j.primary_technician_id AS technician_id,
    j.primary_technician_name AS technician_name,
    COALESCE(j.primary_technician_business_unit, 'Unknown') AS business_unit, -- Handle NULL BUs
    j.revenue,
    j.sales,
    EXTRACT( DOW FROM j.completed_on_est::date ) AS day_of_week -- 0=Sun, 6=Sat in PostgreSQL
  FROM
    {{ ref('jobs') }} AS j
  WHERE
    j.job_status = 'Completed'
    AND j.primary_technician_id IS NOT NULL
    AND j.job_type NOT IN ('To-Do')
),
weekly AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('week', report_date) :: date AS timeframe_start_date,
    business_unit,

    -- Original Counts
    COUNT(DISTINCT technician_id) AS total_weekly_distinct_techs,
    COUNT(
      DISTINCT CASE WHEN revenue > 0 THEN technician_id ELSE NULL END
    ) AS revenue_producing_techs_weekly,
    COUNT(
      DISTINCT CASE WHEN sales > 0 THEN technician_id ELSE NULL END
    ) AS sales_producing_techs_weekly,
    COUNT(
      DISTINCT CASE WHEN day_of_week IN (0, 6) THEN technician_id ELSE NULL END
    ) AS weekend_distinct_techs,
    COUNT(
      DISTINCT CASE WHEN day_of_week BETWEEN 1 AND 5 THEN technician_id ELSE NULL END
    ) AS weekday_distinct_techs,

    -- Additions for New Metrics Calculation
    COUNT(*) AS total_jobs_weekly, -- Total jobs for the group this week
    COUNT(DISTINCT (technician_id, report_date)) AS total_tech_workdays_weekly, -- Total distinct person-days worked this week

    -- Metric 1: Avg Days Per Week Per Technician
    -- (Total distinct person-days worked) / (Total distinct technicians)
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT (technician_id, report_date)) AS NUMERIC)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT technician_id), 0)
      AS avg_days_per_tech_weekly,

    -- Metric 2: Avg Jobs Per Week Per Technician
    -- (Total jobs) / (Total distinct technicians)
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS NUMERIC)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT technician_id), 0)
      AS avg_jobs_per_tech_weekly,

    -- Metric 3: Avg Jobs Per Day Per Technician (on days they worked)
    -- (Total jobs) / (Total distinct person-days worked)
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS NUMERIC)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT (technician_id, report_date)), 0)
      AS avg_jobs_per_tech_per_day_weekly

  FROM
    base
  GROUP BY
    timeframe_start_date,
    business_unit
),
weekly_2 AS (
  SELECT
    'weekly' AS timeframe,
    w.*, -- Inherits all columns from weekly CTE
    CASE
      WHEN business_unit ~* 'service|maint' THEN w.revenue_producing_techs_weekly
      WHEN business_unit ~* 'sales' THEN w.sales_producing_techs_weekly
      ELSE 0
    END AS opportunity_techs_weekly
  FROM
    weekly AS w
),
monthly AS (
  SELECT
    'monthly' AS timeframe,
    date_trunc('month', timeframe_start_date) :: date AS timeframe_start_date,
    business_unit,
    -- Original Aggregations
    CEIL(AVG(total_weekly_distinct_techs)) AS total_weekly_distinct_techs,
    CEIL(AVG(revenue_producing_techs_weekly)) AS revenue_producing_techs_weekly,
    CEIL(AVG(sales_producing_techs_weekly)) AS sales_producing_techs_weekly,
    CEIL(AVG(weekend_distinct_techs)) AS weekend_distinct_techs,
    CEIL(AVG(weekday_distinct_techs)) AS weekday_distinct_techs,
    -- Note: total_jobs_weekly & total_tech_workdays_weekly are intermediate, not usually averaged directly

    -- Aggregate New Average Metrics
    -- Taking AVG of the weekly averages, then CEIL
    (AVG(total_jobs_weekly)) AS total_jobs_weekly,
    (AVG(total_tech_workdays_weekly)) AS avg_days_per_tech_weekly,
    (AVG(avg_days_per_tech_weekly)) AS avg_days_per_tech_weekly,
    (AVG(avg_jobs_per_tech_weekly)) AS avg_jobs_per_tech_weekly,
    (AVG(avg_jobs_per_tech_per_day_weekly)) AS avg_jobs_per_tech_per_day_weekly,
    
    -- Calculated After
    CEIL(AVG(opportunity_techs_weekly)) AS opportunity_techs_weekly
  FROM
    weekly_2
  GROUP BY
    timeframe, -- Group by the literal 'monthly'
    timeframe_start_date, -- Group by the month start date
    business_unit
),
combined AS (
  SELECT * FROM weekly_2
  UNION ALL -- Using UNION ALL assuming timeframe column makes rows unique
  SELECT * FROM monthly
)
SELECT
  *
FROM
  combined
ORDER BY
  timeframe, -- 'monthly', 'weekly'
  timeframe_start_date DESC,
  business_unit
model.edw.technician_counts.compiled_code:
-- Weekly & Monthly Distinct Technician Counts and Averages by Business Unit
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    j.completed_on_est :: date AS report_date,
    j.primary_technician_id AS technician_id,
    j.primary_technician_name AS technician_name,
    COALESCE(j.primary_technician_business_unit, 'Unknown') AS business_unit, -- Handle NULL BUs
    j.revenue,
    j.sales,
    EXTRACT( DOW FROM j.completed_on_est::date ) AS day_of_week -- 0=Sun, 6=Sat in PostgreSQL
  FROM
    "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."jobs" AS j
  WHERE
    j.job_status = 'Completed'
    AND j.primary_technician_id IS NOT NULL
    AND j.job_type NOT IN ('To-Do')
),
weekly AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('week', report_date) :: date AS timeframe_start_date,
    business_unit,

    -- Original Counts
    COUNT(DISTINCT technician_id) AS total_weekly_distinct_techs,
    COUNT(
      DISTINCT CASE WHEN revenue > 0 THEN technician_id ELSE NULL END
    ) AS revenue_producing_techs_weekly,
    COUNT(
      DISTINCT CASE WHEN sales > 0 THEN technician_id ELSE NULL END
    ) AS sales_producing_techs_weekly,
    COUNT(
      DISTINCT CASE WHEN day_of_week IN (0, 6) THEN technician_id ELSE NULL END
    ) AS weekend_distinct_techs,
    COUNT(
      DISTINCT CASE WHEN day_of_week BETWEEN 1 AND 5 THEN technician_id ELSE NULL END
    ) AS weekday_distinct_techs,

    -- Additions for New Metrics Calculation
    COUNT(*) AS total_jobs_weekly, -- Total jobs for the group this week
    COUNT(DISTINCT (technician_id, report_date)) AS total_tech_workdays_weekly, -- Total distinct person-days worked this week

    -- Metric 1: Avg Days Per Week Per Technician
    -- (Total distinct person-days worked) / (Total distinct technicians)
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT (technician_id, report_date)) AS NUMERIC)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT technician_id), 0)
      AS avg_days_per_tech_weekly,

    -- Metric 2: Avg Jobs Per Week Per Technician
    -- (Total jobs) / (Total distinct technicians)
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS NUMERIC)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT technician_id), 0)
      AS avg_jobs_per_tech_weekly,

    -- Metric 3: Avg Jobs Per Day Per Technician (on days they worked)
    -- (Total jobs) / (Total distinct person-days worked)
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS NUMERIC)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT (technician_id, report_date)), 0)
      AS avg_jobs_per_tech_per_day_weekly

  FROM
    base
  GROUP BY
    timeframe_start_date,
    business_unit
),
weekly_2 AS (
  SELECT
    'weekly' AS timeframe,
    w.*, -- Inherits all columns from weekly CTE
    CASE
      WHEN business_unit ~* 'service|maint' THEN w.revenue_producing_techs_weekly
      WHEN business_unit ~* 'sales' THEN w.sales_producing_techs_weekly
      ELSE 0
    END AS opportunity_techs_weekly
  FROM
    weekly AS w
),
monthly AS (
  SELECT
    'monthly' AS timeframe,
    date_trunc('month', timeframe_start_date) :: date AS timeframe_start_date,
    business_unit,
    -- Original Aggregations
    CEIL(AVG(total_weekly_distinct_techs)) AS total_weekly_distinct_techs,
    CEIL(AVG(revenue_producing_techs_weekly)) AS revenue_producing_techs_weekly,
    CEIL(AVG(sales_producing_techs_weekly)) AS sales_producing_techs_weekly,
    CEIL(AVG(weekend_distinct_techs)) AS weekend_distinct_techs,
    CEIL(AVG(weekday_distinct_techs)) AS weekday_distinct_techs,
    -- Note: total_jobs_weekly & total_tech_workdays_weekly are intermediate, not usually averaged directly

    -- Aggregate New Average Metrics
    -- Taking AVG of the weekly averages, then CEIL
    (AVG(total_jobs_weekly)) AS total_jobs_weekly,
    (AVG(total_tech_workdays_weekly)) AS avg_days_per_tech_weekly,
    (AVG(avg_days_per_tech_weekly)) AS avg_days_per_tech_weekly,
    (AVG(avg_jobs_per_tech_weekly)) AS avg_jobs_per_tech_weekly,
    (AVG(avg_jobs_per_tech_per_day_weekly)) AS avg_jobs_per_tech_per_day_weekly,
    
    -- Calculated After
    CEIL(AVG(opportunity_techs_weekly)) AS opportunity_techs_weekly
  FROM
    weekly_2
  GROUP BY
    timeframe, -- Group by the literal 'monthly'
    timeframe_start_date, -- Group by the month start date
    business_unit
),
combined AS (
  SELECT * FROM weekly_2
  UNION ALL -- Using UNION ALL assuming timeframe column makes rows unique
  SELECT * FROM monthly
)
SELECT
  *
FROM
  combined
ORDER BY
  timeframe, -- 'monthly', 'weekly'
  timeframe_start_date DESC,
  business_unit

model.edw.technician_performance.name: technician_performance
model.edw.technician_performance.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[]
) }}

WITH 
dates AS (
    SELECT * from {{ ref('technician_performance_dates') }}
),
non_job_revenue as (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe AS data_timeframe,
		0 AS technician_id,
		'Non-Job Invoice' AS technician,
		nji.business_unit_name AS job_business_unit,
		nji.business_unit_name AS technician_business_unit,
		sum(0) AS jobs,
		sum(0) AS opportunities,
		sum(0) AS converted_jobs,
		sum(0) AS opportunity_conversion_rate,
		sum(nji.invoice_total) AS completed_revenue,
		sum(nji.item_sold_hours) as sold_hours,
		sum(nji.invoice_total) / NULLIF(count(nji.invoice_id),0) AS converted_job_average,
		sum(0) AS completed_tasks,
		sum(0) AS tasks_per_opportunity
	FROM {{ ref ('non_job_invoices') }} nji
	JOIN dates AS d ON nji.invoice_date::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
),
revenue_jobs AS (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe AS data_timeframe,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_name,'No Technician') AS technician,
		j.business_unit AS job_business_unit,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		count(job_id) AS jobs,
		sum(is_opportunity::int) AS opportunities,
		sum(is_converted::int) AS converted_jobs,
		sum(is_converted::numeric) / NULLIF(sum(is_opportunity::numeric),0) AS opportunity_conversion_rate,
		sum(revenue) AS completed_revenue,
		sum(sold_hours) as sold_hours,
		sum(revenue::numeric) / NULLIF(sum(is_converted::numeric),0) AS converted_job_average,
		sum(tasks) AS completed_tasks,
		sum(tasks) / NULLIF(sum(is_opportunity::int),0) AS tasks_per_opportunity
	FROM {{ ref ('jobs_splits') }} j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.completed_on_est::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date
	AND job_status = 'Completed'
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
),
revenue AS (
	SELECT *, 0 as "job_revenue", completed_revenue as "non_job_revenue" from non_job_revenue
	UNION ALL
	SELECT *, completed_revenue as "job_revenue", 0 as "non_job_revenue" from revenue_jobs
),
sales_jobs AS (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe AS data_timeframe,
		COALESCE(split_technician_id, sold_by_id, primary_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		COALESCE(split_technician_name, sold_by_name, primary_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
		business_unit AS job_business_unit,
		COALESCE(split_technician_business_unit, sold_by_business_unit, primary_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		sum(is_sales_opportunity::int) AS sales_opportunity,
		sum(is_sales_converted::int) AS closed_opportunities,
		sum(is_sales_converted::numeric) / NULLIF(sum(is_sales_opportunity::numeric),0) AS close_rate,
		sum(estimate_count) AS completed_options,
		sum(estimate_count) / NULLIF(sum(is_opportunity::int),0) AS options_per_opportunity,
		sum(sales) AS sales,
		sum(sales) / NULLIF(sum(is_sales_converted::numeric),0) AS closed_average_sale,
		sum(CASE WHEN lto_set_job_id IS NOT NULL THEN is_sales_opportunity ELSE 0 end) AS lto_run_opportunity,
		sum(CASE WHEN lto_set_job_id IS NOT NULL THEN is_sales_converted ELSE 0 end) AS lto_run_converted,
		sum(CASE WHEN lto_set_job_id IS NOT NULL THEN sales ELSE 0 end) AS lto_run_sales
	FROM {{ ref ('jobs_splits') }} j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.is_sales_opportunity_date_est::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date
	AND job_status = 'Completed'
	and split > 0
	AND (sold_by_name = primary_technician_name or sold_by_name is null)
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
),
sales_estimates as (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe AS data_timeframe,
		coalesce(estimate_business_unit_id, job_business_unit_id, sold_by_business_unit_id, 999) as job_business_unit_id,
		coalesce(estimate_business_unit_name, job_business_unit, sold_by_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') as job_business_unit,
		coalesce(sold_by_business_unit_id, estimate_business_unit_id, 999) as technician_business_unit_id,
		coalesce(sold_by_business_unit, estimate_business_unit_name, 'No Business Unit') as technician_business_unit,
		coalesce(sold_by_id, 999) as technician_id,
		coalesce(sold_by_name, 'No Technician') as technician,
		sum(item_total) AS sales
	FROM
		{{ ref('estimate_items_sold') }} est
	JOIN 
		dates AS d 
		ON est.sold_on_est::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date
	GROUP BY 
		1,2,3,4,5,6,7
),
lto_jobs AS (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe AS data_timeframe,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
		j.business_unit AS job_business_unit,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		sum(is_lto_set::int) AS lto_set,
		sum(lto_sales) AS lto_set_sales
	FROM {{ ref ('jobs_splits') }} j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.completed_on_est::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date
	WHERE job_status = 'Completed'
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
),
spine AS (
 SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit
 FROM revenue
 UNION
  SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit
 FROM sales_jobs
 UNION
  SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit
 FROM lto_jobs
 UNION
  SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit
 FROM sales_estimates
),
spine_dates as (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe,
		technician_id,
		technician,
		job_business_unit,
		technician_business_unit,
		min(data_start_date) as data_start_date,
		max(data_end_date) as data_end_date
	FROM spine
	JOIN dates USING (data_timeframe)
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
),
output as (
SELECT
    spine.data_timeframe,
    spine.data_start_date::Date,
    spine.data_end_date::Date,
    spine.technician_id,
    spine.technician,
    spine.job_business_unit,
    spine.technician_business_unit,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.jobs, 0) AS jobs,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.opportunities, 0) AS opportunities,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.converted_jobs, 0) AS converted_jobs,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.opportunity_conversion_rate, 0) AS opportunity_conversion_rate,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.completed_revenue, 0) AS completed_revenue,
	COALESCE(revenue_jobs.sold_hours, 0) AS sold_hours,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.converted_job_average, 0) AS converted_job_average,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.completed_options, 0) AS completed_options,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.options_per_opportunity, 0) AS options_per_opportunity,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.completed_tasks, 0) AS completed_tasks,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.tasks_per_opportunity, 0) AS tasks_per_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.sales_opportunity, 0) AS sales_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.closed_opportunities, 0) AS closed_opportunities,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.close_rate, 0) AS close_rate,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.sales, 0) AS job_sales,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.closed_average_sale, 0) AS closed_average_sale,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_opportunity, 0) AS lto_run_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_converted, 0) AS lto_run_converted,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_sales, 0) AS lto_run_sales,
    COALESCE(lto_jobs.lto_set, 0) AS lto_set,
    COALESCE(lto_jobs.lto_set_sales, 0) AS lto_set_sales,
	COALESCE(sales_estimates.sales, 0) AS sales,
	coalesce("job_revenue",0) as "job_revenue",
	coalesce("non_job_revenue",0) as "non_job_revenue"
FROM spine_dates AS spine
-- LEFT JOIN dates using(data_timeframe)
LEFT JOIN revenue as revenue_jobs USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit)
LEFT JOIN sales_jobs USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit)
LEFT JOIN lto_jobs USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit)
LEFT JOIN sales_estimates USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit)
ORDER BY technician_id,job_business_unit
)
select * from output

		COALESCE(split_technician_id, sold_by_id, primary_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		COALESCE(split_technician_name, sold_by_name, primary_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,

		COALESCE(split_technician_business_unit, sold_by_business_unit, primary_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,

),
spine AS (
 SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit
 FROM revenue
 UNION
  SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit

    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.opportunity_conversion_rate, 0) AS opportunity_conversion_rate,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.completed_revenue, 0) AS completed_revenue,
	COALESCE(revenue_jobs.sold_hours, 0) AS sold_hours,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.converted_job_average, 0) AS converted_job_average,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.completed_options, 0) AS completed_options,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.options_per_opportunity, 0) AS options_per_opportunity,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.completed_tasks, 0) AS completed_tasks,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.tasks_per_opportunity, 0) AS tasks_per_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.sales_opportunity, 0) AS sales_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.closed_opportunities, 0) AS closed_opportunities,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.close_rate, 0) AS close_rate,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.sales, 0) AS job_sales,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.closed_average_sale, 0) AS closed_average_sale,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_opportunity, 0) AS lto_run_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_converted, 0) AS lto_run_converted,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_sales, 0) AS lto_run_sales,
    COALESCE(lto_jobs.lto_set, 0) AS lto_set,
    COALESCE(lto_jobs.lto_set_sales, 0) AS lto_set_sales,
	COALESCE(sales_estimates.sales, 0) AS sales,
	coalesce("job_revenue",0) as "job_revenue",
	coalesce("non_job_revenue",0) as "non_job_revenue"
FROM spine_dates AS spine
-- LEFT JOIN dates using(data_timeframe)
LEFT JOIN revenue as revenue_jobs USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit)
LEFT JOIN sales_jobs USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit)
LEFT JOIN lto_jobs USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit)
LEFT JOIN sales_estimates USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit)
ORDER BY technician_id,job_business_unit
)

model.edw.technician_performance_2.name: technician_performance_2
model.edw.technician_performance_2.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized="table", unlogged=True,
    indexes=[]
) }}

WITH 
dates AS (
    SELECT * from {{ ref('technician_performance_dates') }}
),
non_job_revenue as (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe AS data_timeframe,
		0 AS technician_id,
		'Non-Job Invoice' AS technician,
		nji.business_unit_name AS job_business_unit,
		nji.business_unit_name AS technician_business_unit,
		'NJI' as kpi_grouping,
		sum(0) AS jobs,
		sum(0) AS opportunities,
		sum(0) AS converted_jobs,
		sum(0) AS opportunity_conversion_rate,
		sum(nji.invoice_total) AS completed_revenue,
		sum(nji.item_sold_hours) as sold_hours,
		sum(nji.invoice_total) / NULLIF(count(nji.invoice_id),0) AS converted_job_average,
		sum(0) AS completed_tasks,
		sum(0) AS tasks_per_opportunity,
		sum(0) as revenue_discounts,
		sum(0) as job_time
	FROM {{ ref ('non_job_invoices') }} nji
	JOIN dates AS d ON nji.invoice_date::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
revenue_jobs AS (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe AS data_timeframe,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_name,'No Technician') AS technician,
		j.business_unit AS job_business_unit,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		case when j.service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when j.lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		count(job_id) AS jobs,
		sum(is_opportunity::int) AS opportunities,
		sum(is_converted::int) AS converted_jobs,
		sum(is_converted::numeric) / NULLIF(sum(is_opportunity::numeric),0) AS opportunity_conversion_rate,
		sum(revenue) AS completed_revenue,
		sum(sold_hours) as sold_hours,
		sum(revenue::numeric) / NULLIF(sum(is_converted::numeric),0) AS converted_job_average,
		sum(tasks) AS completed_tasks,
		sum(tasks) / NULLIF(sum(is_opportunity::int),0) AS tasks_per_opportunity,
		-- ✅ ADD DISCOUNTS
		sum(discounts) as revenue_discounts,
		-- ✅ ADD SERVICETITAN CLOCK TIME
		sum(total_appointment_hours) as job_time
	FROM {{ ref ('jobs_splits') }} j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.completed_on_est::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date
	AND job_status = 'Completed'
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
revenue AS (
	SELECT *, 0 as "job_revenue", completed_revenue as "non_job_revenue" from non_job_revenue
	UNION ALL
	SELECT *, completed_revenue as "job_revenue", 0 as "non_job_revenue" from revenue_jobs
),
sales_jobs AS (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe AS data_timeframe,
		COALESCE(split_technician_id, sold_by_id, primary_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		COALESCE(split_technician_name, sold_by_name, primary_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
		business_unit AS job_business_unit,
		COALESCE(split_technician_business_unit, sold_by_business_unit, primary_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		case when j.service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when j.lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		sum(is_sales_opportunity::int) AS sales_opportunity,
		sum(is_sales_converted::int) AS closed_opportunities,
		sum(is_sales_converted::numeric) / NULLIF(sum(is_sales_opportunity::numeric),0) AS close_rate,
		sum(estimate_count) AS completed_options,
		sum(estimate_count) / NULLIF(sum(is_opportunity::int),0) AS options_per_opportunity,
		sum(sales) AS sales,
		sum(sales) / NULLIF(sum(is_sales_converted::numeric),0) AS closed_average_sale,
		sum(CASE WHEN lto_set_job_id IS NOT NULL THEN is_sales_opportunity ELSE 0 end) AS lto_run_opportunity,
		sum(CASE WHEN lto_set_job_id IS NOT NULL THEN is_sales_converted ELSE 0 end) AS lto_run_converted,
		sum(CASE WHEN lto_set_job_id IS NOT NULL THEN sales ELSE 0 end) AS lto_run_sales
	FROM {{ ref ('jobs_splits') }} j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.is_sales_opportunity_date_est::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date
	AND job_status = 'Completed'
	and split > 0
	AND (sold_by_name = primary_technician_name or sold_by_name is null)
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
sales_estimates as (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe AS data_timeframe,
		coalesce(estimate_business_unit_id, job_business_unit_id, sold_by_business_unit_id, 999) as job_business_unit_id,
		coalesce(estimate_business_unit_name, job_business_unit, sold_by_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') as job_business_unit,
		coalesce(sold_by_business_unit_id, estimate_business_unit_id, 999) as technician_business_unit_id,
		coalesce(sold_by_business_unit, estimate_business_unit_name, 'No Business Unit') as technician_business_unit,
		case when service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		coalesce(sold_by_id, 999) as technician_id,
		coalesce(sold_by_name, 'No Technician') as technician,
		sum(item_total) AS sales,
		sum(case when item_type = 'PriceModifier' then item_total else 0 end) as sales_discounts
	FROM
		{{ ref('estimate_items_sold') }} est
	JOIN 
		dates AS d 
		ON est.sold_on_est::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date
	GROUP BY 
		1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8
),
lto_jobs AS (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe AS data_timeframe,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
		j.business_unit AS job_business_unit,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		case when j.service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when j.lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		sum(is_lto_set::int) AS lto_set,
		sum(lto_sales) AS lto_set_sales
	FROM {{ ref ('jobs_splits') }} j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.completed_on_est::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date
	WHERE job_status = 'Completed'
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
-- ✅ ADD RECALLS
recall_jobs as (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe AS data_timeframe,
		coalesce(r.recall_caused_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		coalesce(r.recall_caused_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
		r.recall_caused_business_unit AS job_business_unit,
		coalesce(r.recall_caused_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		case when r.recall_caused_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when r.recall_caused_lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		count(recall_caused_job_id) AS recalls
	FROM {{ ref ('recalls') }} r
	JOIN dates AS d ON r.recall_run_complete_date::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
-- ✅ ADD MEMBERSHIP SALES
memberships_invoiced as (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe AS data_timeframe,
		coalesce(j.sold_by_id, j.primary_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		coalesce(j.sold_by_name, j.primary_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
		coalesce(j.sold_by_business_unit, j.primary_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS job_business_unit,
		coalesce(j.sold_by_business_unit, j.primary_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		case when j.service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when j.lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		sum(invoice_sold_membership::int) AS memberships_sold
	FROM {{ ref ('jobs') }} j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.completed_on_est::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date
	AND job_status = 'Completed'
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),

spine AS (
 SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM revenue
 UNION
  SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM sales_jobs
 UNION
  SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM lto_jobs
 UNION
  SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM sales_estimates
 UNION
  SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM recall_jobs
 UNION 
  SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping 
 FROM memberships_invoiced
),
spine_dates as (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe,
		technician_id,
		technician,
		job_business_unit,
		technician_business_unit,
		kpi_grouping,
		min(data_start_date) as data_start_date,
		max(data_end_date) as data_end_date
	FROM spine
	JOIN dates USING (data_timeframe)
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
output as (
SELECT
    spine.data_timeframe,
    spine.data_start_date::Date,
    spine.data_end_date::Date,
    spine.technician_id,
    spine.technician,
    spine.job_business_unit,
    spine.technician_business_unit,
	spine.kpi_grouping,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.jobs, 0) AS jobs,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.opportunities, 0) AS opportunities,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.converted_jobs, 0) AS converted_jobs,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.opportunity_conversion_rate, 0) AS opportunity_conversion_rate,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.completed_revenue, 0) AS completed_revenue,
	COALESCE(revenue_jobs.sold_hours, 0) AS sold_hours,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.converted_job_average, 0) AS converted_job_average,
	COALESCE(revenue_jobs.revenue_discounts, 0) AS revenue_discounts,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.completed_options, 0) AS completed_options,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.options_per_opportunity, 0) AS options_per_opportunity,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.completed_tasks, 0) AS completed_tasks,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.tasks_per_opportunity, 0) AS tasks_per_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.sales_opportunity, 0) AS sales_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.closed_opportunities, 0) AS closed_opportunities,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.close_rate, 0) AS close_rate,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.sales, 0) AS job_sales,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.closed_average_sale, 0) AS closed_average_sale,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_opportunity, 0) AS lto_run_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_converted, 0) AS lto_run_converted,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_sales, 0) AS lto_run_sales,
    COALESCE(lto_jobs.lto_set, 0) AS lto_set,
    COALESCE(lto_jobs.lto_set_sales, 0) AS lto_set_sales,
	COALESCE(sales_estimates.sales, 0) AS sales,
	COALESCE(sales_estimates.sales_discounts, 0) AS sales_discounts,
	coalesce("job_revenue",0) as "job_revenue",
	coalesce("non_job_revenue",0) as "non_job_revenue",
	coalesce(recall_jobs.recalls,0) as recalls,
	coalesce(memberships_invoiced.memberships_sold,0) as memberships_sold,
	coalesce(revenue_jobs.job_time,0) as job_time
FROM spine_dates AS spine
-- LEFT JOIN dates using(data_timeframe)
LEFT JOIN revenue as revenue_jobs USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN sales_jobs USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN lto_jobs USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN sales_estimates USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN recall_jobs USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN memberships_invoiced USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
ORDER BY technician_id,job_business_unit
)
select * from output

revenue_jobs AS (

		case when j.service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when j.lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		count(job_id) AS jobs,
		sum(is_opportunity::int) AS opportunities,
		sum(is_converted::int) AS converted_jobs,
		sum(is_converted::numeric) / NULLIF(sum(is_opportunity::numeric),0) AS opportunity_conversion_rate,
		sum(revenue) AS completed_revenue,

		sum(tasks) AS completed_tasks,
		sum(tasks) / NULLIF(sum(is_opportunity::int),0) AS tasks_per_opportunity,
		-- ✅ ADD DISCOUNTS
		sum(discounts) as revenue_discounts,
		-- ✅ ADD SERVICETITAN CLOCK TIME
		sum(total_appointment_hours) as job_time
	FROM "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."jobs_splits" j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.completed_on_est::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date
	AND job_status = 'Completed'
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
revenue AS (
	SELECT *, 0 as "job_revenue", completed_revenue as "non_job_revenue" from non_job_revenue
	UNION ALL
	SELECT *, completed_revenue as "job_revenue", 0 as "non_job_revenue" from revenue_jobs
),
sales_jobs AS (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe AS data_timeframe,
		COALESCE(split_technician_id, sold_by_id, primary_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		COALESCE(split_technician_name, sold_by_name, primary_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,

		sum(is_sales_converted::int) AS closed_opportunities,
		sum(is_sales_converted::numeric) / NULLIF(sum(is_sales_opportunity::numeric),0) AS close_rate,
		sum(estimate_count) AS completed_options,
		sum(estimate_count) / NULLIF(sum(is_opportunity::int),0) AS options_per_opportunity,
		sum(sales) AS sales,

		sum(CASE WHEN lto_set_job_id IS NOT NULL THEN is_sales_opportunity ELSE 0 end) AS lto_run_opportunity,

lto_jobs AS (

),

recall_jobs as (

			when r.recall_caused_lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO'

		count(recall_caused_job_id) AS recalls
	FROM "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."recalls" r
	JOIN dates AS d ON r.recall_run_complete_date::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date

-- ✅ ADD MEMBERSHIP SALES
memberships_invoiced as (

		case when j.service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when j.lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		sum(invoice_sold_membership::int) AS memberships_sold
	FROM "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."jobs" j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.completed_on_est::date BETWEEN d.data_start_date AND d.data_end_date
	AND job_status = 'Completed'
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),

spine AS (
 SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM revenue
 UNION
  SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM sales_jobs
 UNION
  SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM lto_jobs
 UNION
  SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM sales_estimates
 UNION
  SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM recall_jobs
 UNION 
  SELECT data_timeframe, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping 
 FROM memberships_invoiced
),
spine_dates as (
	SELECT
		data_timeframe,
		technician_id,
		technician,
		job_business_unit,
		technician_business_unit,
		kpi_grouping,
		min(data_start_date) as data_start_date,
		max(data_end_date) as data_end_date
	FROM spine
	JOIN dates USING (data_timeframe)
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
output as (
SELECT
    spine.data_timeframe,
    spine.data_start_date::Date,
    spine.data_end_date::Date,
    spine.technician_id,
    spine.technician,
    spine.job_business_unit,
    spine.technician_business_unit,
	spine.kpi_grouping,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.jobs, 0) AS jobs,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.opportunities, 0) AS opportunities,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.converted_jobs, 0) AS converted_jobs,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.opportunity_conversion_rate, 0) AS opportunity_conversion_rate,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.completed_revenue, 0) AS completed_revenue,
	COALESCE(revenue_jobs.sold_hours, 0) AS sold_hours,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.converted_job_average, 0) AS converted_job_average,
	COALESCE(revenue_jobs.revenue_discounts, 0) AS revenue_discounts,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.completed_options, 0) AS completed_options,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.options_per_opportunity, 0) AS options_per_opportunity,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.completed_tasks, 0) AS completed_tasks,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.tasks_per_opportunity, 0) AS tasks_per_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.sales_opportunity, 0) AS sales_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.closed_opportunities, 0) AS closed_opportunities,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.close_rate, 0) AS close_rate,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.sales, 0) AS job_sales,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.closed_average_sale, 0) AS closed_average_sale,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_opportunity, 0) AS lto_run_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_converted, 0) AS lto_run_converted,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_sales, 0) AS lto_run_sales,
    COALESCE(lto_jobs.lto_set, 0) AS lto_set,
    COALESCE(lto_jobs.lto_set_sales, 0) AS lto_set_sales,
	COALESCE(sales_estimates.sales, 0) AS sales,
	COALESCE(sales_estimates.sales_discounts, 0) AS sales_discounts,
	coalesce("job_revenue",0) as "job_revenue",
	coalesce("non_job_revenue",0) as "non_job_revenue",
	coalesce(recall_jobs.recalls,0) as recalls,
	coalesce(memberships_invoiced.memberships_sold,0) as memberships_sold,
	coalesce(revenue_jobs.job_time,0) as job_time
FROM spine_dates AS spine
-- LEFT JOIN dates using(data_timeframe)
LEFT JOIN revenue as revenue_jobs USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN sales_jobs USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN lto_jobs USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN sales_estimates USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN recall_jobs USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN memberships_invoiced USING (data_timeframe, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
ORDER BY technician_id,job_business_unit
)

model.edw.technician_performance_by_date.name: technician_performance_by_date
model.edw.technician_performance_by_date.raw_code:
WITH 
dates as (
select date from {{ ref('calendar') }}
	where date > current_date - 365
	and date < current_date + 10
),
non_job_invoices as (select * from {{ ref('non_job_invoices') }}),
jobs_splits as (select * from {{ ref('jobs_splits') }}),
estimate_items_sold as (select * from {{ ref('estimate_items_sold') }}),
recalls as (select * from {{ ref('recalls') }}),
jobs as (select * from {{ ref('jobs') }}),
non_job_revenue as (
	SELECT
		date,
		0 AS technician_id,
		'Non-Job Invoice' AS technician,
		nji.business_unit_name AS job_business_unit,
		nji.business_unit_name AS technician_business_unit,
		'NJI' as kpi_grouping,
		sum(0) AS jobs,
		sum(0) AS opportunities,
		sum(0) AS converted_jobs,
		sum(0) AS opportunity_conversion_rate,
		sum(nji.invoice_total) AS completed_revenue,
		sum(nji.item_sold_hours) as sold_hours,
		sum(nji.invoice_total) / NULLIF(count(nji.invoice_id),0) AS converted_job_average,
		sum(0) AS completed_tasks,
		sum(0) AS tasks_per_opportunity,
		sum(0) as revenue_discounts,
		sum(0) as job_time
	FROM non_job_invoices nji
	JOIN dates AS d ON nji.invoice_date::date = d.date
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
revenue_jobs AS (
	SELECT
		date as date,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_name,'No Technician') AS technician,
		j.business_unit AS job_business_unit,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		case when j.service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when j.lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		count(job_id) AS jobs,
		sum(is_opportunity::int) AS opportunities,
		sum(is_converted::int) AS converted_jobs,
		sum(is_converted::numeric) / NULLIF(sum(is_opportunity::numeric),0) AS opportunity_conversion_rate,
		sum(revenue) AS completed_revenue,
		sum(sold_hours) as sold_hours,
		sum(revenue::numeric) / NULLIF(sum(is_converted::numeric),0) AS converted_job_average,
		sum(tasks) AS completed_tasks,
		sum(tasks) / NULLIF(sum(is_opportunity::int),0) AS tasks_per_opportunity,
		-- ✅ ADD DISCOUNTS
		sum(discounts) as revenue_discounts,
		-- ✅ ADD SERVICETITAN CLOCK TIME
		sum(total_appointment_hours) as job_time
	FROM jobs_splits j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.completed_on_est::date = d.date
	AND job_status = 'Completed'
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
revenue AS (
	SELECT *, 0 as "job_revenue", completed_revenue as "non_job_revenue" from non_job_revenue
	UNION ALL
	SELECT *, completed_revenue as "job_revenue", 0 as "non_job_revenue" from revenue_jobs
),
sales_jobs AS (
	SELECT
		date as date,
		COALESCE(split_technician_id, sold_by_id, primary_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		COALESCE(split_technician_name, sold_by_name, primary_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
		business_unit AS job_business_unit,
		COALESCE(split_technician_business_unit, sold_by_business_unit, primary_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		case when j.service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when j.lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		sum(is_sales_opportunity::int) AS sales_opportunity,
		sum(is_sales_converted::int) AS closed_opportunities,
		sum(is_sales_converted::numeric) / NULLIF(sum(is_sales_opportunity::numeric),0) AS close_rate,
		sum(estimate_count) AS completed_options,
		sum(estimate_count) / NULLIF(sum(is_opportunity::int),0) AS options_per_opportunity,
		sum(sales) AS sales,
		sum(sales) / NULLIF(sum(is_sales_converted::numeric),0) AS closed_average_sale,
		sum(CASE WHEN lto_set_job_id IS NOT NULL THEN is_sales_opportunity ELSE 0 end) AS lto_run_opportunity,
		sum(CASE WHEN lto_set_job_id IS NOT NULL THEN is_sales_converted ELSE 0 end) AS lto_run_converted,
		sum(CASE WHEN lto_set_job_id IS NOT NULL THEN sales ELSE 0 end) AS lto_run_sales
	FROM jobs_splits j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.is_sales_opportunity_date_est::date = d.date
	AND job_status = 'Completed'
	and split > 0
	AND (sold_by_name = primary_technician_name or sold_by_name is null)
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
sales_estimates as (
	SELECT
		date as date,
		coalesce(estimate_business_unit_id, job_business_unit_id, sold_by_business_unit_id, 999) as job_business_unit_id,
		coalesce(estimate_business_unit_name, job_business_unit, sold_by_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') as job_business_unit,
		coalesce(sold_by_business_unit_id, estimate_business_unit_id, 999) as technician_business_unit_id,
		coalesce(sold_by_business_unit, estimate_business_unit_name, 'No Business Unit') as technician_business_unit,
		case when service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		coalesce(sold_by_id, 999) as technician_id,
		coalesce(sold_by_name, 'No Technician') as technician,
		sum(item_total) AS sales,
		sum(case when item_type = 'PriceModifier' then item_total else 0 end) as sales_discounts
	FROM
		estimate_items_sold est
	JOIN 
		dates AS d 
		ON est.sold_on_est::date = d.date
	GROUP BY 
		1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8
),
lto_jobs AS (
	SELECT
		date as date,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
		j.business_unit AS job_business_unit,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		case when j.service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when j.lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		sum(is_lto_set::int) AS lto_set,
		sum(lto_sales) AS lto_set_sales
	FROM jobs_splits j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.completed_on_est::date = d.date
	WHERE job_status = 'Completed'
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
-- ✅ ADD RECALLS
recall_jobs as (
	SELECT
		date as date,
		coalesce(r.recall_caused_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		coalesce(r.recall_caused_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
		r.recall_caused_business_unit AS job_business_unit,
		coalesce(r.recall_caused_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		case when r.recall_caused_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when r.recall_caused_lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		count(recall_caused_job_id) AS recalls
	FROM recalls r
	JOIN dates AS d ON r.recall_run_complete_date::date = d.date
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
-- ✅ ADD MEMBERSHIP SALES
memberships_invoiced as (
	SELECT
		date as date,
		coalesce(j.sold_by_id, j.primary_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		coalesce(j.sold_by_name, j.primary_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
		coalesce(j.sold_by_business_unit, j.primary_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS job_business_unit,
		coalesce(j.sold_by_business_unit, j.primary_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		case when j.service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when j.lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		sum(invoice_sold_membership::int) AS memberships_sold
	from jobs j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.completed_on_est::date = d.date
	AND job_status = 'Completed'
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
spine AS (
 SELECT date, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM revenue
 UNION
  SELECT date, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM sales_jobs
 UNION
  SELECT date, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM lto_jobs
 UNION
  SELECT date, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM sales_estimates
 UNION
  SELECT date, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM recall_jobs
 UNION 
  SELECT date, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping 
 FROM memberships_invoiced
),
output as (
SELECT
    spine.date,
    spine.technician_id,
    spine.technician,
    spine.job_business_unit,
    spine.technician_business_unit,
	spine.kpi_grouping,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.jobs, 0) AS jobs,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.opportunities, 0) AS opportunities,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.converted_jobs, 0) AS converted_jobs,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.opportunity_conversion_rate, 0) AS opportunity_conversion_rate,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.completed_revenue, 0) AS completed_revenue,
	COALESCE(revenue_jobs.sold_hours, 0) AS sold_hours,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.converted_job_average, 0) AS converted_job_average,
	COALESCE(revenue_jobs.revenue_discounts, 0) AS revenue_discounts,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.completed_options, 0) AS completed_options,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.options_per_opportunity, 0) AS options_per_opportunity,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.completed_tasks, 0) AS completed_tasks,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.tasks_per_opportunity, 0) AS tasks_per_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.sales_opportunity, 0) AS sales_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.closed_opportunities, 0) AS closed_opportunities,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.close_rate, 0) AS close_rate,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.sales, 0) AS job_sales,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.closed_average_sale, 0) AS closed_average_sale,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_opportunity, 0) AS lto_run_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_converted, 0) AS lto_run_converted,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_sales, 0) AS lto_run_sales,
    COALESCE(lto_jobs.lto_set, 0) AS lto_set,
    COALESCE(lto_jobs.lto_set_sales, 0) AS lto_set_sales,
	COALESCE(sales_estimates.sales, 0) AS sales,
	COALESCE(sales_estimates.sales_discounts, 0) AS sales_discounts,
	coalesce("job_revenue",0) as "job_revenue",
	coalesce("non_job_revenue",0) as "non_job_revenue",
	coalesce(recall_jobs.recalls,0) as recalls,
	coalesce(memberships_invoiced.memberships_sold,0) as memberships_sold,
	coalesce(revenue_jobs.job_time,0) as job_time
FROM spine
-- LEFT JOIN dates using(data_timeframe)
LEFT JOIN revenue as revenue_jobs USING (date, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN sales_jobs USING (date, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN lto_jobs USING (date, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN sales_estimates USING (date, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN recall_jobs USING (date, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN memberships_invoiced USING (date, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
ORDER BY technician_id,job_business_unit
)

non_job_revenue as (
	SELECT

revenue_jobs AS (

			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		count(job_id) AS jobs,
		sum(is_opportunity::int) AS opportunities,
		sum(is_converted::int) AS converted_jobs,
		sum(is_converted::numeric) / NULLIF(sum(is_opportunity::numeric),0) AS opportunity_conversion_rate,
		sum(revenue) AS completed_revenue,
		sum(sold_hours) as sold_hours,
		sum(revenue::numeric) / NULLIF(sum(is_converted::numeric),0) AS converted_job_average,
		sum(tasks) AS completed_tasks,

		-- ✅ ADD DISCOUNTS

		sum(total_appointment_hours) as job_time
	FROM jobs_splits j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.completed_on_est::date = d.date
	AND job_status = 'Completed'

),
revenue AS (

		coalesce(j.split_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
		j.business_unit AS job_business_unit,
		coalesce(j.split_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		case when j.service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when j.lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		sum(is_lto_set::int) AS lto_set,
		sum(lto_sales) AS lto_set_sales
	FROM jobs_splits j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.completed_on_est::date = d.date
	WHERE job_status = 'Completed'
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
-- ✅ ADD RECALLS
recall_jobs as (
	SELECT
		date as date,
		coalesce(r.recall_caused_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		coalesce(r.recall_caused_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
		r.recall_caused_business_unit AS job_business_unit,
		coalesce(r.recall_caused_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		case when r.recall_caused_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when r.recall_caused_lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		count(recall_caused_job_id) AS recalls
	FROM recalls r
	JOIN dates AS d ON r.recall_run_complete_date::date = d.date
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
-- ✅ ADD MEMBERSHIP SALES
memberships_invoiced as (
	SELECT
		date as date,
		coalesce(j.sold_by_id, j.primary_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
		coalesce(j.sold_by_name, j.primary_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
		coalesce(j.sold_by_business_unit, j.primary_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS job_business_unit,
		coalesce(j.sold_by_business_unit, j.primary_technician_business_unit, 'No Business Unit') AS technician_business_unit,
		case when j.service_lead_type = 'Maintenance' then 'Maintenance' 
			when j.lto_set_by_id is not null then 'LTO' 
			else 'Demand' end as kpi_grouping,
		sum(invoice_sold_membership::int) AS memberships_sold
	from jobs j
	JOIN dates AS d ON j.completed_on_est::date = d.date
	AND job_status = 'Completed'
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
),
spine AS (
 SELECT date, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM revenue
 UNION
  SELECT date, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM sales_jobs
 UNION
  SELECT date, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM lto_jobs
 UNION
  SELECT date, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM sales_estimates
 UNION
  SELECT date, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping
 FROM recall_jobs
 UNION 
  SELECT date, coalesce(technician_id, 999) as technician_id, coalesce(technician, 'No Technician') as technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping 
 FROM memberships_invoiced
),
output as (
SELECT
    spine.date,
    spine.technician_id,
    spine.technician,
    spine.job_business_unit,
    spine.technician_business_unit,
	spine.kpi_grouping,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.jobs, 0) AS jobs,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.opportunities, 0) AS opportunities,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.converted_jobs, 0) AS converted_jobs,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.opportunity_conversion_rate, 0) AS opportunity_conversion_rate,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.completed_revenue, 0) AS completed_revenue,
	COALESCE(revenue_jobs.sold_hours, 0) AS sold_hours,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.converted_job_average, 0) AS converted_job_average,
	COALESCE(revenue_jobs.revenue_discounts, 0) AS revenue_discounts,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.completed_options, 0) AS completed_options,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.options_per_opportunity, 0) AS options_per_opportunity,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.completed_tasks, 0) AS completed_tasks,
    COALESCE(revenue_jobs.tasks_per_opportunity, 0) AS tasks_per_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.sales_opportunity, 0) AS sales_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.closed_opportunities, 0) AS closed_opportunities,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.close_rate, 0) AS close_rate,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.sales, 0) AS job_sales,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.closed_average_sale, 0) AS closed_average_sale,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_opportunity, 0) AS lto_run_opportunity,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_converted, 0) AS lto_run_converted,
    COALESCE(sales_jobs.lto_run_sales, 0) AS lto_run_sales,
    COALESCE(lto_jobs.lto_set, 0) AS lto_set,
    COALESCE(lto_jobs.lto_set_sales, 0) AS lto_set_sales,
	COALESCE(sales_estimates.sales, 0) AS sales,
	COALESCE(sales_estimates.sales_discounts, 0) AS sales_discounts,
	coalesce("job_revenue",0) as "job_revenue",
	coalesce("non_job_revenue",0) as "non_job_revenue",
	coalesce(recall_jobs.recalls,0) as recalls,
	coalesce(memberships_invoiced.memberships_sold,0) as memberships_sold,
	coalesce(revenue_jobs.job_time,0) as job_time
FROM spine
-- LEFT JOIN dates using(data_timeframe)
LEFT JOIN revenue as revenue_jobs USING (date, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN sales_jobs USING (date, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN lto_jobs USING (date, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN sales_estimates USING (date, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN recall_jobs USING (date, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
LEFT JOIN memberships_invoiced USING (date, technician_id, technician, job_business_unit, technician_business_unit, kpi_grouping)
ORDER BY technician_id,job_business_unit
)
select * from output

model.edw.technician_performance_dates.name: technician_performance_dates
model.edw.technician_performance_dates.raw_code:
WITH timeframes AS (
SELECT
'YST' AS data_timeframe,
current_date - 1 AS data_start_date,
current_date - 1 AS data_end_date
UNION
SELECT
'WTD' AS data_timeframe,
date_trunc('week', current_date - 1)::Date AS data_start_date,
current_date - 1 AS data_end_date
UNION
SELECT
'MTD' as data_timeframe,
date_trunc('month', current_date - 1)::Date AS data_start_date,
current_date - 1 AS data_end_date
UNION
SELECT
'YTD' as data_timeframe,
date_trunc('year', current_date - 1)::Date AS data_start_date,
current_date - 1 AS data_end_date
UNION
SELECT
'YTDLM' as data_timeframe,
date_trunc('year', current_date - 1)::Date AS data_start_date,
date_trunc('month', current_date)::Date - 1 AS data_end_date
UNION
SELECT
'LWK' as data_timeframe,
date_trunc('week', current_date)::Date - 7  AS data_start_date,
date_trunc('week', current_date)::Date - 1 AS data_end_date
UNION
SELECT
'MTH' as data_timeframe,
(date_trunc('month', current_date)::Date - INTERVAL '1' MONTH)::date AS data_start_date,
date_trunc('month', current_date)::Date - 1 AS data_end_date
UNION
SELECT
'QTD' as data_timeframe,
(date_trunc('quarter', current_date)::Date) AS data_start_date,
current_date - 1 AS data_end_date
UNION
SELECT
'QTR' as data_timeframe,
(date_trunc('quarter', current_date)::Date - INTERVAL '3' MONTH)::Date AS data_start_date,
(date_trunc('quarter', current_date)::Date - 1) AS data_end_date
UNION
SELECT
'L30' as data_timeframe,
(current_date - INTERVAL '30'  DAY)::Date AS data_start_date,
(current_date - 1)::date AS data_end_date
UNION
SELECT
'L365' as data_timeframe,
(current_date - INTERVAL '365'  DAY)::Date AS data_start_date,
(current_date - 1)::date AS data_end_date
UNION
SELECT
'L7' as data_timeframe,
(current_date - INTERVAL '7'  DAY)::Date AS data_start_date,
(current_date - 1)::date AS data_end_date
UNION
SELECT
'LYR' as data_timeframe,
(date_trunc('year', current_date)::date - INTERVAL '1' YEAR)::Date as data_start_date,
(date_trunc('year', current_date)::date - 1) as data_end_date
)
SELECT *,
	data_end_date - data_start_date + 1 AS days
FROM timeframes
ORDER BY data_start_date, days

model.edw.actuals_by_businessunit.name: actuals_by_businessunit
model.edw.actuals_by_businessunit.raw_code:
with 
technician_actuals as (
    select * from {{ ref("actuals_by_technician") }}
),
actuals_with_bu as (
    select
        technician_actuals.*
    from
        technician_actuals
)
select 
region,
location,
trade_line_type,
department_type,
servicetitan_business_unit_id,
servicetitan_business_unit_name,
department_id,
department_name,
report_date,
count(distinct technician_id) as technician_count,
-- Add all of the sum columns from the macro
{{ actuals_sums() }}
from actuals_with_bu
-- where report_date = current_date - 1
{{ dbt_utils.group_by(9) }}

model.edw.actuals_by_jobtype.name: actuals_by_jobtype
model.edw.actuals_by_jobtype.raw_code:
with jobs as (
    select *
    from edw2.jobs
),
aggregated_to_day as (
	select 
		completed_on_est::date,
		job_type,
		business_unit,
		count(*) as booked_job_count,
		sum(case when is_opportunity = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as opp_count,
		sum(case when revenue > 0 then 1 else 0 end) revenue_conversion_count,
		sum(case when is_sales_opportunity = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as sales_opp_count,
		sum(case when sales > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as sales_conversion_count,
		sum(case when lto_opp_group <> 'Other' then 1 else 0 end) as internal_job,
		sum(case when lto_opp_group <> 'Other' and created_on_est::date = completed_on_est::date then 1 else 0 end) as same_day_internal_job,
		sum(case when lto_opp_group = 'Other' then 1 else 0 end) as external_job,
		sum(case when lto_opp_group = 'Other' and created_on_est::date = min_sold_on_est::date then 1 else 0 end) as same_day_external_job,
		sum(revenue) as total_rev,
		sum(sales) as total_sales,
		coalesce(sum(case when created_on_est::date = completed_on_est::date then revenue end),0) as tot_same_day_revenue,
		coalesce(sum(case when created_on_est::date = completed_on_est::date and revenue > 0 then 1 else 0 end),0) as count_same_day_revenue,
		coalesce(sum(case when created_on_est::date = min_sold_on_est::date then sales end),0) as tot_same_day_sales,
		coalesce(sum(case when created_on_est::date = min_sold_on_est::date and sales > 0 then 1 else 0 end),0) as count_same_day_sales,
		coalesce(sum(case when max_sold_on_est::date > completed_on_est::date then sales end),0) as total_sales_post_completed
	from jobs
	where (completed_on_est::date is not null and completed_on_est::date between current_date-61 and current_date - 1)
		and job_status not in ('Canceled')
	group by 1, 2, 3
	order by 1 desc, 2 asc
),
working_days as (
	select 
		completed_on_est::date,
		sum(booked_job_count) as booked_job_count
	from aggregated_to_day
	group by 1
),
date_spine as (
	select completed_on_est
	from working_days
	where booked_job_count > 100
	order by 1 desc
),
max_days as (
select 
	business_unit,
	count(distinct completed_on_est) as days_with_job
from aggregated_to_day
where completed_on_est in (select completed_on_est from date_spine)
group by 1
),
pre_agg as (
	select 
		atd.job_type,
		atd.business_unit,
		md.days_with_job as max_days,
		count(distinct atd.completed_on_est) as days_with_job,
		sum(atd.booked_job_count) as total_booked_job,
		sum(atd.opp_count) as opportunity_count,
		sum(atd.revenue_conversion_count) as revenue_conversion_count,
		sum(atd.sales_opp_count) as sales_opportunity_count,
		sum(atd.sales_conversion_count) as sales_conversion_count,
		sum(atd.internal_job) as internal_job,
		sum(atd.same_day_internal_job) as same_day_internal_job,
		sum(atd.external_job) as external_job,
		sum(atd.same_day_external_job) as same_day_external_job,
		sum(atd.total_rev) as total_revenue,
		sum(atd.total_sales) as total_sales,
		sum(atd.tot_same_day_revenue) as total_same_day_revenue,
		sum(atd.count_same_day_revenue) as count_same_day_revenue,
		sum(atd.tot_same_day_sales) as total_same_day_sales,
		sum(atd.count_same_day_sales) as count_same_day_sales,
		sum(atd.total_sales_post_completed) as total_sales_post_completed
	from aggregated_to_day atd
	left join max_days md
		on md.business_unit = atd.business_unit
	where completed_on_est in (select completed_on_est from date_spine)
	group by 1,2,3
)
select 
	job_type,
	business_unit,
	total_booked_job as weight,
	days_with_job::float / max_days::float as run_chance,
	coalesce(revenue_conversion_count / nullif(opportunity_count,0),0) as new_opportunity_conversion_chance,
	coalesce(sales_conversion_count / nullif(sales_opportunity_count,0),0) as sales_opportunity_conversion_chance,
	internal_job / nullif(max_days, 0) as internal_leads_per_day,
	same_day_internal_job / nullif(max_days, 0) as internal_same_day_leads_per_day,
	external_job / nullif(max_days, 0) as external_leads_per_day,
	same_day_external_job / nullif(max_days, 0) as external_same_day_leads_per_day,
	total_revenue,
	total_same_day_revenue,
	coalesce(total_same_day_revenue / nullif(count_same_day_revenue,0), 0) as average_same_day_revenue_per_job,
	coalesce(total_revenue / nullif(revenue_conversion_count,0), 0) as average_revenue_per_job,
	total_sales,
	total_same_day_sales,
	coalesce(total_same_day_sales / nullif(count_same_day_sales,0),0) as average_same_day_sales_per_job,
	coalesce(total_sales / nullif(sales_conversion_count,0),0) as average_sales_per_job
from pre_agg
order by 1 asc,2 asc
