		atd.business_unit,
		md.days_with_job as max_days,
		count(distinct atd.completed_on_est) as days_with_job,
		sum(atd.booked_job_count) as total_booked_job,
		sum(atd.opp_count) as opportunity_count,
		sum(atd.revenue_conversion_count) as revenue_conversion_count,
		sum(atd.sales_opp_count) as sales_opportunity_count,
		sum(atd.sales_conversion_count) as sales_conversion_count,
		sum(atd.internal_job) as internal_job,
		sum(atd.same_day_internal_job) as same_day_internal_job,
		sum(atd.external_job) as external_job,
		sum(atd.same_day_external_job) as same_day_external_job,
		sum(atd.total_rev) as total_revenue,
		sum(atd.total_sales) as total_sales,
		sum(atd.tot_same_day_revenue) as total_same_day_revenue,
		sum(atd.count_same_day_revenue) as count_same_day_revenue,
		sum(atd.tot_same_day_sales) as total_same_day_sales,
		sum(atd.count_same_day_sales) as count_same_day_sales,
		sum(atd.total_sales_post_completed) as total_sales_post_completed
	from aggregated_to_day atd
	left join max_days md
		on md.business_unit = atd.business_unit
	where completed_on_est in (select completed_on_est from date_spine)
	group by 1,2,3
)
select 
	job_type,
	business_unit,
	total_booked_job as weight,
	days_with_job::float / max_days::float as run_chance,
	coalesce(revenue_conversion_count / nullif(opportunity_count,0),0) as new_opportunity_conversion_chance,
	coalesce(sales_conversion_count / nullif(sales_opportunity_count,0),0) as sales_opportunity_conversion_chance,
	internal_job / nullif(max_days, 0) as internal_leads_per_day,
	same_day_internal_job / nullif(max_days, 0) as internal_same_day_leads_per_day,
	external_job / nullif(max_days, 0) as external_leads_per_day,
	same_day_external_job / nullif(max_days, 0) as external_same_day_leads_per_day,
	total_revenue,
	total_same_day_revenue,
	coalesce(total_same_day_revenue / nullif(count_same_day_revenue,0), 0) as average_same_day_revenue_per_job,
	coalesce(total_revenue / nullif(revenue_conversion_count,0), 0) as average_revenue_per_job,
	total_sales,
	total_same_day_sales,
	coalesce(total_same_day_sales / nullif(count_same_day_sales,0),0) as average_same_day_sales_per_job,
	coalesce(total_sales / nullif(sales_conversion_count,0),0) as average_sales_per_job
from pre_agg
order by 1 asc,2 asc

    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'report_date']},
      {'columns': ['servicetitan_business_unit_id', 'report_date']}
    ]
)}}

    where servicetitan_business_unit_id is not null
),
technicians as (

    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__technicians') }}
),
worked_hours as (

),
installed_items as (

),
sold_items as (
    select *
    from {{ ref("int_estimate_items_by_day_and_soldby") }}
),
lto_set as (
    select *
    from {{ ref("int_lto_set_by_day_and_tech") }}
),
lto_run as (
    select *
    from {{ ref("int_lto_run_by_day_and_tech") }}
),

select

    "job_count_splits_adjusted" as "job_count_splits_adjusted",
    "sold_job_count_splits_adjusted" as "sold_job_count_splits_adjusted",
    "new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted" as "new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted",
    "new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted" as "new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted",
    "revenue" as "revenue",

    "lto_lto_sales_generated" as "lto_lto_sales_generated",
    "lto_tto_set_count" as "lto_tto_set_count",
    "lto_tto_sales_generated" as "lto_tto_sales_generated",
    -- JOB GROUP TYPE METRICS
    jobs."water_heater_replacement_count" as "water_heater_replacement_count",
    jobs."water_heater_replacement_sold_count" as "water_heater_replacement_sold_count",
    jobs."water_heater_total_count" as "water_heater_total_count",
    jobs."water_heater_total_sold_count" as "water_heater_total_sold_count",  
    jobs."hvac_care_plan_system_check_count" as "hvac_care_plan_system_check_count",

    -- SALES METRICS

    jobs."estimate_jobs_sold" as "estimate_jobs_sold",
    jobs."estimates" as "estimates",
    jobs."estimate_tasks" as "estimate_tasks",
    jobs."estimates_sold" as "estimates_sold",
    jobs."estimate_sold_tasks" as "estimate_sold_tasks",
    jobs."estimate_sales" as "estimate_sales",
    jobs."estimate_sold_hours_sold" as "estimate_sold_hours_sold",
    jobs."estimate_discounts" as "estimate_discounts",
    jobs."estimate_lto_jobs" as "estimate_lto_jobs",
    jobs."estimate_lto_jobs_sold" as "estimate_lto_jobs_sold",
    jobs."estimate_lto_sales" as "estimate_lto_sales",
    jobs."estimate_lto_discounts" as "estimate_lto_discounts",
    -- RECALLS
    jobs.recalls as "recalls",
    -- WORKED HOURS
    coalesce(wh.hours,0) as hours_worked,
    -- INSTALLED ITEMS
    i.care_plan_row_count,
    i.care_plan_invoices,
    i.care_plan_quantity,
    i.care_plan_cost,
    i.care_plan_revenue,
    i.care_plan_sold_hours,
    i.care_plan_sold_invoices,
    i.care_plan_sold_quantity,
    i.care_plan_discounts,

    i.water_heaters_row_count,
    i.water_heaters_invoices,
    i.water_heaters_quantity,
    i.water_heaters_cost,
    i.water_heaters_revenue,
    i.water_heaters_sold_hours,
    i.water_heaters_sold_invoices,
    i.water_heaters_sold_quantity,
    i.water_heaters_discounts,

    i.tankless_row_count,
    i.tankless_invoices,
    i.tankless_quantity,
    i.tankless_cost,
    i.tankless_revenue,
    i.tankless_sold_hours,
    i.tankless_sold_invoices,
    i.tankless_sold_quantity,
    i.tankless_discounts,

    i.hvac_full_system_row_count,
    i.hvac_full_system_invoices,
    i.hvac_full_system_quantity,
    i.hvac_full_system_cost,
    i.hvac_full_system_revenue,
    i.hvac_full_system_sold_hours,
    i.hvac_full_system_sold_invoices,
    i.hvac_full_system_sold_quantity,
    i.hvac_full_system_discounts,

    i.hvac_partial_system_row_count,
    i.hvac_partial_system_invoices,
    i.hvac_partial_system_quantity,
    i.hvac_partial_system_cost,
    i.hvac_partial_system_revenue,
    i.hvac_partial_system_sold_hours,
    i.hvac_partial_system_sold_invoices,
    i.hvac_partial_system_sold_quantity,
    i.hvac_partial_system_discounts,

    i.excavation_row_count,
    i.excavation_invoices,
    i.excavation_quantity,
    i.excavation_cost,
    i.excavation_revenue,
    i.excavation_sold_hours,
    i.excavation_sold_invoices,
    i.excavation_sold_quantity,
    i.excavation_discounts,

    i.downspouts_row_count,
    i.downspouts_invoices,
    i.downspouts_quantity,
    i.downspouts_cost,
    i.downspouts_revenue,
    i.downspouts_sold_hours,
    i.downspouts_sold_invoices,
    i.downspouts_sold_quantity,
    i.downspouts_discounts,
    -- SALES ITEMS
    si.care_plan_sales_row_count,
    si.care_plan_sales_estimates,
    si.care_plan_sales_quantity,
    si.care_plan_sales_cost,
    si.care_plan_sales,
    si.care_plan_sales_sold_hours,
    si.care_plan_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.care_plan_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.care_plan_sales_discounts,

    si.water_heaters_sales_row_count,
    si.water_heaters_sales_estimates,
    si.water_heaters_sales_quantity,
    si.water_heaters_sales_cost,
    si.water_heaters_sales,
    si.water_heaters_sales_sold_hours,
    si.water_heaters_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.water_heaters_sales_discounts,

    si.tankless_sales_row_count,
    si.tankless_sales_estimates,
    si.tankless_sales_quantity,
    si.tankless_sales_cost,
    si.tankless_sales,
    si.tankless_sales_sold_hours,
    si.tankless_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.tankless_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.tankless_sales_discounts,

    si.hvac_full_system_sales_row_count,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_estimates,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_quantity,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_cost,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_sold_hours,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_discounts,

    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_row_count,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_estimates,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_quantity,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_cost,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_hours,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_discounts,

    si.excavation_sales_row_count,
    si.excavation_sales_estimates,
    si.excavation_sales_quantity,
    si.excavation_sales_cost,
    si.excavation_sales,
    si.excavation_sales_sold_hours,
    si.excavation_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.excavation_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.excavation_sales_discounts,

    si.downspouts_sales_row_count,
    si.downspouts_sales_estimates,
    si.downspouts_sales_quantity,
    si.downspouts_sales_cost,
    si.downspouts_sales,
    si.downspouts_sales_sold_hours,
    si.downspouts_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.downspouts_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.downspouts_sales_discounts,

    
    
    
    -- LTOS
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_total_count,0) as lto_set_total_count,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_total_sold,0) as lto_set_total_sold,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_total_sales,0) as lto_set_total_sales,
    -- LTO RUN
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_total_count,0) as lto_run_total_count,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_total_sold,0) as lto_run_total_sold,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_total_sales,0) as lto_run_total_sales,
        
    -- LTO SET
    jobs."lto_sewer_opp_count" as "lto_sewer_opp_count",
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_sewer_count,0) as lto_set_sewer_count,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_sewer_sold,0) as lto_set_sewer_sold,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_sewer_sales,0) as lto_set_sewer_sales,
    -- LTO RUN
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_sewer_count,0) as lto_run_sewer_count,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_sewer_sold,0) as lto_run_sewer_sold,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_sewer_sales,0) as lto_run_sewer_sales,
        
    -- LTO SET
    jobs."lto_downspout_opp_count" as "lto_downspout_opp_count",
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_downspout_count,0) as lto_set_downspout_count,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_downspout_sold,0) as lto_set_downspout_sold,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_downspout_sales,0) as lto_set_downspout_sales,
    -- LTO RUN
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_downspout_count,0) as lto_run_downspout_count,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_downspout_sold,0) as lto_run_downspout_sold,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_downspout_sales,0) as lto_run_downspout_sales,
        
    -- LTO SET
    jobs."lto_hvac_opp_count" as "lto_hvac_opp_count",
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_hvac_count,0) as lto_set_hvac_count,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_hvac_sold,0) as lto_set_hvac_sold,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_hvac_sales,0) as lto_set_hvac_sales,
    -- LTO RUN
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_hvac_count,0) as lto_run_hvac_count,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_hvac_sold,0) as lto_run_hvac_sold,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_hvac_sales,0) as lto_run_hvac_sales,
    -- Calculated Conversion Metric
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_opportunity_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as blended_opportunity_count,
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_sold_job_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as blended_sold_job_count,
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_opportunity_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_sold_job_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as kpi_blended_sold_job_count
    ------------------------
    -- NOTE: change the blended definition to be based on sale opps data
    ------------------------
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.sales_opportunities 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
        else 0 end
    as blended_opportunity_count,
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.sales_converted 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
        else 0 end
    as blended_sold_job_count,
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.kpi_sales_opportunities 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
        else 0 end
    as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.kpi_sales_converted 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
        else 0 end
    as kpi_blended_sold_job_count

from
    jobs
left join technicians as t
    on jobs.technician_id = t.technician_id
left join worked_hours as wh
    on jobs.technician_id = wh.servicetitan_technician_id
    and jobs.report_date = wh.date
left join installed_items as i
    on jobs.technician_id = i.technician_id
    and jobs.report_date = i.report_date
left join sold_items as si
    on jobs.technician_id = si.technician_id
    and jobs.report_date = si.report_date
left join lto_set as ls
    on jobs.technician_id = ls.lto_set_technician_id
    and jobs.report_date = ls.lto_set_date
left join lto_run as lr
    on jobs.technician_id = lr.lto_run_technician_id
    and jobs.report_date = lr.lto_run_date
left join sales_opps as so
    on jobs.technician_id = so.technician_id
    and jobs.report_date = so.report_date
left join departments
    on coalesce(jobs.technician_business_unit_id, t.business_unit_id)::int = departments.servicetitan_business_unit_id::int
)
select *
from combine_datasets
model.edw.actuals_by_technician.compiled_code:

departments as (

),
technicians as (

),

),

),

),
combine_datasets as (
select

,

    -- JOBS METRICS

    "new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted" as "new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted",
    "revenue" as "revenue",
    "job_sales" as "job_sales",
    "sold_hours" as "sold_hours",
    "total_tasks" as "total_tasks",
    "lto_set_count" as "lto_set_count",
    "lto_sales_generated" as "lto_sales_generated",
    "servicetitan_clock_time" as "servicetitan_clock_time",
    "lto_lto_set_count" as "lto_lto_set_count",
    "lto_lto_sales_generated" as "lto_lto_sales_generated",
    "lto_tto_set_count" as "lto_tto_set_count",
    "lto_tto_sales_generated" as "lto_tto_sales_generated",
    -- JOB GROUP TYPE METRICS
    jobs."water_heater_replacement_count" as "water_heater_replacement_count",
    jobs."water_heater_replacement_sold_count" as "water_heater_replacement_sold_count",
    jobs."water_heater_total_count" as "water_heater_total_count",
    jobs."water_heater_total_sold_count" as "water_heater_total_sold_count",  
    jobs."hvac_care_plan_system_check_count" as "hvac_care_plan_system_check_count",
    jobs."hvac_system_check_count" as "hvac_system_check_count",

    -- SALES METRICS
    jobs."estimate_jobs" as "estimate_jobs",
    jobs."estimate_jobs_sold" as "estimate_jobs_sold",
    jobs."estimates" as "estimates",
    jobs."estimate_tasks" as "estimate_tasks",
    jobs."estimates_sold" as "estimates_sold",
    jobs."estimate_sold_tasks" as "estimate_sold_tasks",
    jobs."estimate_sales" as "estimate_sales",
    jobs."estimate_sold_hours_sold" as "estimate_sold_hours_sold",
    jobs."estimate_discounts" as "estimate_discounts",
    jobs."estimate_lto_jobs" as "estimate_lto_jobs",
    jobs."estimate_lto_jobs_sold" as "estimate_lto_jobs_sold",
    jobs."estimate_lto_sales" as "estimate_lto_sales",
    jobs."estimate_lto_discounts" as "estimate_lto_discounts",
    -- RECALLS
    jobs.recalls as "recalls",
    -- WORKED HOURS
    coalesce(wh.hours,0) as hours_worked,
    -- INSTALLED ITEMS
    i.care_plan_row_count,
    i.care_plan_invoices,
    i.care_plan_quantity,
    i.care_plan_cost,
    i.care_plan_revenue,
    i.care_plan_sold_hours,
    i.care_plan_sold_invoices,
    i.care_plan_sold_quantity,
    i.care_plan_discounts,

    i.water_heaters_row_count,
    i.water_heaters_invoices,
    i.water_heaters_quantity,
    i.water_heaters_cost,
    i.water_heaters_revenue,
    i.water_heaters_sold_hours,
    i.water_heaters_sold_invoices,
    i.water_heaters_sold_quantity,
    i.water_heaters_discounts,

    i.tankless_row_count,
    i.tankless_invoices,
    i.tankless_quantity,
    i.tankless_cost,
    i.tankless_revenue,
    i.tankless_sold_hours,
    i.tankless_sold_invoices,
    i.tankless_sold_quantity,
    i.tankless_discounts,

    i.hvac_full_system_row_count,
    i.hvac_full_system_invoices,
    i.hvac_full_system_quantity,
    i.hvac_full_system_cost,
    i.hvac_full_system_revenue,
    i.hvac_full_system_sold_hours,
    i.hvac_full_system_sold_invoices,
    i.hvac_full_system_sold_quantity,
    i.hvac_full_system_discounts,

    i.hvac_partial_system_row_count,
    i.hvac_partial_system_invoices,
    i.hvac_partial_system_quantity,
    i.hvac_partial_system_cost,
    i.hvac_partial_system_revenue,
    i.hvac_partial_system_sold_hours,
    i.hvac_partial_system_sold_invoices,
    i.hvac_partial_system_sold_quantity,
    i.hvac_partial_system_discounts,

    i.excavation_row_count,
    i.excavation_invoices,
    i.excavation_quantity,
    i.excavation_cost,
    i.excavation_revenue,
    i.excavation_sold_hours,
    i.excavation_sold_invoices,
    i.excavation_sold_quantity,
    i.excavation_discounts,

    i.downspouts_row_count,
    i.downspouts_invoices,
    i.downspouts_quantity,
    i.downspouts_cost,
    i.downspouts_revenue,
    i.downspouts_sold_hours,
    i.downspouts_sold_invoices,
    i.downspouts_sold_quantity,
    i.downspouts_discounts,
    -- SALES ITEMS
    si.care_plan_sales_row_count,
    si.care_plan_sales_estimates,
    si.care_plan_sales_quantity,
    si.care_plan_sales_cost,
    si.care_plan_sales,
    si.care_plan_sales_sold_hours,
    si.care_plan_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.care_plan_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.care_plan_sales_discounts,

    si.water_heaters_sales_row_count,
    si.water_heaters_sales_estimates,
    si.water_heaters_sales_quantity,
    si.water_heaters_sales_cost,
    si.water_heaters_sales,
    si.water_heaters_sales_sold_hours,
    si.water_heaters_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.water_heaters_sales_discounts,

    si.tankless_sales_row_count,
    si.tankless_sales_estimates,
    si.tankless_sales_quantity,
    si.tankless_sales_cost,
    si.tankless_sales,
    si.tankless_sales_sold_hours,
    si.tankless_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.tankless_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.tankless_sales_discounts,

    si.hvac_full_system_sales_row_count,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_estimates,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_quantity,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_cost,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_sold_hours,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_discounts,

    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_row_count,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_estimates,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_quantity,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_cost,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_hours,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_discounts,

    si.excavation_sales_row_count,
    si.excavation_sales_estimates,
    si.excavation_sales_quantity,
    si.excavation_sales_cost,
    si.excavation_sales,
    si.excavation_sales_sold_hours,
    si.excavation_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.excavation_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.excavation_sales_discounts,

    si.downspouts_sales_row_count,
    si.downspouts_sales_estimates,
    si.downspouts_sales_quantity,
    si.downspouts_sales_cost,
    si.downspouts_sales,
    si.downspouts_sales_sold_hours,
    si.downspouts_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.downspouts_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.downspouts_sales_discounts,

    
    
    
    -- LTOS
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_total_count,0) as lto_set_total_count,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_total_sold,0) as lto_set_total_sold,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_total_sales,0) as lto_set_total_sales,
    -- LTO RUN
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_total_count,0) as lto_run_total_count,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_total_sold,0) as lto_run_total_sold,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_total_sales,0) as lto_run_total_sales,
        
    -- LTO SET
    jobs."lto_sewer_opp_count" as "lto_sewer_opp_count",
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_sewer_count,0) as lto_set_sewer_count,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_sewer_sold,0) as lto_set_sewer_sold,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_sewer_sales,0) as lto_set_sewer_sales,
    -- LTO RUN
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_sewer_count,0) as lto_run_sewer_count,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_sewer_sold,0) as lto_run_sewer_sold,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_sewer_sales,0) as lto_run_sewer_sales,
        
    -- LTO SET
    jobs."lto_downspout_opp_count" as "lto_downspout_opp_count",
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_downspout_count,0) as lto_set_downspout_count,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_downspout_sold,0) as lto_set_downspout_sold,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_downspout_sales,0) as lto_set_downspout_sales,
    -- LTO RUN
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_downspout_count,0) as lto_run_downspout_count,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_downspout_sold,0) as lto_run_downspout_sold,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_downspout_sales,0) as lto_run_downspout_sales,
        
    -- LTO SET
    jobs."lto_hvac_opp_count" as "lto_hvac_opp_count",
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_hvac_count,0) as lto_set_hvac_count,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_hvac_sold,0) as lto_set_hvac_sold,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_hvac_sales,0) as lto_set_hvac_sales,
    -- LTO RUN
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_hvac_count,0) as lto_run_hvac_count,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_hvac_sold,0) as lto_run_hvac_sold,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_hvac_sales,0) as lto_run_hvac_sales,
    -- Calculated Conversion Metric
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_opportunity_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as blended_opportunity_count,
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_sold_job_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as blended_sold_job_count,
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_opportunity_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_sold_job_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as kpi_blended_sold_job_count
    ------------------------
    -- NOTE: change the blended definition to be based on sale opps data
    ------------------------
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.sales_opportunities 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
        else 0 end
    as blended_opportunity_count,
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.sales_converted 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
        else 0 end
    as blended_sold_job_count,
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.kpi_sales_opportunities 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
        else 0 end
    as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.kpi_sales_converted 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
        else 0 end
    as kpi_blended_sold_job_count

from
    jobs
left join technicians as t
    on jobs.technician_id = t.technician_id
left join worked_hours as wh
    on jobs.technician_id = wh.servicetitan_technician_id
    and jobs.report_date = wh.date
left join installed_items as i
    on jobs.technician_id = i.technician_id
    and jobs.report_date = i.report_date
left join sold_items as si
    on jobs.technician_id = si.technician_id
    and jobs.report_date = si.report_date
left join lto_set as ls
    on jobs.technician_id = ls.lto_set_technician_id
    and jobs.report_date = ls.lto_set_date
left join lto_run as lr
    on jobs.technician_id = lr.lto_run_technician_id
    and jobs.report_date = lr.lto_run_date
left join sales_opps as so
    on jobs.technician_id = so.technician_id
    and jobs.report_date = so.report_date
left join departments
    on coalesce(jobs.technician_business_unit_id, t.business_unit_id)::int = departments.servicetitan_business_unit_id::int
)
select *
from combine_datasets

model.edw.actuals_cube.name: actuals_cube
model.edw.actuals_cube.raw_code:
with 
actuals_by_technicians as (
    select * from {{ ref("actuals_by_technician") }}
),
groupings as (
select 
    -- DIMENSIONS
    coalesce(region,'Total') as region,
    coalesce(location,'Total') as location,
    coalesce(trade_line_type,'Total') as trade_line_type,
    coalesce(department_type,'Total') as department_type,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_id,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_id,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_name,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_name,        
    coalesce(department_id,0) as department_id,
    coalesce(department_name,'Total') as department_name,
    -- TECHNICIAN
    coalesce(technician_team,'Total') as technician_team,
    coalesce(technician_id,0) as technician_id,
    coalesce(technician_name,'Total') as technician_name,
    -- DATE
    report_date,
    -- METRICS
    sum("job_count") as "job_count",
    sum("sold_job_count") as "sold_job_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_count") as "new_opportunity_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count") as "new_opportunity_sold_count",
    sum("job_count_splits_adjusted") as "job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("sold_job_count_splits_adjusted") as "sold_job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("revenue") as "revenue",
    sum("sold_hours") as "sold_hours",
    sum("total_tasks") as "total_tasks",
    sum("lto_set_count") as "lto_set_count",
    sum("lto_sales_generated") as "lto_sales_generated",
    sum("recalls") as "recalls",

    sum("estimate_jobs") as "estimate_jobs",
    sum("estimate_jobs_sold") as "estimate_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimates") as "estimates",
    sum("estimate_tasks") as "estimate_tasks",
    sum("estimates_sold") as "estimates_sold",
    sum("estimate_sold_tasks") as "estimate_sold_tasks",
    sum("estimate_sales") as "estimate_sales",
    sum("estimate_discounts") as "estimate_discounts",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs") as "estimate_lto_jobs",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs_sold") as "estimate_lto_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimate_lto_sales") as "estimate_lto_sales",
    sum("estimate_lto_discounts") as "estimate_lto_discounts",

    sum(care_plan_row_count) as care_plan_row_count,
    sum(care_plan_invoices) as care_plan_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_quantity) as care_plan_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_cost) as care_plan_cost,
    sum(care_plan_revenue) as care_plan_revenue,
    sum(care_plan_sold_hours) as care_plan_sold_hours,
    sum(care_plan_sold_invoices) as care_plan_sold_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_sold_quantity) as care_plan_sold_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_discounts) as care_plan_discounts

from actuals_by_technicians
group by 
    grouping sets (
        -- ALL COLUMNS
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, technician_id, technician_name, report_date),
        -- TEAM LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, report_date),
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, report_date),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, report_date),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, report_date),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, report_date),        
        (trade_line_type, report_date),        
        (location, report_date),        
        (region, report_date)        
    )
),
add_calculated_metrics as (
    select *,
    {{ ratio("new_opportunity_sold_count","new_opportunity_count") }} as "new_opp_conversion_pct",
    {{ ratio("revenue","sold_job_count") }} as "average_sale",
    {{ ratio("revenue","new_opportunity_count") }} as "revenue_run_rate",
    {{ ratio("sold_hours","sold_job_count") }} as "sold_hours_per_job",
    {{ ratio("sold_hours","new_opportunity_count") }} as "sold_hours_run_rate",
    {{ ratio("recalls","sold_job_count") }} as "recall_rate",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_count","new_opportunity_count") }} as "lto_rate",
    {{ ratio("revenue","sold_hours") }} as "revenue_per_sold_hour"
    from groupings
)
select * from add_calculated_metrics

    sum("estimate_lto_jobs_sold") as "estimate_lto_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimate_lto_sales") as "estimate_lto_sales",
    sum("estimate_lto_discounts") as "estimate_lto_discounts",

    sum(care_plan_row_count) as care_plan_row_count,
    sum(care_plan_invoices) as care_plan_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_quantity) as care_plan_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_cost) as care_plan_cost,
    sum(care_plan_revenue) as care_plan_revenue,
    sum(care_plan_sold_hours) as care_plan_sold_hours,
    sum(care_plan_sold_invoices) as care_plan_sold_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_sold_quantity) as care_plan_sold_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_discounts) as care_plan_discounts

from actuals_by_technicians
group by 
    grouping sets (
        -- ALL COLUMNS
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, technician_id, technician_name, report_date),
        -- TEAM LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, report_date),
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, report_date),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, report_date),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, report_date),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, report_date),        
        (trade_line_type, report_date),        
        (location, report_date),        
        (region, report_date)        
    )
),
add_calculated_metrics as (
    select *,
    
    coalesce(("new_opportunity_sold_count") /  nullif(("new_opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "new_opp_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "average_sale",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("new_opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_run_rate",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hours_per_job",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("new_opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hours_run_rate",
    
    coalesce(("recalls") /  nullif(("sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "recall_rate",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_count") /  nullif(("new_opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_rate",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("sold_hours"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_per_sold_hour"
    from groupings
)
select * from add_calculated_metrics

model.edw.budget_by_businessunit.name: budget_by_businessunit
model.edw.budget_by_businessunit.raw_code:
with 
budget as (
    select * from {{ ref("stg_ecoplumbers__budget") }}
),
departments as (
    select * from {{ ref("stg_ecoplumbers__departments") }}
),
budget_with_bu as (
    select
        departments.servicetitan_business_unit_id,
        departments.servicetitan_business_unit_name,
        departments.trade,
        departments.trade_line,
        departments.trade_line_type,
        departments.region,
        departments.trade_type,
        departments.location,
        departments.department_type,
        departments.department_id,
        departments.department as department_name,
        -- budget_mentrics
        budget.budget_date,
        budget.is_budgeted_date,
        budget.budget_crews,
        budget.budget_canceled_calls,
        budget.budget_opportunities,
        budget.budget_sold_jobs,
        budget.budget_lto,
        budget.budget_revenue,
        budget.budget_sold_hours,
        budget.budget_hours_worked,
        budget.budget_care_plans,
        budget.budget_pre_sold_revenue,
        budget.budget_recalls,
        budget.budget_client_concerns,
        budget.budget_gross_margin,
        budget.budget_damages,
        budget.budget_discounts
    from
        budget
    left join departments
        on budget.department_id = departments.department_id
    where servicetitan_tenant_id in ({{ proj_var_where_in('servicetitan_tenant_ids') }})
)
select
    region,
    location,
    trade_line_type,
    department_type,
    servicetitan_business_unit_id,
    servicetitan_business_unit_name,
    department_id,
    department_name,
    budget_date,
    -- Add all of the sum columns from the macro
    {{ budget_sums() }}
from 
    budget_with_bu
where 
    is_budgeted_date = true
{{ dbt_utils.group_by(9)}}

model.edw.budget_cube.name: budget_cube
model.edw.budget_cube.raw_code:
with budget_by_businessunit as (
    select * from {{ ref("budget_by_businessunit") }}
),
groupings as (
    select
        -- DIMENSIONS
        coalesce(region, 'Total') as region,
        coalesce(location, 'Total') as location,
        coalesce(trade_line_type, 'Total') as trade_line_type,
        coalesce(department_type, 'Total') as department_type,
        coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_id, 'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_id,
        coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_name, 'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_name,
        coalesce(department_id, 0) as department_id,
        coalesce(department_name, 'Total') as department_name,
        -- DATE
        budget_date,
        -- METRICS
        sum(budget_crews) as budget_crews,
        sum(budget_canceled_calls) as budget_canceled_calls,
        sum(budget_opportunities) as budget_opportunities,
        sum(budget_sold_jobs) as budget_sold_jobs,
        sum(budget_lto) as budget_lto,
        sum(budget_revenue) as budget_revenue,
        sum(budget_sold_hours) as budget_sold_hours,
        sum(budget_hours_worked) as budget_hours_worked,
        sum(budget_care_plans) as budget_care_plans,
        sum(budget_pre_sold_revenue) as budget_pre_sold_revenue,
        sum(budget_recalls) as budget_recalls,
        sum(budget_client_concerns) as budget_client_concerns,
        sum(budget_gross_margin) as budget_gross_margin,
        sum(budget_damages) as budget_damages,
        sum(budget_discounts) as budget_discounts,
        -- METRICS
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_jobs") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_conversion_pct",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_jobs"), 0),0) as "budget_average_sale",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_run_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_hours") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_sold_hours_run_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_hours") /  nullif(sum("budget_hours_worked"), 0),0) as "budget_sold_hour_efficiency",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_crews"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_per_crew",
        coalesce(sum("budget_recalls") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_jobs"), 0),0) as "budget_recall_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_care_plans") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_care_plan_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_lto") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_lto_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_hours"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_per_sold_hour"

    from budget_by_businessunit
    group by
    grouping sets (
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, budget_date),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, budget_date),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, budget_date),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, budget_date),        
        (trade_line_type, budget_date),        
        (location, budget_date),        
        (region, budget_date)  
        )
)
select * from groupings

        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_hours"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_per_sold_hour"

    from budget_by_businessunit
    group by
    grouping sets (
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, budget_date),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, budget_date),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, budget_date),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, budget_date),        
        (trade_line_type, budget_date),        
        (location, budget_date),        
        (region, budget_date)  
        )
)
select * from groupings
model.edw.budget_cube_w_zeros.compiled_code:
with budget_by_businessunit as (
    select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."budget_by_businessunit_w_zeros"
),
groupings as (
    select
        -- DIMENSIONS
        coalesce(region, 'Total') as region,
        coalesce(location, 'Total') as location,
        coalesce(trade_line_type, 'Total') as trade_line_type,
        coalesce(department_type, 'Total') as department_type,
        coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_id, 'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_id,
        coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_name, 'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_name,
        coalesce(department_id, 0) as department_id,
        coalesce(department_name, 'Total') as department_name,
        -- DATE
        budget_date,
        -- METRICS
        sum(budget_crews) as budget_crews,
        sum(budget_canceled_calls) as budget_canceled_calls,
        sum(budget_opportunities) as budget_opportunities,
        sum(budget_sold_jobs) as budget_sold_jobs,
        sum(budget_lto) as budget_lto,
        sum(budget_revenue) as budget_revenue,
        sum(budget_sold_hours) as budget_sold_hours,
        sum(budget_hours_worked) as budget_hours_worked,
        sum(budget_care_plans) as budget_care_plans,
        sum(budget_pre_sold_revenue) as budget_pre_sold_revenue,
        sum(budget_recalls) as budget_recalls,
        sum(budget_client_concerns) as budget_client_concerns,
        sum(budget_gross_margin) as budget_gross_margin,
        sum(budget_damages) as budget_damages,
        sum(budget_discounts) as budget_discounts,
        -- METRICS
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_jobs") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_conversion_pct",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_jobs"), 0),0) as "budget_average_sale",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_run_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_hours") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_sold_hours_run_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_hours") /  nullif(sum("budget_hours_worked"), 0),0) as "budget_sold_hour_efficiency",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_crews"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_per_crew",
        coalesce(sum("budget_recalls") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_jobs"), 0),0) as "budget_recall_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_care_plans") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_care_plan_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_lto") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_lto_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_hours"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_per_sold_hour"

    from budget_by_businessunit
    group by
    grouping sets (
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, budget_date),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, budget_date),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, budget_date),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, budget_date),        
        (trade_line_type, budget_date),        
        (location, budget_date),        
        (region, budget_date)  
        )
)
select * from groupings

model.edw.employees_count_by_department_.name: employees_count_by_department_daily
model.edw.employees_count_by_department_.raw_code:
with 
employees as 
    (select id, department, department_type, "location", "status", date_started, date_terminated from {{ ref("employees") }}),
dates as 
    (select "date" as on_date from {{ ref("calendar") }} where "date" between (select min(date_started) from employees) and current_date),
crossed_count as (
    select
        *
    from 
        dates 
    cross join
        employees
),
aggregated_set as (
    select
        on_date,
        department,
        department_type,
        location,
        sum(case when on_date between date_started and (case when status = 'Active' then current_date else date_terminated end) then 1 else 0 end) as current_active_count
    from crossed_count
    group by on_date, department, department_type, location
    having sum(case when on_date between date_started and (case when status = 'Active' then current_date else date_terminated end) then 1 else 0 end) > 0 
    order by on_date desc 
)
select * from aggregated_set
model.edw.employees_count_by_department_.compiled_code:
with 
employees as 
    (select id, department, department_type, "location", "status", date_started, date_terminated from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."employees"),
dates as 
    (select "date" as on_date from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."calendar" where "date" between (select min(date_started) from employees) and current_date),
crossed_count as (
    select
        *
    from 
        dates 
    cross join
        employees
),
aggregated_set as (
    select
        on_date,
        department,
        department_type,
        location,
        sum(case when on_date between date_started and (case when status = 'Active' then current_date else date_terminated end) then 1 else 0 end) as current_active_count
    from crossed_count
    group by on_date, department, department_type, location
    having sum(case when on_date between date_started and (case when status = 'Active' then current_date else date_terminated end) then 1 else 0 end) > 0 
    order by on_date desc 
)
select * from aggregated_set

model.edw.metrics_daily_by_businessunit.name: metrics_daily_by_businessunit
model.edw.metrics_daily_by_businessunit.raw_code:
{% 
set common_columns = [
    'region',
    'location',
    'trade_line_type',
    'department_type',
    'servicetitan_business_unit_id',
    'servicetitan_business_unit_name',
    'department_id',
    'department_name',
    'budget_date',
    'report_date'
] 
%}
with 
actuals as (
    select * from {{ ref("actuals_by_businessunit") }}
),
budget as (
    select * from {{ ref("budget_by_businessunit") }}
),
aggregation as (
select 
    coalesce(budget.region,actuals.region) as region,
    coalesce(budget.location,actuals.location) as location,
    coalesce(budget.trade_line_type,actuals.trade_line_type) as trade_line_type,
    coalesce(budget.department_type,actuals.department_type) as department_type,
    coalesce(budget.servicetitan_business_unit_id,actuals.servicetitan_business_unit_id) as servicetitan_business_unit_id,
    coalesce(budget.servicetitan_business_unit_name,actuals.servicetitan_business_unit_name) as servicetitan_business_unit_name,
    coalesce(budget.department_id,actuals.department_id) as department_id,
    coalesce(budget.department_name,actuals.department_name) as department_name,
    coalesce(budget.budget_date,actuals.report_date) as "date",
    {{ star_sum(from=ref("actuals_by_businessunit"), except=common_columns )}},
    {{ actuals_calculations('sum') }},
    {{ star_sum(from=ref("budget_by_businessunit"), except=common_columns) }},
    {{ budget_calculations() }}
from budget
full outer join actuals
    on actuals.servicetitan_business_unit_id::int = budget.servicetitan_business_unit_id::int
    and actuals.report_date::date = budget.budget_date::date
group by
    grouping sets (
        (1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9), -- All Column Combinations
        (1,2,3,4,9),    -- Region, Trade, Location, Type
        (1,3,4,9),
        (1,2,3,9),
        (1,9),(2,9),(3,9),(4,9) -- Each of the above individually
    )
)
select 
    agg.*
from aggregation as agg

model.edw.actuals_by_technician_jbu.name: actuals_by_technician_jbu
model.edw.actuals_by_technician_jbu.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'report_date']},
      {'columns': ['servicetitan_business_unit_id', 'report_date']}
    ]
)}}
with 
departments as (
    select * 
    from {{ ref("stg_ecoplumbers__departments") }}
    where servicetitan_business_unit_id is not null
),
technicians as (
    select * 
    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__technicians') }}
),
worked_hours as (
    select 
        wh.*, 
        t.business_unit_id as technician_business_unit_id,
        t.business_unit as technician_business_unit
    from {{ ref("int_worked_hours_aggregated_to_day")}} as wh
    left join technicians as t
    on t.technician_id = wh.servicetitan_technician_id
),
installed_items as (
    select *
    from {{ ref("int_invoice_items_by_day_and_installer_jbu") }}
),
sold_items as (
    select *
    from {{ ref("int_estimate_items_by_day_and_soldby_jbu") }}
),
lto_set as (
    select *
    from {{ ref("int_lto_set_by_day_and_tech_jbu") }}
),
lto_run as (
    select *
    from {{ ref("int_lto_run_by_day_and_tech_jbu") }}
),
jobs as (
    select *
    from {{ ref("int_jobs_full_join_to_sales_jbu") }}
),
sales_opps as (
    select *
    from {{ ref("int_sales_opportunities_by_date_and_tech_jbu") }}
),
recalls as (
    select *
    from {{ ref("int_recalls_by_day_and_tech_jbu") }}
),
combine_datasets as (
select
    -- HIERARCHY ATTRIBUTES
    {{ department_hierarchy(dept_alias="departments") }},    
    jobs.technician_id,
    jobs.technician_name,
    jobs.report_date,
    -- JOBS METRICS
    "job_count" as "job_count",
    "opportunity_count" as "opportunity_count",
    "sold_job_count" as "sold_job_count",
    "kpi_opportunity_count" as "kpi_opportunity_count",
    "kpi_sold_job_count" as "kpi_sold_job_count",
    so.sales_opportunities as "sales_opportunity_count",
    so.sales_converted as "sales_sold_job_count",
    so.kpi_sales_opportunities as "kpi_sales_opportunity_count",
    so.kpi_sales_converted as "kpi_sales_sold_job_count",
    "new_opportunity_count" as "new_opportunity_count",
    "new_opportunity_sold_count" as "new_opportunity_sold_count",
    "job_count_splits_adjusted" as "job_count_splits_adjusted",
    "sold_job_count_splits_adjusted" as "sold_job_count_splits_adjusted",
    "new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted" as "new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted",
    "new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted" as "new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted",
    "revenue" as "revenue",
    "job_sales" as "job_sales",
    "sold_hours" as "sold_hours",
    "total_tasks" as "total_tasks",
    "lto_set_count" as "lto_set_count",
    "lto_sales_generated" as "lto_sales_generated",
    "servicetitan_clock_time" as "servicetitan_clock_time",
    "lto_lto_set_count" as "lto_lto_set_count",
    "lto_lto_sales_generated" as "lto_lto_sales_generated",
    "lto_tto_set_count" as "lto_tto_set_count",
    "lto_tto_sales_generated" as "lto_tto_sales_generated",
    -- JOB GROUP TYPE METRICS
    jobs."water_heater_replacement_count" as "water_heater_replacement_count",
    jobs."water_heater_replacement_sold_count" as "water_heater_replacement_sold_count",
    jobs."water_heater_total_count" as "water_heater_total_count",
    jobs."water_heater_total_sold_count" as "water_heater_total_sold_count", 
    jobs."hvac_replacement_count" as "hvac_replacement_count",
    jobs."hvac_10plus_count" as "hvac_10plus_count", 
    jobs."hvac_care_plan_system_check_count" as "hvac_care_plan_system_check_count",
    jobs."hvac_system_check_count" as "hvac_system_check_count",

    -- SALES METRICS
    jobs."estimate_jobs" as "estimate_jobs",
    jobs."estimate_jobs_sold" as "estimate_jobs_sold",
    jobs."estimates" as "estimates",
    jobs."estimate_tasks" as "estimate_tasks",
    jobs."estimates_sold" as "estimates_sold",
    jobs."estimate_sold_tasks" as "estimate_sold_tasks",
    jobs."estimate_sales" as "estimate_sales",
    jobs."estimate_sold_hours_sold" as "estimate_sold_hours_sold",
    jobs."estimate_discounts" as "estimate_discounts",
    jobs."estimate_lto_jobs" as "estimate_lto_jobs",
    jobs."estimate_lto_jobs_sold" as "estimate_lto_jobs_sold",
    jobs."estimate_lto_sales" as "estimate_lto_sales",
    jobs."estimate_lto_discounts" as "estimate_lto_discounts",
    -- RECALLS
    jobs.recalls as "recalls",
    -- WORKED HOURS
    coalesce(wh.hours,0) as hours_worked,
    -- INSTALLED ITEMS
    i.care_plan_row_count,
    i.care_plan_invoices,
    i.care_plan_quantity,
    i.care_plan_cost,
    i.care_plan_revenue,
    i.care_plan_sold_hours,
    i.care_plan_sold_invoices,
    i.care_plan_sold_quantity,
    i.care_plan_discounts,

    i.water_heaters_row_count,
    i.water_heaters_invoices,
    i.water_heaters_quantity,
    i.water_heaters_cost,
    i.water_heaters_revenue,
    i.water_heaters_sold_hours,
    i.water_heaters_sold_invoices,
    i.water_heaters_sold_quantity,
    i.water_heaters_discounts,

    i.tankless_row_count,
    i.tankless_invoices,
    i.tankless_quantity,
    i.tankless_cost,
    i.tankless_revenue,
    i.tankless_sold_hours,
    i.tankless_sold_invoices,
    i.tankless_sold_quantity,
    i.tankless_discounts,

    i.hvac_full_system_row_count,
    i.hvac_full_system_invoices,
    i.hvac_full_system_quantity,
    i.hvac_full_system_cost,
    i.hvac_full_system_revenue,
    i.hvac_full_system_sold_hours,
    i.hvac_full_system_sold_invoices,
    i.hvac_full_system_sold_quantity,
    i.hvac_full_system_discounts,

    i.hvac_partial_system_row_count,
    i.hvac_partial_system_invoices,
    i.hvac_partial_system_quantity,
    i.hvac_partial_system_cost,
    i.hvac_partial_system_revenue,
    i.hvac_partial_system_sold_hours,
    i.hvac_partial_system_sold_invoices,
    i.hvac_partial_system_sold_quantity,
    i.hvac_partial_system_discounts,

    i.excavation_row_count,
    i.excavation_invoices,
    i.excavation_quantity,
    i.excavation_cost,
    i.excavation_revenue,
    i.excavation_sold_hours,
    i.excavation_sold_invoices,
    i.excavation_sold_quantity,
    i.excavation_discounts,

    i.downspouts_row_count,
    i.downspouts_invoices,
    i.downspouts_quantity,
    i.downspouts_cost,
    i.downspouts_revenue,
    i.downspouts_sold_hours,
    i.downspouts_sold_invoices,
    i.downspouts_sold_quantity,
    i.downspouts_discounts,
    -- SALES ITEMS
    si.care_plan_sales_row_count,
    si.care_plan_sales_estimates,
    si.care_plan_sales_quantity,
    si.care_plan_sales_cost,
    si.care_plan_sales,
    si.care_plan_sales_sold_hours,
    si.care_plan_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.care_plan_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.care_plan_sales_discounts,

    si.water_heaters_sales_row_count,
    si.water_heaters_sales_estimates,
    si.water_heaters_sales_quantity,
    si.water_heaters_sales_cost,
    si.water_heaters_sales,
    si.water_heaters_sales_sold_hours,
    si.water_heaters_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.water_heaters_sales_discounts,

    si.tankless_sales_row_count,
    si.tankless_sales_estimates,
    si.tankless_sales_quantity,
    si.tankless_sales_cost,
    si.tankless_sales,
    si.tankless_sales_sold_hours,
    si.tankless_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.tankless_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.tankless_sales_discounts,

    si.hvac_full_system_sales_row_count,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_estimates,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_quantity,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_cost,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_sold_hours,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.hvac_full_system_sales_discounts,

    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_row_count,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_estimates,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_quantity,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_cost,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_hours,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.hvac_partial_system_sales_discounts,

    si.excavation_sales_row_count,
    si.excavation_sales_estimates,
    si.excavation_sales_quantity,
    si.excavation_sales_cost,
    si.excavation_sales,
    si.excavation_sales_sold_hours,
    si.excavation_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.excavation_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.excavation_sales_discounts,

    si.downspouts_sales_row_count,
    si.downspouts_sales_estimates,
    si.downspouts_sales_quantity,
    si.downspouts_sales_cost,
    si.downspouts_sales,
    si.downspouts_sales_sold_hours,
    si.downspouts_sales_sold_estimates,
    si.downspouts_sales_sold_quantity,
    si.downspouts_sales_discounts,

    
    
    
    -- LTOS
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_total_count,0) as lto_set_total_count,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_total_sold,0) as lto_set_total_sold,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_total_sales,0) as lto_set_total_sales,
    -- LTO RUN
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_total_count,0) as lto_run_total_count,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_total_sold,0) as lto_run_total_sold,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_total_sales,0) as lto_run_total_sales,
        
    -- LTO SET
    jobs."lto_sewer_opp_count" as "lto_sewer_opp_count",
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_sewer_count,0) as lto_set_sewer_count,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_sewer_sold,0) as lto_set_sewer_sold,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_sewer_sales,0) as lto_set_sewer_sales,
    -- LTO RUN
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_sewer_count,0) as lto_run_sewer_count,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_sewer_sold,0) as lto_run_sewer_sold,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_sewer_sales,0) as lto_run_sewer_sales,
        
    -- LTO SET
    jobs."lto_downspout_opp_count" as "lto_downspout_opp_count",
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_downspout_count,0) as lto_set_downspout_count,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_downspout_sold,0) as lto_set_downspout_sold,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_downspout_sales,0) as lto_set_downspout_sales,
    -- LTO RUN
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_downspout_count,0) as lto_run_downspout_count,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_downspout_sold,0) as lto_run_downspout_sold,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_downspout_sales,0) as lto_run_downspout_sales,
        
    -- LTO SET
    jobs."lto_hvac_opp_count" as "lto_hvac_opp_count",
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_hvac_count,0) as lto_set_hvac_count,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_hvac_sold,0) as lto_set_hvac_sold,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_hvac_sales,0) as lto_set_hvac_sales,
    -- LTO RUN
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_hvac_count,0) as lto_run_hvac_count,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_hvac_sold,0) as lto_run_hvac_sold,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_hvac_sales,0) as lto_run_hvac_sales,
    -- Calculated Conversion Metric
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_opportunity_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as blended_opportunity_count,
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_sold_job_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as blended_sold_job_count,
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_opportunity_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_sold_job_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as kpi_blended_sold_job_count
    ------------------------
    -- NOTE: change the blended definition to be based on sale opps data
    ------------------------
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.sales_opportunities 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
        else 0 end
    as blended_opportunity_count,
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.sales_converted 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
        else 0 end
    as blended_sold_job_count,
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.kpi_sales_opportunities 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
        else 0 end
    as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.kpi_sales_converted 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
        else 0 end
    as kpi_blended_sold_job_count
from
    jobs
left join departments
    on jobs.business_unit_id = departments.servicetitan_business_unit_id::int
-- left join technicians as t
--     on jobs.technician_id = t.technician_id
left join worked_hours as wh
    on jobs.technician_id = wh.servicetitan_technician_id
    and jobs.business_unit_id = wh.technician_business_unit_id
    and jobs.report_date = wh.date
left join installed_items as i
    on jobs.technician_id = i.technician_id
    and jobs.business_unit_id = i.business_unit_id
    and jobs.report_date = i.report_date
left join sold_items as si
    on jobs.technician_id = si.technician_id
    and jobs.business_unit_id = si.business_unit_id
    and jobs.report_date = si.report_date
left join lto_set as ls
    on jobs.technician_id = ls.lto_set_technician_id
    and jobs.business_unit_id = ls.lto_set_business_unit_id
    and jobs.report_date = ls.lto_set_date
left join lto_run as lr
    on jobs.technician_id = lr.lto_run_technician_id
    and jobs.business_unit_id = lr.lto_run_business_unit_id
    and jobs.report_date = lr.lto_run_date
left join sales_opps as so
    on jobs.technician_id = so.technician_id
    and jobs.business_unit_id = so.business_unit_id
    and jobs.report_date = so.report_date
)
select *
from combine_datasets
model.edw.actuals_by_technician_jbu.compiled_code:
with

    select *

),

),
worked_hours as (

        t.business_unit as technician_business_unit
    from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_worked_hours_aggregated_to_day" as wh
    left join technicians as t
    on t.technician_id = wh.servicetitan_technician_id

installed_items as (

    -- SALES ITEMS

    -- LTO RUN

    coalesce(lr.lto_run_total_sales,0) as lto_run_total_sales,

    coalesce(lr.lto_run_downspout_sales,0) as lto_run_downspout_sales,

    coalesce(ls.lto_set_hvac_sales,0) as lto_set_hvac_sales,
    -- LTO RUN

    coalesce(lr.lto_run_hvac_sold,0) as lto_run_hvac_sold,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_hvac_sales,0) as lto_run_hvac_sales,
    -- Calculated Conversion Metric
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_opportunity_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as blended_opportunity_count,
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_sold_job_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as blended_sold_job_count,
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_opportunity_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    -- case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_sold_job_count 
    --     when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
    --     else 0 end
    -- as kpi_blended_sold_job_count
    ------------------------
    -- NOTE: change the blended definition to be based on sale opps data
    ------------------------
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.sales_opportunities 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
        else 0 end
    as blended_opportunity_count,
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.sales_converted 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
        else 0 end
    as blended_sold_job_count,
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.kpi_sales_opportunities 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
        else 0 end
    as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    case when department_type = 'Sales' then so.kpi_sales_converted 
        when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
        else 0 end
    as kpi_blended_sold_job_count
from
    jobs
left join departments
    on jobs.business_unit_id = departments.servicetitan_business_unit_id::int
-- left join technicians as t
--     on jobs.technician_id = t.technician_id
left join worked_hours as wh
    on jobs.technician_id = wh.servicetitan_technician_id
    and jobs.business_unit_id = wh.technician_business_unit_id
    and jobs.report_date = wh.date
left join installed_items as i
    on jobs.technician_id = i.technician_id
    and jobs.business_unit_id = i.business_unit_id
    and jobs.report_date = i.report_date
left join sold_items as si
    on jobs.technician_id = si.technician_id
    and jobs.business_unit_id = si.business_unit_id
    and jobs.report_date = si.report_date
left join lto_set as ls
    on jobs.technician_id = ls.lto_set_technician_id
    and jobs.business_unit_id = ls.lto_set_business_unit_id
    and jobs.report_date = ls.lto_set_date
left join lto_run as lr
    on jobs.technician_id = lr.lto_run_technician_id
    and jobs.business_unit_id = lr.lto_run_business_unit_id
    and jobs.report_date = lr.lto_run_date
left join sales_opps as so
    on jobs.technician_id = so.technician_id
    and jobs.business_unit_id = so.business_unit_id
    and jobs.report_date = so.report_date
)
select *
from combine_datasets

model.edw.actuals_cube_jbu.raw_code:
with 
actuals_by_technicians as (
    select * from {{ ref("actuals_by_technician_jbu") }}
),
groupings as (
select 
    -- DIMENSIONS
    coalesce(region,'Total') as region,
    coalesce(location,'Total') as location,
    coalesce(trade_line_type,'Total') as trade_line_type,
    coalesce(department_type,'Total') as department_type,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_id,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_id,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_name,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_name,        
    coalesce(department_id,0) as department_id,
    coalesce(department_name,'Total') as department_name,
    -- TECHNICIAN
    coalesce('Total','Total') as technician_team, -- Kept for consistency with other cubes
    coalesce(technician_id,0) as technician_id,
    coalesce(technician_name,'Total') as technician_name,
    -- DATE
    report_date,
    -- METRICS
    sum("job_count") as "job_count",
    sum("sold_job_count") as "sold_job_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_count") as "new_opportunity_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count") as "new_opportunity_sold_count",
    sum("job_count_splits_adjusted") as "job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("sold_job_count_splits_adjusted") as "sold_job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("revenue") as "revenue",
    sum("sold_hours") as "sold_hours",
    sum("total_tasks") as "total_tasks",
    sum("lto_set_count") as "lto_set_count",
    sum("lto_sales_generated") as "lto_sales_generated",
    sum("recalls") as "recalls",

    sum("estimate_jobs") as "estimate_jobs",
    sum("estimate_jobs_sold") as "estimate_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimates") as "estimates",
    sum("estimate_tasks") as "estimate_tasks",
    sum("estimates_sold") as "estimates_sold",
    sum("estimate_sold_tasks") as "estimate_sold_tasks",
    sum("estimate_sales") as "estimate_sales",
    sum("estimate_discounts") as "estimate_discounts",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs") as "estimate_lto_jobs",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs_sold") as "estimate_lto_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimate_lto_sales") as "estimate_lto_sales",
    sum("estimate_lto_discounts") as "estimate_lto_discounts",

    sum(care_plan_row_count) as care_plan_row_count,
    sum(care_plan_invoices) as care_plan_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_quantity) as care_plan_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_cost) as care_plan_cost,
    sum(care_plan_revenue) as care_plan_revenue,
    sum(care_plan_sold_hours) as care_plan_sold_hours,
    sum(care_plan_sold_invoices) as care_plan_sold_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_sold_quantity) as care_plan_sold_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_discounts) as care_plan_discounts

from actuals_by_technicians
group by 
    grouping sets (
        -- ALL COLUMNS
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, technician_id, technician_name, report_date),
        -- TEAM LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, report_date),
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, report_date),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, report_date),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, report_date),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, report_date),        
        (trade_line_type, report_date),        
        (location, report_date),        
        (region, report_date)        
    )
),
add_calculated_metrics as (
    select *,
    {{ ratio("new_opportunity_sold_count","new_opportunity_count") }} as "new_opp_conversion_pct",
    {{ ratio("revenue","sold_job_count") }} as "average_sale",
    {{ ratio("revenue","new_opportunity_count") }} as "revenue_run_rate",
    {{ ratio("sold_hours","sold_job_count") }} as "sold_hours_per_job",
    {{ ratio("sold_hours","new_opportunity_count") }} as "sold_hours_run_rate",
    {{ ratio("recalls","sold_job_count") }} as "recall_rate",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_count","new_opportunity_count") }} as "lto_rate",
    {{ ratio("revenue","sold_hours") }} as "revenue_per_sold_hour"
    from groupings
)
select * from add_calculated_metrics

model.edw.int_estimate_items_by_day_and_.name: int_estimate_items_by_day_and_soldby_jbu
model.edw.int_estimate_items_by_day_and_.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'business_unit_id', 'report_date']}
    ]
)}}
with
estimate_items as (
    select * from {{ ref('estimate_items_sold') }}
),
output as (
select 
    est.opportunity_date_est::date as report_date,
    est.job_business_unit_id as business_unit_id,
    est.job_business_unit as business_unit,
    est.sold_by_id as technician_id,
    est.sold_by_name as technician_name,
    count(distinct estimate_id) as estimates,
    count(estimate_id) as estimates_item_count,
    count(case when est.item_type = 'Services' and item_total > 0 then 1 end) as estimate_item_tasks_sold,
    sum(item_price) as estimate_item_sales,
    sum(case when item_type = 'Discount' or item_price < 0 then item_total end) as estimate_item_discounts,
    sum(case when item_type = 'Materials' then item_total end) as estimate_item_charged_materials,
    -- ITEMS COLUMNS
    {{sales_item_columns(['Care Plans','Membership'], 'care_plan')}},
    -- PLUMBING
    {{sales_item_columns(['Water Heaters - Tank','Water Heaters - Tankless','Water Heaters'], 'water_heaters')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Water Heaters - Tank'], 'tanked_water_heaters')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Water Heaters - Tankless'], 'tankless')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Sump Pumps'], 'sump_pump')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Toilet'], 'toilet')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Water Treatment','Halo 5'], 'water_treatment')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Halo 5'], 'halo_5')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Disposal'], 'disposal')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Stack Replacement'], 'stack')}},
    -- HVAC
    {{sales_item_columns(['HVAC System Replacement','HVAC - Full System Install - Gold','HVAC - Full System Install - Silver','HVAC - Full System Install - Platinum'], 'hvac_full_system')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['HVAC Furnace Replacement','HVAC Air Conditioner Replacement','HVAC - Partial System Install'], 'hvac_partial_system')}},
    -- SEWER
    {{sales_item_columns(['Excavation - Boring','Excavation - Hydro Vac','Excavation - Lining','Excavation - Sewer','Excavation - Water Service'], 'excavation')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Downspout Drains'], 'downspouts')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Hydro Jet'], 'jets')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Eco Drain'], 'eco_drain')}}
from estimate_items as est
where 1=1
    -- est.job_status = 'Completed'
group by
    opportunity_date_est::Date,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit,
    sold_by_id,
    sold_by_name
)
select *
from output

model.edw.int_invoice_items_by_day_and_i.name: int_invoice_items_by_day_and_installer_jbu
model.edw.int_invoice_items_by_day_and_i.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'business_unit_id', 'report_date']}
    ]
)}}
with
invoice_items as (
    select * from {{ ref('invoice_items') }}
),
output as (
select 
    inv.completed_on_est::date as report_date,
    inv.business_unit_id,
    inv.business_unit_name as business_unit,
    inv.primary_technician_id as technician_id,
    inv.primary_technician_name as technician_name,
    count(distinct invoice_id) as invoices,
    count(invoice_id) as invoices_item_count,
    count(case when inv.item_type = 'Services' and item_total > 0 then 1 end) as installed_tasks_sold,
    sum(item_total) as installed_sales,
    sum(case when item_type = 'Discount' or item_price < 0 then item_total end) as installed_discounts,
    sum(case when item_type = 'Materials' then item_total end) as installed_charged_materials,
    sum(case when item_type = 'Materials' then item_cost end) as installed_material_cost,
    -- ITEMS COLUMNS
    {{item_columns(['Care Plans','Membership'], 'care_plan')}},
    {{item_columns(['Water Heaters - Tank','Water Heaters - Tankless'], 'water_heaters')}},
    {{item_columns(['Water Heaters - Tankless'], 'tankless')}},
    {{item_columns(['HVAC System Replacement','HVAC - Full System Install - Gold','HVAC - Full System Install - Silver','HVAC - Full System Install - Platinum','HVAC - Full System Install - Bronze','HVAC - Full System Install - Economy'], 'hvac_full_system')}},
    {{item_columns(['HVAC Furnace Replacement','HVAC Air Conditioner Replacement','HVAC - Partial System Install'], 'hvac_partial_system')}},
    {{item_columns(['Excavation - Boring','Excavation - Hydro Vac','Excavation - Lining','Excavation - Sewer','Excavation - Water Service'], 'excavation')}},
    {{item_columns(['Downspout Drains'], 'downspouts')}}

from invoice_items as inv
where
    inv.job_status = 'Completed'
group by
    completed_on_est::Date,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit,
    primary_technician_id,
    primary_technician_name
)
select *
from output

   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('Downspout Drains') then 1 else 0 end) as downspouts_row_count,
   count(distinct case when item_cross_sale_group in ('Downspout Drains') then invoice_id end) as downspouts_invoices,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('Downspout Drains') then item_quantity else 0 end) as downspouts_quantity,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('Downspout Drains') then item_cost else 0 end) as downspouts_cost,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('Downspout Drains') then item_total else 0 end) as downspouts_revenue,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('Downspout Drains') then item_sold_hours else 0 end) as downspouts_sold_hours,
   count(distinct case when item_cross_sale_group in ('Downspout Drains') and item_total > 0 then invoice_id end) as downspouts_sold_invoices,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('Downspout Drains') and item_total > 0 then item_quantity else 0 end) as downspouts_sold_quantity,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('Downspout Drains') and (item_type = 'Discount' or item_price < 0) then item_total else 0 end) as downspouts_discounts


from invoice_items as inv
where
    inv.job_status = 'Completed'
group by
    completed_on_est::Date,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit,
    primary_technician_id,
    primary_technician_name
)
select *
from output
-- where report_date = '2022-11-25'

model.edw.int_jobs_full_join_to_sales_jb.name: int_jobs_full_join_to_sales_jbu
model.edw.int_jobs_full_join_to_sales_jb.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'business_unit_id', 'report_date']}
    ]
)}}
with 
jobs as (
    select * from {{ ref("int_jobs_splits_by_completion_date_by_tech_jbu") }}
),
sales as (
    select * from {{ ref("int_sales_by_sold_date_by_tech_jbu") }}
),
recalls as (
    select * from {{ ref("int_recalls_by_day_and_tech_jbu") }}
),
output as (
    select
        coalesce(coalesce(jobs.report_date, sales.report_date), recalls.report_date) as report_date,
        coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(jobs.business_unit_id, sales.business_unit_id),recalls.business_unit_id), NULL) as business_unit_id,
        coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(jobs.business_unit, sales.business_unit),recalls.business_unit),'No BU') as business_unit, 
        coalesce(coalesce(jobs.technician_id, sales.technician_id),recalls.technician_id) as technician_id, 
        coalesce(coalesce(jobs.technician_name, sales.technician_name), recalls.technician_name) as  technician_name,
        -- JOBS METRICS
        jobs.job_count,
        jobs.opportunity_count,
        jobs.sold_job_count,
        jobs.kpi_opportunity_count,
        jobs.kpi_sold_job_count,
        jobs.sales_opportunity_count,
        jobs.sales_sold_job_count,
        jobs.kpi_sales_opportunity_count,
        jobs.kpi_sales_sold_job_count,
        jobs.new_opportunity_count,
        jobs.new_opportunity_sold_count,
        jobs.job_count_splits_adjusted,
        jobs.sold_job_count_splits_adjusted,
        jobs.new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted,
        jobs.new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted,
        jobs.revenue,
        jobs.job_sales,
        jobs.sold_hours,
        jobs.total_tasks,
        jobs.lto_set_count,
        jobs.lto_sales_generated,
        jobs.servicetitan_clock_time,
        jobs.lto_sewer_opp_count,
        jobs.lto_downspout_opp_count,
        jobs.lto_hvac_opp_count,
        jobs.lto_lto_set_count,
        jobs.lto_lto_sales_generated,
        jobs.lto_tto_set_count,
        jobs.lto_tto_sales_generated,
        -- JOB TYPE GROUPS
        jobs.water_heater_replacement_count,
        jobs.water_heater_replacement_sold_count,
        jobs.water_heater_total_count,
        jobs.water_heater_total_sold_count,
        jobs.hvac_replacement_count,
        jobs.hvac_10plus_count,
        jobs.hvac_care_plan_system_check_count,
        jobs.hvac_system_check_count,
        -- SALES METRICS
        sales.estimate_jobs,
        sales.estimate_jobs_sold,
        sales.estimates,
        sales.estimate_tasks,
        sales.estimates_sold,
        sales.estimate_sold_tasks,
        sales.estimate_sales,
        sales.estimate_sold_hours_sold,
        sales.estimate_discounts,
        sales.estimate_lto_jobs,
        sales.estimate_lto_jobs_sold,
        sales.estimate_lto_sales,
        sales.estimate_lto_discounts,
        -- RECALLS
        recalls.recalls
        from
            jobs
        full outer join sales
            on jobs.technician_id = sales.technician_id
            and jobs.business_unit_id = sales.business_unit_id
            and jobs.report_date = sales.report_date
        full outer join recalls
            on jobs.technician_id = recalls.technician_id
            and jobs.business_unit_id = recalls.business_unit_id
            and jobs.report_date = recalls.report_date
)
select *
from output
