model.edw.int_jobs_splits_by_completion_.name: int_jobs_splits_by_completion_date_by_tech_jbu
model.edw.int_jobs_splits_by_completion_.raw_code:
with
jobs_splits as (
    select * from {{ ref("jobs_splits") }}
),
non_job_revenue as (
    select * from {{ ref("non_job_invoices") }}
),
non_job_revenue_output as (
    select
        -- ATTRIBUTES
        njr.completed_on_est::date as report_date,
        njr.business_unit_id::int as business_unit_id,
        njr.business_unit_name as business_unit,
        njr.primary_technician_id::int as technician_id,
        njr.primary_technician_name as technician_name,
        -- METRICS
        count(njr.invoice_id) as job_count,
        0 as opportunity_count,
        0 as sold_job_count,
        0 as kpi_opportunity_count,
        0 as kpi_sold_job_count,
        0 as sales_opportunity_count,
        0 as sales_sold_job_count,
        0 as kpi_sales_opportunity_count,
        0 as kpi_sales_sold_job_count,
        0 as new_opportunity_count,
        0 as new_opportunity_sold_count,
        0 as job_count_splits_adjusted,
        0 as sold_job_count_splits_adjusted,
        0 as new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted,
        0 as new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted,
        sum(njr.invoice_total) as revenue,
        0 as job_sales,
        sum(njr.item_sold_hours) as sold_hours,
        0 as total_tasks,
        0 as lto_sewer_opp_count,
        0 as lto_downspout_opp_count,
        0 as lto_hvac_opp_count,
        0 as lto_set_count,
        0 as lto_sales_generated,
        0 as lto_lto_set_count,
        0 as lto_lto_sales_generated,
        0 as lto_tto_set_count,
        0 as lto_tto_sales_generated,
        0 as recalls,
        0 as water_heater_replacement_count,
        0 as water_heater_replacement_sold_count,
        0 as water_heater_total_count,
        0 as water_heater_total_sold_count,
        0 as hvac_replacement_count,
        0 as hvac_10plus_count,
        0 as hvac_care_plan_system_check_count,
        0 as hvac_system_check_count,
        0 as servicetitan_clock_time
    from
        non_job_revenue as njr
    group by
        njr.completed_on_est::Date,
        njr.business_unit_id,
        njr.business_unit_name,
        njr.primary_technician_id,
        njr.primary_technician_name
),
output as (
    select
        -- ATTRIBUTES
        js.completed_on_est::date as report_date,
        js.business_unit_id as business_unit_id,
        js.business_unit as business_unit,
        js.split_technician_id as technician_id,
        js.split_technician_name as technician_name,
        -- METRICS
        count(js.job_id) as job_count,
        sum(js.is_opportunity) as opportunity_count,
        sum(js.is_converted) as sold_job_count,
        sum(js.kpi_is_opportunity) as kpi_opportunity_count,
        sum(js.kpi_is_converted) as kpi_sold_job_count,
        sum(js.is_sales_opportunity) as sales_opportunity_count,
        sum(js.is_sales_converted) as sales_sold_job_count,
        sum(js.kpi_is_sales_opportunity) as kpi_sales_opportunity_count,
        sum(js.kpi_is_sales_converted) as kpi_sales_sold_job_count,
        count(js.is_opp_with_maint) as new_opportunity_count,
        count(case when js.is_opp_with_maint is not null and js.revenue > 0 then 1 end) as new_opportunity_sold_count,
        sum(js.split) as job_count_splits_adjusted,
        sum(case when js.revenue > 0 then js.split else null end) as sold_job_count_splits_adjusted,
        sum(case when js.is_opp_with_maint is not null then js.split end) as new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted,
        sum(case when js.is_opp_with_maint is not null and js.revenue > 0 then js.split end) as new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted,
        sum(js.revenue) as revenue,
        sum(js.sales) as job_sales,
        sum(js.sold_hours) as sold_hours,
        sum(0) as total_tasks,
        sum(case when lto_opp_group = 'Sewer' then 1 else 0 end) as lto_sewer_opp_count,
        sum(case when lto_opp_group = 'Downspout' then 1 else 0 end) as lto_downspout_opp_count,
        sum(case when lto_opp_group = 'HVAC' then 1 else 0 end) as lto_hvac_opp_count,
        sum(lto_run_count) as lto_set_count,
        sum(js.lto_sales) as lto_sales_generated,
        sum(case when js.lto_set_type = 'LTO' then js.split else 0 end) as lto_lto_set_count,
        sum(case when js.lto_set_type = 'LTO' then js.lto_sales else 0 end) as lto_lto_sales_generated,
        sum(case when js.lto_set_type = 'TTO' then js.split else 0 end) as lto_tto_set_count,
        sum(case when js.lto_set_type = 'TTO' then js.lto_sales else 0 end) as lto_tto_sales_generated,
        sum(recall_run_count) as recalls,
        -- JOB TYPE GROUPS - MIGHT PULL THIS OUT
        sum(case when js.job_type_group = 'Water Heater Replacement' then js.split else 0 end) as water_heater_replacement_count,
        sum(case when js.job_type_group = 'Water Heater Replacement' and js.sales > 500 then js.split else 0 end) as water_heater_replacement_sold_count,
        sum(case when js.job_type_group in ('Water Heater Replacement','Water Heater Service') then js.split else 0 end) as water_heater_total_count,
        sum(case when js.job_type_group in ('Water Heater Replacement','Water Heater Service') and js.sales > 500 then js.split else 0 end) as water_heater_total_sold_count,
        -- HVAC
        sum(case when js.job_type_group = 'HVAC Replacement' then js.split else 0 end) as hvac_replacement_count,
        sum(case when js.job_type ~* 'HVAC' and js.tags ~* 'HVAC 10+' and not js.tags ~* 'HVAC 10+ Opportunity' and lto_set_job_id is null then js.split else 0 end) as hvac_10plus_count,
        sum(case when js.job_type_group = 'HVAC Care Plan System Check' then js.split else 0 end) as hvac_care_plan_system_check_count,
        sum(case when js.job_type_group in ('HVAC Care Plan System Check','HVAC Non Care Plan System Check') then js.split else 0 end) as hvac_system_check_count,
        count(0) as servicetitan_clock_time
    from
        jobs_splits as js
    where
        js.job_status = 'Completed'
    group by
        js.completed_on_est::Date,
        js.business_unit_id,
        js.business_unit,
        split_technician_id,
        split_technician_name
)
select * from output
union
select * from non_job_revenue_output

model.edw.int_lto_run_by_day_and_tech_jb.name: int_lto_run_by_day_and_tech_jbu
model.edw.int_lto_run_by_day_and_tech_jb.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['lto_run_technician_id', 'lto_run_business_unit_id', 'lto_run_date']}
    ]
)}}
with 
lto_run as (
    select * from {{ ref("int_jobs_filtered_to_lto_run") }}
)
select
    lto_run_business_unit_id as lto_run_business_unit_id,
    lto_run_business_unit as lto_run_business_unit,
    lto_run_primary_technician_id as lto_run_technician_id,
    lto_run_primary_technician_name as lto_run_technician_name,
    lto_run_completed_on_est::date as lto_run_date,
    -- Total Set
    count(*) as lto_run_total_count,
    sum(case when lto_run_sales > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_total_sold,
    sum(lto_run_sales) as lto_run_total_sales,
    -- Sewer
    {{ generate_lto_run_metrics("Sewer") }},
    -- Downspout
    {{ generate_lto_run_metrics("Downspout") }},
    -- HVAC
    {{ generate_lto_run_metrics("HVAC") }}
from 
    lto_run
where 
    lto_run_job_status = 'Completed'
group by 
    1,2,3,4,5

)
select
    lto_run_business_unit_id as lto_run_business_unit_id,
    lto_run_business_unit as lto_run_business_unit,
    lto_run_primary_technician_id as lto_run_technician_id,
    lto_run_primary_technician_name as lto_run_technician_name,
    lto_run_completed_on_est::date as lto_run_date,
    -- Total Set
    count(*) as lto_run_total_count,
    sum(case when lto_run_sales > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_total_sold,
    sum(lto_run_sales) as lto_run_total_sales,
    -- Sewer
    
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'Sewer' then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_sewer_count,
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'Sewer' and lto_run_sales > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_sewer_sold,
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'Sewer' then lto_run_sales else 0 end) as lto_run_sewer_sales
,
    -- Downspout
    
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'Downspout' then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_downspout_count,
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'Downspout' and lto_run_sales > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_downspout_sold,
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'Downspout' then lto_run_sales else 0 end) as lto_run_downspout_sales
,
    -- HVAC
    
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'HVAC' then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_hvac_count,
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'HVAC' and lto_run_sales > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_hvac_sold,
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'HVAC' then lto_run_sales else 0 end) as lto_run_hvac_sales

from 
    lto_run
where 
    lto_run_job_status = 'Completed'
group by 
    1,2,3,4,5

model.edw.int_lto_set_by_day_and_tech_jb.name: int_lto_set_by_day_and_tech_jbu
model.edw.int_lto_set_by_day_and_tech_jb.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['lto_set_technician_id', 'lto_set_business_unit_id', 'lto_set_date']}
    ]
)}}
with 
set_lto_jobs as (
    -- Note that we filter on run ID because it means an lto was set from the job
    select jobs.*,
        {{ lto_set_type("job_type","tags") }} as lto_set_group
    from {{ ref('jobs') }} as jobs 
    where lto_run_job_ids is not null
    and jobs.job_status = 'Completed'
)
select
    set_lto_jobs.business_unit_id as lto_set_business_unit_id,
    set_lto_jobs.business_unit as lto_set_business_unit,
    primary_technician_id as lto_set_technician_id,
    primary_technician_name as lto_set_technician_name,
    completed_on_est::date as lto_set_date,
    -- Total Set
    sum(lto_run_count) as lto_set_total_count,
    sum(lto_run_sold_count) as lto_set_total_sold,
    sum(lto_sales) as lto_set_total_sales,
    -- Sewer
    {{ generate_lto_set_metrics("Sewer") }},
    -- Downspout
    {{ generate_lto_set_metrics("Downspout") }},
    -- HVAC
    {{ generate_lto_set_metrics("HVAC") }}
from

where 
    job_status = 'Completed'
group by 
    1,2,3,4,5
model.edw.int_lto_set_by_day_and_tech_jb.compiled_code:
with 
set_lto_jobs as (
    -- Note that we filter on run ID because it means an lto was set from the job
    select jobs.*,
        
    CASE
        WHEN "job_type" in 
            ('Drain Clogged or Broken Downspout-Clog/Clearing',
             'Drain Clogged or Broken Downspout- Repair/Replace'
            ) 
            THEN 'Downspout'
        WHEN 
            "tags" ~ 'Repipe Opportunity' 
            AND "job_type" in ('Drain Clogged Floor')
            THEN 'Repipe'
        WHEN "job_type" in 
            (
            'Drain Clogged Floor',
            'Drain Clogged Kitchen',
            'Drain Clogged Toilet/Shower/Sink/Bathtub/Stack: Secondary Line'
            )
            THEN 'Drain'
        WHEN ("job_type" in 
            ('DEAL: 93 or Free',
             'Drain Clogged Sanitary Sewer'
            ) AND  "tags" ~ 'Sewer') and NOT  "tags" ~ 'Non Sewer Opp' 
            THEN 'Sewer'
        WHEN 
            "tags" ~ 'HVAC 10+' 
            AND "job_type" ~* 'HVAC'
            THEN 'HVAC 10+' 
        WHEN 
            "job_type" ~* 'HVAC'
            THEN 'HVAC' 
        WHEN "tags" ~ 'Tankless Opportunity' THEN 'Tankless'
        WHEN 
            "tags" ~ 'Repipe Opportunity' 
            THEN 'Repipe'
        ELSE 'Other' 
        END
 as lto_set_group
    from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."jobs" as jobs 
    where lto_run_job_ids is not null
    and jobs.job_status = 'Completed'
)
select
    set_lto_jobs.business_unit_id as lto_set_business_unit_id,
    set_lto_jobs.business_unit as lto_set_business_unit,
    primary_technician_id as lto_set_technician_id,
    primary_technician_name as lto_set_technician_name,
    completed_on_est::date as lto_set_date,
    -- Total Set
    sum(lto_run_count) as lto_set_total_count,
    sum(lto_run_sold_count) as lto_set_total_sold,
    sum(lto_sales) as lto_set_total_sales,
    -- Sewer
    
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'Sewer' then lto_run_count else 0 end) as lto_set_sewer_count,
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'Sewer' then lto_run_sold_count else 0 end) as lto_set_sewer_sold,
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'Sewer' then lto_sales else 0 end) as lto_set_sewer_sales
,
    -- Downspout
    
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'Downspout' then lto_run_count else 0 end) as lto_set_downspout_count,
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'Downspout' then lto_run_sold_count else 0 end) as lto_set_downspout_sold,
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'Downspout' then lto_sales else 0 end) as lto_set_downspout_sales
,
    -- HVAC
    
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'HVAC' then lto_run_count else 0 end) as lto_set_hvac_count,
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'HVAC' then lto_run_sold_count else 0 end) as lto_set_hvac_sold,
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'HVAC' then lto_sales else 0 end) as lto_set_hvac_sales

from 
    set_lto_jobs
where 
    job_status = 'Completed'
group by 
    1,2,3,4,5

model.edw.int_sales_by_sold_date_by_tech.name: int_sales_by_sold_date_by_tech_jbu
model.edw.int_sales_by_sold_date_by_tech.raw_code:
with
estimate_items as (
    select
        *
    from
        {{ ref("estimate_items") }}
),
output as (
    select
        -- ATTRIBUTES
        ei.opportunity_date_est::date as report_date,
        ei.job_business_unit_id as business_unit_id,
        ei.job_business_unit as business_unit,
        ei.sold_by_id as technician_id,
        ei.sold_by_name as technician_name,
        -- METRICS
        count(distinct ei.job_id) as estimate_jobs,
        count(distinct case when ei.status_name = 'Sold' and ei.job_status = 'Completed' and total_estimate_sales > 0 then ei.job_id else null end) as estimate_jobs_sold,
        count(distinct ei.estimate_id) as estimates,
        count(case when ei.item_type = 'Service' and item_total > 0 then 1 end) as estimate_tasks,
        count(distinct case when  ei.status_name = 'Sold' then ei.estimate_id end) as estimates_sold,
        count(case when ei.status_name = 'Sold' and ei.item_type = 'Service' and item_total > 0 then 1 end) as estimate_sold_tasks,
        sum(case when ei.status_name = 'Sold' then ei.item_total end) as estimate_sales,
        sum(case when ei.status_name = 'Sold' then ei.item_sold_hours end) as estimate_sold_hours_sold,
        sum(case when ei.status_name = 'Sold' and (item_type = 'PriceModifier' or item_total < 0) then ei.item_total end) as estimate_discounts,
        count(distinct case when lto_set_by_id is not null then ei.job_id end) as estimate_lto_jobs,
        count(distinct case when  ei.status_name = 'Sold' and lto_set_by_id is not null then ei.job_id end) as estimate_lto_jobs_sold,
        sum(case when ei.status_name = 'Sold' and lto_set_by_id is not null and item_total > 0 then ei.item_total end) as estimate_lto_sales,
        sum(case when ei.status_name = 'Sold' and lto_set_by_id is not null and (item_type = 'PriceModifier' or item_total < 0) then ei.item_total end) as estimate_lto_discounts
    from
        estimate_items as ei
    where
        ei.opportunity_date_est::date is not null
    group by
        opportunity_date_est::date,
        business_unit_id,
        business_unit,
        sold_by_id,
        sold_by_name
)
select *
from output

model.edw.int_sales_opportunities_by_dat.name: int_sales_opportunities_by_date_and_tech_jbu
model.edw.int_sales_opportunities_by_dat.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'business_unit_id', 'report_date']}
    ]
)}}
with jobs as (
	select *
	-- from {{ ref('jobs')}} as j
	from {{ ref('jobs_splits')}} as j
	where 
		j.job_status = 'Completed'
		and 
		j.is_sales_opportunity = 1
)
select 
	jobs.business_unit_id as business_unit_id,
	jobs.business_unit as business_unit,
--	coalesce(sold_by_id,primary_technician_id) as technician_id,
--	coalesce(sold_by_name,primary_technician_name) as technician_name,
	COALESCE(split_technician_id, sold_by_id, primary_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
	COALESCE(split_technician_name, sold_by_name, primary_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
	is_sales_opportunity_date_est::Date as report_date,
	sum(is_sales_opportunity) as sales_opportunities,
	sum(is_sales_converted) as sales_converted,
	sum(is_sales_opportunity) as kpi_sales_opportunities,
	sum(is_sales_converted) as kpi_sales_converted,
	sum(sales) as sales
from jobs
where 
	(sold_by_name = primary_technician_name or sold_by_name is null)
group by 
	jobs.business_unit_id,
	jobs.business_unit,
	COALESCE(split_technician_id, sold_by_id, primary_technician_id, 999),
	COALESCE(split_technician_name, sold_by_name, primary_technician_name, 'No Technician'), 
	is_sales_opportunity_date_est::date

model.edw.int_estimate_items_by_day_and_.name: int_estimate_items_by_day_and_soldby
model.edw.int_estimate_items_by_day_and_.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'report_date']}
    ]
)}}
with
estimate_items as (
    select * from {{ ref('estimate_items_sold') }}
),
technician_info as (
    select
        *
    from
        {{ ref("int_technician_performance_roster_info") }}
),
output as (
select 
    est.opportunity_date_est::date as report_date,
    ti.technician_business_unit_id,
    ti.technician_business_unit,
    est.sold_by_id as technician_id,
    est.sold_by_name as technician_name,
    count(distinct estimate_id) as estimates,
    count(estimate_id) as estimates_item_count,
    count(case when est.item_type = 'Services' and item_total > 0 then 1 end) as estimate_item_tasks_sold,
    sum(item_price) as estimate_item_sales,
    sum(case when item_type = 'Discount' or item_price < 0 then item_total end) as estimate_item_discounts,
    sum(case when item_type = 'Materials' then item_total end) as estimate_item_charged_materials,
    -- ITEMS COLUMNS
    {{sales_item_columns(['Care Plans','Membership'], 'care_plan')}},
    -- PLUMBING
    {{sales_item_columns(['Water Heaters - Tank','Water Heaters - Tankless','Water Heaters'], 'water_heaters')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Water Heaters - Tank'], 'tanked_water_heaters')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Water Heaters - Tankless'], 'tankless')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Sump Pumps'], 'sump_pump')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Toilet'], 'toilet')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Water Treatment','Halo 5'], 'water_treatment')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Halo 5'], 'halo_5')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Disposal'], 'disposal')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Stack Replacement'], 'stack')}},
    -- HVAC
    {{sales_item_columns(['HVAC System Replacement','HVAC - Full System Install - Gold','HVAC - Full System Install - Silver','HVAC - Full System Install - Platinum'], 'hvac_full_system')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['HVAC Furnace Replacement','HVAC Air Conditioner Replacement','HVAC - Partial System Install'], 'hvac_partial_system')}},
    -- SEWER
    {{sales_item_columns(['Excavation - Boring','Excavation - Hydro Vac','Excavation - Lining','Excavation - Sewer','Excavation - Water Service'], 'excavation')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Downspout Drains'], 'downspouts')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Hydro Jet'], 'jets')}},
    {{sales_item_columns(['Eco Drain'], 'eco_drain')}}
from estimate_items as est
    left join
        technician_info as ti
        on est.sold_by_id = ti.technician_id
        and est.opportunity_date_est::date = ti.date::date
where 1=1
    -- est.job_status = 'Completed'
group by
    opportunity_date_est::Date,
    technician_business_unit_id,
    technician_business_unit,
    technician_team,
    sold_by_id,
    sold_by_name
)
select *
from output

    left join
        technician_info as ti
        on est.sold_by_id = ti.technician_id
        and est.opportunity_date_est::date = ti.date::date
where 1=1
    -- est.job_status = 'Completed'
group by
    opportunity_date_est::Date,
    technician_business_unit_id,
    technician_business_unit,
    technician_team,
    sold_by_id,
    sold_by_name
)
select *
from output

model.edw.int_invoice_items_by_day_and_i.name: int_invoice_items_by_day_and_installer
model.edw.int_invoice_items_by_day_and_i.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'report_date']}
    ]
)}}
with
invoice_items as (
    select * from {{ ref('invoice_items') }}
),
technician_info as (
    select
        *
    from
        {{ ref("int_technician_performance_roster_info") }}
),
output as (
select 
    inv.completed_on_est::date as report_date,
    ti.technician_business_unit_id,
    ti.technician_business_unit,
    inv.primary_technician_id as technician_id,
    inv.primary_technician_name as technician_name,
    count(distinct invoice_id) as invoices,
    count(invoice_id) as invoices_item_count,
    count(case when inv.item_type = 'Services' and item_total > 0 then 1 end) as installed_tasks_sold,
    sum(item_total) as installed_sales,
    sum(case when item_type = 'Discount' or item_price < 0 then item_total end) as installed_discounts,
    sum(case when item_type = 'Materials' then item_total end) as installed_charged_materials,
    sum(case when item_type = 'Materials' then item_cost end) as installed_material_cost,
    -- ITEMS COLUMNS
    {{item_columns(['Care Plans','Membership'], 'care_plan')}},
    {{item_columns(['Water Heaters - Tank','Water Heaters - Tankless'], 'water_heaters')}},
    {{item_columns(['Water Heaters - Tankless'], 'tankless')}},
    {{item_columns(['HVAC System Replacement','HVAC - Full System Install - Gold','HVAC - Full System Install - Silver','HVAC - Full System Install - Platinum','HVAC - Full System Install - Bronze','HVAC - Full System Install - Economy'], 'hvac_full_system')}},
    {{item_columns(['HVAC Furnace Replacement','HVAC Air Conditioner Replacement','HVAC - Partial System Install'], 'hvac_partial_system')}},
    {{item_columns(['Excavation - Boring','Excavation - Hydro Vac','Excavation - Lining','Excavation - Sewer','Excavation - Water Service'], 'excavation')}},
    {{item_columns(['Downspout Drains'], 'downspouts')}}

from invoice_items as inv
    left join
        technician_info as ti
        on inv.primary_technician_id = ti.technician_id
        and inv.completed_on_est::date = ti.date::date
where
    inv.job_status = 'Completed'
group by
    completed_on_est::Date,
    technician_business_unit_id,
    technician_business_unit,
    technician_team,
    primary_technician_id,
    primary_technician_name
)
select *
from output

{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'report_date']}

invoice_items as (

),
technician_info as (
    select
        *
    from
        {{ ref("int_technician_performance_roster_info") }}
),
output as (
select 
    inv.completed_on_est::date as report_date,
    ti.technician_business_unit_id,

    count(distinct invoice_id) as invoices,

    count(case when inv.item_type = 'Services' and item_total > 0 then 1 end) as installed_tasks_sold,
    sum(item_price) as installed_sales,
    sum(case when item_type = 'Discount' or item_price < 0 then item_total end) as installed_discounts,
    sum(case when item_type = 'Materials' then item_total end) as installed_charged_materials,
    sum(case when item_type = 'Materials' then item_cost end) as installed_material_cost,
    -- ITEMS COLUMNS
    {{item_columns(['Care Plans','Membership'], 'care_plan')}},
    {{item_columns(['Water Heaters - Tank','Water Heaters - Tankless'], 'water_heaters')}},
    {{item_columns(['Water Heaters - Tankless'], 'tankless')}},
    {{item_columns(['HVAC System Replacement','HVAC - Full System Install - Gold','HVAC - Full System Install - Silver','HVAC - Full System Install - Platinum'], 'hvac_full_system')}},
    {{item_columns(['HVAC Furnace Replacement','HVAC Air Conditioner Replacement','HVAC - Partial System Install'], 'hvac_partial_system')}},
    {{item_columns(['Excavation - Boring','Excavation - Hydro Vac','Excavation - Lining','Excavation - Sewer','Excavation - Water Service'], 'excavation')}},
    {{item_columns(['Downspout Drains'], 'downspouts')}}

from invoice_items as inv
    left join
        technician_info as ti
        on inv.sold_by_id = ti.technician_id
        and inv.completed_on_est::date = ti.date::date
where
    inv.job_status = 'Completed'
group by
    completed_on_est::Date,
    technician_business_unit_id,
    technician_business_unit,
    technician_team,
    sold_by_id,
    sold_by_name
)

model.edw.int_jobs_full_join_to_sales.name: int_jobs_full_join_to_sales
model.edw.int_jobs_full_join_to_sales.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'report_date']}
    ]
)}}
with 
jobs as (
    select * from {{ ref("int_jobs_splits_by_completion_date_by_tech") }}
),
sales as (
    select * from {{ ref("int_sales_by_sold_date_by_tech") }}
),
recalls as (
    select * from {{ ref("int_recalls_by_day_and_tech") }}
),
output as (
    select
        coalesce(coalesce(jobs.report_date, sales.report_date), recalls.report_date) as report_date,
        coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(jobs.technician_business_unit_id, sales.technician_business_unit_id),recalls.technician_business_unit_id), NULL) as technician_business_unit_id,
        coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(jobs.technician_business_unit, sales.technician_business_unit),recalls.technician_business_unit),'No BU') as technician_business_unit, 
        coalesce(coalesce(jobs.technician_team, sales.technician_team), recalls.technician_team) as technician_team, 
        coalesce(coalesce(jobs.technician_id, sales.technician_id),recalls.technician_id) as technician_id, 
        coalesce(coalesce(jobs.technician_name, sales.technician_name), recalls.technician_name) as  technician_name,
        -- JOBS METRICS
        jobs.job_count,
        jobs.opportunity_count,
        jobs.sold_job_count,
        jobs.kpi_opportunity_count,
        jobs.kpi_sold_job_count,
        jobs.sales_opportunity_count,
        jobs.sales_sold_job_count,
        jobs.kpi_sales_opportunity_count,
        jobs.kpi_sales_sold_job_count,
        jobs.new_opportunity_count,
        jobs.new_opportunity_sold_count,
        jobs.job_count_splits_adjusted,
        jobs.sold_job_count_splits_adjusted,
        jobs.new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted,
        jobs.new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted,
        jobs.revenue,
        jobs.job_sales,
        jobs.sold_hours,
        jobs.total_tasks,
        jobs.lto_set_count,
        jobs.lto_sales_generated,
        jobs.servicetitan_clock_time,
        jobs.lto_sewer_opp_count,
        jobs.lto_downspout_opp_count,
        jobs.lto_hvac_opp_count,
        jobs.lto_lto_set_count,
        jobs.lto_lto_sales_generated,
        jobs.lto_tto_set_count,
        jobs.lto_tto_sales_generated,
        -- JOB TYPE GROUPS
        jobs.water_heater_replacement_count,
        jobs.water_heater_replacement_sold_count,
        jobs.water_heater_total_count,
        jobs.water_heater_total_sold_count,
        jobs.hvac_care_plan_system_check_count,
        jobs.hvac_system_check_count,
        -- SALES METRICS
        sales.estimate_jobs,
        sales.estimate_jobs_sold,
        sales.estimates,
        sales.estimate_tasks,
        sales.estimates_sold,
        sales.estimate_sold_tasks,
        sales.estimate_sales,
        sales.estimate_sold_hours_sold,
        sales.estimate_discounts,
        sales.estimate_lto_jobs,
        sales.estimate_lto_jobs_sold,
        sales.estimate_lto_sales,
        sales.estimate_lto_discounts,
        -- RECALLS
        recalls.recalls
        from
            jobs
        full outer join sales
            on jobs.technician_id = sales.technician_id
            and jobs.report_date = sales.report_date
        full outer join recalls
            on jobs.technician_id = recalls.technician_id
            and jobs.report_date = recalls.report_date
)
select *
from output

        jobs.water_heater_total_count,
        jobs.water_heater_total_sold_count,

        -- SALES METRICS

model.edw.int_jobs_splits_by_completion_.name: int_jobs_splits_by_completion_date_by_tech
model.edw.int_jobs_splits_by_completion_.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'report_date']}
    ]
)}}
with
jobs_splits as (
    select
        *
    from
        {{ ref("jobs_splits") }}
),
technician_info as (
    select
        *
    from
        {{ ref("int_technician_performance_roster_info") }}
),
technicians_info_backup as (
    select * 
    from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_api__technicians') }}
),
non_job_revenue as (
    select * from {{ ref("non_job_invoices") }}
),
non_job_revenue_output as (
    select
        -- ATTRIBUTES
        njr.completed_on_est::date as report_date,
        njr.business_unit_id::int as technician_business_unit_id,
        njr.business_unit_name as technician_business_unit,
        'NJI-' || njr.business_unit_name as technician_team,
        njr.primary_technician_id::int as technician_id,
        njr.primary_technician_name as technician_name,
        -- METRICS
        count(njr.invoice_id) as job_count,
        0 as opportunity_count,
        0 as sold_job_count,
        0 as kpi_opportunity_count,
        0 as kpi_sold_job_count,
        0 as sales_opportunity_count,
        0 as sales_sold_job_count,
        0 as kpi_sales_opportunity_count,
        0 as kpi_sales_sold_job_count,
        0 as new_opportunity_count,
        0 as new_opportunity_sold_count,
        0 as job_count_splits_adjusted,
        0 as sold_job_count_splits_adjusted,
        0 as new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted,
        0 as new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted,
        sum(njr.invoice_total) as revenue,
        0 as job_sales,
        sum(njr.item_sold_hours) as sold_hours,
        0 as total_tasks,
        0 as lto_sewer_opp_count,
        0 as lto_downspout_opp_count,
        0 as lto_hvac_opp_count,
        0 as lto_set_count,
        0 as lto_sales_generated,
        0 as lto_lto_set_count,
        0 as lto_lto_sales_generated,
        0 as lto_tto_set_count,
        0 as lto_tto_sales_generated,
        0 as recalls,
        0 as water_heater_replacement_count,
        0 as water_heater_replacement_sold_count,
        0 as water_heater_total_count,
        0 as water_heater_total_sold_count,
        -- 0 as hvac_replacement_count,
        -- 0 as hvac_10plus_count,
        0 as hvac_care_plan_system_check_count,
        0 as hvac_system_check_count,
        0 as servicetitan_clock_time
    from
        non_job_revenue as njr
    group by
        njr.completed_on_est::Date,
        njr.business_unit_id,
        njr.business_unit_name,
        njr.primary_technician_id,
        njr.primary_technician_name
),
output as (
    select
        -- ATTRIBUTES
        js.completed_on_est::date as report_date,
        coalesce(ti.technician_business_unit_id , tib.business_unit_id) as technician_business_unit_id,
        coalesce(ti.technician_business_unit , tib.business_unit) as technician_business_unit,
        ti.technician_team,
        js.split_technician_id as technician_id,
        js.split_technician_name as technician_name,
        -- METRICS
        count(js.job_id) as job_count,
        sum(js.is_opportunity) as opportunity_count,
        sum(js.is_converted) as sold_job_count,
        sum(js.kpi_is_opportunity) as kpi_opportunity_count,
        sum(js.kpi_is_converted) as kpi_sold_job_count,
        sum(js.is_sales_opportunity) as sales_opportunity_count,
        sum(js.is_sales_converted) as sales_sold_job_count,
        sum(js.kpi_is_sales_opportunity) as kpi_sales_opportunity_count,
        sum(js.kpi_is_sales_converted) as kpi_sales_sold_job_count,
        count(js.is_opp_with_maint) as new_opportunity_count,
        count(case when js.is_opp_with_maint is not null and js.revenue > 0 then 1 end) as new_opportunity_sold_count,
        sum(js.split) as job_count_splits_adjusted,
        sum(case when js.revenue > 0 then js.split else null end) as sold_job_count_splits_adjusted,
        sum(case when js.is_opp_with_maint is not null then js.split end) as new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted,
        sum(case when js.is_opp_with_maint is not null and js.revenue > 0 then js.split end) as new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted,
        sum(js.revenue) as revenue,
        sum(js.sales) as job_sales,
        sum(js.sold_hours) as sold_hours,
        sum(0) as total_tasks,
        sum(case when lto_opp_group = 'Sewer' then 1 else 0 end) as lto_sewer_opp_count,
        sum(case when lto_opp_group = 'Downspout' then 1 else 0 end) as lto_downspout_opp_count,
        sum(case when lto_opp_group = 'HVAC' then 1 else 0 end) as lto_hvac_opp_count,
        sum(lto_run_count) as lto_set_count,
        sum(js.lto_sales) as lto_sales_generated,
        sum(case when js.lto_set_type = 'LTO' then js.split else 0 end) as lto_lto_set_count,
        sum(case when js.lto_set_type = 'LTO' then js.lto_sales else 0 end) as lto_lto_sales_generated,
        sum(case when js.lto_set_type = 'TTO' then js.split else 0 end) as lto_tto_set_count,
        sum(case when js.lto_set_type = 'TTO' then js.lto_sales else 0 end) as lto_tto_sales_generated,
        sum(recall_run_count) as recalls,
        -- JOB TYPE GROUPS - MIGHT PULL THIS OUT
        sum(case when js.job_type_group = 'Water Heater Replacement' then js.split else 0 end) as water_heater_replacement_count,
        sum(case when js.job_type_group = 'Water Heater Replacement' and js.sales > 500 then js.split else 0 end) as water_heater_replacement_sold_count,
        sum(case when js.job_type_group in ('Water Heater Replacement','Water Heater Service') then js.split else 0 end) as water_heater_total_count,
        sum(case when js.job_type_group in ('Water Heater Replacement','Water Heater Service') and js.sales > 500 then js.split else 0 end) as water_heater_total_sold_count,
        -- HVAC
        sum(case when js.job_type_group = 'HVAC Care Plan System Check' then js.split else 0 end) as hvac_care_plan_system_check_count,
        sum(case when js.job_type_group in ('HVAC Care Plan System Check','HVAC Non Care Plan System Check') then js.split else 0 end) as hvac_system_check_count,
        count(0) as servicetitan_clock_time
    from
        jobs_splits as js
    left join
        technician_info as ti
        on js.split_technician_id = ti.technician_id
        and js.completed_on_est::date = ti.date::date
    left join technicians_info_backup as tib
        on js.split_technician_id = tib.technician_id
    where
        js.job_status = 'Completed'
    group by
        js.completed_on_est::Date,
        coalesce(ti.technician_business_unit_id , tib.business_unit_id),
        coalesce(ti.technician_business_unit , tib.business_unit),
        ti.technician_team,
        split_technician_id,
        split_technician_name
)
select * from output
union
select * from non_job_revenue_output

model.edw.int_lto_run_by_day_and_tech.name: int_lto_run_by_day_and_tech
model.edw.int_lto_run_by_day_and_tech.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['lto_run_technician_id', 'lto_run_date']}
    ]
)}}
with 
lto_run as (
    select * from {{ ref("int_jobs_filtered_to_lto_run") }}
)
select
    lto_run_primary_technician_id as lto_run_technician_id,
    lto_run_primary_technician_name as lto_run_technician_name,
    lto_run_completed_on_est::date as lto_run_date,
    -- Total Set
    count(*) as lto_run_total_count,
    sum(case when lto_run_sales > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_total_sold,
    sum(lto_run_sales) as lto_run_total_sales,
    -- Sewer
    {{ generate_lto_run_metrics("Sewer") }},
    -- Downspout
    {{ generate_lto_run_metrics("Downspout") }},
    -- HVAC
    {{ generate_lto_run_metrics("HVAC") }}
from 
    lto_run
where 
    lto_run_job_status = 'Completed'
group by 
    1,2,3
model.edw.int_lto_run_by_day_and_tech.compiled_code:
with 
lto_run as (
    select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."int_jobs_filtered_to_lto_run"
)
select
    lto_run_primary_technician_id as lto_run_technician_id,
    lto_run_primary_technician_name as lto_run_technician_name,
    lto_run_completed_on_est::date as lto_run_date,
    -- Total Set
    count(*) as lto_run_total_count,
    sum(case when lto_run_sales > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_total_sold,
    sum(lto_run_sales) as lto_run_total_sales,
    -- Sewer
    
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'Sewer' then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_sewer_count,
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'Sewer' and lto_run_sales > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_sewer_sold,
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'Sewer' then lto_run_sales else 0 end) as lto_run_sewer_sales
,
    -- Downspout
    
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'Downspout' then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_downspout_count,
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'Downspout' and lto_run_sales > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_downspout_sold,
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'Downspout' then lto_run_sales else 0 end) as lto_run_downspout_sales
,
    -- HVAC
    
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'HVAC' then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_hvac_count,
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'HVAC' and lto_run_sales > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as lto_run_hvac_sold,
    sum(case when lto_run_group = 'HVAC' then lto_run_sales else 0 end) as lto_run_hvac_sales

from 
    lto_run
where 
    lto_run_job_status = 'Completed'
group by 
    1,2,3

model.edw.int_lto_set_by_day_and_tech.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['lto_set_technician_id', 'lto_set_date']}
    ]
)}}
with 
set_lto_jobs as (
    -- Note that we filter on run ID because it means an lto was set from the job
    select jobs.*,
        {{ lto_set_type("job_type","tags") }} as lto_set_group
    from {{ ref('jobs') }} as jobs 
    where lto_run_job_ids is not null
    and jobs.job_status = 'Completed'
)
select
    primary_technician_id as lto_set_technician_id,
    primary_technician_name as lto_set_technician_name,
    completed_on_est::date as lto_set_date,
    -- Total Set
    sum(lto_run_count) as lto_set_total_count,
    sum(lto_run_sold_count) as lto_set_total_sold,
    sum(lto_sales) as lto_set_total_sales,
    -- Sewer
    {{ generate_lto_set_metrics("Sewer") }},
    -- Downspout
    {{ generate_lto_set_metrics("Downspout") }},
    -- HVAC
    {{ generate_lto_set_metrics("HVAC") }}
from 
    set_lto_jobs
where 
    job_status = 'Completed'
group by 
    1,2,3
model.edw.int_lto_set_by_day_and_tech.compiled_code:
with 
set_lto_jobs as (
    -- Note that we filter on run ID because it means an lto was set from the job
    select jobs.*,
        
    CASE
        WHEN "job_type" in 
            ('Drain Clogged or Broken Downspout-Clog/Clearing',
             'Drain Clogged or Broken Downspout- Repair/Replace'
            ) 
            THEN 'Downspout'
        WHEN 
            "tags" ~ 'Repipe Opportunity' 
            AND "job_type" in ('Drain Clogged Floor')
            THEN 'Repipe'
        WHEN "job_type" in 
            (
            'Drain Clogged Floor',
            'Drain Clogged Kitchen',
            'Drain Clogged Toilet/Shower/Sink/Bathtub/Stack: Secondary Line'
            )
            THEN 'Drain'
        WHEN ("job_type" in 
            ('DEAL: 93 or Free',
             'Drain Clogged Sanitary Sewer'
            ) AND  "tags" ~ 'Sewer') and NOT  "tags" ~ 'Non Sewer Opp' 
            THEN 'Sewer'
        WHEN 
            "tags" ~ 'HVAC 10+' 
            AND "job_type" ~* 'HVAC'
            THEN 'HVAC 10+' 
        WHEN 
            "job_type" ~* 'HVAC'
            THEN 'HVAC' 
        WHEN "tags" ~ 'Tankless Opportunity' THEN 'Tankless'
        WHEN 
            "tags" ~ 'Repipe Opportunity' 
            THEN 'Repipe'
        ELSE 'Other' 
        END
 as lto_set_group
    from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."jobs" as jobs 
    where lto_run_job_ids is not null
    and jobs.job_status = 'Completed'
)
select
    primary_technician_id as lto_set_technician_id,
    primary_technician_name as lto_set_technician_name,
    completed_on_est::date as lto_set_date,
    -- Total Set
    sum(lto_run_count) as lto_set_total_count,
    sum(lto_run_sold_count) as lto_set_total_sold,
    sum(lto_sales) as lto_set_total_sales,
    -- Sewer
    
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'Sewer' then lto_run_count else 0 end) as lto_set_sewer_count,
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'Sewer' then lto_run_sold_count else 0 end) as lto_set_sewer_sold,
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'Sewer' then lto_sales else 0 end) as lto_set_sewer_sales
,
    -- Downspout
    
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'Downspout' then lto_run_count else 0 end) as lto_set_downspout_count,
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'Downspout' then lto_run_sold_count else 0 end) as lto_set_downspout_sold,
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'Downspout' then lto_sales else 0 end) as lto_set_downspout_sales
,
    -- HVAC
    
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'HVAC' then lto_run_count else 0 end) as lto_set_hvac_count,
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'HVAC' then lto_run_sold_count else 0 end) as lto_set_hvac_sold,
    sum(case when lto_set_group = 'HVAC' then lto_sales else 0 end) as lto_set_hvac_sales

from 
    set_lto_jobs
where 
    job_status = 'Completed'
group by 
    1,2,3

model.edw.int_recalls_by_day_and_tech.name: int_recalls_by_day_and_tech
model.edw.int_recalls_by_day_and_tech.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'report_date']}
    ]
)}}
with 
recalls as (
    select * from {{ ref('recalls') }}
),
technician_info as (
    select
        *
    from
        {{ ref("int_technician_performance_roster_info") }}
),
output as (
    select
        r.recall_run_complete_date::date as report_date,
        ti.technician_business_unit_id,
        ti.technician_business_unit,
        ti.technician_team,
        r.recall_caused_technician_id as technician_id,
        r.recall_caused_technician_name as technician_name,
        count(distinct r.recall_run_job_id) as recalls
    from recalls as r
    left join
        technician_info as ti
        on r.recall_caused_technician_id = ti.technician_id
        and r.recall_run_complete_date::date = ti.date::date
    where
        r.recall_run_complete_date::date is not null
    group by
        recall_run_complete_date::date,
        technician_business_unit_id,
        technician_business_unit,
        technician_team,
        recall_caused_technician_id,
        recall_caused_technician_name
)
select *
from output

model.edw.int_sales_by_sold_date_by_tech.name: int_sales_by_sold_date_by_tech
model.edw.int_sales_by_sold_date_by_tech.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'report_date']}
    ]
)}}
with
estimate_items as (
    select
        *
    from
        {{ ref("estimate_items") }}
),
technician_info as (
    select
        *
    from
        {{ ref("int_technician_performance_roster_info") }}
),
output as (
    select
        -- ATTRIBUTES
        ei.opportunity_date_est::date as report_date,
        ti.technician_business_unit_id,
        ti.technician_business_unit,
        ti.technician_team,
        ei.sold_by_id as technician_id,
        ei.sold_by_name as technician_name,
        -- METRICS
        count(distinct ei.job_id) as estimate_jobs,
        count(distinct case when ei.status_name = 'Sold' and ei.job_status = 'Completed' and total_estimate_sales > 0 then ei.job_id else null end) as estimate_jobs_sold,
        count(distinct ei.estimate_id) as estimates,
        count(case when ei.item_type = 'Service' and item_total > 0 then 1 end) as estimate_tasks,
        count(distinct case when  ei.status_name = 'Sold' then ei.estimate_id end) as estimates_sold,
        count(case when ei.status_name = 'Sold' and ei.item_type = 'Service' and item_total > 0 then 1 end) as estimate_sold_tasks,
        sum(case when ei.status_name = 'Sold' then ei.item_total end) as estimate_sales,
        sum(case when ei.status_name = 'Sold' then ei.item_sold_hours end) as estimate_sold_hours_sold,
        sum(case when ei.status_name = 'Sold' and (item_type = 'PriceModifier' or item_total < 0) then ei.item_total end) as estimate_discounts,
        count(distinct case when lto_set_by_id is not null then ei.job_id end) as estimate_lto_jobs,
        count(distinct case when  ei.status_name = 'Sold' and lto_set_by_id is not null then ei.job_id end) as estimate_lto_jobs_sold,
        sum(case when ei.status_name = 'Sold' and lto_set_by_id is not null and item_total > 0 then ei.item_total end) as estimate_lto_sales,
        sum(case when ei.status_name = 'Sold' and lto_set_by_id is not null and (item_type = 'PriceModifier' or item_total < 0) then ei.item_total end) as estimate_lto_discounts
    from
        estimate_items as ei
    left join
        technician_info as ti
        on ei.sold_by_id = ti.technician_id
        and ei.opportunity_date_est::date = ti.date::date
    where
        ei.opportunity_date_est::date is not null
    group by
        opportunity_date_est::date,
        technician_business_unit_id,
        technician_business_unit,
        technician_team,
        sold_by_id,
        sold_by_name
)
select *
from output

model.edw.int_sales_opportunities_by_dat.name: int_sales_opportunities_by_date_and_tech
model.edw.int_sales_opportunities_by_dat.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized = 'table',
    unlogged = True,
    indexes=[
      {'columns': ['technician_id', 'report_date']}
    ]
)}}
with jobs as (
	select *
	-- from {{ ref('jobs')}} as j
	from {{ ref('jobs_splits')}} as j
	where 
		j.job_status = 'Completed'
		and 
		j.is_sales_opportunity = 1
)
select 
	COALESCE(split_technician_id, sold_by_id, primary_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
	COALESCE(split_technician_name, sold_by_name, primary_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
	is_sales_opportunity_date_est::Date as report_date,
	sum(is_sales_opportunity) as sales_opportunities,
	sum(is_sales_converted) as sales_converted,
	sum(is_sales_opportunity) as kpi_sales_opportunities,
	sum(is_sales_converted) as kpi_sales_converted,
	sum(sales) as sales
from jobs
where 
	(sold_by_name = primary_technician_name or sold_by_name is null)
group by 
	COALESCE(split_technician_id, sold_by_id, primary_technician_id, 999), 
	COALESCE(split_technician_name, sold_by_name, primary_technician_name, 'No Technician'), 
	is_sales_opportunity_date_est::date
model.edw.int_sales_opportunities_by_dat.compiled_code:
with jobs as (
	select *
	-- from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."jobs" as j
	from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."jobs_splits" as j
	where 
		j.job_status = 'Completed'
		and 
		j.is_sales_opportunity = 1
)
select 
	COALESCE(split_technician_id, sold_by_id, primary_technician_id, 999) AS technician_id,
	COALESCE(split_technician_name, sold_by_name, primary_technician_name, 'No Technician') AS technician,
	is_sales_opportunity_date_est::Date as report_date,
	sum(is_sales_opportunity) as sales_opportunities,
	sum(is_sales_converted) as sales_converted,
	sum(is_sales_opportunity) as kpi_sales_opportunities,
	sum(is_sales_converted) as kpi_sales_converted,
	sum(sales) as sales
from jobs
where 
	(sold_by_name = primary_technician_name or sold_by_name is null)
group by 
	COALESCE(split_technician_id, sold_by_id, primary_technician_id, 999), 
	COALESCE(split_technician_name, sold_by_name, primary_technician_name, 'No Technician'), 
	is_sales_opportunity_date_est::date

model.edw.actuals_cube_monthly.name: actuals_cube_monthly
model.edw.actuals_cube_monthly.raw_code:
with 
actuals_by_technicians as (
    select * from {{ ref("actuals_by_technician") }}
),
groupings as (
select 
    -- DIMENSIONS
    coalesce(region,'Total') as region,
    coalesce(location,'Total') as location,
    coalesce(trade_line_type,'Total') as trade_line_type,
    coalesce(department_type,'Total') as department_type,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_id,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_id,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_name,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_name,        
    coalesce(department_id,0) as department_id,
    coalesce(department_name,'Total') as department_name,
    -- TECHNICIAN
    coalesce(technician_team,'Total') as technician_team,
    coalesce(technician_id,0) as technician_id,
    coalesce(technician_name,'Total') as technician_name,
    -- DATE
    date_trunc('month',report_date)::date as report_date,
    -- METRICS
    count(distinct case when "revenue" > 0 then technician_id end) as "revenue_technician_count",
    count(distinct case when "job_sales" > 0 then technician_id end) as "sales_technician_count",
    sum("job_count") as "job_count",
    sum("opportunity_count") as "opportunity_count",
    sum("sold_job_count") as "sold_job_count",
    sum("sales_opportunity_count") as "sales_opportunity_count",
    sum("sales_sold_job_count") as "sales_sold_job_count",
    sum("kpi_sales_opportunity_count") as "kpi_sales_opportunity_count",
    sum("kpi_sales_sold_job_count") as "kpi_sales_sold_job_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_count") as "new_opportunity_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count") as "new_opportunity_sold_count",
    sum("job_count_splits_adjusted") as "job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("sold_job_count_splits_adjusted") as "sold_job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("revenue") as "revenue",
    sum("job_sales") as "job_sales",
    sum("sold_hours") as "sold_hours",
    sum("total_tasks") as "total_tasks",
    sum("lto_set_count") as "lto_set_count",
    sum("lto_sales_generated") as "lto_sales_generated",
    sum("lto_tto_set_count") as "lto_tto_set_count",
    sum("recalls") as "recalls",

    -- JOB TYPE GROUPS
    sum("water_heater_replacement_count") as "water_heater_replacement_count",
    sum("water_heater_replacement_sold_count") as "water_heater_replacement_sold_count",
    sum("water_heater_total_count") as "water_heater_total_count",
    sum("water_heater_total_sold_count") as "water_heater_total_sold_count",
    sum("hvac_care_plan_system_check_count") as "hvac_care_plan_system_check_count",
    sum("hvac_system_check_count") as "hvac_system_check_count",

    sum("hours_worked") as "hours_worked",

    -- ESTIMATE SALES METRICS
    sum("estimate_jobs") as "estimate_jobs",
    sum("estimate_jobs_sold") as "estimate_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimates") as "estimates",
    sum("estimate_tasks") as "estimate_tasks",
    sum("estimates_sold") as "estimates_sold",
    sum("estimate_sold_tasks") as "estimate_sold_tasks",
    sum("estimate_sales") as "estimate_sales",
    sum("estimate_sold_hours_sold") as "estimate_sold_hours_sold",
    sum("estimate_discounts") as "estimate_discounts",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs") as "estimate_lto_jobs",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs_sold") as "estimate_lto_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimate_lto_sales") as "estimate_lto_sales",
    sum("estimate_lto_discounts") as "estimate_lto_discounts",

    -- Calculated Conversion Metric
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_opportunity_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as blended_opportunity_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_sold_job_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as blended_sold_job_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_opportunity_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_sold_job_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as kpi_blended_sold_job_count,
    -- Care Plan Metrics
    sum(care_plan_row_count) as care_plan_row_count,
    sum(care_plan_invoices) as care_plan_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_quantity) as care_plan_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_cost) as care_plan_cost,
    sum(care_plan_revenue) as care_plan_revenue,
    sum(care_plan_sold_hours) as care_plan_sold_hours,
    sum(care_plan_sold_invoices) as care_plan_sold_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_sold_quantity) as care_plan_sold_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_discounts) as care_plan_discounts,

    -- Other Item Metrics
    sum(water_heaters_sold_quantity) as total_water_heaters_sold_quantity,
    sum(tankless_sold_quantity) as tankless_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sold_quantity + hvac_partial_system_sold_quantity) as hvac_systems_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sold_quantity) as hvac_full_system_sold_quantity,
    sum(excavation_sold_invoices) as excavation_sold_invoices,
    sum(downspouts_sold_quantity) as downspouts_sold_quantity,       

    -- Other Sales Metrics
    sum(care_plan_sales_sold_estimates) as care_plan_sales_sold_estimates,
    sum(water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity) as total_water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(tankless_sales_sold_quantity) as tankless_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity + hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_quantity) as hvac_systems_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity) as hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(excavation_sales_sold_estimates) as excavation_sales_sold_estimates,
    sum(downspouts_sales_sold_quantity) as downspouts_sales_sold_quantity,  

    sum("lto_set_total_count") as "lto_set_total_count",
    sum("lto_set_total_sold") as "lto_set_total_sold",
    sum("lto_set_total_sales") as "lto_set_total_sales",

    sum("lto_run_total_count") as "lto_run_total_count",
    sum("lto_run_total_sold") as "lto_run_total_sold",
    sum("lto_run_total_sales") as "lto_run_total_sales",

    sum("lto_sewer_opp_count") as "lto_sewer_opp_count",
    sum("lto_downspout_opp_count") as "lto_downspout_opp_count",
    sum("lto_hvac_opp_count") as "lto_hvac_opp_count",

    sum("lto_set_sewer_count") as "lto_set_sewer_count",
    sum("lto_set_sewer_sold") as "lto_set_sewer_sold",
    sum("lto_set_sewer_sales") as "lto_set_sewer_sales",

    sum("lto_set_downspout_count") as "lto_set_downspout_count",
    sum("lto_set_downspout_sold") as "lto_set_downspout_sold",
    sum("lto_set_downspout_sales") as "lto_set_downspout_sales",

    sum("lto_set_hvac_count") as "lto_set_hvac_count",
    sum("lto_set_hvac_sold") as "lto_set_hvac_sold",
    sum("lto_set_hvac_sales") as "lto_set_hvac_sales",

    sum("lto_run_sewer_count") as "lto_run_sewer_count",
    sum("lto_run_sewer_sold") as "lto_run_sewer_sold",
    sum("lto_run_sewer_sales") as "lto_run_sewer_sales",

    sum("lto_run_downspout_count") as "lto_run_downspout_count",
    sum("lto_run_downspout_sold") as "lto_run_downspout_sold",
    sum("lto_run_downspout_sales") as "lto_run_downspout_sales",

    sum("lto_run_hvac_count") as "lto_run_hvac_count",
    sum("lto_run_hvac_sold") as "lto_run_hvac_sold",
    sum("lto_run_hvac_sales") as "lto_run_hvac_sales"

from actuals_by_technicians
group by 
    grouping sets (
        -- ALL COLUMNS
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, technician_id, technician_name, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        -- TEAM LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        -- BU LEVEL

model.edw.actuals_cube_monthly.compiled_code:
with 
actuals_by_technicians as (
    select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."actuals_by_technician"
),
groupings as (
select 
    -- DIMENSIONS
    coalesce(region,'Total') as region,
    coalesce(location,'Total') as location,
    coalesce(trade_line_type,'Total') as trade_line_type,
    coalesce(department_type,'Total') as department_type,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_id,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_id,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_name,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_name,        
    coalesce(department_id,0) as department_id,
    coalesce(department_name,'Total') as department_name,
    -- TECHNICIAN
    coalesce(technician_team,'Total') as technician_team,
    coalesce(technician_id,0) as technician_id,
    coalesce(technician_name,'Total') as technician_name,
    -- DATE
    date_trunc('month',report_date)::date as report_date,
    -- METRICS
    count(distinct case when "revenue" > 0 then technician_id end) as "revenue_technician_count",
    count(distinct case when "job_sales" > 0 then technician_id end) as "sales_technician_count",
    sum("job_count") as "job_count",
    sum("opportunity_count") as "opportunity_count",
    sum("sold_job_count") as "sold_job_count",
    sum("sales_opportunity_count") as "sales_opportunity_count",
    sum("sales_sold_job_count") as "sales_sold_job_count",
    sum("kpi_sales_opportunity_count") as "kpi_sales_opportunity_count",
    sum("kpi_sales_sold_job_count") as "kpi_sales_sold_job_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_count") as "new_opportunity_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count") as "new_opportunity_sold_count",
    sum("job_count_splits_adjusted") as "job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("sold_job_count_splits_adjusted") as "sold_job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("revenue") as "revenue",
    sum("job_sales") as "job_sales",
    sum("sold_hours") as "sold_hours",
    sum("total_tasks") as "total_tasks",
    sum("lto_set_count") as "lto_set_count",
    sum("lto_sales_generated") as "lto_sales_generated",
    sum("lto_tto_set_count") as "lto_tto_set_count",
    sum("recalls") as "recalls",

    -- JOB TYPE GROUPS
    sum("water_heater_replacement_count") as "water_heater_replacement_count",
    sum("water_heater_replacement_sold_count") as "water_heater_replacement_sold_count",
    sum("water_heater_total_count") as "water_heater_total_count",
    sum("water_heater_total_sold_count") as "water_heater_total_sold_count",
    sum("hvac_care_plan_system_check_count") as "hvac_care_plan_system_check_count",
    sum("hvac_system_check_count") as "hvac_system_check_count",

    sum("hours_worked") as "hours_worked",

    -- ESTIMATE SALES METRICS
    sum("estimate_jobs") as "estimate_jobs",
    sum("estimate_jobs_sold") as "estimate_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimates") as "estimates",
    sum("estimate_tasks") as "estimate_tasks",
    sum("estimates_sold") as "estimates_sold",
    sum("estimate_sold_tasks") as "estimate_sold_tasks",
    sum("estimate_sales") as "estimate_sales",
    sum("estimate_sold_hours_sold") as "estimate_sold_hours_sold",
    sum("estimate_discounts") as "estimate_discounts",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs") as "estimate_lto_jobs",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs_sold") as "estimate_lto_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimate_lto_sales") as "estimate_lto_sales",
    sum("estimate_lto_discounts") as "estimate_lto_discounts",

    -- Calculated Conversion Metric
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_opportunity_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as blended_opportunity_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_sold_job_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as blended_sold_job_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_opportunity_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_sold_job_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as kpi_blended_sold_job_count,
    -- Care Plan Metrics
    sum(care_plan_row_count) as care_plan_row_count,
    sum(care_plan_invoices) as care_plan_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_quantity) as care_plan_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_cost) as care_plan_cost,
    sum(care_plan_revenue) as care_plan_revenue,
    sum(care_plan_sold_hours) as care_plan_sold_hours,
    sum(care_plan_sold_invoices) as care_plan_sold_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_sold_quantity) as care_plan_sold_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_discounts) as care_plan_discounts,

    -- Other Item Metrics
    sum(water_heaters_sold_quantity) as total_water_heaters_sold_quantity,
    sum(tankless_sold_quantity) as tankless_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sold_quantity + hvac_partial_system_sold_quantity) as hvac_systems_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sold_quantity) as hvac_full_system_sold_quantity,
    sum(excavation_sold_invoices) as excavation_sold_invoices,
    sum(downspouts_sold_quantity) as downspouts_sold_quantity,       

    -- Other Sales Metrics
    sum(care_plan_sales_sold_estimates) as care_plan_sales_sold_estimates,
    sum(water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity) as total_water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(tankless_sales_sold_quantity) as tankless_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity + hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_quantity) as hvac_systems_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity) as hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(excavation_sales_sold_estimates) as excavation_sales_sold_estimates,
    sum(downspouts_sales_sold_quantity) as downspouts_sales_sold_quantity,  

    sum("lto_set_total_count") as "lto_set_total_count",
    sum("lto_set_total_sold") as "lto_set_total_sold",
    sum("lto_set_total_sales") as "lto_set_total_sales",

    sum("lto_run_total_count") as "lto_run_total_count",
    sum("lto_run_total_sold") as "lto_run_total_sold",
    sum("lto_run_total_sales") as "lto_run_total_sales",

    sum("lto_sewer_opp_count") as "lto_sewer_opp_count",
    sum("lto_downspout_opp_count") as "lto_downspout_opp_count",
    sum("lto_hvac_opp_count") as "lto_hvac_opp_count",

    sum("lto_set_sewer_count") as "lto_set_sewer_count",
    sum("lto_set_sewer_sold") as "lto_set_sewer_sold",
    sum("lto_set_sewer_sales") as "lto_set_sewer_sales",

    sum("lto_set_downspout_count") as "lto_set_downspout_count",
    sum("lto_set_downspout_sold") as "lto_set_downspout_sold",
    sum("lto_set_downspout_sales") as "lto_set_downspout_sales",

    sum("lto_set_hvac_count") as "lto_set_hvac_count",
    sum("lto_set_hvac_sold") as "lto_set_hvac_sold",
    sum("lto_set_hvac_sales") as "lto_set_hvac_sales",

    sum("lto_run_sewer_count") as "lto_run_sewer_count",
    sum("lto_run_sewer_sold") as "lto_run_sewer_sold",
    sum("lto_run_sewer_sales") as "lto_run_sewer_sales",

    sum("lto_run_downspout_count") as "lto_run_downspout_count",
    sum("lto_run_downspout_sold") as "lto_run_downspout_sold",
    sum("lto_run_downspout_sales") as "lto_run_downspout_sales",

    sum("lto_run_hvac_count") as "lto_run_hvac_count",
    sum("lto_run_hvac_sold") as "lto_run_hvac_sold",
    sum("lto_run_hvac_sales") as "lto_run_hvac_sales"

from actuals_by_technicians
group by 
    grouping sets (
        -- ALL COLUMNS
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, technician_id, technician_name, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        -- TEAM LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        (region, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        (location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),        
        (trade_line_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),        
        (location, date_trunc('month',report_date)),        
        (region, date_trunc('month',report_date))        
    )
),
add_calculated_metrics as (
    select groupings.*,
    
    coalesce(("sold_job_count") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("new_opportunity_sold_count") /  nullif(("new_opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "new_opp_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("estimate_jobs_sold") /  nullif(("estimate_jobs"), 0),0)
 as "estimate_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("blended_sold_job_count") /  nullif(("blended_opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "blended_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("kpi_blended_sold_job_count") /  nullif(("kpi_blended_opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "kpi_blended_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "average_sale",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("kpi_blended_sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "kpi_average_ticket",
    
    coalesce(("estimate_sales") /  nullif(("kpi_sales_sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "kpi_average_sales_ticket",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_run_rate",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hours_per_job",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hours_run_rate",
    
    coalesce(("recalls") /  nullif(("sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "recall_rate",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("hours_worked"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hour_efficiency",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_count") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_rate",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("sold_hours"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_per_sold_hour",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("estimate_sales") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sales_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hours_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("opportunity_count") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "opportunity_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("sales_opportunity_count") /  nullif(("sales_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sales_opportunity_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("sold_job_count") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_jobs_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("new_opportunity_count") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "new_opp_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("lto_run_total_sold") /  nullif(("lto_run_total_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_run_conversion",
    
    coalesce(("lto_run_total_sales") /  nullif(("lto_run_total_sold"), 0),0)
 as "lto_run_average_sale",
    
    coalesce(("water_heater_replacement_sold_count") /  nullif(("water_heater_replacement_count"), 0),0)
 as "water_heater_replacement_conversion",
    
    coalesce(("water_heater_total_sold_count") /  nullif(("water_heater_total_count"), 0),0)
 as "water_heater_total_conversion",
    
    coalesce(("tankless_sales_sold_quantity") /  nullif(("total_water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity"), 0),0)
 as "tankless_conversion",
    -- LTO SEWERS
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_sewer_count") /  nullif(("lto_sewer_opp_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_rate_sewer",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_sewer_sold") /  nullif(("lto_set_sewer_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_conversion_sewer",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_sewer_sales") /  nullif(("lto_set_sewer_sold"), 0),0)
 as "lto_average_sale_sewer",
    -- LTO DOWNSPOUTS
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_downspout_count") /  nullif(("lto_downspout_opp_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_rate_downspout",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_downspout_sold") /  nullif(("lto_set_downspout_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_conversion_downspout",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_downspout_sales") /  nullif(("lto_set_downspout_sold"), 0),0)
 as "lto_average_sale_downspout",
    -- LTO HVAC
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_hvac_count") /  nullif(("lto_hvac_opp_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_rate_hvac",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_hvac_sold") /  nullif(("lto_set_hvac_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_conversion_hvac",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_hvac_sales") /  nullif(("lto_set_hvac_sold"), 0),0)
 as "lto_average_sale_hvac"
    from groupings
)

    -- METRICS
    count(distinct case when "revenue" > 0 then technician_id end) as "revenue_technician_count",

    sum("job_count") as "job_count",
