    -- Calculated Conversion Metric
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_opportunity_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as blended_opportunity_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_sold_job_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as blended_sold_job_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_opportunity_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_sold_job_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as kpi_blended_sold_job_count,
    -- Care Plan Metrics
    sum(care_plan_row_count) as care_plan_row_count,
    sum(care_plan_invoices) as care_plan_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_quantity) as care_plan_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_cost) as care_plan_cost,
    sum(care_plan_revenue) as care_plan_revenue,
    sum(care_plan_sold_hours) as care_plan_sold_hours,
    sum(care_plan_sold_invoices) as care_plan_sold_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_sold_quantity) as care_plan_sold_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_discounts) as care_plan_discounts,

    -- Other Item Metrics
    sum(water_heaters_sold_quantity) as total_water_heaters_sold_quantity,
    sum(tankless_sold_quantity) as tankless_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sold_quantity + hvac_partial_system_sold_quantity) as hvac_systems_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sold_quantity) as hvac_full_system_sold_quantity,
    sum(excavation_sold_invoices) as excavation_sold_invoices,
    sum(downspouts_sold_quantity) as downspouts_sold_quantity,       

    -- Other Sales Metrics
    sum(care_plan_sales_sold_estimates) as care_plan_sales_sold_estimates,
    sum(water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity) as total_water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(tankless_sales_sold_quantity) as tankless_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity + hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_quantity) as hvac_systems_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity) as hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(excavation_sales_sold_estimates) as excavation_sales_sold_estimates,
    sum(downspouts_sales_sold_quantity) as downspouts_sales_sold_quantity,  

    sum("lto_set_total_count") as "lto_set_total_count",
    sum("lto_set_total_sold") as "lto_set_total_sold",
    sum("lto_set_total_sales") as "lto_set_total_sales",

    sum("lto_run_total_count") as "lto_run_total_count",
    sum("lto_run_total_sold") as "lto_run_total_sold",
    sum("lto_run_total_sales") as "lto_run_total_sales",

    sum("lto_sewer_opp_count") as "lto_sewer_opp_count",
    sum("lto_downspout_opp_count") as "lto_downspout_opp_count",
    sum("lto_hvac_opp_count") as "lto_hvac_opp_count",

    sum("lto_set_sewer_count") as "lto_set_sewer_count",
    sum("lto_set_sewer_sold") as "lto_set_sewer_sold",
    sum("lto_set_sewer_sales") as "lto_set_sewer_sales",

    sum("lto_set_downspout_count") as "lto_set_downspout_count",
    sum("lto_set_downspout_sold") as "lto_set_downspout_sold",
    sum("lto_set_downspout_sales") as "lto_set_downspout_sales",

    sum("lto_set_hvac_count") as "lto_set_hvac_count",
    sum("lto_set_hvac_sold") as "lto_set_hvac_sold",
    sum("lto_set_hvac_sales") as "lto_set_hvac_sales",

    sum("lto_run_sewer_count") as "lto_run_sewer_count",
    sum("lto_run_sewer_sold") as "lto_run_sewer_sold",
    sum("lto_run_sewer_sales") as "lto_run_sewer_sales",

    sum("lto_run_downspout_count") as "lto_run_downspout_count",
    sum("lto_run_downspout_sold") as "lto_run_downspout_sold",
    sum("lto_run_downspout_sales") as "lto_run_downspout_sales",

    sum("lto_run_hvac_count") as "lto_run_hvac_count",
    sum("lto_run_hvac_sold") as "lto_run_hvac_sold",
    sum("lto_run_hvac_sales") as "lto_run_hvac_sales"

from actuals_by_technicians
group by 
    grouping sets (
        -- ALL COLUMNS
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, technician_id, technician_name, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        -- TEAM LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        (region, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        (location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),        
        (trade_line_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),        
        (location, date_trunc('month',report_date)),        
        (region, date_trunc('month',report_date))        
    )
),
add_calculated_metrics as (
    select groupings.*,
    {{ ratio("sold_job_count","opportunity_count") }} as "revenue_conversion_pct",
    {{ ratio("new_opportunity_sold_count","new_opportunity_count") }} as "new_opp_conversion_pct",
    {{ ratio("estimate_jobs_sold","estimate_jobs") }} as "estimate_conversion_pct",
    {{ ratio("blended_sold_job_count","blended_opportunity_count") }} as "blended_conversion_pct",
    {{ ratio("kpi_blended_sold_job_count","kpi_blended_opportunity_count") }} as "kpi_blended_conversion_pct",
    {{ ratio("revenue","sold_job_count") }} as "average_sale",
    {{ ratio("revenue","blended_sold_job_count") }} as "blended_average_sale",
    {{ ratio("revenue","kpi_blended_sold_job_count") }} as "kpi_average_ticket",
    {{ ratio("estimate_sales","kpi_sales_sold_job_count") }} as "kpi_average_sales_ticket",
    {{ ratio("revenue","opportunity_count") }} as "revenue_run_rate",
    {{ ratio("sold_hours","sold_job_count") }} as "sold_hours_per_job",
    {{ ratio("sold_hours","opportunity_count") }} as "sold_hours_run_rate",
    {{ ratio("recalls","sold_job_count") }} as "recall_rate",
    {{ ratio("sold_hours","hours_worked") }} as "sold_hour_efficiency",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_count","opportunity_count") }} as "lto_rate",
    {{ ratio("revenue","sold_hours") }} as "revenue_per_sold_hour",
    {{ ratio("revenue","revenue_technician_count") }} as "revenue_per_truck",
    {{ ratio("estimate_sales","revenue_technician_count") }} as "sales_per_truck",
    {{ ratio("sold_hours","revenue_technician_count") }} as "sold_hours_per_truck",
    {{ ratio("opportunity_count","revenue_technician_count") }} as "opportunity_per_truck",
    {{ ratio("sales_opportunity_count","sales_technician_count") }} as "sales_opportunity_per_truck",
    {{ ratio("sold_job_count","revenue_technician_count") }} as "sold_jobs_per_truck",
    {{ ratio("new_opportunity_count","revenue_technician_count") }} as "new_opp_per_truck",
    {{ ratio("lto_run_total_sold","lto_run_total_count") }} as "lto_run_conversion",
    {{ ratio("lto_run_total_sales","lto_run_total_sold") }} as "lto_run_average_sale",
    {{ ratio("water_heater_replacement_sold_count","water_heater_replacement_count") }} as "water_heater_replacement_conversion",
    {{ ratio("water_heater_total_sold_count","water_heater_total_count") }} as "water_heater_total_conversion",
    {{ ratio("tankless_sales_sold_quantity","total_water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity") }} as "tankless_conversion",
    -- LTO SEWERS
    {{ ratio("lto_set_sewer_count","lto_sewer_opp_count") }} as "lto_rate_sewer",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_sewer_sold","lto_set_sewer_count") }} as "lto_conversion_sewer",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_sewer_sales","lto_set_sewer_sold") }} as "lto_average_sale_sewer",
    -- LTO DOWNSPOUTS
    {{ ratio("lto_set_downspout_count","lto_downspout_opp_count") }} as "lto_rate_downspout",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_downspout_sold","lto_set_downspout_count") }} as "lto_conversion_downspout",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_downspout_sales","lto_set_downspout_sold") }} as "lto_average_sale_downspout",
    -- LTO HVAC
    {{ ratio("lto_set_hvac_count","lto_hvac_opp_count") }} as "lto_rate_hvac",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_hvac_sold","lto_set_hvac_count") }} as "lto_conversion_hvac",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_hvac_sales","lto_set_hvac_sold") }} as "lto_average_sale_hvac"
    from groupings
)
select * from add_calculated_metrics
model.edw.actuals_cube_monthly_jbu.compiled_code:
with 
actuals_by_technicians as (
    select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."actuals_by_technician_jbu"
),
groupings as (
select 
    -- DIMENSIONS
    coalesce(region,'Total') as region,
    coalesce(location,'Total') as location,
    coalesce(trade_line_type,'Total') as trade_line_type,
    coalesce(department_type,'Total') as department_type,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_id,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_id,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_name,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_name,        
    coalesce(department_id,0) as department_id,
    coalesce(department_name,'Total') as department_name,
    -- TECHNICIAN
    coalesce('Total','Total') as technician_team,
    coalesce(technician_id,0) as technician_id,
    coalesce(technician_name,'Total') as technician_name,
    -- DATE
    date_trunc('month',report_date)::date as report_date,
    -- METRICS
    count(distinct case when "revenue" > 0 then technician_id end) as "revenue_technician_count",
    count(distinct case when "job_sales" > 0 then technician_id end) as "sales_technician_count",
    sum("job_count") as "job_count",
    sum("opportunity_count") as "opportunity_count",
    sum("sold_job_count") as "sold_job_count",
    sum("sales_opportunity_count") as "sales_opportunity_count",
    sum("sales_sold_job_count") as "sales_sold_job_count",
    sum("kpi_sales_opportunity_count") as "kpi_sales_opportunity_count",
    sum("kpi_sales_sold_job_count") as "kpi_sales_sold_job_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_count") as "new_opportunity_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count") as "new_opportunity_sold_count",
    sum("job_count_splits_adjusted") as "job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("sold_job_count_splits_adjusted") as "sold_job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("revenue") as "revenue",
    sum("job_sales") as "job_sales",
    sum("sold_hours") as "sold_hours",
    sum("total_tasks") as "total_tasks",
    sum("lto_set_count") as "lto_set_count",
    sum("lto_sales_generated") as "lto_sales_generated",
    sum("lto_tto_set_count") as "lto_tto_set_count",
    sum("recalls") as "recalls",

    -- JOB TYPE GROUPS
    sum("water_heater_replacement_count") as "water_heater_replacement_count",
    sum("water_heater_replacement_sold_count") as "water_heater_replacement_sold_count",
    sum("water_heater_total_count") as "water_heater_total_count",
    sum("water_heater_total_sold_count") as "water_heater_total_sold_count",
    sum("hvac_replacement_count") as "hvac_replacement_count",
    sum("hvac_10plus_count") as "hvac_10plus_count",
    sum("hvac_care_plan_system_check_count") as "hvac_care_plan_system_check_count",
    sum("hvac_system_check_count") as "hvac_system_check_count",

    sum("hours_worked") as "hours_worked",

    -- ESTIMATE SALES METRICS
    sum("estimate_jobs") as "estimate_jobs",
    sum("estimate_jobs_sold") as "estimate_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimates") as "estimates",
    sum("estimate_tasks") as "estimate_tasks",
    sum("estimates_sold") as "estimates_sold",
    sum("estimate_sold_tasks") as "estimate_sold_tasks",
    sum("estimate_sales") as "estimate_sales",
    sum("estimate_sold_hours_sold") as "estimate_sold_hours_sold",
    sum("estimate_discounts") as "estimate_discounts",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs") as "estimate_lto_jobs",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs_sold") as "estimate_lto_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimate_lto_sales") as "estimate_lto_sales",
    sum("estimate_lto_discounts") as "estimate_lto_discounts",

    -- Calculated Conversion Metric
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_opportunity_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as blended_opportunity_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_sold_job_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as blended_sold_job_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_opportunity_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_sold_job_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as kpi_blended_sold_job_count,
    -- Care Plan Metrics
    sum(care_plan_row_count) as care_plan_row_count,
    sum(care_plan_invoices) as care_plan_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_quantity) as care_plan_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_cost) as care_plan_cost,
    sum(care_plan_revenue) as care_plan_revenue,
    sum(care_plan_sold_hours) as care_plan_sold_hours,
    sum(care_plan_sold_invoices) as care_plan_sold_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_sold_quantity) as care_plan_sold_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_discounts) as care_plan_discounts,

    -- Other Item Metrics
    sum(water_heaters_sold_quantity) as total_water_heaters_sold_quantity,
    sum(tankless_sold_quantity) as tankless_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sold_quantity + hvac_partial_system_sold_quantity) as hvac_systems_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sold_quantity) as hvac_full_system_sold_quantity,
    sum(excavation_sold_invoices) as excavation_sold_invoices,
    sum(downspouts_sold_quantity) as downspouts_sold_quantity,       

    -- Other Sales Metrics
    sum(care_plan_sales_sold_estimates) as care_plan_sales_sold_estimates,
    sum(water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity) as total_water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(tankless_sales_sold_quantity) as tankless_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity + hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_quantity) as hvac_systems_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity) as hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(excavation_sales_sold_estimates) as excavation_sales_sold_estimates,
    sum(downspouts_sales_sold_quantity) as downspouts_sales_sold_quantity,  

    sum("lto_set_total_count") as "lto_set_total_count",
    sum("lto_set_total_sold") as "lto_set_total_sold",
    sum("lto_set_total_sales") as "lto_set_total_sales",

    sum("lto_run_total_count") as "lto_run_total_count",
    sum("lto_run_total_sold") as "lto_run_total_sold",
    sum("lto_run_total_sales") as "lto_run_total_sales",

    sum("lto_sewer_opp_count") as "lto_sewer_opp_count",
    sum("lto_downspout_opp_count") as "lto_downspout_opp_count",
    sum("lto_hvac_opp_count") as "lto_hvac_opp_count",

    sum("lto_set_sewer_count") as "lto_set_sewer_count",
    sum("lto_set_sewer_sold") as "lto_set_sewer_sold",
    sum("lto_set_sewer_sales") as "lto_set_sewer_sales",

    sum("lto_set_downspout_count") as "lto_set_downspout_count",
    sum("lto_set_downspout_sold") as "lto_set_downspout_sold",
    sum("lto_set_downspout_sales") as "lto_set_downspout_sales",

    sum("lto_set_hvac_count") as "lto_set_hvac_count",
    sum("lto_set_hvac_sold") as "lto_set_hvac_sold",
    sum("lto_set_hvac_sales") as "lto_set_hvac_sales",

    sum("lto_run_sewer_count") as "lto_run_sewer_count",
    sum("lto_run_sewer_sold") as "lto_run_sewer_sold",
    sum("lto_run_sewer_sales") as "lto_run_sewer_sales",

    sum("lto_run_downspout_count") as "lto_run_downspout_count",
    sum("lto_run_downspout_sold") as "lto_run_downspout_sold",
    sum("lto_run_downspout_sales") as "lto_run_downspout_sales",

    sum("lto_run_hvac_count") as "lto_run_hvac_count",
    sum("lto_run_hvac_sold") as "lto_run_hvac_sold",
    sum("lto_run_hvac_sales") as "lto_run_hvac_sales"

from actuals_by_technicians
group by 
    grouping sets (
        -- ALL COLUMNS
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, technician_id, technician_name, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        -- TEAM LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        (region, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        (location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),        
        (trade_line_type, date_trunc('month',report_date)),        
        (location, date_trunc('month',report_date)),        
        (region, date_trunc('month',report_date))        
    )
),
add_calculated_metrics as (
    select groupings.*,
    
    coalesce(("sold_job_count") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("new_opportunity_sold_count") /  nullif(("new_opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "new_opp_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("estimate_jobs_sold") /  nullif(("estimate_jobs"), 0),0)
 as "estimate_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("blended_sold_job_count") /  nullif(("blended_opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "blended_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("kpi_blended_sold_job_count") /  nullif(("kpi_blended_opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "kpi_blended_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "average_sale",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("blended_sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "blended_average_sale",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("kpi_blended_sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "kpi_average_ticket",
    
    coalesce(("estimate_sales") /  nullif(("kpi_sales_sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "kpi_average_sales_ticket",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_run_rate",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hours_per_job",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hours_run_rate",
    
    coalesce(("recalls") /  nullif(("sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "recall_rate",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("hours_worked"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hour_efficiency",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_count") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_rate",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("sold_hours"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_per_sold_hour",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("estimate_sales") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sales_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hours_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("opportunity_count") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "opportunity_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("sales_opportunity_count") /  nullif(("sales_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sales_opportunity_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("sold_job_count") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_jobs_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("new_opportunity_count") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "new_opp_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("lto_run_total_sold") /  nullif(("lto_run_total_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_run_conversion",
    
    coalesce(("lto_run_total_sales") /  nullif(("lto_run_total_sold"), 0),0)
 as "lto_run_average_sale",
    
    coalesce(("water_heater_replacement_sold_count") /  nullif(("water_heater_replacement_count"), 0),0)
 as "water_heater_replacement_conversion",
    
    coalesce(("water_heater_total_sold_count") /  nullif(("water_heater_total_count"), 0),0)
 as "water_heater_total_conversion",
    
    coalesce(("tankless_sales_sold_quantity") /  nullif(("total_water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity"), 0),0)
 as "tankless_conversion",
    -- LTO SEWERS
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_sewer_count") /  nullif(("lto_sewer_opp_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_rate_sewer",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_sewer_sold") /  nullif(("lto_set_sewer_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_conversion_sewer",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_sewer_sales") /  nullif(("lto_set_sewer_sold"), 0),0)
 as "lto_average_sale_sewer",
    -- LTO DOWNSPOUTS
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_downspout_count") /  nullif(("lto_downspout_opp_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_rate_downspout",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_downspout_sold") /  nullif(("lto_set_downspout_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_conversion_downspout",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_downspout_sales") /  nullif(("lto_set_downspout_sold"), 0),0)
 as "lto_average_sale_downspout",
    -- LTO HVAC
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_hvac_count") /  nullif(("lto_hvac_opp_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_rate_hvac",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_hvac_sold") /  nullif(("lto_set_hvac_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_conversion_hvac",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_hvac_sales") /  nullif(("lto_set_hvac_sold"), 0),0)
 as "lto_average_sale_hvac"
    from groupings
)
select * from add_calculated_metrics

model.edw.budget_cube_monthly.name: budget_cube_monthly
model.edw.budget_cube_monthly.raw_code:
with budget_by_businessunit as (
    select * from {{ ref("budget_by_businessunit") }}
),
groupings as (
    select
        -- DIMENSIONS
        coalesce(region, 'Total') as region,
        coalesce(location, 'Total') as location,
        coalesce(trade_line_type, 'Total') as trade_line_type,
        coalesce(department_type, 'Total') as department_type,
        coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_id, 'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_id,
        coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_name, 'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_name,
        coalesce(department_id, 0) as department_id,
        coalesce(department_name, 'Total') as department_name,
        -- DATE
        date_trunc('month', budget_date)::date as budget_date,
        -- METRICS
        coalesce(sum("budget_crews") /  nullif(count(distinct "budget_date"), 0),0) as budget_crews,
        sum(budget_canceled_calls) as budget_canceled_calls,
        sum(budget_opportunities) as budget_opportunities,
        sum(budget_sold_jobs) as budget_sold_jobs,
        sum(budget_lto) as budget_lto,
        sum(budget_revenue) as budget_revenue,
        sum(budget_sold_hours) as budget_sold_hours,
        sum(budget_hours_worked) as budget_hours_worked,
        sum(budget_care_plans) as budget_care_plans,
        sum(budget_pre_sold_revenue) as budget_pre_sold_revenue,
        sum(budget_recalls) as budget_recalls,
        sum(budget_client_concerns) as budget_client_concerns,
        sum(budget_gross_margin) as budget_gross_margin,
        sum(budget_damages) as budget_damages,
        sum(budget_discounts) as budget_discounts,
        -- METRICS
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_jobs") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_conversion_pct",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_jobs"), 0),0) as "budget_average_sale",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_run_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_hours") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_sold_hours_run_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_hours") /  nullif(sum("budget_hours_worked"), 0),0) as "budget_sold_hour_efficiency",
        coalesce(sum("budget_recalls") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_jobs"), 0),0) as "budget_recall_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_care_plans") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_care_plan_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_lto") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_lto_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_hours"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_per_sold_hour",
        -- Extra Math for Crew Math :()
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_crews") /  nullif(count(distinct "budget_date"), 0),0),0) as "budget_revenue_per_crew",
        coalesce(sum("budget_opportunities") /  nullif(sum("budget_crews") /  nullif(count(distinct "budget_date"), 0),0),0) as "budget_opps_per_crew"

    from budget_by_businessunit
    group by
    grouping sets (
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, date_trunc('month', budget_date)),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('month', budget_date)),
        (region, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('month', budget_date)),
        (trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('month', budget_date)),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, date_trunc('month', budget_date)),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, date_trunc('month', budget_date)),        
        (trade_line_type, date_trunc('month', budget_date)),        
        (location, date_trunc('month', budget_date)),        
        (region, date_trunc('month', budget_date))  
        )
)
select * from groupings

model.edw.actuals_cube_weekly.name: actuals_cube_weekly
model.edw.actuals_cube_weekly.raw_code:
with 
actuals_by_technicians as (
    select * from {{ ref("actuals_by_technician") }}
),
groupings as (
select 
    -- DIMENSIONS
    coalesce(region,'Total') as region,
    coalesce(location,'Total') as location,
    coalesce(trade_line_type,'Total') as trade_line_type,
    coalesce(department_type,'Total') as department_type,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_id,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_id,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_name,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_name,        
    coalesce(department_id,0) as department_id,
    coalesce(department_name,'Total') as department_name,
    -- TECHNICIAN
    coalesce(technician_team,'Total') as technician_team,
    coalesce(technician_id,0) as technician_id,
    coalesce(technician_name,'Total') as technician_name,
    -- DATE
    date_trunc('week',report_date)::date as report_date,
    -- METRICS
    count(distinct case when "revenue" > 0 then technician_id end) as "revenue_technician_count",
    count(distinct case when "job_sales" > 0 then technician_id end) as "sales_technician_count",
    sum("job_count") as "job_count",
    sum("opportunity_count") as "opportunity_count",
    sum("sold_job_count") as "sold_job_count",
    sum("sales_opportunity_count") as "sales_opportunity_count",
    sum("sales_sold_job_count") as "sales_sold_job_count",
    sum("kpi_sales_opportunity_count") as "kpi_sales_opportunity_count",
    sum("kpi_sales_sold_job_count") as "kpi_sales_sold_job_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_count") as "new_opportunity_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count") as "new_opportunity_sold_count",
    sum("job_count_splits_adjusted") as "job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("sold_job_count_splits_adjusted") as "sold_job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("revenue") as "revenue",
    sum("job_sales") as "job_sales",
    sum("sold_hours") as "sold_hours",
    sum("total_tasks") as "total_tasks",
    sum("lto_set_count") as "lto_set_count",
    sum("lto_sales_generated") as "lto_sales_generated",
    sum("lto_tto_set_count") as "lto_tto_set_count",
    sum("recalls") as "recalls",

    -- JOB TYPE GROUPS
    sum("water_heater_replacement_count") as "water_heater_replacement_count",
    sum("water_heater_replacement_sold_count") as "water_heater_replacement_sold_count",
    sum("water_heater_total_count") as "water_heater_total_count",
    sum("water_heater_total_sold_count") as "water_heater_total_sold_count",
    sum("hvac_care_plan_system_check_count") as "hvac_care_plan_system_check_count",
    sum("hvac_system_check_count") as "hvac_system_check_count",

    sum("hours_worked") as "hours_worked",

    -- ESTIMATE SALES METRICS
    sum("estimate_jobs") as "estimate_jobs",
    sum("estimate_jobs_sold") as "estimate_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimates") as "estimates",
    sum("estimate_tasks") as "estimate_tasks",
    sum("estimates_sold") as "estimates_sold",
    sum("estimate_sold_tasks") as "estimate_sold_tasks",
    sum("estimate_sales") as "estimate_sales",
    sum("estimate_sold_hours_sold") as "estimate_sold_hours_sold",
    sum("estimate_discounts") as "estimate_discounts",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs") as "estimate_lto_jobs",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs_sold") as "estimate_lto_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimate_lto_sales") as "estimate_lto_sales",
    sum("estimate_lto_discounts") as "estimate_lto_discounts",

    -- Calculated Conversion Metric
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_opportunity_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as blended_opportunity_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_sold_job_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as blended_sold_job_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_opportunity_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_sold_job_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as kpi_blended_sold_job_count,
    -- Care Plan Metrics
    sum(care_plan_row_count) as care_plan_row_count,
    sum(care_plan_invoices) as care_plan_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_quantity) as care_plan_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_cost) as care_plan_cost,
    sum(care_plan_revenue) as care_plan_revenue,
    sum(care_plan_sold_hours) as care_plan_sold_hours,
    sum(care_plan_sold_invoices) as care_plan_sold_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_sold_quantity) as care_plan_sold_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_discounts) as care_plan_discounts,

    -- Other Item Metrics
    sum(water_heaters_sold_quantity) as total_water_heaters_sold_quantity,
    sum(tankless_sold_quantity) as tankless_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sold_quantity + hvac_partial_system_sold_quantity) as hvac_systems_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sold_quantity) as hvac_full_system_sold_quantity,
    sum(excavation_sold_invoices) as excavation_sold_invoices,
    sum(downspouts_sold_quantity) as downspouts_sold_quantity,       

    -- Other Sales Metrics
    sum(care_plan_sales_sold_estimates) as care_plan_sales_sold_estimates,
    sum(water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity) as total_water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(tankless_sales_sold_quantity) as tankless_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity + hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_quantity) as hvac_systems_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity) as hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(excavation_sales_sold_estimates) as excavation_sales_sold_estimates,
    sum(downspouts_sales_sold_quantity) as downspouts_sales_sold_quantity,  

    sum("lto_set_total_count") as "lto_set_total_count",
    sum("lto_set_total_sold") as "lto_set_total_sold",
    sum("lto_set_total_sales") as "lto_set_total_sales",

    sum("lto_run_total_count") as "lto_run_total_count",
    sum("lto_run_total_sold") as "lto_run_total_sold",
    sum("lto_run_total_sales") as "lto_run_total_sales",

    sum("lto_sewer_opp_count") as "lto_sewer_opp_count",
    sum("lto_downspout_opp_count") as "lto_downspout_opp_count",
    sum("lto_hvac_opp_count") as "lto_hvac_opp_count",

    sum("lto_set_sewer_count") as "lto_set_sewer_count",
    sum("lto_set_sewer_sold") as "lto_set_sewer_sold",
    sum("lto_set_sewer_sales") as "lto_set_sewer_sales",

    sum("lto_set_downspout_count") as "lto_set_downspout_count",
    sum("lto_set_downspout_sold") as "lto_set_downspout_sold",
    sum("lto_set_downspout_sales") as "lto_set_downspout_sales",

    sum("lto_set_hvac_count") as "lto_set_hvac_count",
    sum("lto_set_hvac_sold") as "lto_set_hvac_sold",
    sum("lto_set_hvac_sales") as "lto_set_hvac_sales",

    sum("lto_run_sewer_count") as "lto_run_sewer_count",
    sum("lto_run_sewer_sold") as "lto_run_sewer_sold",
    sum("lto_run_sewer_sales") as "lto_run_sewer_sales",

    sum("lto_run_downspout_count") as "lto_run_downspout_count",
    sum("lto_run_downspout_sold") as "lto_run_downspout_sold",
    sum("lto_run_downspout_sales") as "lto_run_downspout_sales",

    sum("lto_run_hvac_count") as "lto_run_hvac_count",
    sum("lto_run_hvac_sold") as "lto_run_hvac_sold",
    sum("lto_run_hvac_sales") as "lto_run_hvac_sales"

from actuals_by_technicians
group by 
    grouping sets (
        -- ALL COLUMNS
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, technician_id, technician_name, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- TEAM LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        (region, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        (location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        (trade_line_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        (location, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        (region, date_trunc('week',report_date))        
    )
),
add_calculated_metrics as (
    select groupings.*,
    {{ ratio("sold_job_count","opportunity_count") }} as "revenue_conversion_pct",
    {{ ratio("new_opportunity_sold_count","new_opportunity_count") }} as "new_opp_conversion_pct",
    {{ ratio("estimate_jobs_sold","estimate_jobs") }} as "estimate_conversion_pct",
    {{ ratio("blended_sold_job_count","blended_opportunity_count") }} as "blended_conversion_pct",
    {{ ratio("kpi_blended_sold_job_count","kpi_blended_opportunity_count") }} as "kpi_blended_conversion_pct",
    {{ ratio("revenue","sold_job_count") }} as "average_sale",
    {{ ratio("revenue","kpi_blended_sold_job_count") }} as "kpi_average_ticket",
    {{ ratio("estimate_sales","kpi_sales_sold_job_count") }} as "kpi_average_sales_ticket",
    {{ ratio("revenue","opportunity_count") }} as "revenue_run_rate",
    {{ ratio("sold_hours","sold_job_count") }} as "sold_hours_per_job",
    {{ ratio("sold_hours","opportunity_count") }} as "sold_hours_run_rate",
    {{ ratio("recalls","sold_job_count") }} as "recall_rate",
    {{ ratio("sold_hours","hours_worked") }} as "sold_hour_efficiency",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_count","opportunity_count") }} as "lto_rate",
    {{ ratio("revenue","sold_hours") }} as "revenue_per_sold_hour",
    {{ ratio("revenue","revenue_technician_count") }} as "revenue_per_truck",
    {{ ratio("estimate_sales","revenue_technician_count") }} as "sales_per_truck",
    {{ ratio("sold_hours","revenue_technician_count") }} as "sold_hours_per_truck",
    {{ ratio("opportunity_count","revenue_technician_count") }} as "opportunity_per_truck",
    {{ ratio("sales_opportunity_count","sales_technician_count") }} as "sales_opportunity_per_truck",
    {{ ratio("sold_job_count","revenue_technician_count") }} as "sold_jobs_per_truck",
    {{ ratio("new_opportunity_count","revenue_technician_count") }} as "new_opp_per_truck",
    {{ ratio("lto_run_total_sold","lto_run_total_count") }} as "lto_run_conversion",
    {{ ratio("lto_run_total_sales","lto_run_total_sold") }} as "lto_run_average_sale",
    {{ ratio("water_heater_replacement_sold_count","water_heater_replacement_count") }} as "water_heater_replacement_conversion",
    {{ ratio("water_heater_total_sold_count","water_heater_total_count") }} as "water_heater_total_conversion",
    {{ ratio("tankless_sales_sold_quantity","total_water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity") }} as "tankless_conversion",
    -- LTO SEWERS
    {{ ratio("lto_set_sewer_count","lto_sewer_opp_count") }} as "lto_rate_sewer",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_sewer_sold","lto_set_sewer_count") }} as "lto_conversion_sewer",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_sewer_sales","lto_set_sewer_sold") }} as "lto_average_sale_sewer",
    -- LTO DOWNSPOUTS
    {{ ratio("lto_set_downspout_count","lto_downspout_opp_count") }} as "lto_rate_downspout",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_downspout_sold","lto_set_downspout_count") }} as "lto_conversion_downspout",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_downspout_sales","lto_set_downspout_sold") }} as "lto_average_sale_downspout",
    -- LTO HVAC
    {{ ratio("lto_set_hvac_count","lto_hvac_opp_count") }} as "lto_rate_hvac",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_hvac_sold","lto_set_hvac_count") }} as "lto_conversion_hvac",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_hvac_sales","lto_set_hvac_sold") }} as "lto_average_sale_hvac"
    from groupings
)
select * from add_calculated_metrics
model.edw.actuals_cube_weekly.compiled_code:
with 
actuals_by_technicians as (
    select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."actuals_by_technician"
),
groupings as (
select 
    -- DIMENSIONS
    coalesce(region,'Total') as region,
    coalesce(location,'Total') as location,
    coalesce(trade_line_type,'Total') as trade_line_type,
    coalesce(department_type,'Total') as department_type,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_id,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_id,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_name,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_name,        
    coalesce(department_id,0) as department_id,
    coalesce(department_name,'Total') as department_name,
    -- TECHNICIAN
    coalesce(technician_team,'Total') as technician_team,
    coalesce(technician_id,0) as technician_id,
    coalesce(technician_name,'Total') as technician_name,
    -- DATE
    date_trunc('week',report_date)::date as report_date,
    -- METRICS
    count(distinct case when "revenue" > 0 then technician_id end) as "revenue_technician_count",
    count(distinct case when "job_sales" > 0 then technician_id end) as "sales_technician_count",
    sum("job_count") as "job_count",
    sum("opportunity_count") as "opportunity_count",
    sum("sold_job_count") as "sold_job_count",
    sum("sales_opportunity_count") as "sales_opportunity_count",
    sum("sales_sold_job_count") as "sales_sold_job_count",
    sum("kpi_sales_opportunity_count") as "kpi_sales_opportunity_count",
    sum("kpi_sales_sold_job_count") as "kpi_sales_sold_job_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_count") as "new_opportunity_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count") as "new_opportunity_sold_count",
    sum("job_count_splits_adjusted") as "job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("sold_job_count_splits_adjusted") as "sold_job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("revenue") as "revenue",
    sum("job_sales") as "job_sales",
    sum("sold_hours") as "sold_hours",
    sum("total_tasks") as "total_tasks",
    sum("lto_set_count") as "lto_set_count",
    sum("lto_sales_generated") as "lto_sales_generated",
    sum("lto_tto_set_count") as "lto_tto_set_count",
    sum("recalls") as "recalls",

    -- JOB TYPE GROUPS
    sum("water_heater_replacement_count") as "water_heater_replacement_count",
    sum("water_heater_replacement_sold_count") as "water_heater_replacement_sold_count",
    sum("water_heater_total_count") as "water_heater_total_count",
    sum("water_heater_total_sold_count") as "water_heater_total_sold_count",
    sum("hvac_care_plan_system_check_count") as "hvac_care_plan_system_check_count",
    sum("hvac_system_check_count") as "hvac_system_check_count",

    sum("hours_worked") as "hours_worked",

    -- ESTIMATE SALES METRICS
    sum("estimate_jobs") as "estimate_jobs",
    sum("estimate_jobs_sold") as "estimate_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimates") as "estimates",
    sum("estimate_tasks") as "estimate_tasks",
    sum("estimates_sold") as "estimates_sold",
    sum("estimate_sold_tasks") as "estimate_sold_tasks",
    sum("estimate_sales") as "estimate_sales",
    sum("estimate_sold_hours_sold") as "estimate_sold_hours_sold",
    sum("estimate_discounts") as "estimate_discounts",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs") as "estimate_lto_jobs",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs_sold") as "estimate_lto_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimate_lto_sales") as "estimate_lto_sales",
    sum("estimate_lto_discounts") as "estimate_lto_discounts",

    -- Calculated Conversion Metric
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_opportunity_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as blended_opportunity_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_sold_job_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as blended_sold_job_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_opportunity_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_sold_job_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as kpi_blended_sold_job_count,
    -- Care Plan Metrics
    sum(care_plan_row_count) as care_plan_row_count,
    sum(care_plan_invoices) as care_plan_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_quantity) as care_plan_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_cost) as care_plan_cost,
    sum(care_plan_revenue) as care_plan_revenue,
    sum(care_plan_sold_hours) as care_plan_sold_hours,
    sum(care_plan_sold_invoices) as care_plan_sold_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_sold_quantity) as care_plan_sold_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_discounts) as care_plan_discounts,

    -- Other Item Metrics
    sum(water_heaters_sold_quantity) as total_water_heaters_sold_quantity,
    sum(tankless_sold_quantity) as tankless_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sold_quantity + hvac_partial_system_sold_quantity) as hvac_systems_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sold_quantity) as hvac_full_system_sold_quantity,
    sum(excavation_sold_invoices) as excavation_sold_invoices,
    sum(downspouts_sold_quantity) as downspouts_sold_quantity,       

    -- Other Sales Metrics
    sum(care_plan_sales_sold_estimates) as care_plan_sales_sold_estimates,
    sum(water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity) as total_water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(tankless_sales_sold_quantity) as tankless_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity + hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_quantity) as hvac_systems_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity) as hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(excavation_sales_sold_estimates) as excavation_sales_sold_estimates,
    sum(downspouts_sales_sold_quantity) as downspouts_sales_sold_quantity,  

    sum("lto_set_total_count") as "lto_set_total_count",
    sum("lto_set_total_sold") as "lto_set_total_sold",
    sum("lto_set_total_sales") as "lto_set_total_sales",

    sum("lto_run_total_count") as "lto_run_total_count",
    sum("lto_run_total_sold") as "lto_run_total_sold",
    sum("lto_run_total_sales") as "lto_run_total_sales",

    sum("lto_sewer_opp_count") as "lto_sewer_opp_count",
    sum("lto_downspout_opp_count") as "lto_downspout_opp_count",
    sum("lto_hvac_opp_count") as "lto_hvac_opp_count",

    sum("lto_set_sewer_count") as "lto_set_sewer_count",
    sum("lto_set_sewer_sold") as "lto_set_sewer_sold",
    sum("lto_set_sewer_sales") as "lto_set_sewer_sales",

    sum("lto_set_downspout_count") as "lto_set_downspout_count",
    sum("lto_set_downspout_sold") as "lto_set_downspout_sold",
    sum("lto_set_downspout_sales") as "lto_set_downspout_sales",

    sum("lto_set_hvac_count") as "lto_set_hvac_count",
    sum("lto_set_hvac_sold") as "lto_set_hvac_sold",
    sum("lto_set_hvac_sales") as "lto_set_hvac_sales",

    sum("lto_run_sewer_count") as "lto_run_sewer_count",
    sum("lto_run_sewer_sold") as "lto_run_sewer_sold",
    sum("lto_run_sewer_sales") as "lto_run_sewer_sales",

    sum("lto_run_downspout_count") as "lto_run_downspout_count",
    sum("lto_run_downspout_sold") as "lto_run_downspout_sold",
    sum("lto_run_downspout_sales") as "lto_run_downspout_sales",

    sum("lto_run_hvac_count") as "lto_run_hvac_count",
    sum("lto_run_hvac_sold") as "lto_run_hvac_sold",
    sum("lto_run_hvac_sales") as "lto_run_hvac_sales"

from actuals_by_technicians
group by 
    grouping sets (
        -- ALL COLUMNS
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, technician_id, technician_name, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- TEAM LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        (region, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        (location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        (trade_line_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        (location, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        (region, date_trunc('week',report_date))        
    )
),
add_calculated_metrics as (
    select groupings.*,
    
    coalesce(("sold_job_count") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("new_opportunity_sold_count") /  nullif(("new_opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "new_opp_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("estimate_jobs_sold") /  nullif(("estimate_jobs"), 0),0)
 as "estimate_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("blended_sold_job_count") /  nullif(("blended_opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "blended_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("kpi_blended_sold_job_count") /  nullif(("kpi_blended_opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "kpi_blended_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "average_sale",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("kpi_blended_sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "kpi_average_ticket",
    
    coalesce(("estimate_sales") /  nullif(("kpi_sales_sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "kpi_average_sales_ticket",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_run_rate",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hours_per_job",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hours_run_rate",
    
    coalesce(("recalls") /  nullif(("sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "recall_rate",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("hours_worked"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hour_efficiency",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_count") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_rate",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("sold_hours"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_per_sold_hour",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("estimate_sales") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sales_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hours_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("opportunity_count") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "opportunity_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("sales_opportunity_count") /  nullif(("sales_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sales_opportunity_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("sold_job_count") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_jobs_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("new_opportunity_count") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "new_opp_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("lto_run_total_sold") /  nullif(("lto_run_total_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_run_conversion",
    
    coalesce(("lto_run_total_sales") /  nullif(("lto_run_total_sold"), 0),0)
 as "lto_run_average_sale",
    
    coalesce(("water_heater_replacement_sold_count") /  nullif(("water_heater_replacement_count"), 0),0)
 as "water_heater_replacement_conversion",
    
    coalesce(("water_heater_total_sold_count") /  nullif(("water_heater_total_count"), 0),0)
 as "water_heater_total_conversion",
    
    coalesce(("tankless_sales_sold_quantity") /  nullif(("total_water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity"), 0),0)
 as "tankless_conversion",
    -- LTO SEWERS
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_sewer_count") /  nullif(("lto_sewer_opp_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_rate_sewer",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_sewer_sold") /  nullif(("lto_set_sewer_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_conversion_sewer",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_sewer_sales") /  nullif(("lto_set_sewer_sold"), 0),0)
 as "lto_average_sale_sewer",
    -- LTO DOWNSPOUTS
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_downspout_count") /  nullif(("lto_downspout_opp_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_rate_downspout",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_downspout_sold") /  nullif(("lto_set_downspout_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_conversion_downspout",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_downspout_sales") /  nullif(("lto_set_downspout_sold"), 0),0)
 as "lto_average_sale_downspout",
    -- LTO HVAC
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_hvac_count") /  nullif(("lto_hvac_opp_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_rate_hvac",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_hvac_sold") /  nullif(("lto_set_hvac_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_conversion_hvac",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_hvac_sales") /  nullif(("lto_set_hvac_sold"), 0),0)
 as "lto_average_sale_hvac"
    from groupings
)
select * from add_calculated_metrics

        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, technician_id, technician_name, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- TEAM LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        (region, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        (location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        (trade_line_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        (location, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        (region, date_trunc('week',report_date))        
    )
),
add_calculated_metrics as (

model.edw.actuals_cube_weekly_jbu.compiled_code:
with 
actuals_by_technicians as (
    select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."actuals_by_technician_jbu"
),
groupings as (
select 
    -- DIMENSIONS
    coalesce(region,'Total') as region,
    coalesce(location,'Total') as location,
    coalesce(trade_line_type,'Total') as trade_line_type,
    coalesce(department_type,'Total') as department_type,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_id,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_id,
    coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_name,'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_name,        
    coalesce(department_id,0) as department_id,
    coalesce(department_name,'Total') as department_name,
    -- TECHNICIAN
    coalesce('Total','Total') as technician_team,
    coalesce(technician_id,0) as technician_id,
    coalesce(technician_name,'Total') as technician_name,
    -- DATE
    date_trunc('week',report_date)::date as report_date,
    -- METRICS
    count(distinct case when "revenue" > 0 then technician_id end) as "revenue_technician_count",
    count(distinct case when "job_sales" > 0 then technician_id end) as "sales_technician_count",
    sum("job_count") as "job_count",
    sum("opportunity_count") as "opportunity_count",
    sum("sold_job_count") as "sold_job_count",
    sum("sales_opportunity_count") as "sales_opportunity_count",
    sum("sales_sold_job_count") as "sales_sold_job_count",
    sum("kpi_sales_opportunity_count") as "kpi_sales_opportunity_count",
    sum("kpi_sales_sold_job_count") as "kpi_sales_sold_job_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_count") as "new_opportunity_count",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count") as "new_opportunity_sold_count",
    sum("job_count_splits_adjusted") as "job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("sold_job_count_splits_adjusted") as "sold_job_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted") as "new_opportunity_sold_count_splits_adjusted",
    sum("revenue") as "revenue",
    sum("job_sales") as "job_sales",
    sum("sold_hours") as "sold_hours",
    sum("total_tasks") as "total_tasks",
    sum("lto_set_count") as "lto_set_count",
    sum("lto_sales_generated") as "lto_sales_generated",
    sum("lto_tto_set_count") as "lto_tto_set_count",
    sum("recalls") as "recalls",

    -- JOB TYPE GROUPS
    sum("water_heater_replacement_count") as "water_heater_replacement_count",
    sum("water_heater_replacement_sold_count") as "water_heater_replacement_sold_count",
    sum("water_heater_total_count") as "water_heater_total_count",
    sum("water_heater_total_sold_count") as "water_heater_total_sold_count",
    sum("hvac_replacement_count") as "hvac_replacement_count",
    sum("hvac_10plus_count") as "hvac_10plus_count",
    sum("hvac_care_plan_system_check_count") as "hvac_care_plan_system_check_count",
    sum("hvac_system_check_count") as "hvac_system_check_count",

    sum("hours_worked") as "hours_worked",

    -- ESTIMATE SALES METRICS
    sum("estimate_jobs") as "estimate_jobs",
    sum("estimate_jobs_sold") as "estimate_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimates") as "estimates",
    sum("estimate_tasks") as "estimate_tasks",
    sum("estimates_sold") as "estimates_sold",
    sum("estimate_sold_tasks") as "estimate_sold_tasks",
    sum("estimate_sales") as "estimate_sales",
    sum("estimate_sold_hours_sold") as "estimate_sold_hours_sold",
    sum("estimate_discounts") as "estimate_discounts",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs") as "estimate_lto_jobs",
    sum("estimate_lto_jobs_sold") as "estimate_lto_jobs_sold",
    sum("estimate_lto_sales") as "estimate_lto_sales",
    sum("estimate_lto_discounts") as "estimate_lto_discounts",

    -- Calculated Conversion Metric
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_opportunity_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then opportunity_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as blended_opportunity_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then sales_sold_job_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then sold_job_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as blended_sold_job_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_opportunity_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_opportunity_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as kpi_blended_opportunity_count,
    sum(
        case when department_type = 'Sales' then kpi_sales_sold_job_count 
             when department_type <> 'Installation' then kpi_sold_job_count 
             else 0 end
        ) as kpi_blended_sold_job_count,
    -- Care Plan Metrics
    sum(care_plan_row_count) as care_plan_row_count,
    sum(care_plan_invoices) as care_plan_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_quantity) as care_plan_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_cost) as care_plan_cost,
    sum(care_plan_revenue) as care_plan_revenue,
    sum(care_plan_sold_hours) as care_plan_sold_hours,
    sum(care_plan_sold_invoices) as care_plan_sold_invoices,
    sum(care_plan_sold_quantity) as care_plan_sold_quantity,
    sum(care_plan_discounts) as care_plan_discounts,

    -- Other Item Metrics
    sum(water_heaters_sold_quantity) as total_water_heaters_sold_quantity,
    sum(tankless_sold_quantity) as tankless_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sold_quantity + hvac_partial_system_sold_quantity) as hvac_systems_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sold_quantity) as hvac_full_system_sold_quantity,
    sum(excavation_sold_invoices) as excavation_sold_invoices,
    sum(downspouts_sold_quantity) as downspouts_sold_quantity,       

    -- Other Sales Metrics
    sum(care_plan_sales_sold_estimates) as care_plan_sales_sold_estimates,
    sum(water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity) as total_water_heaters_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(tankless_sales_sold_quantity) as tankless_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity + hvac_partial_system_sales_sold_quantity) as hvac_systems_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity) as hvac_full_system_sales_sold_quantity,
    sum(excavation_sales_sold_estimates) as excavation_sales_sold_estimates,
    sum(downspouts_sales_sold_quantity) as downspouts_sales_sold_quantity,  

    sum("lto_set_total_count") as "lto_set_total_count",
    sum("lto_set_total_sold") as "lto_set_total_sold",
    sum("lto_set_total_sales") as "lto_set_total_sales",

    sum("lto_run_total_count") as "lto_run_total_count",
    sum("lto_run_total_sold") as "lto_run_total_sold",
    sum("lto_run_total_sales") as "lto_run_total_sales",

    sum("lto_sewer_opp_count") as "lto_sewer_opp_count",
    sum("lto_downspout_opp_count") as "lto_downspout_opp_count",
    sum("lto_hvac_opp_count") as "lto_hvac_opp_count",

    sum("lto_set_sewer_count") as "lto_set_sewer_count",
    sum("lto_set_sewer_sold") as "lto_set_sewer_sold",
    sum("lto_set_sewer_sales") as "lto_set_sewer_sales",

    sum("lto_set_downspout_count") as "lto_set_downspout_count",
    sum("lto_set_downspout_sold") as "lto_set_downspout_sold",
    sum("lto_set_downspout_sales") as "lto_set_downspout_sales",

    sum("lto_set_hvac_count") as "lto_set_hvac_count",
    sum("lto_set_hvac_sold") as "lto_set_hvac_sold",
    sum("lto_set_hvac_sales") as "lto_set_hvac_sales",

    sum("lto_run_sewer_count") as "lto_run_sewer_count",
    sum("lto_run_sewer_sold") as "lto_run_sewer_sold",
    sum("lto_run_sewer_sales") as "lto_run_sewer_sales",

    sum("lto_run_downspout_count") as "lto_run_downspout_count",
    sum("lto_run_downspout_sold") as "lto_run_downspout_sold",
    sum("lto_run_downspout_sales") as "lto_run_downspout_sales",

    sum("lto_run_hvac_count") as "lto_run_hvac_count",
    sum("lto_run_hvac_sold") as "lto_run_hvac_sold",
    sum("lto_run_hvac_sales") as "lto_run_hvac_sales"

from actuals_by_technicians
group by 
    grouping sets (
        -- ALL COLUMNS
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, technician_id, technician_name, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- TEAM LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, technician_team, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        (region, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        (location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        (trade_line_type, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        (location, date_trunc('week',report_date)),        
        (region, date_trunc('week',report_date))        
    )
),
add_calculated_metrics as (
    select groupings.*,
    
    coalesce(("sold_job_count") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_conversion_pct",
    
    coalesce(("new_opportunity_sold_count") /  nullif(("new_opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "new_opp_conversion_pct",

 as "average_sale",

 as "blended_average_sale",

    coalesce(("estimate_sales") /  nullif(("kpi_sales_sold_job_count"), 0),0)

    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_run_rate",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hours_per_job",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hours_run_rate",
    
    coalesce(("recalls") /  nullif(("sold_job_count"), 0),0)
 as "recall_rate",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("hours_worked"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hour_efficiency",
    
    coalesce(("lto_set_count") /  nullif(("opportunity_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_rate",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("sold_hours"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_per_sold_hour",
    
    coalesce(("revenue") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "revenue_per_truck",

 as "sales_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("sold_hours") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_hours_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("opportunity_count") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "opportunity_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("sales_opportunity_count") /  nullif(("sales_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sales_opportunity_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("sold_job_count") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "sold_jobs_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("new_opportunity_count") /  nullif(("revenue_technician_count"), 0),0)
 as "new_opp_per_truck",
    
    coalesce(("lto_run_total_sold") /  nullif(("lto_run_total_count"), 0),0)
 as "lto_run_conversion",
    
    coalesce(("lto_run_total_sales") /  nullif(("lto_run_total_sold"), 0),0)
 as "lto_run_average_sale",

 as "water_heater_replacement_conversion",

 as "water_heater_total_conversion",

 as "tankless_conversion",

 as "lto_rate_downspout",

 as "lto_rate_hvac",

model.edw.budget_cube_weekly.name: budget_cube_weekly
model.edw.budget_cube_weekly.raw_code:
with budget_by_businessunit as (
    select * from {{ ref("budget_by_businessunit") }}
),
groupings as (
    select
        -- DIMENSIONS
        coalesce(region, 'Total') as region,
        coalesce(location, 'Total') as location,
        coalesce(trade_line_type, 'Total') as trade_line_type,
        coalesce(department_type, 'Total') as department_type,
        coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_id, 'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_id,
        coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_name, 'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_name,
        coalesce(department_id, 0) as department_id,
        coalesce(department_name, 'Total') as department_name,
        -- DATE
        date_trunc('week', budget_date)::date as budget_date,
        -- METRICS
        coalesce(sum("budget_crews") /  nullif(count(distinct "budget_date"), 0),0) as budget_crews,
        sum(budget_canceled_calls) as budget_canceled_calls,
        sum(budget_opportunities) as budget_opportunities,
        sum(budget_sold_jobs) as budget_sold_jobs,
        sum(budget_lto) as budget_lto,
        sum(budget_revenue) as budget_revenue,
        sum(budget_sold_hours) as budget_sold_hours,
        sum(budget_hours_worked) as budget_hours_worked,
        sum(budget_care_plans) as budget_care_plans,
        sum(budget_pre_sold_revenue) as budget_pre_sold_revenue,
        sum(budget_recalls) as budget_recalls,
        sum(budget_client_concerns) as budget_client_concerns,
        sum(budget_gross_margin) as budget_gross_margin,
        sum(budget_damages) as budget_damages,
        sum(budget_discounts) as budget_discounts,
        -- METRICS
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_jobs") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_conversion_pct",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_jobs"), 0),0) as "budget_average_sale",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_run_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_hours") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_sold_hours_run_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_hours") /  nullif(sum("budget_hours_worked"), 0),0) as "budget_sold_hour_efficiency",
        coalesce(sum("budget_recalls") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_jobs"), 0),0) as "budget_recall_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_care_plans") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_care_plan_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_lto") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_lto_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_hours"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_per_sold_hour",
        -- Extra Math for Crew Math :()
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_crews") /  nullif(count(distinct "budget_date"), 0),0),0) as "budget_revenue_per_crew",
        coalesce(sum("budget_opportunities") /  nullif(sum("budget_crews") /  nullif(count(distinct "budget_date"), 0),0),0) as "budget_opps_per_crew"

    from budget_by_businessunit
    group by
    grouping sets (
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),
        (region, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),
        (trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),        
        (trade_line_type, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),        
        (location, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),        
        (region, date_trunc('week', budget_date))  
        )
)
select * from groupings
model.edw.budget_cube_weekly.compiled_code:
with budget_by_businessunit as (
    select * from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."budget_by_businessunit"
),
groupings as (
    select
        -- DIMENSIONS
        coalesce(region, 'Total') as region,
        coalesce(location, 'Total') as location,
        coalesce(trade_line_type, 'Total') as trade_line_type,
        coalesce(department_type, 'Total') as department_type,
        coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_id, 'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_id,
        coalesce(servicetitan_business_unit_name, 'Total') as servicetitan_business_unit_name,
        coalesce(department_id, 0) as department_id,
        coalesce(department_name, 'Total') as department_name,
        -- DATE
        date_trunc('week', budget_date)::date as budget_date,
        -- METRICS
        coalesce(sum("budget_crews") /  nullif(count(distinct "budget_date"), 0),0) as budget_crews,
        sum(budget_canceled_calls) as budget_canceled_calls,
        sum(budget_opportunities) as budget_opportunities,
        sum(budget_sold_jobs) as budget_sold_jobs,
        sum(budget_lto) as budget_lto,
        sum(budget_revenue) as budget_revenue,
        sum(budget_sold_hours) as budget_sold_hours,
        sum(budget_hours_worked) as budget_hours_worked,
        sum(budget_care_plans) as budget_care_plans,
        sum(budget_pre_sold_revenue) as budget_pre_sold_revenue,
        sum(budget_recalls) as budget_recalls,
        sum(budget_client_concerns) as budget_client_concerns,
        sum(budget_gross_margin) as budget_gross_margin,
        sum(budget_damages) as budget_damages,
        sum(budget_discounts) as budget_discounts,
        -- METRICS
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_jobs") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_conversion_pct",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_jobs"), 0),0) as "budget_average_sale",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_run_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_hours") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_sold_hours_run_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_sold_hours") /  nullif(sum("budget_hours_worked"), 0),0) as "budget_sold_hour_efficiency",
        coalesce(sum("budget_recalls") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_jobs"), 0),0) as "budget_recall_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_care_plans") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_care_plan_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_lto") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_lto_rate",
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_hours"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_per_sold_hour",
        -- Extra Math for Crew Math :()
        coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_crews") /  nullif(count(distinct "budget_date"), 0),0),0) as "budget_revenue_per_crew",
        coalesce(sum("budget_opportunities") /  nullif(sum("budget_crews") /  nullif(count(distinct "budget_date"), 0),0),0) as "budget_opps_per_crew"

    from budget_by_businessunit
    group by
    grouping sets (
        -- BU LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, department_id, department_name, servicetitan_business_unit_id, servicetitan_business_unit_name, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),
        -- TRADE TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),
        (region, trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),
        (trade_line_type, department_type, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),
        -- DEPARTMENT TYPE LEVEL
        (region, location, trade_line_type, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),        
        -- INDIVIDUAL GAMING
        (department_type, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),        
        (trade_line_type, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),        
        (location, date_trunc('week', budget_date)),        
        (region, date_trunc('week', budget_date))  
        )
)
select * from groupings

model.edw.operations_board_jobs_api.name: operations_board_jobs_api
model.edw.operations_board_jobs_api.raw_code:
with 
jobs as (
  select * from {{ ref('int_jobs_add_attributes') }}
),
invoices as (
  select * from {{ ref('int_invoices_aggregated_to_jobs') }}
),
estimates as (
  select * from {{ ref('int_estimates_aggregated_to_jobs') }}
),
appointments as (
  select * from {{ ref('int_appointments_aggregated_to_jobs') }}
where 
  (
    first_appointment_start_date::date between current_date - 7 and current_date + 14
  or 
    last_appointment_end_date::date between current_date - 7 and current_date + 14
  )
),
jobs_view as (
select 
  jobs.*,
  appt.first_appointment_start_date,
  appt.last_appointment_end_date,
  appt.next_appointment_date,
  appt.completed_appointment_count,
  appt.active_appointment_count,
  appt.inactive_appointment_count,
  est.min_sold_on_est,
  est.max_sold_on_est,
  coalesce(inv.total,0) as revenue,
  coalesce(inv.balance,0) as balance,
  coalesce(est.sales,0) as sales
from
  appointments as appt 
left join 
  jobs on jobs.job_id = appt.job_id
left join 
  invoices as inv on jobs.job_id = inv.job_id
left join 
  estimates as est on jobs.job_id = est.job_id
)
select 
job_id,
case when job_status in ('Completed','Canceled') then completed_on_est::date
     else coalesce(next_appointment_date::date, first_appointment_start_date::date) end as reporting_date,
completed_on_est::date,
business_unit as job_business_unit,
'tbd' as department_name,
'tbd' as department_id,
job_type,
job_status,
tags,
primary_technician_business_unit,
primary_technician_id,
primary_technician_name,
new_opportunity,
revenue,
balance,
sales
from jobs_view
order by reporting_date desc

model.edw.turnovers_by_trade.name: turnovers_by_trade
model.edw.turnovers_by_trade.raw_code:
with lto_run as (
select *
from {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_rpt__jobs') }} dj
where 1=1
and lead_generated_from is not null
and completion_date::date > '2023-01-01'
),
turnovers as (
select 
	s.completion_date::date as "Set Date",
	sd.trade_line_type as "Set Trade",
--	s.business_unit as "Set BU",
	rd.trade_line_type as "Run Trade", 
--	r.business_unit as "Run BU", 
	count(*) as "Count"
from lto_run as r
left join {{ ref('stg_servicetitan_rpt__jobs') }} s
on r.lead_generated_from::int = s.job_id::int
left join {{ ref('stg_ecoplumbers__departments') }} as sd
on s.business_unit = sd.servicetitan_business_unit_name
left join {{ ref('stg_ecoplumbers__departments') }} as rd
on r.business_unit = rd.servicetitan_business_unit_name
group by 1,2,3
order by 1,2,3
)
select 
	"Set Date",
	"Set Trade", 
	sum(case when "Set Trade" = "Run Trade" then "Count" else 0 end) as "LTO",
	sum(case when "Set Trade" <> "Run Trade" then "Count" else 0 end) as "Total TTO",
	sum("Count") as "Total Turnovers",
	sum(case when "Run Trade" = 'Plumbing' then "Count" else 0 end) as "Plumbing Turnover",
	sum(case when "Run Trade" = 'Sewer' then "Count" else 0 end) as "Sewer Turnover",
	sum(case when "Run Trade" = 'HVAC' then "Count" else 0 end) as "HVAC Turnover",
	sum(case when "Run Trade" = 'Electric' then "Count" else 0 end) as "Electric Turnover"
from turnovers
group by 1,2
