model.dbt_artifacts.dim_dbt__current_mod.name: dim_dbt__current_models
model.dbt_artifacts.dim_dbt__current_mod.description: Dimension model that contains data about models' most recent successful runs

command_invocation_id.name: command_invocation_id
command_invocation_id.description: The invocation_id is a UUID generated by dbt for each invocation. It can be used to link records which were generated by the same dbt invocation.

database.name: database
database.description: The configured database for the node.

depends_on_nodes.name: depends_on_nodes
depends_on_nodes.description: Array of node identifiers that this node depends on in the execution graph.

last_full_refresh_run_completed_at.name: last_full_refresh_run_completed_at
last_full_refresh_run_completed_at.description: Timestamp when the node's SQL query completed on the last full (non-incremental) run.

last_full_refresh_run_rows_affected.name: last_full_refresh_run_rows_affected
last_full_refresh_run_rows_affected.description: Number of rows affected by the node's last full (non-incremental) run.

last_full_refresh_run_bytes_processed.name: last_full_refresh_run_bytes_processed
last_full_refresh_run_bytes_processed.description: Number of bytes processed by the node's last full (non-incremental) run.

last_full_refresh_run_total_runtime.name: last_full_refresh_run_total_runtime
last_full_refresh_run_total_runtime.description: Total time spent executing the node's last full (non-incremental) run (seconds).

last_run_completed_at.name: last_run_completed_at
last_run_completed_at.description: Timestamp when the node's SQL query completed on the last run.

last_run_rows_affected.name: last_run_rows_affected
last_run_rows_affected.description: Number of rows affected by the node's last run.

last_run_bytes_processed.name: last_run_bytes_processed
last_run_bytes_processed.description: Number of bytes processed by the node's last run.

last_run_total_runtime.name: last_run_total_runtime
last_run_total_runtime.description: Total time spent executing the node's last run (seconds).

model_execution_id.name: model_execution_id
model_execution_id.description: Execution ID of the model node.

package_name.name: package_name
package_name.description: Name of the dbt package which contains the node.

path.name: path
path.description: Path to the model on the local filesystem.

run_started_at.name: run_started_at
run_started_at.description: The start timestamp of the dbt execution which generated the record.

model.dbt_artifacts.dim_dbt__current_mod.compiled_code:
with base as (
    select *
    from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_dbt__models"
),

model_executions as (
    select *
    from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."stg_dbt__model_executions"
),

latest_models as (
    /* Retrieves the models present in the most recent run */
    select *
    from base
    where run_started_at = (select max(run_started_at) from base)
),

latest_models_runs as (
    /* Retreives all successful run information for the models present in the most
    recent run and ranks them based on query completion time */
    select
        model_executions.node_id
        , model_executions.was_full_refresh
        , model_executions.query_completed_at
        , model_executions.total_node_runtime
        , model_executions.rows_affected
        
        /* Row number by refresh and node ID */
        , row_number() over (
            partition by latest_models.node_id, model_executions.was_full_refresh
            order by model_executions.query_completed_at desc /* most recent ranked first */
        ) as run_idx
        /* Row number by node ID */
        , row_number() over (
            partition by latest_models.node_id
            order by model_executions.query_completed_at desc /* most recent ranked first */
        ) as run_idx_id_only
    from model_executions
    inner join latest_models on model_executions.node_id = latest_models.node_id
    where model_executions.status = 'success'
),

latest_model_stats as (
    select
        node_id
        , max(case when was_full_refresh then query_completed_at end) as last_full_refresh_run_completed_at
        , max(case when was_full_refresh then total_node_runtime end) as last_full_refresh_run_total_runtime
        , max(case when was_full_refresh then rows_affected end) as last_full_refresh_run_rows_affected
        
        , max(case when run_idx_id_only = 1 then query_completed_at end) as last_run_completed_at
        , max(case when run_idx_id_only = 1 then total_node_runtime end) as last_run_total_runtime
        , max(case when run_idx_id_only = 1 then rows_affected end) as last_run_rows_affected
        
        , max(case when not was_full_refresh then query_completed_at end) as last_incremental_run_completed_at
        , max(case when not was_full_refresh then total_node_runtime end) as last_incremental_run_total_runtime
        , max(case when not was_full_refresh then rows_affected end) as last_incremental_run_rows_affected
        
    from latest_models_runs
    where run_idx = 1
    group by 1
),

final as (
    select
        latest_models.*
        , latest_model_stats.last_full_refresh_run_completed_at
        , latest_model_stats.last_full_refresh_run_total_runtime
        , latest_model_stats.last_full_refresh_run_rows_affected
        
        , latest_model_stats.last_run_completed_at
        , latest_model_stats.last_run_total_runtime
        , latest_model_stats.last_run_rows_affected
        
        , latest_model_stats.last_incremental_run_completed_at
        , latest_model_stats.last_incremental_run_total_runtime
        , latest_model_stats.last_incremental_run_rows_affected
        
    from latest_models
    left join latest_model_stats
        on latest_models.node_id = latest_model_stats.node_id
)

select * from final

        message

)

model.dbt_artifacts.fct_dbt__test_execut.raw_code:
with base as (

    select *
    from {{ ref('stg_dbt__test_executions') }}

),

test_executions as (

    select
        test_execution_id,
        command_invocation_id,
        node_id,
        run_started_at,
        was_full_refresh,
        thread_id,
        status,
        compile_started_at,
        query_completed_at,
        total_node_runtime,
        rows_affected,
        failures,
        message
    from base

)

select * from test_executions

test.edw.unique_jobs_job_id.8a428446b6.name: unique_jobs_job_id
test.edw.unique_jobs_job_id.8a428446b6.compiled_code:
select
    job_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "ecoplumbersdb"."edw2"."jobs"
where job_id is not null
group by job_id
having count(*) > 1

test.edw.source_date_is_updated_servicet.name: source_date_is_updated_servicetitan_api_v2_jpm_jobs_data_completedOn
test.edw.source_date_is_updated_servicet.compiled_code:
select
	*
from (
	select 
		case 
			when extract(dow from current_date) in (1,6,7) then False
			when max("completedOn"::date) in (current_date, current_date - 1) then True
			else False
		end as is_updated
	from "ecoplumbersdb"."servicetitan"."api_v2_jpm_jobs_data"
) as updates
where is_updated = False

macro.edw.ynbool.name: ynbool
macro.edw.ynbool.macro_sql:
{% macro ynbool(yn_field) %}
    case 
        when "{{ yn_field }}" ~* 'Yes' then True
        when "{{ yn_field }}" ~* 'No' then False
        else null
    end
{% endmacro %}

macro.edw.item_equipment_group.name: item_equipment_group
macro.edw.item_equipment_group.macro_sql:
{% macro item_equipment_group() %}

    CASE 
        WHEN item_cross_sale_group in (
            'HVAC - Full System Install - Platinum',
            'HVAC - Full System Install - Gold',
            'HVAC - Full System Install - Silver',
            'HVAC System Replacement',
            'HVAC - Partial System Install',
            'HVAC - Ductless Install'
        ) and item_total > 0 then 'HVAC'
        WHEN item_cross_sale_group in (
            'Water Heaters - Tank',
            'Water Heaters - Tankless',
            'Stack Replacement',
            'Halo 5'
        ) and item_total > 0 then 'Plumbing'
        WHEN item_cross_sale_group in (
            'Downspout Drains',
            'Excavation - Lining',
            'Excavation - Water Service',
            'Excavation - Sewer',
        ) and item_total > 0 then 'Sewer'
        when item_cross_sale_group in (
            'Electric - Generators'
        ) and item_total > 0 then 'Electric'
        ELSE 'Other'
    END

{% endmacro %}

macro.edw.item_columns.name: item_columns
macro.edw.item_columns.macro_sql:
{% macro item_columns(cross_sale_group_list, prefix) %}
    {% set cross_sale_group = "','".join(cross_sale_group_list)  %}
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') then 1 else 0 end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_row_count,
   count(distinct case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') then invoice_id end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_invoices,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') then item_quantity else 0 end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_quantity,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') then item_cost else 0 end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_cost,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') then item_total else 0 end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_revenue,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') then item_sold_hours else 0 end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_sold_hours,
   count(distinct case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') and item_total > 0 then invoice_id end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_sold_invoices,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') and item_total > 0 then item_quantity else 0 end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_sold_quantity,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') and (item_type = 'Discount' or item_price < 0) then item_total else 0 end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_discounts
{% endmacro %}

macro.edw.generate_item_columns.name: generate_item_columns

macro.edw.sales_item_columns.name: sales_item_columns
macro.edw.sales_item_columns.macro_sql:
{% macro sales_item_columns(cross_sale_group_list, prefix) %}
    {% set cross_sale_group = "','".join(cross_sale_group_list)  %}
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') then 1 else 0 end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_sales_row_count,
   count(distinct case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') then estimate_id end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_sales_estimates,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') then item_quantity else 0 end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_sales_quantity,
   0 as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_sales_cost, -- Sales items don't have cost
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') then item_total else 0 end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_sales,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') then item_sold_hours else 0 end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_sales_sold_hours,
   count(distinct case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') and item_total > 0 then estimate_id end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_sales_sold_estimates,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') and item_total > 0 then item_quantity else 0 end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_sales_sold_quantity,
   sum(case when item_cross_sale_group in ('{{ cross_sale_group }}') and (item_type = 'Discount' or item_price < 0) then item_total else 0 end) as {{ prefix | lower | replace(' ', '_') }}_sales_discounts
{% endmacro %}

macro.edw.abc_item_group.name: abc_item_group

macro.edw.is_booked_online.name: is_booked_online
macro.edw.is_booked_online.macro_sql:
{% macro is_booked_online(campaign_name, session_id, alias='', alias1='') %}
  case 
    when {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ campaign_name }}" ~* 'SCHEDULE Engine|Schedule_Engine' then true
    when {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ campaign_name }}" in ('GoogleLocalServices Integration','Reserve with Google','ServiceTitan Web Scheduler') then true
    when {% if alias1 != '' %}"{{alias1}}".{% endif %}"{{ session_id }}" is not null then true
    else false 
   end
{% endmacro %}

macro.edw.is_water_heater_service_opp.name: is_water_heater_service_opp

macro.edw.is_hvac_system_check.name: is_hvac_system_check
macro.edw.is_hvac_system_check.macro_sql:
{% macro is_hvac_system_check(job_type, alias='') %}
    {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ job_type }}" in 
        ('HVAC - Care Plan - Fall Tune Up','HVAC - Care Plan - Spring Tune Up', 
         'HVAC - Deal - Tune Up', 'HVAC - Non Care Plan Member - Tune Up ',
         'HVAC - Membership - Fall Tune Up','HVAC - Membership - Spring Tune Up', 
         'HVAC - Non Member - Tune Up ',
         'HVAC - Membership - Spring Multi System Tune Up',
         'HVAC - Membership - Fall Multi System Tune Up',
         'HVAC - Non Member - Multi System Tune Up'
         ) 
{% endmacro %}

macro.edw.is_hvac_demand_opp.name: is_hvac_demand_opp

macro.edw.is_hvac_care_plan_system_check.name: is_hvac_care_plan_system_check

macro.edw.is_sewer_lto_opp.name: is_sewer_lto_opp

macro.edw.is_downspout_lto_opp.name: is_downspout_lto_opp

macro.edw.job_type_group.name: job_type_group
macro.edw.job_type_group.macro_sql:
{% macro job_type_group(job_type, tags, alias='') %}
  case 
    when {{ is_water_heater_replacement_opp(job_type, alias) }} then 'Water Heater Replacement'
    when {{ is_water_heater_service_opp(job_type, alias) }} then 'Water Heater Service'
    when {{ is_hvac_demand_opp(job_type, alias) }} then 'HVAC Replacement'
    when {{ is_hvac_care_plan_system_check(job_type, alias) }} then 'HVAC Care Plan System Check'
    when {{ is_hvac_system_check(job_type, alias) }} then 'HVAC Non Care Plan System Check'
    when {{ is_hvac_care_plan_system_check(job_type, alias) }} then 'HVAC Care Plan System Check'
    when {{ is_hvac_system_check(job_type, alias) }} then 'HVAC Non Care Plan System Check'
    -- With Tags
    when {{ is_sewer_lto_opp(job_type,tags, alias) }} then 'Sewer LTO Opp'
    when {{ is_downspout_lto_opp(job_type,tags, alias) }} then 'Downspout LTO Opp'
    else 'Other' 
   end
{% endmacro %}

macro.edw.lto_set_type.name: lto_set_type
macro.edw.lto_set_type.macro_sql:
{% macro lto_set_type(job_type, tags, alias='') %}
    CASE
        WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ job_type }}" in 
            ('Drain Clogged or Broken Downspout-Clog/Clearing',
             'Drain Clogged or Broken Downspout- Repair/Replace'
            ) 
            THEN 'Downspout'
        WHEN 
            {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~ 'Repipe Opportunity' 
            AND {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ job_type }}" in ('Drain Clogged Floor')
            THEN 'Repipe'
        WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ job_type }}" in 
            (
            'Drain Clogged Floor',
            'Drain Clogged Kitchen',
            'Drain Clogged Toilet/Shower/Sink/Bathtub/Stack: Secondary Line'
            )
            THEN 'Drain'
        WHEN ({% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ job_type }}" in 
            ('DEAL: 93 or Free',
             'Drain Clogged Sanitary Sewer'
            ) AND  {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~ 'Sewer') and NOT  {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~ 'Non Sewer Opp' 
            THEN 'Sewer'
        WHEN 
            {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~ 'HVAC 10+' 
            AND {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ job_type }}" ~* 'HVAC'
            THEN 'HVAC 10+' 
        WHEN 
            {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ job_type }}" ~* 'HVAC'
            THEN 'HVAC' 
        WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~ 'Tankless Opportunity' THEN 'Tankless'
        WHEN 
            {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~ 'Repipe Opportunity' 
            THEN 'Repipe'
        ELSE 'Other' 
        END
{% endmacro %}

macro.edw.lto_run_type.name: lto_run_type
macro.edw.lto_run_type.macro_sql:
{% macro lto_run_type(job_type, alias='') %}
    CASE 
        WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ job_type }}" = 'LTO - Sewer' THEN 'Sewer'
        WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ job_type }}" = 'LTO - Downspout' THEN 'Downspout'
        WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ job_type }}" = 'LTO - Water Service' THEN 'Water Service'
        WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ job_type }}" in (
            'HVAC - LTO','HVAC - Furnace 8 Plus','HVAC - No Heat 🔥',
            'HVAC - Air Conditioner 8 Plus', 'HVAC - No Cool ❄',
            'HVAC - Air Conditioner 10 Plus','HVAC - Furnace 10 Plus') THEN 'HVAC'
        WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ job_type }}" in ('HVAC - Team Visit') THEN 'HVAC - Team Visit'
        WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ job_type }}" in ('LTO - Repipe','LTO - Stack') THEN 'Repipe'
        WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ job_type }}" = 'LTO - Water Treatment' THEN 'Water Treatment'
        ELSE 'Other'
        END
{% endmacro %}

macro.edw.generate_lto_set_metrics.name: generate_lto_set_metrics

macro.edw.generate_lto_run_metrics.name: generate_lto_run_metrics

macro.edw.generate_lto_group_columns_saf.name: generate_lto_group_columns_safe
macro.edw.generate_lto_group_columns_saf.macro_sql:
{% macro generate_lto_group_columns_safe(lto_group) %}
    -- LTO SET
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_{{ lto_group }}_count,0) as lto_set_{{ lto_group }}_count,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_{{ lto_group }}_sold,0) as lto_set_{{ lto_group }}_sold,
    coalesce(ls.lto_set_{{ lto_group }}_sales,0) as lto_set_{{ lto_group }}_sales,
    -- LTO RUN
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_{{ lto_group }}_count,0) as lto_run_{{ lto_group }}_count,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_{{ lto_group }}_sold,0) as lto_run_{{ lto_group }}_sold,
    coalesce(lr.lto_run_{{ lto_group }}_sales,0) as lto_run_{{ lto_group }}_sales
{% endmacro %}

macro.edw.department_hierarchy.name: department_hierarchy
macro.edw.department_hierarchy.macro_sql:
{% macro department_hierarchy(dept_alias="departments") %}
    {{ dept_alias }}.region,
    {{ dept_alias }}.location,
    {{ dept_alias }}.trade,
    {{ dept_alias }}.trade_line,
    {{ dept_alias }}.trade_line_type,
    {{ dept_alias }}.department_type,
    {{ dept_alias }}.trade_type,
    {{ dept_alias }}.department_id,
    {{ dept_alias }}.department as department_name,
    {{ dept_alias }}.servicetitan_business_unit_id,
    {{ dept_alias }}.servicetitan_business_unit_name
{% endmacro %}

macro.edw.actuals_calculations.name: actuals_calculations
macro.edw.actuals_calculations.macro_sql:
{% macro actuals_calculations(agg='') %}
    {{ ratio("new_opportunity_sold_count","new_opportunity_count", agg=agg )}} as "new_opp_conversion_pct",
    {{ ratio("revenue","sold_job_count", agg=agg ) }} as "average_sale",
    {{ ratio("revenue","new_opportunity_count", agg=agg ) }} as "revenue_run_rate",
    {{ ratio("sold_hours","sold_job_count", agg=agg ) }} as "sold_hours_per_job",
    {{ ratio("sold_hours","new_opportunity_count", agg=agg ) }} as "sold_hours_run_rate",
    {{ ratio("recalls","sold_job_count", agg=agg ) }} as "recall_rate",
    {{ ratio("lto_set_count","new_opportunity_count" , agg=agg) }} as "lto_rate",
    {{ ratio("revenue","sold_hours", agg=agg ) }} as "revenue_per_sold_hour"
{% endmacro %}

macro.edw.budget_calculations.name: budget_calculations
macro.edw.budget_calculations.macro_sql:
{% macro budget_calculations() %}
    coalesce(sum("budget_sold_jobs") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_conversion_pct",
    coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_jobs"), 0),0) as "budget_average_sale",
    coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_run_rate",
    coalesce(sum("budget_sold_hours") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_sold_hours_run_rate",
    coalesce(sum("budget_sold_hours") /  nullif(sum("budget_hours_worked"), 0),0) as "budget_sold_hour_efficiency",
    coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_crews"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_per_crew",
    coalesce(sum("budget_recalls") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_jobs"), 0),0) as "budget_recall_rate",
    coalesce(sum("budget_care_plans") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_care_plan_rate",
    coalesce(sum("budget_lto") /  nullif(sum("budget_opportunities"), 0),0) as "budget_lto_rate",
    coalesce(sum("budget_revenue") /  nullif(sum("budget_sold_hours"), 0),0) as "budget_revenue_per_sold_hour"
{% endmacro %}

macro.edw.is_new_opportunity.name: is_new_opportunity
macro.edw.is_new_opportunity.macro_sql:
{% macro is_new_opportunity(tags, show_return_tags=False, alias='') %}
    CASE
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%1R%%'::text THEN '1R'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%1N%%'::text THEN '1N'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%1SPP%%'::text THEN '1SPP'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%2N%%'::text THEN '2N'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%2R%%'::text THEN '1R'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%2SPP%%'::text THEN '2SPP'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%3N%%'::text THEN '3N'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%3R%%'::text THEN '3R'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%3SPP%%'::text THEN '3SPP'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%4N%%'::text THEN '4N'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%4R%%'::text THEN '4R'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%4SPP%%'::text THEN '4SPP'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%HV N%%'::text THEN 'HV N'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%HV R%%'::text THEN 'HV R'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%ER N%%'::text THEN 'ER N'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%ER R%%'::text THEN 'ER R'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%NE N%%'::text THEN 'NE N'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%NE R%%'::text THEN 'NE R'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%Lead Turn-Over%%'::text THEN 'Lead Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%Lead Turnover%%'::text THEN 'Lead Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%Trade Turnover%%'::text THEN 'Trade Turn-Over'::text
          WHEN lower({% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}") ~~ '%%maintenance%%'::text THEN 'Maintenance'::text
          ELSE NULL
          end {% if not show_return_tags %} IS NOT NULL {% endif %}
{% endmacro %}

{% macro priority_tag_group(tags, alias='') %}
    CASE
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%1N%%'::text   THEN 'P1 - Green'
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%1R%%'::text   THEN 'P1 - Green'
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%1SPP%%'::text THEN 'P1 - Green'
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%2N%%'::text   THEN 'P2 - Orange'
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%2R%%'::text   THEN 'P2 - Orange'
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%2SPP%%'::text THEN 'P2 - Orange'
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%3N%%'::text   THEN 'P3 - Yellow'
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%3R%%'::text   THEN 'P3 - Yellow'
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%3SPP%%'::text THEN 'P3 - Yellow'
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%4N%%'::text   THEN 'P4 - Red'
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%4R%%'::text   THEN 'P4 - Red'
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%4SPP%%'::text THEN 'P4 - Red'

          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%HV N%%'::text THEN 'High Value'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%HV R%%'::text THEN 'High Value'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%ER N%%'::text THEN 'Emergency'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%ER R%%'::text THEN 'Emergency'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%NE N%%'::text THEN 'Non-Emergency'::text
          WHEN {% if alias != '' %}"{{alias}}".{% endif %}"{{ tags }}" ~~ '%%NE R%%'::text THEN 'Non-Emergency'::text
          ELSE null::text
          end
{% endmacro %}

macro.dbt_postgres.postgres__list_relati.name: postgres__list_relations_without_caching
macro.dbt_postgres.postgres__list_relati.macro_sql:
{% macro postgres__list_relations_without_caching(schema_relation) %}
  {% call statement('list_relations_without_caching', fetch_result=True) -%}
    select
      '{{ schema_relation.database }}' as database,
      tablename as name,
      schemaname as schema,
      'table' as type
    from pg_tables
    where schemaname ilike '{{ schema_relation.schema }}'
    union all
    select
      '{{ schema_relation.database }}' as database,
      viewname as name,
      schemaname as schema,
      'view' as type
    from pg_views
    where schemaname ilike '{{ schema_relation.schema }}'
    union all
    select
      '{{ schema_relation.database }}' as database,
      matviewname as name,
      schemaname as schema,
      'materialized_view' as type
    from pg_matviews
    where schemaname ilike '{{ schema_relation.schema }}'
  {% endcall %}
  {{ return(load_result('list_relations_without_caching').table) }}
{% endmacro %}

macro.dbt_postgres.postgres__get_show_in.name: postgres__get_show_indexes_sql
macro.dbt_postgres.postgres__get_show_in.macro_sql:
{% macro postgres__get_show_indexes_sql(relation) %}
    select
        i.relname                                   as name,
        m.amname                                    as method,
        ix.indisunique                              as "unique",
        array_to_string(array_agg(a.attname), ',')  as column_names
    from pg_index ix
    join pg_class i
        on i.oid = ix.indexrelid
    join pg_am m
        on m.oid=i.relam
    join pg_class t
        on t.oid = ix.indrelid
    join pg_namespace n
        on n.oid = t.relnamespace
    join pg_attribute a
        on a.attrelid = t.oid
        and a.attnum = ANY(ix.indkey)
    where t.relname = '{{ relation.identifier }}'
      and n.nspname = '{{ relation.schema }}'
      and t.relkind in ('r', 'm')
    group by 1, 2, 3
    order by 1, 2, 3
{% endmacro %}

macro.dbt_postgres.postgres__get_relatio.name: postgres__get_relations
macro.dbt_postgres.postgres__get_relatio.macro_sql:
{% macro postgres__get_relations() -%}

  {#
      -- in pg_depend, objid is the dependent, refobjid is the referenced object
      --  > a pg_depend entry indicates that the referenced object cannot be
      --  > dropped without also dropping the dependent object.
  #}

  {%- call statement('relations', fetch_result=True) -%}
    with relation as (
        select
            pg_rewrite.ev_class as class,
            pg_rewrite.oid as id
        from pg_rewrite
    ),
    class as (
        select
            oid as id,
            relname as name,
            relnamespace as schema,
            relkind as kind
        from pg_class
    ),
    dependency as (
        select distinct
            pg_depend.objid as id,
            pg_depend.refobjid as ref
        from pg_depend
    ),
    schema as (
        select
            pg_namespace.oid as id,
            pg_namespace.nspname as name
        from pg_namespace
        where nspname != 'information_schema' and nspname not like 'pg\_%'
    ),
    referenced as (
        select
            relation.id AS id,
            referenced_class.name ,
            referenced_class.schema ,
            referenced_class.kind
        from relation
        join class as referenced_class on relation.class=referenced_class.id
        where referenced_class.kind in ('r', 'v', 'm')
    ),
    relationships as (
        select
            referenced.name as referenced_name,
            referenced.schema as referenced_schema_id,
            dependent_class.name as dependent_name,
            dependent_class.schema as dependent_schema_id,
            referenced.kind as kind
        from referenced
        join dependency on referenced.id=dependency.id
        join class as dependent_class on dependency.ref=dependent_class.id
        where
            (referenced.name != dependent_class.name or
             referenced.schema != dependent_class.schema)
    )

    select
        referenced_schema.name as referenced_schema,
        relationships.referenced_name as referenced_name,
        dependent_schema.name as dependent_schema,
        relationships.dependent_name as dependent_name
    from relationships
    join schema as dependent_schema on relationships.dependent_schema_id=dependent_schema.id
    join schema as referenced_schema on relationships.referenced_schema_id=referenced_schema.id
    group by referenced_schema, referenced_name, dependent_schema, dependent_name
    order by referenced_schema, referenced_name, dependent_schema, dependent_name;

  {%- endcall -%}

  {{ return(load_result('relations').table) }}
{% endmacro %}

macro.dbt.default__snapshot_staging_tabl.name: default__snapshot_staging_table
macro.dbt.default__snapshot_staging_tabl.macro_sql:
{% macro default__snapshot_staging_table(strategy, source_sql, target_relation) -%}

    with snapshot_query as (

        {{ source_sql }}

    ),

    snapshotted_data as (

        select *,
            {{ strategy.unique_key }} as dbt_unique_key

        from {{ target_relation }}
        where dbt_valid_to is null

    ),

    insertions_source_data as (

        select
            *,
            {{ strategy.unique_key }} as dbt_unique_key,
            {{ strategy.updated_at }} as dbt_updated_at,
            {{ strategy.updated_at }} as dbt_valid_from,
            nullif({{ strategy.updated_at }}, {{ strategy.updated_at }}) as dbt_valid_to,
            {{ strategy.scd_id }} as dbt_scd_id

        from snapshot_query
    ),

    updates_source_data as (

        select
            *,
            {{ strategy.unique_key }} as dbt_unique_key,
            {{ strategy.updated_at }} as dbt_updated_at,
            {{ strategy.updated_at }} as dbt_valid_from,
            {{ strategy.updated_at }} as dbt_valid_to

        from snapshot_query
    ),

    {%- if strategy.invalidate_hard_deletes %}

    deletes_source_data as (

        select
            *,
            {{ strategy.unique_key }} as dbt_unique_key
        from snapshot_query
    ),
    {% endif %}

    insertions as (

        select
            'insert' as dbt_change_type,
            source_data.*

        from insertions_source_data as source_data
        left outer join snapshotted_data on snapshotted_data.dbt_unique_key = source_data.dbt_unique_key
        where snapshotted_data.dbt_unique_key is null
           or (
                snapshotted_data.dbt_unique_key is not null
            and (
                {{ strategy.row_changed }}
            )
        )

    ),

    updates as (

        select
            'update' as dbt_change_type,
            source_data.*,
            snapshotted_data.dbt_scd_id

        from updates_source_data as source_data
        join snapshotted_data on snapshotted_data.dbt_unique_key = source_data.dbt_unique_key
        where (
            {{ strategy.row_changed }}
        )
    )

    {%- if strategy.invalidate_hard_deletes -%}
    ,

    deletes as (

        select
            'delete' as dbt_change_type,
            source_data.*,
            {{ snapshot_get_time() }} as dbt_valid_from,
            {{ snapshot_get_time() }} as dbt_updated_at,
            {{ snapshot_get_time() }} as dbt_valid_to,
            snapshotted_data.dbt_scd_id

        from snapshotted_data
        left join deletes_source_data as source_data on snapshotted_data.dbt_unique_key = source_data.dbt_unique_key
        where source_data.dbt_unique_key is null
    )
    {%- endif %}

    select * from insertions
    union all
    select * from updates
    {%- if strategy.invalidate_hard_deletes %}
    union all
    select * from deletes
    {%- endif %}

{%- endmacro %}

macro.dbt.snapshot_merge_sql.name: snapshot_merge_sql

macro.dbt.default__snapshot_merge_sql.name: default__snapshot_merge_sql
macro.dbt.default__snapshot_merge_sql.macro_sql:
{% macro default__snapshot_merge_sql(target, source, insert_cols) -%}
    {%- set insert_cols_csv = insert_cols | join(', ') -%}

    merge into {{ target }} as DBT_INTERNAL_DEST
    using {{ source }} as DBT_INTERNAL_SOURCE
    on DBT_INTERNAL_SOURCE.dbt_scd_id = DBT_INTERNAL_DEST.dbt_scd_id

    when matched
     and DBT_INTERNAL_DEST.dbt_valid_to is null
     and DBT_INTERNAL_SOURCE.dbt_change_type in ('update', 'delete')
        then update
        set dbt_valid_to = DBT_INTERNAL_SOURCE.dbt_valid_to

    when not matched
     and DBT_INTERNAL_SOURCE.dbt_change_type = 'insert'
        then insert ({{ insert_cols_csv }})
        values ({{ insert_cols_csv }})

{% endmacro %}

any dependencies to make conflicts worse!

Date: 2023-04-28

macro.dbt_artifacts.migrate_from_v0_to_v.name: migrate_from_v0_to_v1
macro.dbt_artifacts.migrate_from_v0_to_v.macro_sql:
{%- macro migrate_from_v0_to_v1(old_database, old_schema, new_database, new_schema) -%}

    {% set migrate_model_executions %}
        insert into {{new_database}}.{{new_schema}}.model_executions (
            command_invocation_id,
            compile_started_at,
            materialization,
            name,
            node_id,
            query_completed_at,
            rows_affected,
            schema,
            status,
            thread_id,
            total_node_runtime,
            was_full_refresh,
            run_started_at
        )
        select
            command_invocation_id,
            compile_started_at,
            model_materialization,
            name,
            node_id,
            query_completed_at,
            rows_affected,
            model_schema,
            status,
            thread_id,
            total_node_runtime,
            was_full_refresh,
            artifact_generated_at
        from {{old_database}}.{{old_schema}}.fct_dbt__model_executions
    {% endset %}

    {{ log("Migrating model_executions", info=True) }}
    {%- call statement(auto_begin=True) -%}
        {{ migrate_model_executions }}
    {%- endcall -%}

    {% set migrate_tests %}
        insert into {{new_database}}.{{new_schema}}.tests (
            command_invocation_id,
            depends_on_nodes,
            name,
            node_id,
            package_name,
            tags,
            test_path,
            run_started_at
        )
        select
            command_invocation_id,
            depends_on_nodes,
            name,
            node_id,
            package_name,
            [],
            test_path,
            artifact_generated_at
        from {{old_database}}.{{old_schema}}.dim_dbt__tests
    {% endset %}

    {{ log("Migrating tests", info=True) }}
    {%- call statement(auto_begin=True) -%}
        {{ migrate_tests }}
    {%- endcall -%}

    {% set migrate_test_executions %}
        insert into {{new_database}}.{{new_schema}}.test_executions (
            command_invocation_id,
            compile_started_at,
            failures,
            node_id,
            query_completed_at,
            rows_affected,
            status,
            thread_id,
            total_node_runtime,
            was_full_refresh,
            run_started_at
        )
        select
            command_invocation_id,
            compile_started_at,
            null,
            node_id,
            query_completed_at,
            rows_affected,
            status,
            thread_id,
            total_node_runtime,
            was_full_refresh,
            artifact_generated_at
        from {{old_database}}.{{old_schema}}.fct_dbt__test_executions
    {% endset %}

    {{ log("Migrating test_executions", info=True) }}
    {%- call statement(auto_begin=True) -%}
        {{ migrate_test_executions }}
    {%- endcall -%}

    {% set migrate_models %}
        insert into {{new_database}}.{{new_schema}}.models (
            checksum,
            command_invocation_id,
            database,
            depends_on_nodes,
            materialization,
            name,
            node_id,
            package_name,
            path,
            schema,
            run_started_at
        )
        select
            checksum,
            command_invocation_id,
            model_database,
            depends_on_nodes,
            model_materialization,
            name,
            node_id,
            package_name,
            model_path,
            model_schema,
            artifact_generated_at
        from {{old_database}}.{{old_schema}}.dim_dbt__models
    {% endset %}

    {{ log("Migrating models", info=True) }}
    {%- call statement(auto_begin=True) -%}
        {{ migrate_models }}
    {%- endcall -%}

    {% set migrate_seeds %}
        insert into {{new_database}}.{{new_schema}}.seeds (
            checksum,
            command_invocation_id,
            database,
            name,
            node_id,
            package_name,
            path,
            schema,
            run_started_at
        )
        select
            checksum,
            command_invocation_id,
            seed_database,
            name,
            node_id,
            package_name,
            seed_path,
            seed_schema,
            artifact_generated_at
        from {{old_database}}.{{old_schema}}.dim_dbt__seeds
    {% endset %}

    {{ log("Migrating seeds", info=True) }}
    {%- call statement(auto_begin=True) -%}
        {{ migrate_seeds }}
    {%- endcall -%}

    {% set migrate_seed_executions %}
        insert into {{new_database}}.{{new_schema}}.seed_executions (
            command_invocation_id,
            compile_started_at,
            materialization,
            name,
            node_id,
            query_completed_at,
            rows_affected,
            schema,
            status,
            thread_id,
            total_node_runtime,
            was_full_refresh,
            run_started_at
        )
        select
            command_invocation_id,
            compile_started_at,
            'seed',
            name,
            node_id,
            query_completed_at,
            rows_affected,
            seed_schema,
            status,
            thread_id,
            total_node_runtime,
            was_full_refresh,
            artifact_generated_at
        from {{old_database}}.{{old_schema}}.fct_dbt__seed_executions
    {% endset %}

    {{ log("Migrating seed_executions", info=True) }}
    {%- call statement(auto_begin=True) -%}
        {{ migrate_seed_executions }}
    {%- endcall -%}

    {% set migrate_exposures %}
        insert into {{new_database}}.{{new_schema}}.exposures (
            command_invocation_id,
            depends_on_nodes,
            description,
            maturity,
            name,
            node_id,
            owner,
            package_name,
            path,
            type,
            url,
            run_started_at
        )
        select
            command_invocation_id,
            array_agg(output_feeds), {#- Here we un-flatten the transformation originally done -#}
            null,
            any_value(maturity) as maturity,
            name,
            node_id,
            null, {#- v0 is a string, v1 is a variant -#}
            any_value(package_name) as package_name,
            null,
            any_value(type) as type,
            null,
            any_value(artifact_generated_at) as artifact_generated_at
        from {{old_database}}.{{old_schema}}.dim_dbt__exposures
        group by command_invocation_id, node_id, name, artifact_generated_at
    {% endset %}

    {{ log("Migrating exposures", info=True) }}
    {%- call statement(auto_begin=True) -%}
        {{ migrate_exposures }}
    {%- endcall -%}

    {% set migrate_snapshots %}
        insert into {{new_database}}.{{new_schema}}.snapshots (
            checksum,
            command_invocation_id,
            database,
            depends_on_nodes,
            name,
            node_id,
            package_name,
            path,
            schema,
            strategy,
            run_started_at
        )
        select
            checksum,
            command_invocation_id,
            snapshot_database,
            depends_on_nodes,
            name,
            node_id,
            package_name,
            snapshot_path,
            snapshot_schema,
            null,
            artifact_generated_at
        from {{old_database}}.{{old_schema}}.dim_dbt__snapshots
    {% endset %}

    {{ log("Migrating snapshots", info=True) }}
    {%- call statement(auto_begin=True) -%}
        {{ migrate_snapshots }}
    {%- endcall -%}

    {% set migrate_snapshot_executions %}
        insert into {{new_database}}.{{new_schema}}.snapshot_executions (
            command_invocation_id,
            compile_started_at,
            materialization,
            name,
            node_id,
            query_completed_at,
            rows_affected,
            schema,
            status,
            thread_id,
            total_node_runtime,
            was_full_refresh,
            run_started_at
        )
        select
            command_invocation_id,
            compile_started_at,
            'snapshot',
            name,
            node_id,
            query_completed_at,
            rows_affected,
            snapshot_schema,
            status,
            thread_id,
            total_node_runtime,
            was_full_refresh,
            artifact_generated_at
        from {{old_database}}.{{old_schema}}.fct_dbt__snapshot_executions
    {% endset %}

    {{ log("Migrating snapshot_executions", info=True) }}
    {%- call statement(auto_begin=True) -%}
        {{ migrate_snapshot_executions }}
    {%- endcall -%}

    {% set migrate_sources %}
        insert into {{new_database}}.{{new_schema}}.sources (
            command_invocation_id,
            database,
            freshness,
            identifier,
            loaded_at_field,
            loader,
            name,
            node_id,
            schema,
            source_name,
            run_started_at
        )
        select
            command_invocation_id,
            node_database,
            parse_json('[{"error_after":{"count":null,"period":null},"filter":null,"warn_after":{"count":null,"period":null}}]'),
            name,
            null,
            source_loader,
            name,
            node_id,
            source_schema,
            source_name,
            artifact_generated_at
        from {{old_database}}.{{old_schema}}.dim_dbt__sources
    {% endset %}

    {{ log("Migrating sources", info=True) }}
    {%- call statement(auto_begin=True) -%}
        {{ migrate_sources }}
    {%- endcall -%}

    {{ log("Migration complete. You can now safely delete any data from before 1.0.0", info=True) }}
{%- endmacro -%}
macro.dbt_artifacts.migrate_from_v0_to_v.description:
A macro to assist with migrating from v0 to v1 of dbt_artifacts. See
https://github.com/brooklyn-data/dbt_artifacts/blob/main/README.md#migrating-from-100-to-100
for details on the usage.

arguments.name: old_database
arguments.description: The database of the <1.0.0 output (fct_/dim_) models - does not have to be different to `new_database`

arguments.name: old_schema
arguments.description: The schema of the <1.0.0 output (fct_/dim_) models - does not have to be different to `new_schema`

arguments.name: new_database
arguments.description: The target database that the v1 artifact sources are in - does not have to be different to `old_database`

arguments.name: new_schema
arguments.description: The target schema that the v1 artifact sources are in - does not have to be different to `old_schema`

doc.dbt.__overview__.name: __overview__
doc.dbt.__overview__.block_contents:
### Welcome!

Welcome to the auto-generated documentation for your dbt project!

### Navigation

You can use the `Project` and `Database` navigation tabs on the left side of the window to explore the models
in your project.

#### Project Tab
The `Project` tab mirrors the directory structure of your dbt project. In this tab, you can see all of the
models defined in your dbt project, as well as models imported from dbt packages.

#### Database Tab
The `Database` tab also exposes your models, but in a format that looks more like a database explorer. This view
shows relations (tables and views) grouped into database schemas. Note that ephemeral models are _not_ shown
in this interface, as they do not exist in the database.

### Graph Exploration
You can click the blue icon on the bottom-right corner of the page to view the lineage graph of your models.

On model pages, you'll see the immediate parents and children of the model you're exploring. By clicking the `Expand`
button at the top-right of this lineage pane, you'll be able to see all of the models that are used to build,
or are built from, the model you're exploring.

Once expanded, you'll be able to use the `--select` and `--exclude` model selection syntax to filter the
models in the graph. For more information on model selection, check out the [dbt docs](https://docs.getdbt.com/docs/model-selection-syntax).

Note that you can also right-click on models to interactively filter and explore the graph.

---

### More information

- [What is dbt](https://docs.getdbt.com/docs/introduction)?
- Read the [dbt viewpoint](https://docs.getdbt.com/docs/viewpoint)
- [Installation](https://docs.getdbt.com/docs/installation)
- Join the [dbt Community](https://www.getdbt.com/community/) for questions and discussion

doc.dbt_artifacts.command_invocation_id.name: command_invocation_id
doc.dbt_artifacts.command_invocation_id.block_contents: The invocation_id is a UUID generated by dbt for each invocation. It can be used to link records which were generated by the same dbt invocation.

doc.dbt_artifacts.strategy.block_contents:
Snapshot "strategies" define how dbt knows if a row has changed. There are two strategies built-in to dbt — timestamp
and check.
